Name: Fran's Café
Address: Av. Jamaris, 100 - Torre 1 - Indianópolis, São Paulo
Author: Mike G
Review: The manager tried to overcharge me for a coffee with milk (a price that wasn't even listed on the menu).

Name: Fran's Café
Address: Av. Jamaris, 100 - Torre 1 - Indianópolis, São Paulo
Author: Flavio Gilberti
Review: Great in almost every detail, staff, food, coffe, etc... The only exception is for the bathroom who was a little bit dirty. But even with that problem  I had a great break time

Name: Fran's Café
Address: Av. Jamaris, 100 - Torre 1 - Indianópolis, São Paulo
Author: Justin Newsome
Review: Owner spoke English. WiFi available. good food and friendly service. and very near our hotel. A place to unwind during an exciting trip.

Name: Fran's Café
Address: Av. Jamaris, 100 - Torre 1 - Indianópolis, São Paulo
Author: Divy Pande
Review: Great coffee, good service and perfect ambience.. Good luck team you Rock!!!

Name: Fran's Café
Address: Av. Jamaris, 100 - Torre 1 - Indianópolis, São Paulo
Author: valter cunha
Review: Good place for quick meals but prices aren't that attractive.

Name: Café Creme
Address: Av. Paulista, 807 - Loja 07, esquina - Bela Vista, São Paulo
Author: Sacha Paquet
Review:
The atmosphere was great, right on the corner of Paulista Boulevard. Lots of tables on the patio with good vibes.
We were greated very nicely and politely to our patio table. The service the waters were offering was exceptional.
The food was very basic in taste and quality. Everything tasted like frozen food … we had a burger and fries… it was just Ok!
Was hoping for better but the food left me disappointed and indifferent.

Name: Café Creme
Address: Av. Paulista, 807 - Loja 07, esquina - Bela Vista, São Paulo
Author: Tomas Sikola
Review:
The service is pretty good and so is the atmosphere as they have live music on most nights.

Burgers, unfortunately, are sub-par so I would encourage you guys eat elsewhere before coming here.

Name: Café Creme
Address: Av. Paulista, 807 - Loja 07, esquina - Bela Vista, São Paulo
Author: Calvin Dart
Review: I think the food is great here. The menu actually has nice big salads, which can be hard to find in Brazil. There are pastas, meats, and sandwiches on the menu too. The beer is always very cold and I had one of the best lemonades of my life here.

Name: Café Creme
Address: Av. Paulista, 807 - Loja 07, esquina - Bela Vista, São Paulo
Author: James Bonin
Review: This is an OK place to try some standard São Paulo fare. Caipirinha Was a bit weak in my opinion, but as you can see from the picture the dishes are pretty substantial. Probably 100 places like this in São Paulo but if you’re in the neighborhood not a bad choice

Name: Café Creme
Address: Av. Paulista, 807 - Loja 07, esquina - Bela Vista, São Paulo
Author: David S
Review: Good outdoor seating. Can’t really comment much about the food as I didn’t order much

Name: Porto Café & Co
Address: R. João Boemer, 167 - Brás, São Paulo
Author: Yair Barouch
Review: Best place I've ever eaten breakfast in. Service was incredible

Name: Porto Café & Co
Address: R. João Boemer, 167 - Brás, São Paulo
Author: Abigail Williams
Review: Lovely Food, natural food ❤️🙌workers respectful and friendly, Treats you like family.

Name: Porto Café & Co
Address: R. João Boemer, 167 - Brás, São Paulo
Author: Marcio Marques
Review: Top

Name: Porto Café & Co
Address: R. João Boemer, 167 - Brás, São Paulo
Author: Denia Renata Da Silva
Review: Top

Name: Porto Café & Co
Address: R. João Boemer, 167 - Brás, São Paulo
Author: Roberta Almeida Soares
Review: Well

Name: Cafe Na Lata
Address: Alameda Arapoema, 392 - Tamboré, Barueri
Author: Robson Moreira Silva
Review: Nice place

Name: Cafe Na Lata
Address: Alameda Arapoema, 392 - Tamboré, Barueri
Author: Marcelo Sumarán
Review:
O Café na Lata é uma inteligente integração com o estacionamento onde está localizado. É possível usar uma vaga sem custo se você vai apenas para tomar o café da manhã lá. Não sei se também vale para almoço e outras refeições.
O serviço é normal, faça seu pedido no balcão e as atendentes levam na mesa. As diversas opções de salgados e doces complementam as bebidas quentes bem preparadas. Sanduíches de recheios populares bem servidos ou para levar.
Uma decoração com boas intenções, marcando a liderança feminina na gestão do café. Porém com o tempo e a intempérie as figuras vão ficando deterioradas.
Todas as mesas estão ao tempo, para aproveitar muito nos dias de bom clima. Tem uma pequena área coberta para os dias de chuva.
Excelente horário de atendimento para ir lá bem cedo, antes de entrar no expediente.

Name: Cafe Na Lata
Address: Alameda Arapoema, 392 - Tamboré, Barueri
Author: Alex Ctp
Review:
Café na lata sempre foi e é uma ótima opção as pessoas que vivem da correria pela manhã e hora do almoço. Porém peço atenção dos donos. Não deixem de focar na qualidade.

Já pedi pão 🍞 na chapa pela manhã e fui servido com um pão gelado, literalmente gelado. Então se por algum momento a pessoa que está no balcão não se atentar e entregar um item a alguém que desistiu e o mesmo ficou no balcão. Imagino que seja falta de atenção da parte dos funcionários. Procurem focar no atendimento do índio ao fim. Apenas uma sugestão de melhoria, porquê gosto do local.
Estacionamento grátis.

Name: Cafe Na Lata
Address: Alameda Arapoema, 392 - Tamboré, Barueri
Author: Virginia Sousa
Review: O atendimento e muito bom a menina são super atenciosas e espaço e bacana e e limpinho

Name: Cafe Na Lata
Address: Alameda Arapoema, 392 - Tamboré, Barueri
Author: Fran Ferreira
Review: Atendimento foi bom. Pão de queijo razoável. Café gostoso. É tipo um contêiner.  Fica dentro de um estacionamento. Atende bem a região que é "pobres"  de cafés. A única  sugestão é deixar o local um pouco menos poluído pois tem muita informação muito cartaz o que confunde na hora de pedir. Também limpar as mesas pois estavam bem sujas e entre um cliente e outro  não foram limpas.

Name: Sampa Café
Address: R. Napoleão de Barros, 715 - Vila Clementino, São Paulo
Author: Simone Luiz da silva
Review:
Fiquei no hospital 24 hr e comprei várias vezes.
Em duas delas, deixei de comprar pq não tinham 1 real para me dar de troco. A senhora do caixa,  mal educada por sinal, preferiu perder 20  do que descontar 1. Levando em consideração que eu já havia gasto bastante lá.

Name: Sampa Café
Address: R. Napoleão de Barros, 715 - Vila Clementino, São Paulo
Author: Alda rodrigues gois Aldinha
Review:
Estou aqui no hospital fui mal atendido, as funcionárias dá noite só fica no celular.
Fui pedir um café, só porque eu estava de chinelo ela falou que tinha que passar o cartão pra vê se eu tinha dinheiro.

Name: Sampa Café
Address: R. Napoleão de Barros, 715 - Vila Clementino, São Paulo
Author: GIO MASTROBUONO
Review: LOCAL AGRADÁVEL, SERVEM BONS SALGADOS E DOCES, ATENDIMENTO FOI RÁPIDO, CAFE DA MANHÃ, LOCALIZADO NO HOSPITAL SÃO PAULO  RECOMENDO.

Name: Sampa Café
Address: R. Napoleão de Barros, 715 - Vila Clementino, São Paulo
Author: Vagner Cavalcante de Oliveira
Review: Eu gosto , Muito lanchonete , Sampa café ótimo , atendimento e Salgados , eu recomendo , ótimo atendimento .

Name: Sampa Café
Address: R. Napoleão de Barros, 715 - Vila Clementino, São Paulo
Author: Paulo Sérgio Pereira
Review: Gosto muito dos salgados, principalmente das tortinhas! E agora em novas instalações ficou mais confortável!

Name: Café Jaú
Address: Rua - Alameda Jaú, 1795 A - Cerqueira César, São Paulo
Author: Zuriel Daher
Review: The first time I came to this restaurant was 7 years ago and the results to our finding was good. At the time we were trying to familiarize locations on the streets outside Paulista. They have outdoor and indoor seating in this location. I came to this restaurant 3 times recently, twice during the week of April 10-16. And one takeout order during the week 17-23. I may want to point out that by ordering their executive plates rice feijao and meat options, they serve you enough food to be stuffed. and they have other plate servings that are not executive which gives decent amount of food. Which in turn we did and they did a good job at it. This Lanchonete has a large variety of alcoholic beverages to choose from. I also see posted against the wall list of fresh fruit drinks where you may not find close to the area, and I believe one or two of those drinks posted are considered energy drinks probably. Maybe if somebody around area went jogging 🏃‍♂️ they could stop by here and have a drink. They have pretty good French fries here. In ordering a sandwich from this location to be honest, may not give you enough quantity meat of ham or presunto like other padarias in  La Bella or Galeria dos Pao’s do. For just a snack it’s good. Their are some things this Lanchonete does not have like other Padarias do have, for example: they don’t sell bread or have pastry treat desserts on display etc.. This location is good to buy a drink while watching a football match.

Name: Café Jaú
Address: Rua - Alameda Jaú, 1795 A - Cerqueira César, São Paulo
Author: Luciano Holanda Gomes
Review: The best cost-benefit one can find in the region! This place is simply marvelous. The food is good and the price is simply unbeatable.

Name: Café Jaú
Address: Rua - Alameda Jaú, 1795 A - Cerqueira César, São Paulo
Author: Moshe Teutsch
Review: Definitely not a breakfast restaurant, scrambled eggs look nasty and the salad was not what I consider a salad.

Name: Café Jaú
Address: Rua - Alameda Jaú, 1795 A - Cerqueira César, São Paulo
Author: Amparo Sanchez Olivera
Review: Great portions, taste and drinks for lunch or dinner

Name: Café Jaú
Address: Rua - Alameda Jaú, 1795 A - Cerqueira César, São Paulo
Author: Franco Cavalcanti
Review: Good food. Simple and the portions are huge.

Name: café zinn
Address: Rua Haddock Lobo, 1574 - Cerqueira César, São Paulo
Author: Ilia “soregashi” Temelkov
Review: The food was very tasty, the coffee was amazing and the service was friendly and quick. They made a mistake with my order and fixed without any fuss. But above all, the cappuccino cups are gorgeous

Name: café zinn
Address: Rua Haddock Lobo, 1574 - Cerqueira César, São Paulo
Author: David Hämmerli (David H.)
Review: Ever heard the phrase—food's only half the experience; service matters too? 🌟 Well, during our breakfast-turned-lunch at this cafe, slow service proved it right. The staff couldn't seem less interested 😴. Yes, the food and cappuccinos were good 🍳☕, but the long wait times—1 hour for food, 1.15 hours for drinks—make it a place to avoid 🛑.

Name: café zinn
Address: Rua Haddock Lobo, 1574 - Cerqueira César, São Paulo
Author: Henrique Guimaraes
Review:
I loved the service! The food is really amazing.
The new way of pay is awesome! Loved the experience. Bruna and Victor are so great with us!

Name: café zinn
Address: Rua Haddock Lobo, 1574 - Cerqueira César, São Paulo
Author: Francisco Roda
Review: Service was fast, the environment was very modern and the food tasted good and healthy. Great place to brunch or have coffee if you are around Oscar Freire.

Name: café zinn
Address: Rua Haddock Lobo, 1574 - Cerqueira César, São Paulo
Author: Dil Ribeiro
Review: Excellent place, very cozy and friendly! If you want to try something different go for Chai with Coffee and don’t forget to grab the chocolate cake or even the apple one, they’re both delicious!!!

Name: Urbe Cafe Bar
Address: R. Antônio Carlos, 404 - Consolação, São Paulo
Author: Laura Kurtzberg
Review: My favorite hipster coffee place in São Paulo! The coffee and tea options are stellar but what really brings it home is the great food! I recommend the mandiocinha soup because it's awesome.

Name: Urbe Cafe Bar
Address: R. Antônio Carlos, 404 - Consolação, São Paulo
Author: Winicius Feitosa
Review: Amazing Coffee Place - Temperature came perfect, very well served, snacks and cakes insanely good, distinct and casual ambience! Fast and well located! Totally recommended!

Name: Urbe Cafe Bar
Address: R. Antônio Carlos, 404 - Consolação, São Paulo
Author: Ben Hurley Scarbro
Review: Great spot. Good food, nice service, and good location if you're wandering north of Paraíso.  We paired breakfast/brunch here with a day at the Museum of Art and Trianon Park nearby.  BUt you could just simply enjoy a morning/afternoon here. Highly Recommend.

Name: Urbe Cafe Bar
Address: R. Antônio Carlos, 404 - Consolação, São Paulo
Author: Sérgio Dantas
Review: Nice environment. Friendly staff. The menu has some interesting options like Jackfruit snacks and different combinations of tea and sandwiches with many vegan choices. The place is a bit noisy but still, very pleasant. Recommended!

Name: Urbe Cafe Bar
Address: R. Antônio Carlos, 404 - Consolação, São Paulo
Author: Rachel B
Review:
Really beautiful coffee shop with quality coffee. I really enjoyed my Irish coffee here, as well as the cappuccino my girlfriend got. Both were delicious.

Love the atmosphere in here. There’s a loft area upstairs with seating, where you can overlook the entirety of the shop. The place is very urban and full of plants, giving a beautiful, green and natural vibe to it all.

Prices were reasonable to me, at least as far as drinks go.

Would definitely return here to enjoy again!

#urbe #urbecafebar #café #coffee #sãopaulo #sampa

Name: Cafe Fiorenza
Address: R. do Alacrán, 182 - Jardim Nice, São Paulo
Author: Luciano Braga
Review: Cadmm

Name: Cafe Fiorenza
Address: R. do Alacrán, 182 - Jardim Nice, São Paulo
Author: Manoelsomar Somar
Review: Os atendentes são educados, está um pouco mais rápido.os preços em alguns produtos não compensa ,está igual as vezes até mais, que em redes menores que a receita.

Name: Cafe Fiorenza
Address: R. do Alacrán, 182 - Jardim Nice, São Paulo
Author: Heidy Caroline
Review: Era uma fábrica de café, não sei se ainda está ativa.

Name: Cafe Fiorenza
Address: R. do Alacrán, 182 - Jardim Nice, São Paulo
Author: Alexandre Da Silva
Review: Excelente localização ótimo café

Name: Cafe Fiorenza
Address: R. do Alacrán, 182 - Jardim Nice, São Paulo
Author: Gustavo Lucas
Review: Muito bom café

Name: Fran's Café Origem
Address: Praça Benedito Calixto, 191 - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: Leonard
Review:
Open 24 hours which is so nice.
Also the place is really clean and feels upscale. I wish they had decaf coffee though. I also think the prices are a bit high. More than 40 reais ($8) for tea, egg, and croissant.

I ordered the croissant and Mexico scrabble eggs and a pineapple, cinnamon, lime tea.  All was good. Service was super helpful and chill.

Name: Fran's Café Origem
Address: Praça Benedito Calixto, 191 - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: Roman
Review: Tasty and amazing murals very near from Kobra

Name: Fran's Café Origem
Address: Praça Benedito Calixto, 191 - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: howard rosenthal
Review: Very nice place,Coffee was excellent and so was the juice/sandwich and very good service.i'll be back !!!.

Name: Fran's Café Origem
Address: Praça Benedito Calixto, 191 - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: brian collins
Review: Coffee, simple scrambled eggs, poorly toasted baguette. R$33.00

Name: Fran's Café Origem
Address: Praça Benedito Calixto, 191 - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: Bomin Lee

Name: Fran's Café
Address: R. Cubatão, 1111 - Vila Mariana, São Paulo
Author: Alexandre Presoto
Review: Nice place. Open 24/7. Good snacks and a variety off coffees hot or frozen. A point to finish the night.

Name: Fran's Café
Address: R. Cubatão, 1111 - Vila Mariana, São Paulo
Author: Pepê p
Review: Good service, all look clean and good, also the toilets. .

Name: Fran's Café
Address: R. Cubatão, 1111 - Vila Mariana, São Paulo
Author: Eric Shee Wah Chang
Review: Expensive and menu very small.

Name: Fran's Café
Address: R. Cubatão, 1111 - Vila Mariana, São Paulo
Author: Luis Bin Ron Ie
Review: Cozy place. Good attendants.

Name: Fran's Café
Address: R. Cubatão, 1111 - Vila Mariana, São Paulo
Author: Adriano Marques
Review: A great place for coffee and snacks

Name: HM Food Café
Address: R. Teodoro Sampaio, 1027 - 1º andar - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: jssk
Review: Great atmosphere, spacious with a lot of sun, plants and light. I went on a Saturday afternoon but it wasn’t crowded. Had coffee, tea and a muffin, all good. Would come again!

Name: HM Food Café
Address: R. Teodoro Sampaio, 1027 - 1º andar - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: Pictures
Review: Incredible food. Stroganoff, coffee, blueberry muffin, and mushroom toast were all so DELICIOUS. The food came out incredibly fast. Servers are very kind and so is the manager/owner who offered us to try some of their fresh cheese bread. Wifi is fast here and it’s a very calm environment to get some work done in. I’ve been traveling for two months in Colombia, peru, Bolivia and Argentina, and this is the best meal I’ve had.

Name: HM Food Café
Address: R. Teodoro Sampaio, 1027 - 1º andar - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: Rohan
Review: Came here to grab a drink and a snack while I did some work. This place did not disappoint. The staff were very friendly and accommodating. The internet was fast and environment was conducive to getting some work done. Food and coffee were good (although not an expert at coffee). It's on the second floor above a collection of stores so a bit hidden but nice and open area. Will definitely return.

Name: HM Food Café
Address: R. Teodoro Sampaio, 1027 - 1º andar - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: Javier Rebagliati Bouby
Review: The environment feels nice, though a bit bare. It feels like a regular vegan/vegetarian/healthy food café which I usually don’t like because of my limited taste in food. The plates look very instagrammable. I got the Combinado, which was a coffee, a cup of orange juice, a fruit salad, and a avocado toast. The fruit salad came with a lot of things I particularly don’t like chia, granola, coconut flakes and milk. So I asked for everything on the side and they were very accommodating. Also, I didn’t know what was gonna come in the avocado toast besides the avocado. And of course there were things I didn’t like. I guess the advice here would be to check for what the menu says, if you’re getting a combo. Because the fruit salad was also not described completely. Other than that, the service was good and the food was good, too.

Name: HM Food Café
Address: R. Teodoro Sampaio, 1027 - 1º andar - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: Michelle Ong
Review: Excellent service! Don't underestimate the toast dishes. They are a full meal! I had the one with jamon paired with chilled white wine. Delicious!

Name: Botanikafé Butantã
Address: Av. Magalhães de Castro, 286 - Butantã, São Paulo
Author: Lucas Markarian
Review:
A “Rio de Janeiro” atmosphere in São Paulo. You can eat and enjoy friends under mango tree shadows while you watch people playing games in the sand arenas.
So close to Rio experience, service is a bit messy too. A teenager and friendly staff try to keep everything running. But reservations, orders, sometimes can be confused and delay.
I was very excited with the food descriptions in the menu and pictures in reviews. But taste is quite average and turns pricy when you check the bill.
The place is dog friendly!
Concluding, is a cool place to enjoy with friends and see well-born people surround.

Name: Botanikafé Butantã
Address: Av. Magalhães de Castro, 286 - Butantã, São Paulo
Author: Mike Liaw
Review:
The place is really amazing with plenty of space for pets.
Dishes are quite small for what's charged... But they are quite tasty!

Name: Botanikafé Butantã
Address: Av. Magalhães de Castro, 286 - Butantã, São Paulo
Author: Gabriela Oliveira
Review:
Nice vibes and outdoor space. Very kind and efficient staff. The menu is very inclusive towards vegetarians and vegans, good seasoning and the beverages are decent.

Only thing I would recommend is developing the ozzy break, the salmon could be better.

Name: Botanikafé Butantã
Address: Av. Magalhães de Castro, 286 - Butantã, São Paulo
Author: Bernardo Barros Franco
Review:
Excellent brunch for a sunny Sunday. In the back of the restaurant there are beach tennis courts and lounges you can rent for a beach like experience in the heart of SP.
There are groups of people crossfitting in the back too.. there is a charm in eating some benedicts, drinking a macchiato and drinking coconut water while people exercise.

Name: Botanikafé Butantã
Address: Av. Magalhães de Castro, 286 - Butantã, São Paulo
Author: 300 feet above
Review: Great atmosphere and crowd. WiFi is super fast too. Food is quite good - coffee not so much. Keep in mind it is very loud from the freeway and the other road outside. Great place for a sunny day!

Name: IL BARISTA CAFÉS ESPECIAIS | VILA NOVA : Casa, Torrefação e Escola do Café
Address: R. Consórcio, 191 - Vila Nova Conceição, São Paulo
Author: Neville Lee
Review: I came here on a Sunday afternoon with a friend for breakfast. The staff was knowledgeable of the menu and attentive. This location has wifi but no outlets at the tables if you plan to bring your laptop for an extended period of time. There is outdoor seating in the front and side as well as indoor seating. I ordered the French press which was enough for 2 small cups of coffee. They have a wide variety of beans. I recommend “blue”. Overall it was a pleasant experience. You won’t be disappointed!

Name: IL BARISTA CAFÉS ESPECIAIS | VILA NOVA : Casa, Torrefação e Escola do Café
Address: R. Consórcio, 191 - Vila Nova Conceição, São Paulo
Author: Lucas Markarian
Review: Nice variety of coffees well prepared. Cozy atmosphere and friendly staff. A bit pricy.

Name: IL BARISTA CAFÉS ESPECIAIS | VILA NOVA : Casa, Torrefação e Escola do Café
Address: R. Consórcio, 191 - Vila Nova Conceição, São Paulo
Author: Svetlana R
Review: Wide choice of coffee and great service! We got a detailed explanation in English about different types of coffee and were offered to try several espressos. Barista provided us an exceptional hospitality!

Name: IL BARISTA CAFÉS ESPECIAIS | VILA NOVA : Casa, Torrefação e Escola do Café
Address: R. Consórcio, 191 - Vila Nova Conceição, São Paulo
Author: KAEUL LEE
Review: Nice coffee shop with a variety of menu to choose from along with very helpful staffs!

Name: IL BARISTA CAFÉS ESPECIAIS | VILA NOVA : Casa, Torrefação e Escola do Café
Address: R. Consórcio, 191 - Vila Nova Conceição, São Paulo
Author: Walid Nabhane
Review: Excellent coffee place and very cozy. The barista there is very nice and takes his time to explain everything. Very friendly people. Could be the best coffee I will drink on this trip to Brazil.

Name: Fran's Café Tamandaré
Address: Rua Tamandaré, 744 - Liberdade, São Paulo
Author: Monzer Osama
Review: Great coffee taste, but not hot enough

Name: Fran's Café Tamandaré
Address: Rua Tamandaré, 744 - Liberdade, São Paulo
Author: David Tidbury
Review: The workers are miserable!! And not very friendly.

Name: Fran's Café Tamandaré
Address: Rua Tamandaré, 744 - Liberdade, São Paulo
Author: Peter Hauer
Review: Good coffee, good WiFi, friendly

Name: Fran's Café Tamandaré
Address: Rua Tamandaré, 744 - Liberdade, São Paulo
Author: Tinytree Ryan
Review: Good to have a cup of coffee

Name: Fran's Café Tamandaré
Address: Rua Tamandaré, 744 - Liberdade, São Paulo
Author: Pamela Santos
Review: Top

Name: Kofi & Co - Café e Brunch
Address: Rua Alexandre Dumas, 1518 - Chácara Santo Antônio (Zona Sul), São Paulo
Author: Joshua “Jelser96” Elser
Review: This restaurant is fantastic, it's cute and it's cozy. I don't speak a lick of Portuguese but the servers were patient with me Google translating everything, the food was tremendous and I will be going back

Name: Kofi & Co - Café e Brunch
Address: Rua Alexandre Dumas, 1518 - Chácara Santo Antônio (Zona Sul), São Paulo
Author: Prafan Adriana
Review: Best breakfast/brunch food we had in Sao Paolo. The place is really nice and cosy and the food is amazing! Lots of healthy options, great service (although they don't speak English). Not cheap, but totally worths the visit.

Name: Kofi & Co - Café e Brunch
Address: Rua Alexandre Dumas, 1518 - Chácara Santo Antônio (Zona Sul), São Paulo
Author: Octavio Gomez
Review: Not enough good things to say about Marcello’s hospitality and attention. He made sure that I felt comfortable and that I got the true Brazilian coffee shop experience. His suggestions were on point and the food and coffee was delicious! Highly recommend it!

Name: Kofi & Co - Café e Brunch
Address: Rua Alexandre Dumas, 1518 - Chácara Santo Antônio (Zona Sul), São Paulo
Author: Luísa Gomes
Review: Food is very good but brunch is overpriced. Service is not fast so save expect waiting for you food. Also the extra portion of Nutella sauce is too small for the pancakes.

Name: Kofi & Co - Café e Brunch
Address: Rua Alexandre Dumas, 1518 - Chácara Santo Antônio (Zona Sul), São Paulo
Author: Manuel G. Leon
Review: The food was espectacular, different and very well done. It's easy to see the dedication. But the cost benefit is not so good. So if you want to test new food this is the place but it is very hard to have a complete meal with a good price.

Name: Freak Café
Address: Av. Jurema, 359 - Moema, São Paulo
Author: Michael Mejeninov
Review: I loveed this coffee restaurant. Many options to choose something to eat. The coffee ☕ opens very early, this is something great. The atmosphere is pleasant. Something one that bothers me that the waiters don't speak English.

Name: Freak Café
Address: Av. Jurema, 359 - Moema, São Paulo
Author: Lindsay Castano
Review: What a hidden gem! The name may be odd but the food is delicious and fresh and the indoor-outdoor seating plentiful.

Name: Freak Café
Address: Av. Jurema, 359 - Moema, São Paulo
Author: Gary Monk
Review: Freakishly cool place!! I always feel well served here and it’s a lovely place with friendly staff and great food! Maybe a year ago I would not have been as favourable because I recall they spent most effort on takeaway orders and it did not feel so good, but that was then and it’s super cool now! (I try not to arrive too late on weekends as like anywhere good I guess it will be busy)

Name: Freak Café
Address: Av. Jurema, 359 - Moema, São Paulo
Author: Fábio Henrique Bittes Terra
Review: Their call is nice, but still there is a way to go. Food was good, but it took too long to arrive (and it isn’t a slow food place). Drinks as well took too long to arrive, and we saw them waiting after the kitchen finished them: thus they arrived only warm and not hot. Prices are fair. Another hint would be redesigning the menu, because theirs is fairly confusing. Sure the place will improve through time.

Name: Freak Café
Address: Av. Jurema, 359 - Moema, São Paulo
Author: Cello Ka
Review:
Beautiful live Jazz music on a sunny and warm Saturday.
Stopped by to have a coffee and waited 20min only to be told that they didn’t have any ice! A supermarket is literally only 50m away. At least the music was nice.

Name: Cá entre nós Café - Cafeteria em São Paulo
Address: R. Aurélia, 950 - Pompeia, São Paulo
Author: Sibonginkosi Nyathi
Review: The kitchen staff 👌 😍 is very good and the staff is friendly and helpful

Name: Cá entre nós Café - Cafeteria em São Paulo
Address: R. Aurélia, 950 - Pompeia, São Paulo
Author: Leonardo Santin
Review: Great coffee place

Name: Cá entre nós Café - Cafeteria em São Paulo
Address: R. Aurélia, 950 - Pompeia, São Paulo
Author: Andy Goto
Review: Local aconchegante com um ambiente bem intimista, o atendimento é bom feito pela proprietária. Os salgados são muito gostosos, o muffin de cenoura com especiarias é um show porém, o de banana com chocolate deixou um pouco a desejar, não encontrei o sabor da banana. No geral é um local que vale a visita!

Name: Cá entre nós Café - Cafeteria em São Paulo
Address: R. Aurélia, 950 - Pompeia, São Paulo
Author: Déborah Monaco
Review: Lugar gostoso, fica na esquina e tem bastante luz natural. A Gallete é deliciosa, com ctza os demais pratos devem ser muito bons. O chá gelado estava uma delícia. O atendimento é atencioso e bem discreto, dá para ficar por lá conversando, sozinho, lendo... é bem gostoso. Não é muito grande, acho que tem uma mesa só que cabe mais que 3 pessoas confortavelmente

Name: Cá entre nós Café - Cafeteria em São Paulo
Address: R. Aurélia, 950 - Pompeia, São Paulo
Author: Aleandra Vasconcelos
Review: Fomos para tomar café da manhã, o ambiente é super agradável, música boa e um ótimo atendimento. Pedimos diversos quitutes que estavam deliciosos, com certeza voltaremos mais vezes.

Name: Le Pain Quotidien
Address: R. Jacques Félix, 752 - Vila Nova Conceição, São Paulo
Author: Leonard
Review:
Such a great experience. Warm greeting on my arrival,  clean and aesthetic ambiance,  great food and drink options,  and wifi to work.

I puedes the vegan tabula which came with an assortment of bread, Nutella, eggs, fruits, yogurt, orange juice, and a hot drink (I picked tea). But the the dish had me very full. I exchanged some of the items for mom vegan versions without a problem too.

Excellent cafe and highly recommend. I just wish they had decaf like their stores in other countries.

Name: Le Pain Quotidien
Address: R. Jacques Félix, 752 - Vila Nova Conceição, São Paulo
Author: Matheus Moreira
Review: Healthy cuisine, cosy and pleasent place. The menu is out of the box and the desserts a doom. Don't go in a rush, the service is a little bit slow, but the employees will treat and serve you very well. We ordered a nice mandioquinha soup and a croquet monsieur. Everything was delightful.

Name: Le Pain Quotidien
Address: R. Jacques Félix, 752 - Vila Nova Conceição, São Paulo
Author: Isabela Toccheton
Review:
I go there literally every weekend!
My go-to brunch dish is the eggs with ham and emmenthal cheese, along with their coffee.

This time, I went in the late evening to have a pumpkin soup. Also, very delicious!

Nevertheless, the only negative comment is that every time we try to get pão de queijo and they are always out of it haha. I guess it’s worth it!

Name: Le Pain Quotidien
Address: R. Jacques Félix, 752 - Vila Nova Conceição, São Paulo
Author: Andrés Suárez
Review: straightforward and standardised this is a nice Le pain Quotidien location   it also has a nice outside patio

Name: Le Pain Quotidien
Address: R. Jacques Félix, 752 - Vila Nova Conceição, São Paulo
Author: Pri L.
Review: We ordered a large mug of coffee, unaware that it was the standard option, as the waitress presumed we were familiar with the place. It was our first time visiting São Paulo. After placing our food order, we also requested a sangria jar. Seated at the top of the restaurant, we witnessed the staff opening a bottle of wine, pouring it into a jar, adding water, juice, and some fruit. While the jar looked aesthetically pleasing, it tasted nothing like sangria. Upon inquiring, the staff insisted it was their recipe and suggested not ordering it next time if we didn't like it. I was left disappointed and uncertain if they actually followed a recipe to prepare the cocktail. We also observed that the staff seemed undertrained, lacking the necessary skills to accurately deliver food service. Their approach was limited to merely placing the food in front of the customer, leaving a notable gap in their service knowledge. It became evident that their expertise fell short; they seemed unaware of proper service protocols beyond placing dishes in front of the patrons. For the prices they charge, the level of service should be more akin to that of a café in Belgium, offering a higher standard of quality and experience.

Name: Cafeteria Mais1 Café - Pamplona
Address: R. Pamplona, 287 - Bela Vista, São Paulo
Author: Jose Baldo
Review: Prime time

Name: Cafeteria Mais1 Café - Pamplona
Address: R. Pamplona, 287 - Bela Vista, São Paulo
Author: Adão Sodré
Review:
Fui tomar café numa manhã de sexta, estava tranquilo.
Fiz o pedido de uma pink lemonade, cold mocha, pão de queijo e um salgado de catupiry.
A pink estava deliciosa, bem refrescante.
O mocha estava com muita espuma e pouca bebida.
O pão de queijo era gostoso.
Salgado ok.

O ambiente é pequeno mas vem organizado, bonito e limpo.
O atendente foi muito simpática, educada e solícita.

Name: Cafeteria Mais1 Café - Pamplona
Address: R. Pamplona, 287 - Bela Vista, São Paulo
Author: Ludmila Gurjão
Review: Comida de ótima qualidade, bebidas deliciosas e atendimento profissional! Eu amo essa unidade Mais 1 café, quase todos os dias estou passando pra pegar meu matcha deliciosooo.

Name: Cafeteria Mais1 Café - Pamplona
Address: R. Pamplona, 287 - Bela Vista, São Paulo
Author: Jurandir Lima
Review:
Visto de longe, o espaço é pequenino e aparenta ser desconfortável, mas quando se aproxima, percebe-se o aconchego do ambiente.

A barista (César), é super atencioso, atende rápido, com sorriso estampado no rosto e, se estabelecimento não estiver cheio, ainda troca um "dedo de prosa".

Name: Cafeteria Mais1 Café - Pamplona
Address: R. Pamplona, 287 - Bela Vista, São Paulo
Author: Gabriele Ferreira
Review:
Ambiente pequeno que cabe dois clientes sentados, mas é limpinho e bem aconchegante. Já tem um tempo que vou nesse local e sempre gostei dos cafés.

Recentemente pedi o Chocolate de Floresta Negra e estava delicioso, acho o copo um pouco pequeno para o preço R$14,90 mas como é diferenciado vale a pena.

Name: KOF - King of The Fork
Address: R. Artur de Azevedo, 1317 - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: Gabriella B. Teixeira
Review:
Service was rude after I asked about organic milk and coffee (none), I asked if I could have one of the sandwiches on their “pao de fermentação” but was condescendingly told no.

The tuna melt sandwich was bland (more bread than the tuna and tasteless cheese), the cheese melt was good.

Banana bread, flat white, and fresh mint tea were great!!

Name: KOF - King of The Fork
Address: R. Artur de Azevedo, 1317 - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: Leonard
Review:
Small, but quality coffee shop.
I had the chai latte with oat milk and it was so good. It was actually the best chai I've had in town.
You could tell the chai was quality and pure and the oat added the right amount of sweetness. I'm sure it would taste good with cow milk too.

Name: KOF - King of The Fork
Address: R. Artur de Azevedo, 1317 - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: Florian Koenigsberger
Review: Tucked away café spot with great sandwich and coffee options. The back patio is a nice pocket of greenery and they also stock a number of cool cycling trinkets. Great for weekend brunch, very friendly staff. The chocolate cookie was absurdly good, as was the cold brew with tonic.

Name: KOF - King of The Fork
Address: R. Artur de Azevedo, 1317 - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: Victoria Conti
Review: We got espresso tonic and rapadura latte, both very good.

Name: KOF - King of The Fork
Address: R. Artur de Azevedo, 1317 - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: Ethan Watkins
Review: Really good coffee, some of the best we had in Sao Paulo. The decor is very unique and all fits together to make a very cool atmosphere- a must visit for cycling fans!

Name: Fran's Café - Santo André
Address: Av. Portugal, 1126 - Jardim Bela Vista, Santo André
Author: Asmaa Khairy
Review: This place is always like coming home… warm meals and nice smiles.

Name: Fran's Café - Santo André
Address: Av. Portugal, 1126 - Jardim Bela Vista, Santo André
Author: Isabelle Miura
Review: I missed so much Fran's Cafés in Santo André when passed in front of this one and remembered that this was the first Fran's Café that I had known. The waitresses were wonderful.

Name: Fran's Café - Santo André
Address: Av. Portugal, 1126 - Jardim Bela Vista, Santo André
Author: Paul D
Review: A nice morning coffee. Opens at 7, which seems to be early in Sao Paulo.

Name: Fran's Café - Santo André
Address: Av. Portugal, 1126 - Jardim Bela Vista, Santo André
Author: Welington Venancio
Review: Good vibe

Name: Fran's Café - Santo André
Address: Av. Portugal, 1126 - Jardim Bela Vista, Santo André
Author: Dan L
Review: Good food and quick service. Prices are good.

Name: Fran's Café Analia Franco
Address: R. Emília Marengo, 688 - Vila Reg. Feijó, São Paulo
Author: Luis Carlos Meireles
Review:
The staff was polite and helpful, loved the service there.
Anyone should try their soups that come inside an Italian bread, it's really good.
Coffe was good as well.

Name: Fran's Café Analia Franco
Address: R. Emília Marengo, 688 - Vila Reg. Feijó, São Paulo
Author: Giuliana Teruko
Review: Perfect place if you want to have a break, drink a good coffee, grab a lunch or just study or work on your laptop. Wifi here is extremely good (especially when comparing to other Fran's café), service is good and also staff leave you alone when necessary (if you want to stay here all day in your computer no one will bother you) and ambiance is nice and comfortable.

Name: Fran's Café Analia Franco
Address: R. Emília Marengo, 688 - Vila Reg. Feijó, São Paulo
Author: Rafael Estevam
Review: It's a little bit expensive... But in my opinion worth it

Name: Fran's Café Analia Franco
Address: R. Emília Marengo, 688 - Vila Reg. Feijó, São Paulo
Author: Rogerio Xavier
Review: Top

Name: Fran's Café Analia Franco
Address: R. Emília Marengo, 688 - Vila Reg. Feijó, São Paulo
Author: Anderson Anzileiro
Review: Nice place to work and study.

Name: Provence Cafés Especiais
Address: R. Serra de Japi, 1378 - Vila Gomes Cardim, São Paulo
Author: Elisangela Rodrigues
Review:
Excelente atendimento, eu pedi uma torta de camarão que estava maravilhosa... amo frutos do mar e não podia deixar de pedir.

Lugar aconchegante e tranquilo... você pode fazer suas reuniões e eventos aqui também é só e trará em contato com a Elaine.

Name: Provence Cafés Especiais
Address: R. Serra de Japi, 1378 - Vila Gomes Cardim, São Paulo
Author: SOFIA MONTEIRO
Review: Que lugar perfeito!!! Os funcionários são extremamente educados, o ambiente bem acolhedor. Os cafés são perfeitos, e eles possuem os diversos tipos de grãos e a explicação dos aromas para você escolher. Já fui diversas vezes e já experimentei muitas coisas do cardápio e digo que tudo estava sempre perfeito.

Name: Provence Cafés Especiais
Address: R. Serra de Japi, 1378 - Vila Gomes Cardim, São Paulo
Author: Rafael Pavanello
Review:
Lugar espetacular!!
Sem palavras, ligar insano de incrível!

Recomendo a banoffee autoral e os cafés especiais.

Tem opções para veganos (fazem na hora alguns pratos) e tem opção de bebidas com leite vegetal.

Name: Provence Cafés Especiais
Address: R. Serra de Japi, 1378 - Vila Gomes Cardim, São Paulo
Author: Luciana Amorim
Review:
Hoje dia 07/04/2024 eu e meu namorado fomos essa lindíssima cafeteria. Chegamos ao local e já fomos direcionados à mesa, nos entregaram o cardápio. Tem muitas opções de cafés, outras bebidas quentes e geladas , vinhos.
Nós pedimos uma degustação de café ( que seria a escolha de grãos e o método de coar o café ) , um tricolote (café ,leite condensado e crema de leite ) ,um chocolate branco europeu ,uma tosta de presunto e queijo( pão artesanal )e um pão artesanal na chapa com requeijão.
Os pedidos chegaram rápido, atendentes super educados ( acho que o gerente também nos atendeu ), tivemos uma explicação sobre a degustação dos grãos de café e dos métodos de fazê-lo .
O lugar é lindo , muitos lugares para tirar fotos , área para eventos , balanço .
Os banheiros estavam cheirosos , limpos ,em especial o feminino  tinha protetor de vaso sanitário, absorvente , e com flores . Achei que tiveram um cuidado muito especial nos detalhes .

Name: Provence Cafés Especiais
Address: R. Serra de Japi, 1378 - Vila Gomes Cardim, São Paulo
Author: Philippe Hardardt
Review: Café delicioso! Gosto muito de cafés especiais e aqui é um ótimo lugar para um café diferenciado. Te apresentam diversas opções de grão, eu provei o rei amarelo e estava excelente. Pra completar, croissant estava ótimo, ambiente agradável e foi muito bem atendido

Name: Mais1.Café - Vila Clementino
Address: R. Borges Lagoa, 1028 - B - Vila Clementino, São Paulo
Author: Cassiano Bueno
Review: Cozy and pleasant place, excellent service, the baristas Giovana and Vitoria are amazing as well as the service of the partners.

Name: Mais1.Café - Vila Clementino
Address: R. Borges Lagoa, 1028 - B - Vila Clementino, São Paulo
Author: isabelle brasil
Review: Bom+

Name: Mais1.Café - Vila Clementino
Address: R. Borges Lagoa, 1028 - B - Vila Clementino, São Paulo
Author: Ricardo Orrico
Review: Show

Name: Mais1.Café - Vila Clementino
Address: R. Borges Lagoa, 1028 - B - Vila Clementino, São Paulo
Author: Emili Lucht
Review: Lugar maravilhoso! Passamos aqui tomar um café e uma bebida refrescante. Ambiente lindo e fresco com mesinhas ao ar livre. Os cafés são maravilhosos. Eu e meu esposo tomamos um Super Mocha e um Baileys, deliciosos. Também pegamos para levar um Pink Lemonade (gente, tem pedacinhos de morango!!!!). E pra fechar esse donut red velvet muito saboroso! Voltarei aqui muitas vezes!

Name: Mais1.Café - Vila Clementino
Address: R. Borges Lagoa, 1028 - B - Vila Clementino, São Paulo
Author: Cordeiro
Review: achei otimo o atendimento, comida muito boa e barata, eu pedi uma porção de coxinhas e um café gelado de morango, sai satisfeito e muito feliz com o atendimento, otimo local para um café da tarde recomendo muito

Name: Flôrida Garden Café e Eventos
Address: Rua das Granjas, 565 - Vila Santo Antônio, Cotia
Author: William Wada
Review: Top!

Name: Flôrida Garden Café e Eventos
Address: Rua das Granjas, 565 - Vila Santo Antônio, Cotia
Author: Mina Nakamura
Review: Pense num lugar pequeno mas aconchegante com muitas opções de doces, cafés, refeições com ótimo atendimento . Dá vontade de ficar horas tomando um café e lendo um livro ali no cantinho ... bem no miolo da Granja com vagas de estacionamento em frente e mesinhas externas também .

Name: Flôrida Garden Café e Eventos
Address: Rua das Granjas, 565 - Vila Santo Antônio, Cotia
Author: Flaviane Lima
Review:
Meu cantinho favorito da granja....amo tudo.... desde a decoração até todas as gostosuras que saem de lá.... mas sem dúvida a banofee é  a melhor que já comi....
Indico sempre....

Name: Flôrida Garden Café e Eventos
Address: Rua das Granjas, 565 - Vila Santo Antônio, Cotia
Author: Graciela Dias
Review: Muito atenciosos, decoração super aconchegante e bolos deliciosos, recomendo muito o bolo de banana! O pão de queijo também é excepcional!

Name: Flôrida Garden Café e Eventos
Address: Rua das Granjas, 565 - Vila Santo Antônio, Cotia
Author: Tathiana Cardoso
Review: Lugar aconchegante,organizado,limpo,bem localizado e com bolo e café maravilhosos!Uma delícia!

Name: Le Manjue Café VNC
Address: R. Afonso Braz, 315 - Vila Nova Conceição, São Paulo
Author: Andre Matarazzo
Review: Extraordinarily delicious food. Quite sophisticated Brazilian fusion food. In love with

Name: Le Manjue Café VNC
Address: R. Afonso Braz, 315 - Vila Nova Conceição, São Paulo
Author: Silvia Di Stasio
Review:
Food was amazing and very well presented.
Service was good, the lady helped me with the   pick up point for Uber.
Obrigada 😊

Name: Le Manjue Café VNC
Address: R. Afonso Braz, 315 - Vila Nova Conceição, São Paulo
Author: veronica oliveira
Review: Healthy and delicious food.

Name: Le Manjue Café VNC
Address: R. Afonso Braz, 315 - Vila Nova Conceição, São Paulo
Author: Maria K
Review: Everyone is kind, Foods are very nice and healthy. I love this place.

Name: Le Manjue Café VNC
Address: R. Afonso Braz, 315 - Vila Nova Conceição, São Paulo
Author: Fabio Magalhaes
Review: Rrr

Name: Cafeteria Mais1 Café - Faria Lima
Address: Av. Brig. Faria Lima, 1616 - Loja 02 - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: Rogério Hiroshi
Review: Já há 2 semanas notei essa loja. A atendente Duda, muito simpática e explica cardápio corretamente, informa está aberta unidade há 11 meses. Meu pedido foi a promoção sexta feira Ice Coffee com Baileys. E apesar ser levemente alcoólico, devido a bebida base desse café, a combinação de sabores ficou bastante leve e saborosa. Existem outras boas pedidas cuja base e o bom e velho café. Próximo pedido Gold Mocha gelado também. Vale a pena experimentar. Recomendo a visita.

Name: Cafeteria Mais1 Café - Faria Lima
Address: Av. Brig. Faria Lima, 1616 - Loja 02 - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: Marina Prudente Guiotti
Review:
Café delicioso para amantes de café! Possui torra média e um sabor suave, com notas de caramelo.
Para quem não gosta de café puro, possui variedades de misturas com ovomaltine, kitkat, entre outros que agradam gregos e troianos.
As comidas são de muito boa qualidade. Desde croissants verdadeiros (importados da França), até pão de queijo original da Forno de Minas.
Indico muito a visita.

Name: Cafeteria Mais1 Café - Faria Lima
Address: Av. Brig. Faria Lima, 1616 - Loja 02 - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: Luiz G Carvalho
Review:
Uma excelente opção de café com algum acompanhamento salgado ou doce.

Menu com boas opções de cafés e bebidas para todos os gostos. Como vou sempre no final da tarde peço o café coado por ser leve e muito saboroso.

Ahhh, não posso deixar de falar do espresso. É perfeito e tem um sabor intenso como deve ser, nota 10 para execução.

Das comidas o meu preferido é o cookie de baunilha!

Serviço excelente e destaque para barista que é muito simpática e atenciosa.

Name: Cafeteria Mais1 Café - Faria Lima
Address: Av. Brig. Faria Lima, 1616 - Loja 02 - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: Paulo Pimentel
Review: Lugar sensacional. Como amante de café, gostaria de ressaltar o café especial de torra média, de menor acidez e mais açúcares naturais. Além disso, vale muito a pena a vista para experimentar as várias bebidas que misturam o café com licores, ovomaltine, kitkat, negresco, entre outros. Com relação à comida, indicaria os quitutes importados, como croissant da França, donuts da Espanha, além do inesquecível pastel de Belém de Portugal. Para acompanhar o cafezinho, não dá pra esquecer o pão de queijo e cookies da Forno de Minas. Indico 100%.

Name: Cafeteria Mais1 Café - Faria Lima
Address: Av. Brig. Faria Lima, 1616 - Loja 02 - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: Alexandre Lenza
Review: Excelente café, atendimento realmente diferenciado. Já fui inúmeras vezes e em todas, sem exceção foram TOP. Recomendo fortemente para quem gosta de degustar um café na temperatura certa, qualidade excelente. Diversas opções e preço muito coerente. Parabéns pela equipe!

Name: Oz Café
Address: R. Narciso Sturlini, 170 - Centro, Osasco
Author: Naphina
Review: Começando a falar sobre a comida eu achei sensacional, as bebidas e as comidas são deliciosas e o Frapuccino que tomei era uma delícia, extremamente gostoso e geladinho, já os salgados são muito saborosos, peguei uma coxinha de jaca e meu Deus, que sabor. O ambiente é impecável, limpo e com uma decoração como se fosse uma caverna, é incrível, tem uma temática muito agradável. É sinceramente um ambiente muito gostoso com comida muito gostosa.

Name: Oz Café
Address: R. Narciso Sturlini, 170 - Centro, Osasco
Author: Lisa Caroline Rodrigues
Review: Lugar bem legal, cheio de bichinhos encantando o espaço. O cardápio deixa um pouco a desejar pela simplicidade e quantidade de itens, mas para um lanche da tarde simples atende bem.

Name: Oz Café
Address: R. Narciso Sturlini, 170 - Centro, Osasco
Author: Zá
Review:
Excelente!
Pão de batata maravilhoso!
Café delicioso!

Name: Oz Café
Address: R. Narciso Sturlini, 170 - Centro, Osasco
Author: Liege Meffe
Review: Tomei somente o capuccino e é muito gostoso. O ambiente é bem agradável e as atendentes simpáticas.

Name: Oz Café
Address: R. Narciso Sturlini, 170 - Centro, Osasco
Author: Rosangela Gimenes
Review: Ambiente limpo e agradável,  serviço eficiente.

Name: Café Quintal
Address: R. Ramos Batista, 481 - Vila Olímpia, São Paulo
Author: Juliana “Ju” Baeta
Review: Boa noite, vcs estão abrindo uma franquia em campinas? Tem um que vai abrir aqui com o mesmo nome de vcs!

Name: Café Quintal
Address: R. Ramos Batista, 481 - Vila Olímpia, São Paulo
Author: Rafael Costa
Review: A torta é execelente. Demora um pouco para ser atendido, pois a procura é relativamente alta.

Name: Café Quintal
Address: R. Ramos Batista, 481 - Vila Olímpia, São Paulo
Author: Liz Alexandrita
Review: Nem lembro mais, mas se não tenho reclamação é pq foi bom, uai.

Name: Café Quintal
Address: R. Ramos Batista, 481 - Vila Olímpia, São Paulo
Author: Paulo Sérgio
Review: Tomo café com frequência lá e gosto do sabor e da tranquilidade do lugar.

Name: Café Quintal
Address: R. Ramos Batista, 481 - Vila Olímpia, São Paulo
Author: EL PATRON NOTICIAS
Review: Ótimo Lugar para vender VR , ALELO , REFEIÇÃO PAGA 15% Menor taxa da vila Olímpia

Name: mug.sp - Avenida Paulista
Address: Av. Paulista, 1079 - Bela Vista, São Paulo
Author: Gian Mastrorosa
Review:
A great place for brunch - I need to come back during lunch to taste their mains, as the quality of the breakfast material was incredible. The butter and bread are clearly artisanal. The jam accompanying the bread is also great. I also had a boiled egg and a fruits+yoghurt plate. The price was reasonable, considering the quality and region of the restaurant. The place itself is nice and the waiters were fine, although they were clearly overloaded.
Edit: after coming a second time for lunch, the servings were too small for my appetite, although the food was good.

Name: mug.sp - Avenida Paulista
Address: Av. Paulista, 1079 - Bela Vista, São Paulo
Author: Isadora Costa Cardoso
Review: Great place for brunch. They offer several vegetarian options and some vegan too. Dog friendly. Great place to work from, laptops are allowed, the WiFi is good, and there are plugs. The only bad thing is that they won’t let you substitute items on your plate (not even for vegetarians). Atmosphere is great, very instagrammable. Prices are a bit high but average to the area. Music is great too. Theres an outdoor area as well. Very friendly staff, Douglas was our server and he was super attentive and kind. Very chill vibes for Avenida Paulista. Hard to find but worth it!!

Name: mug.sp - Avenida Paulista
Address: Av. Paulista, 1079 - Bela Vista, São Paulo
Author: Heidi Farnsworth
Review: I had the eggs Benedict. It was great. Coffee was superb. What a great introduction to Brazil.

Name: mug.sp - Avenida Paulista
Address: Av. Paulista, 1079 - Bela Vista, São Paulo
Author: Pieter K
Review: Great espresso and nice croissant with pistachio. Long wait time. Popular place

Name: mug.sp - Avenida Paulista
Address: Av. Paulista, 1079 - Bela Vista, São Paulo
Author: Joelle Drechsler
Review:
Very nice and cosy place, especially Rafael was an amazing and very friendly waiter!!
Defo recommend!

Name: Café Martinelli Midi
Address: R. Líbero Badaró, 508 - Centro Histórico de São Paulo, São Paulo
Author: Pieter Lekkerkerk
Review: Cute little café in a historic building in the center of São Paulo. Very tasty gourmet coffee varieties plus a variety of sweet and savory snacks.

Name: Café Martinelli Midi
Address: R. Líbero Badaró, 508 - Centro Histórico de São Paulo, São Paulo
Author: Andy Gamertsfelder
Review: Very authentic, traditional downtown São Paulo café. Noted by many as the best coffee/espresso in São Paulo, the baristas make a number of different designs in the foam - flowers, hearts even "Bom dia!" Can't miss if you're visiting downtown - on business or as a tourist!

Name: Café Martinelli Midi
Address: R. Líbero Badaró, 508 - Centro Histórico de São Paulo, São Paulo
Author: Tereza Arrais
Review: Theo best

Name: Café Martinelli Midi
Address: R. Líbero Badaró, 508 - Centro Histórico de São Paulo, São Paulo
Author: Joserubens Domingues
Review: Top

Name: Café Martinelli Midi
Address: R. Líbero Badaró, 508 - Centro Histórico de São Paulo, São Paulo
Author: Audrey Ding
Review: Good coffee..

Name: Mr Black Café - Cafeteria
Address: R. Olimpíadas, 360 - LUC 405 - Vila Olímpia, São Paulo
Author: sandra uzor
Review: This pastries at this cafe is amazing. Also the coffee was just right and giving all the vibes. No jokes, you need to visit this cafe and try out their recipes

Name: Mr Black Café - Cafeteria
Address: R. Olimpíadas, 360 - LUC 405 - Vila Olímpia, São Paulo
Author: Ricardo Nogueira
Review:
Eu gosto de experimentar cafés e com sorte tentar achar uma cafeteria que mereça o nome. Infelizmente não foi o caso aqui. A decepção começa no menu. Queria um capuccino italiano e me deparo com um menu informando que vai canela e chocolate... 🙄 Sem comentários, eu ainda informo que isso é um erro e deveria ter outro nome mas a colega insiste falando que é isso mesmo... Ok, pedi então algo próximo e eis que aparece a bebida da foto. Um expresso além do ponto com uma camada de leite que mal disfarçava um expresso mal tirado, gerando uma bebida dura, sem notas aromáticas e de gosto residual amargo e desagradável. Uma experiência ruim de ponta a ponta. Sugeri até um curso de barista para a colega, como o do Santo Grão, mas a sugestão foi mal recebida. Resumindo, um café caro, mal extraído, feito de qualquer jeito e com nome incorreto no menu. Um atendimento sofrível e para jogar sal na ferida, sequer acompanhava uma dose de água com gás para limpeza do paladar. NÃO recomendo de jeito nenhum.

PS: Agradeço a resposta, mas não retiro uma vírgula da avaliação, nem mesmo o "expresso" que apontou como um erro, quem dera tivessem esse mesmo rigor no preparo do café. Lembrando que "espresso" é uma palavra de origem italiana que, em português, é "expresso", ainda que carregando significados diferentes mas como ela não existe em português, a grafia que eu usei está correta, mas tudo bem. Sugiro que em vez de se auto elogiarem, aprendam ao  visitar cafeterias de excelência, como a Takko café na Santa Cecília, onde realmente preparam cafés de primeira linha e com um preço similar ao de vocês

Name: Mr Black Café - Cafeteria
Address: R. Olimpíadas, 360 - LUC 405 - Vila Olímpia, São Paulo
Author: Leandro Lopes
Review: Era o melhor café do shopping. Agora é um só um café meio sem gosto, não é ruim, ma era tão gostoso antes. Posso estar sob influência do serviço: uma xícara pelando e atirada a sua mesa por uma garçonete mal humorada o suficiente para não se importar se a xícara irá chegar inteira ou não ao destino.  Não há petit four ou água gaseificada com o café, são 9 reais por xícara de café seco... Não dá para recomendar ou voltar.

Name: Mr Black Café - Cafeteria
Address: R. Olimpíadas, 360 - LUC 405 - Vila Olímpia, São Paulo
Author: Thrícia Young
Review:
Cafeteria localizada dentro do shopping Vila Olímpia! Servem diversos tipos de cafés ( feitos com diferentes métodos - prensa francesa, coado, expresso,etc), deliciosas bebidas de/com café.
Minha experiência foi bastante positiva, cafés deliciosos, qualidade excepcional.
Serviço excepcional.

Name: Mr Black Café - Cafeteria
Address: R. Olimpíadas, 360 - LUC 405 - Vila Olímpia, São Paulo
Author: Gilberto Pucci
Review: Boa cafeteria e atendimento. Podia ter mais opções de doces. Mas o que tem estava muito bom. O bom daqui é que tem café coado.

Name: GeMa Café Bistrô Itaim Bibi
Address: R. Prof. Atílio Innocenti, 249 - Itaim Bibi, São Paulo
Author: Andrew Backer
Review: Had a good double espresso and a nice pão de queijo for breakfast, 15k.  Others were eating breakfast which looked nice and simple.

Name: GeMa Café Bistrô Itaim Bibi
Address: R. Prof. Atílio Innocenti, 249 - Itaim Bibi, São Paulo
Author: J. W. K. Widy
Review: A wonderful place, not just for coffee and cake! I had the opportunity to chat with the owner "Che" (he speaks English very well, which is still a rarity in São Paulo). He puts my heart and soul into his business and in addition to the great service, you can taste it, even if it's just an espresso. Rather inconspicuous from the outside as it's narrow, but it's a very "long" restaurant with a great ambience. For me an absolute insider tip in the area!

Name: GeMa Café Bistrô Itaim Bibi
Address: R. Prof. Atílio Innocenti, 249 - Itaim Bibi, São Paulo
Author: Gustavo de Paula
Review: Restaurante desrespeita público ao obstruir calçada, dificultar passagem e acabando com a acessibilidade do espaço!

Name: GeMa Café Bistrô Itaim Bibi
Address: R. Prof. Atílio Innocenti, 249 - Itaim Bibi, São Paulo
Author: Melissa G
Review: Ótima comida, preço justo e comi o MELHOR pudim de leite da minha vida feito pela Duda! fiquei impressionada, já fui em lugares muito caros que não chegavam nem perto.

Name: GeMa Café Bistrô Itaim Bibi
Address: R. Prof. Atílio Innocenti, 249 - Itaim Bibi, São Paulo
Author: João Santos
Review: A comida e o atendimento do local é ótimo ! Contudo, a última vez que fui com minha namorada no estabelecimento presenciamos uma situação muito triste. O dono/gestor do estabelecimento estava reunido com os funcionários /prestadores de serviço realizando um Feedback muito agressivo. Sendo ríspido e agressivo ao indicar as melhorias de serviço. Sempre fomos muito bem atendidos e respeitados por todos. Infelicidade ter ainda pessoas que se sentem no direito de desrespeitar alguém em um ambiente de trabalho. Espero que este comentário não gere nenhum desconforto aos funcionários, apenas reflexão a este gestor (existem diversos cursos de liderança que posso recomendar!)

Name: Café de Casa
Address: Av. Dr. Luís Rocha Miranda, 273 - Jabaquara, São Paulo
Author: Lucia
Review: Adoro este café, os pratos são deliciosos, adoro as massas, bolos, salgados, tudo! Lugar ideal pra tomar aquele cafezinho e relaxar.

Name: Café de Casa
Address: Av. Dr. Luís Rocha Miranda, 273 - Jabaquara, São Paulo
Author: André Gonçalves
Review: Excelência no atendimento/serviço, pratos rápidos e bem caprichados, destaque para as massas frescas e Molhos vibrantes.

Name: Café de Casa
Address: Av. Dr. Luís Rocha Miranda, 273 - Jabaquara, São Paulo
Author: Rodolfo Felipe
Review: As massas e os risotos são bons.  Entregam uma boa relação de custo benefício, porém eu não volto mais nesse restaurante: na última visita eu e meu time fomos enganados descaradamente no almoço: decidimos esperar porque a atendente disse que vagaria uma mesa rapidamente e então ficamos lá, aguardando no calor infernal do lado de fora. Resumo da ópera: nos colocaram em mesas separas, sendo que uma era enfiada em um canto que mal dava pra gente se mexer, demorou 2 horas para almoçarmos, as massas vieram com pouco recheio, quase perdi uma reunião importante e o ambiente estava fedendo carne na chapa. Sinto muito, precisam deixar de ser amadores. Só comida boa não faz um negócio ter sucesso

Name: Café de Casa
Address: Av. Dr. Luís Rocha Miranda, 273 - Jabaquara, São Paulo
Author: Daniela Araujo
Review: Eu realmente me surpreendi com este café, tudo com muita qualidade, um café pequeno, mas desde de a bebida até os salgados, tortas e bolos são bem gostosos, não desmerecendo, acho só um pouquinho caro, senão iria toda semana, rs, porque é tudo muito gostoso, e tb precisa ter um convênio de estacionamento pois aí é um lugar ruim de parar, mas de resto tudo 100%👏

Name: Café de Casa
Address: Av. Dr. Luís Rocha Miranda, 273 - Jabaquara, São Paulo
Author: Wesley Barbosa
Review: A mais grata surpresa gastronômica do ano. Sente-se o cuidado e carinho em cada item do cardápio, do café coado ao risotto, passando pelos quitutes, massas e sobremesas de encher os olhos. Lugar perfeito: aconchegante, acolhedor, atendimento ímpar. Toda grande rede e renomado restaurante deveria tomar aulas com este lugar. Que outras pessoas possam apreciar esta experiência. Não espere finesse exacerbada, espere culinária de verdade, onde a comida é início, meio e fim. Obrigado Café de Casa.

Name: World café bar - Cafeteria, Bar e Restaurante
Address: R. Araújo, 329 - República, São Paulo
Author: Thomas Piland
Review: The expression hit the spot on this rainy São Paulo day. The waitress understood Spanish and was really kind and helpful. The pao da queso hits the spot and highly recommend it. I also had a ham, cheese and egg breakfast sandwich. São Paulo is truly an amazing city

Name: World café bar - Cafeteria, Bar e Restaurante
Address: R. Araújo, 329 - República, São Paulo
Author: kim e. powell
Review: 3.5 | cute stop in for a quick bite and coffee. I enjoyed sthe pão de queijo na chapa quite a lot. it’s nothing spectacular, just a easy stop, good location, and quick service for a morning bite and coffee pick me up.

Name: World café bar - Cafeteria, Bar e Restaurante
Address: R. Araújo, 329 - República, São Paulo
Author: Hendrik Kohleick
Review: Stopped by for breakfast and were not disappointed. Decent breakfast, nice interior, kid friendly.

Name: World café bar - Cafeteria, Bar e Restaurante
Address: R. Araújo, 329 - República, São Paulo
Author: Zethus Chow
Review: Everything about this place is amazing. The food is delicious. I had the chicken thighs and they were juicy and tender with a crisp surface. The restaurant was playing chill music which added to the calming atmosphere. Staff spoke english too, which of course was helpful. I came back for dessert later in the day, and had the chocolate mousse pie which absolutely blew my mind. Highly recommend a visit if you are in the area.

Name: World café bar - Cafeteria, Bar e Restaurante
Address: R. Araújo, 329 - República, São Paulo
Author: Carola
Review:
Amazing food and service.
The owners really take an interest in your experience and I felt very welcome.
It's pretty busy also in the afternoon and that's for good reasons!

Name: Deli Café Nespresso- Cafeteria, lanches rápidos e produtos TO GO
Address: No hotel Pullman - R. Olimpíadas, 205 - Vila Olímpia, São Paulo
Author: Idelma Bernardes
Review: Lugar muito agradável , ótimo atendimento,próximo a tudo que precisei . Parabéns.

Name: Deli Café Nespresso- Cafeteria, lanches rápidos e produtos TO GO
Address: No hotel Pullman - R. Olimpíadas, 205 - Vila Olímpia, São Paulo
Author: Henrique Weber
Review: Excellent!

Name: Deli Café Nespresso- Cafeteria, lanches rápidos e produtos TO GO
Address: No hotel Pullman - R. Olimpíadas, 205 - Vila Olímpia, São Paulo
Author: Raimundo

Name: Deli Café Nespresso- Cafeteria, lanches rápidos e produtos TO GO
Address: No hotel Pullman - R. Olimpíadas, 205 - Vila Olímpia, São Paulo
Author: pedro Henrique

Name: Deli Café Nespresso- Cafeteria, lanches rápidos e produtos TO GO
Address: No hotel Pullman - R. Olimpíadas, 205 - Vila Olímpia, São Paulo
Author: Shekhar Baxi

Name: San Benedetto Café
Address: R. Lavradio, 503 - Barra Funda, São Paulo
Author: Maria dos Santos Soares
Review: Ambiente organizado, bonito a comida é deliciosa. É muito bem frequentando.

Name: San Benedetto Café
Address: R. Lavradio, 503 - Barra Funda, São Paulo
Author: Íris Fernandes
Review:
Quem me indicou foi o pessoal da Konigame, desde então desde que tenho oportunidade almoço ou compro algum salgado, sobremesa.
Muito bom de verdade !
Aaah, o doce sericaia é divino !

Name: San Benedetto Café
Address: R. Lavradio, 503 - Barra Funda, São Paulo
Author: Kelly Amaral
Review: Eu simplesmente AMO ❤️! O melhor capuccino da região, e um carinho super especial no atendimento e no preparo dos pedidos.

Name: San Benedetto Café
Address: R. Lavradio, 503 - Barra Funda, São Paulo
Author: Nelson Cardoso
Review: Excelente é a palavra. Estava nas imediações e entrei para comer e beber alguma coisa. Almocei e comi a sobremesa. Era uma torta portuguesa que esqueci o nome, mas foi uma verdadeira delícia. Recomendo muito esse doce. A dona é de uma simpatia ímpar. Se estiver na área, vale a visita.

Name: San Benedetto Café
Address: R. Lavradio, 503 - Barra Funda, São Paulo
Author: Ricardo Nascimento
Review: Ótima comida, serviço fantástico, o ambiente é simplesmente excelente, voltarei sempre que puder, super recomendo 👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻

Name: Sterna Café Vila Leopoldina
Address: Rua Hayden, 105 - Loja 105 - Vila Leopoldina, São Paulo
Author: thaís conceição
Review: tostex light top mt bom

Name: Sterna Café Vila Leopoldina
Address: Rua Hayden, 105 - Loja 105 - Vila Leopoldina, São Paulo
Author: Thais Perez
Review: Atendimento muito atencioso, adorei. Levei meus pais para conhecer o mercadão e o café sterna para comemorar o aniversário da minha mãe e fomos muito bem atendidos. Ambiente agradável e comida deliciosa. Recomendo :)

Name: Sterna Café Vila Leopoldina
Address: Rua Hayden, 105 - Loja 105 - Vila Leopoldina, São Paulo
Author: Ricardo Cecchi
Review:
O Sterna Café, dentro do Mercadão das Flores, é bem legal! Eu adoro o Mercadão das Flores – pra mim, é como passear na Disney. É um lugar incrível pra quem curte plantas e flores, e o Sterna Café só torna o passeio ainda melhor.

Os cafés do Sterna são ótimos. É um passeio super agradável: você para no Sterna Café, toma um cafezinho delicioso, e depois passeia pelo mercado comprando plantas e flores. Pra mim, isso resume um passeio bacana e prazeroso.

Hoje em dia, com a idade chegando, estou valorizando cada vez mais essas pequenas coisas da vida.

Name: Sterna Café Vila Leopoldina
Address: Rua Hayden, 105 - Loja 105 - Vila Leopoldina, São Paulo
Author: Vagner Luis Valim Carlos
Review: Ambiente tranquilo e agradável para um café ou mesmo almoço. O atendimento primoroso é a cereja do bolo. Recomendo a todos que estejam no Mercadão das Flores que deem um pulo no café! Vale à pena!

Name: Sterna Café Vila Leopoldina
Address: Rua Hayden, 105 - Loja 105 - Vila Leopoldina, São Paulo
Author: Arnaldo B. Diniz Filho
Review:
Para quem gosta de café, a Sterna é uma excelente opção.
Café maravilhoso e coado na mesa sob pressão.
Atendimento de primeira.
Valeu muito.

Name: BETC Havas Café
Address: R. Oscar Freire, 1128 - Cerqueira César, São Paulo
Author: Isadora Costa Cardoso
Review: Cute little cafe + bookstore with great atmosphere. Computer friendly space and also great for coffee with friends. Highly recommend

Name: BETC Havas Café
Address: R. Oscar Freire, 1128 - Cerqueira César, São Paulo
Author: Victoria Conti
Review: It used to be way better years ago. Now the space is reduced and the menu is not really impressive. Once I went there to buy a book and they gave me a wrinkled and dirty one…

Name: BETC Havas Café
Address: R. Oscar Freire, 1128 - Cerqueira César, São Paulo
Author: Gabriel Ishida
Review: Very fancy, great coffee and it is located in the most luxury street of SP

Name: BETC Havas Café
Address: R. Oscar Freire, 1128 - Cerqueira César, São Paulo
Author: Júlia De Castro
Review: Amei!! Meio carinho, mas na média de preço da Oscar freire. Chá é maravilhoso e o atendimento também. O pessoal da livraria é incrível e super atenciosos, tem uma baita coleção de livros de tudo o que se imaginar, mas mais focado em fotografias e desing.

Name: BETC Havas Café
Address: R. Oscar Freire, 1128 - Cerqueira César, São Paulo
Author: Letícia Ayumi
Review: Conheci através de vídeos na internet onde falavam super bem do lugar. O ambiente é lindo, limpo e bem localizado. Porém, acho que de nada adianta o ambiente ser bonito, se entregam pouco referente a culinária. Pedi um mocha e um muffin de blueberry e um bolo vegano. O mocha fraquíssimo, o café que é feito em casa da no mesmo sabor que o café em que foi oferecido (pela foto já se percebe também que a apresentação não foi impecável). O Muffin estava duro, de blueberry não tinha nada, gelado, reclamei que estava duro e gelado, me mandaram outro duro também e justificaram que por ser congelado, precisa ver com o cliente se quer que esquente ou gelado, não vi nada de fresco nas opções em que pedi. Extremamente decepcionante, acho que o lugar ser bonito e apresentável não significa nada quando não trás qualidade. Cheguei com fome e sai com fome, péssimos…

Name: Catavento Café Coletivo
Address: R. Antônio Mariani, 157 - Instituto de Previdencia, São Paulo
Author: Rodrigo Medina Viscarra
Review: Wonderful place!

Name: Catavento Café Coletivo
Address: R. Antônio Mariani, 157 - Instituto de Previdencia, São Paulo
Author: Alexandre Kopte
Review: Entrei, limparam uma mesa pra mim do lado de fora e fiquei no mínimo uns 10 minutos aguardando. Saí sem ser atendido. A atendente estava no caixa mexendo no celular. Triste, pois o lugar está bem avaliado e por isso resolvi passar para tomar um café e responder uns e-mails. Acabei indo na padaria que fica próxima.

Name: Catavento Café Coletivo
Address: R. Antônio Mariani, 157 - Instituto de Previdencia, São Paulo
Author: N P
Review:
Um lugar aconchegante, com atendimento simpático.
A coxinha sem glúten é uma boa pedida para quem tem intolerância ao trigo.

Name: Catavento Café Coletivo
Address: R. Antônio Mariani, 157 - Instituto de Previdencia, São Paulo
Author: Gustavo Strauss
Review: Ambiente muito aconchegante e bem localizado. Pude trabalhar no ambiente da cafeteria, porém existe um espaço de co-working caso deseje algo mais privado por um valor bem acessível. Os preços dos alimentos são acessíveis também e muito bons. Espaço super recomendado tanto para tomar um café quanto para trabalhar num local diferente da rotina.

Name: Catavento Café Coletivo
Address: R. Antônio Mariani, 157 - Instituto de Previdencia, São Paulo
Author: Júnio César Paula
Review: Very good!!

Name: Café | Restaurante | Cafés da manhã | Lanches | Cafeteria Baras Café no Ipiranga - SP
Address: R. Cipriano Barata, 2261 - Ipiranga, São Paulo
Author: Damiana Costa
Review: O atendimento é muito bom e o lugar é bem confortável. O ambiente é calmo e tranquilo, da para desfrutar de um café gostoso seguido de várias opções. Tudo muito agradável.!

Name: Café | Restaurante | Cafés da manhã | Lanches | Cafeteria Baras Café no Ipiranga - SP
Address: R. Cipriano Barata, 2261 - Ipiranga, São Paulo
Author: José Victor
Review: Excelente atendimento, deliciosos cafés, lanches tudo feito com bastante atenção e carinho, recomendo muito

Name: Café | Restaurante | Cafés da manhã | Lanches | Cafeteria Baras Café no Ipiranga - SP
Address: R. Cipriano Barata, 2261 - Ipiranga, São Paulo
Author: Daniel Aguiar Duarte
Review: Local agradável e aconchegante! Fazem café  com as mais variadas técnicas sem falar nas gostosuras.

Name: Café | Restaurante | Cafés da manhã | Lanches | Cafeteria Baras Café no Ipiranga - SP
Address: R. Cipriano Barata, 2261 - Ipiranga, São Paulo
Author: Ivan Barasnevicius
Review: Lugar muito agradável. Vale a pena conhecer as receitas especiais e saborear o café feito na hora!

Name: Café | Restaurante | Cafés da manhã | Lanches | Cafeteria Baras Café no Ipiranga - SP
Address: R. Cipriano Barata, 2261 - Ipiranga, São Paulo
Author: Gyselle Oliveira
Review: Uma macarronada maravilhosa!!! Super indico!!!

Name: Santo Grão - Vila Madalena
Address: R. Fradique Coutinho, 915 - Vila Madalena, São Paulo
Author: Leonard
Review:
Hidden cafe in the back of a bookstore.
So nice! Three cafe is in a little shaded garden by an area where people come to read stories to the little kids.
I ordered the decaf coffee with oat milk and it arrived super elegant and tasted so good!
Is hard to find decaf and lactose free milk in the same coffee shop but this place has it.
I also saw some their other drinks at other tables and it looked good.

They have wifi and is a good place to work. Not for business calls but for concentrated work.

Name: Santo Grão - Vila Madalena
Address: R. Fradique Coutinho, 915 - Vila Madalena, São Paulo
Author: hny
Review:
You can read the books in the bookstore before you buy them.
However, the coffee we drank was not good at all.
This may be the first time I have ever left coffee in a cafe.

Name: Santo Grão - Vila Madalena
Address: R. Fradique Coutinho, 915 - Vila Madalena, São Paulo
Author: Thomas Kanzig
Review:
The place is very good to work remotly.
We ordered coffees, omelete, penny pasta and an açaí smoothie .

Name: Santo Grão - Vila Madalena
Address: R. Fradique Coutinho, 915 - Vila Madalena, São Paulo
Author: Ben Baker
Review: The atmosphere is incredible. It is so green and you have to walk through the bookstore to the back. The food itself is really good. However the service as they open is really slow. Only one server to cook, make drinks, and take orders. Took over an hour

Name: Santo Grão - Vila Madalena
Address: R. Fradique Coutinho, 915 - Vila Madalena, São Paulo
Author: brian collins
Review: Lovely cafe and book store. Quite over priced though for what you get.

Name: Avenue Korea Cafeteria
Address: Av. Dr. Cardoso de Melo, 47 - Vila Olímpia, São Paulo
Author: Lee Soyoung
Review: Friendly staffs & cool atmosphere! It was my 3rd visit and i love this place. They have Korean style menus that are hard to find in Brazil! So special

Name: Avenue Korea Cafeteria
Address: Av. Dr. Cardoso de Melo, 47 - Vila Olímpia, São Paulo
Author: Andrew Ng
Review: very friendly cafe with Korean foods and other healthy options. they have baked goods also (breads & cookies)

Name: Avenue Korea Cafeteria
Address: Av. Dr. Cardoso de Melo, 47 - Vila Olímpia, São Paulo
Author: Jonah Pollone
Review: Great place to sit and work. Staff are very friendly, space is clean, and vibes were spooky 🎃

Name: Avenue Korea Cafeteria
Address: Av. Dr. Cardoso de Melo, 47 - Vila Olímpia, São Paulo
Author: Franziska H
Review: The salmon bagel was absolutely delicious and they speak English :) 5 stars. i loved it

Name: Avenue Korea Cafeteria
Address: Av. Dr. Cardoso de Melo, 47 - Vila Olímpia, São Paulo
Author: Clarissa Van Acker
Review: Great specialty coffee, great non-coffee drinks too. Pastries that feel homemade. Great atmosphere!

Name: Le Pain Quotidien
Address: Av. Pres. Juscelino Kubitschek, 2041 - Shopping JK Iguatemi, São Paulo
Author: Jorge Pereira
Review:
Quite nice Pain Quotidien in the JK Shopping Mall.
I specially liked the Salmon Tartare
Our waitress was very friendly

Name: Le Pain Quotidien
Address: Av. Pres. Juscelino Kubitschek, 2041 - Shopping JK Iguatemi, São Paulo
Author: Daniel P
Review:
Good food and nice place, however:
Service is terrible. Waiters are always lost and you need to wait like 30 minutes for a fruit salad (even when the place is empty!!).
Worst Le Pan Quotidien I ever went to!
Suggestion: if you want a breakfast, just go to an ordinary bakery nearby. It's cheaper, better and always with good service!

Name: Le Pain Quotidien
Address: Av. Pres. Juscelino Kubitschek, 2041 - Shopping JK Iguatemi, São Paulo
Author: Rafael Carlet
Review: Nice place for a breakfast or brunch. Huge variety of housemade breads and the cappuccino is huge!

Name: Le Pain Quotidien
Address: Av. Pres. Juscelino Kubitschek, 2041 - Shopping JK Iguatemi, São Paulo
Author: Barbara Capelli
Review: Great lily cafe with yummy treats. The pistachio cake was to die for and the focaccia was authentic. Delish!

Name: Le Pain Quotidien
Address: Av. Pres. Juscelino Kubitschek, 2041 - Shopping JK Iguatemi, São Paulo
Author: J Ernst G
Review:
Typical LPQ atmosphere from other locations around the globe. Has some good pastries and service is alright. If you order water they only have those 300ml little bottles which I think is disrespectful. The Belgian waffles, I mean, waffle, the mini waffle is tiny and if you add any extra ingredient to your order, the portion is minuscule, like a slice of smoked salmon or a thin slice of avocado.
I mean, I will still come but if they could fix these annoyances, it would be a much enjoyable visit.

Name: Caffè Ristoro
Address: Av. Paulista, 37 - Paraíso, São Paulo
Author: Anderson Yan
Review: Nice coffee in an oasis in the middle of a hectic busy city

Name: Caffè Ristoro
Address: Av. Paulista, 37 - Paraíso, São Paulo
Author: Cello Ka
Review:
Unfriendly staff.
Better stay away from the “Focaccia”, it’s basically fat/oil soaked dough with some garnish.
Bill was 105,50R$, paid by card and unfortunately didn’t check the maquininha and only later found out that I got charged 107,50, be aware!

Name: Caffè Ristoro
Address: Av. Paulista, 37 - Paraíso, São Paulo
Author: Luiz
Review: Nice place for having a special coffee or even a lunch. Close to Casa das Rosas and Paulista Mall. Good service. High quality.

Name: Caffè Ristoro
Address: Av. Paulista, 37 - Paraíso, São Paulo
Author: Patricia Paura
Review: Nice place, good food and great view to the roses.

Name: Caffè Ristoro
Address: Av. Paulista, 37 - Paraíso, São Paulo
Author: Katia Kouzelis (Teacher Kay)
Review: A great place in the open.

Name: Tectonica Café
Address: R. Min. Ferreira Alves, 686 - Pompeia, São Paulo
Author: Alexandre Lopes
Review: Simplicity is the key! Everything is so well prepared and the staff is really friendly and attentive. Food was great! Unfortunately I forgot to take a pic of the brownie they have... a must try.

Name: Tectonica Café
Address: R. Min. Ferreira Alves, 686 - Pompeia, São Paulo
Author: sachin kucheria
Review: Amazing food, coffee, staff - we ordered as much of the menu as we could but would definitely come back to try and eat all of their dishes! The mushroom peanut butter toast was especially interesting 😍🇧🇷

Name: Tectonica Café
Address: R. Min. Ferreira Alves, 686 - Pompeia, São Paulo
Author: Carlos Augusto Lopes de Almeida
Review: Great spot! Delicious coffee, unique preparations, and eclectic food choices. Bruna is a sweetheart!

Name: Tectonica Café
Address: R. Min. Ferreira Alves, 686 - Pompeia, São Paulo
Author: Hysteria
Review: Lovely food, beautiful quirky place, kind and attentive people 💚💛💙

Name: Tectonica Café

The staff is great and very friendly, but perhaps things would flow a little better if the server at the counter was a little less chatty. Anyway, the cakes are amazing. Don’t forget to try the pão de mel.

Name: Da Feira ao Baile Café
Address: Rua Marcos Azevedo, 109 - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: Fábio Henrique Bittes Terra
Review: Amazing cakes! One of the best in São Paulo.

Address: Rua Marcos Azevedo, 109 - Pinheiros, São Paulo

Address: R. Amazonas, 604 - Centro, São Caetano do Sul

Review: What a amazing coffee shop!! The environment, the attendance, the food and the drinks, everything is unbelievable amazing!! Awesome place to go with your laptop and work or study, hangout with your friends, family, girlfriend or boyfriend! :D
