Review:
Custo benefício incrível pela qualidade entregue, autoatendimento super intuitivo e simples.
Obs: se vc pedir sem tampa ou retirar a sua quando for entregue prepare-se para a surpresa.

Name: The Coffee
Address: R. Iguatemi, 128 - Itaim Bibi, São Paulo
Author: isabela furtado
Review: Bebida gostosa, ótimo custo benefício e atendimento maravilhoso!!

Name: The Coffee
Address: R. Iguatemi, 128 - Itaim Bibi, São Paulo
Author: bruno a
Review: Café bom

Name: The Coffee
Address: R. Iguatemi, 128 - Itaim Bibi, São Paulo
Author: Rafael Alves

Name: The Coffee
Address: Av. Brig. Faria Lima, 1358 - Jardim Paulistano, São Paulo
Author: Linea J
Review: I would love to visit this location but every time I’ve gone, they don’t have working wifi. 😔

Name: The Coffee
Address: Av. Brig. Faria Lima, 1358 - Jardim Paulistano, São Paulo
Author: Tahsin Engin Gökten
Review: Regular coffee, clean & neat place..

Name: The Coffee
Address: Av. Brig. Faria Lima, 1358 - Jardim Paulistano, São Paulo
Author: Bene Cruz
Review: Uma das melhores experiências que já tive em estabelecimentos da franquia! Atendimento excelente, funcionários extremamente simpáticos. O local é um pouco pequeno, mas fui em um horário tranquilo e acabou sendo muito acolhedor. Não poderia recomendar mais!

Name: The Coffee
Address: Av. Brig. Faria Lima, 1358 - Jardim Paulistano, São Paulo
Author: Daniel Andrade
Review: Finalmente fui conhecer o “The Coffee”. Horrível kkkkkk 13$ por um café com leite italac, leite sem crema, atendimento nível mcdonalds pra baixo! Menina mal humorada credo! Não volto mais!

Name: The Coffee
Address: Av. Brig. Faria Lima, 1358 - Jardim Paulistano, São Paulo
Author: Josias Lawrence Lopes
Review: Excelente café, saboroso, e sempre peço bebidas geladas nesse verão recomendo

Name: The Coffee
Address: R. Maj. Sertório, 519 - Vila Buarque, São Paulo
Author: Brendo Cesar
Review: Excellent coffee and service, I was very well attended by baristas Maxwell and Eduarda, both very attentive and well trained, the cakes are definitely worth trying.

Name: The Coffee
Address: R. Maj. Sertório, 519 - Vila Buarque, São Paulo
Author: Moe Khan
Review: Interesting coffee concept, uses native ingredients from the amazon.

Name: The Coffee
Address: R. Maj. Sertório, 519 - Vila Buarque, São Paulo
Author: Ana Paula Joaquim
Review: Max is fabulous! 😍❤️

Name: The Coffee
Address: R. Maj. Sertório, 519 - Vila Buarque, São Paulo
Author: e. t.
Review:
Esta unidade tinha algumas promoções de bebidas no cardápio, além de um cartão fidelidade (que pode gerar um cashback de até 5%).

Ela foi reformada há um tempo, ficando mais iluminada e agradável para consumo no local.

O chocold mint estava ok. Pedi o chai iced ginger, que estava em promoção, para experimentar, mas o achei um pouco aguado. Talvez precisasse chacoalhar, misturar mais, ou era gelo demais, quando termina vemos o copo com gelo pela metade, ou simples questão de gosto pessoal.

Atendentes mudam mas sempre são simpáticas e têm bom gosto musical, o que faz diferença quando consumimos por lá.

Name: The Coffee
Address: R. Maj. Sertório, 519 - Vila Buarque, São Paulo
Author: Pedro Wolfart
Review: Acabei de tomar café ali, serviço maravilhoso e a comida nem se fala, pedi um misto quente, um flat caramel e um cookie triple chocolate. Tudo uma delícia

Name: The Coffee
Address: Av. Pavão, 560 - Moema, São Paulo
Author: Tim Opitz
Review:
Really nice coffee shop. Modern and simple with great taste. Card payment only.
Nice outside area as well.

Name: The Coffee
Address: Av. Pavão, 560 - Moema, São Paulo
Author: Silvina Bender
Review: Great clean place with high quality coffee and matcha and amazing pão de queijo

Name: The Coffee
Address: Av. Pavão, 560 - Moema, São Paulo
Author: יסמין בנדר
Review: Great matcha 🍵 super cute place and good service😻

Name: The Coffee
Address: Av. Pavão, 560 - Moema, São Paulo
Author: Gabriel Zibordi
Review: Tooooop

Name: The Coffee
Address: Av. Pavão, 560 - Moema, São Paulo
Author: Rafaela Cardoso
Review: Espaço bem pequeno, apenas para esperar o  café ficar pronto, mas aconchegante. Você checa o cardápio e faz seu pedido no totem, sistema bem simples e fácil. Interação mínima com atendente. Brownie estava uma delícia.

Name: United by Coffee
Address: Terminal - Av. Washington Luís - Vila Congonhas, São Paulo
Author: MDMusic
Review: Don’t waste your time, pretty bad overall.

Name: United by Coffee
Address: Terminal - Av. Washington Luís - Vila Congonhas, São Paulo
Author: Andreza Velez
Review: Boa opção de lanches e café da manhã no aeroporto de Congonhas. Pão de queijo Forno de Minas, quentinho. Salada de frutas fresquinha. Cappuccino adoçado na medida certa. Por 45 reais, pelo padrão dos aeroportos, serve muito bem! Muitas tomadas!

Name: United by Coffee
Address: Terminal - Av. Washington Luís - Vila Congonhas, São Paulo
Author: Teresa Cristina Pereira
Review: Local bem movimentado, alguns lanches bons e preços altos.

Name: United by Coffee
Address: Terminal - Av. Washington Luís - Vila Congonhas, São Paulo
Author: Maxxi Rodrigues
Review: Lugar péssimo, comida ok, cheguei no café  e haviam 3 atendentes no balcão, conversando, nenhuma me atendeu, falei boa tarde e uma me olhou como se eu estivesse incomodando, perguntou o que eu queria, pedi, entregou uma parte e esqueceu a outra, quando falei, novamente me olhou como se eu estivesse atrapalhando a vida delas.  Péssimo atendimento, local sujo, cheio de lixo nas mesas e todas batendo papo. Uma pena, pois é bem decorado, agradável, mas com serviço horroroso.

Name: United by Coffee
Address: Terminal - Av. Washington Luís - Vila Congonhas, São Paulo
Author: Erick Ferreira
Review: A Atendente do caixa pessima, mal humorada, nao me olhou na cara, como se sentisse incomodada, e ainda teve q gritar 10 vezes pra outra q estava parada, ir fazer meu capuccino.Se pudesse seria zero estrelas. Fujam desse lugar.Sem falar dos preços altissimos.

Name: The Coffee
Address: Av. Prof. Alfonso Bovero, 481 - Anexo 487 - Sumaré, São Paulo
Author: Feh
Review: Lugar limpo, confortável, bebidas deliciosas e diversas opções de comidas (Tem cupom)!! Tudo fresquinho e pra quem vai de manhã como eu sempre tem pão de queijo saindo do forno 🥰 Baristas super atenciosas que ajudam no tablet e estão dispostas a responder qualquer dúvida. Melhor The coffee To Go que já fui, recomendo!

Name: The Coffee
Address: Av. Prof. Alfonso Bovero, 481 - Anexo 487 - Sumaré, São Paulo
Author: Luciano Garcia
Review:
Qualidade da bebida ótima, serviço depende do bom humor da atendente e ambiente bacana, mas extremamente decepcionante o pós-venda da empresa.
Ganhei dois copos térmicos dos meus filhos no Natal, que por sinal mantém a bebida quente por bastante tempo, porém as tampas de ambos já racharam e vazam. Disponibilizam apenas atendimento por whatsapp que não dão retorno de jeito nenhum.
Resumindo, não aconselho comprar um copo de R$ 114,00 para não poder usá-lo por causa da tampa que não funciona, e que eles mesmo reconhecem que as tampas deram problema, mas não dão a menor importância para a solução do problema.

Name: The Coffee
Address: Av. Prof. Alfonso Bovero, 481 - Anexo 487 - Sumaré, São Paulo
Author: pablo radical
Review: Eu pedi uma bebida de chocolate e menta gelada, o sabor é ótimo mas eles colocam bastante gelo no copo então acabou mto rápido, paguei 12 reais. O local tem um conceito de pedido e entrega rápida ,então  nao tem cadeiras para sentar, sinceramente não comprei as comidas pois pelo tamanho não vale o preço. A parte mais legal é a facilidade em fazer o seu pedido pois é realizado por um tablet no balcão, lá vc tem difersas opções de como personalizar seu pedido.

Name: The Coffee
Address: Av. Prof. Alfonso Bovero, 481 - Anexo 487 - Sumaré, São Paulo
Author: Yonne Malta
Review: Excelente cafeteria to go, itens de qualidade e ótimo café!

Name: The Coffee
Address: Av. Prof. Alfonso Bovero, 481 - Anexo 487 - Sumaré, São Paulo
Author: Marcus Vinicius Justo
Review:
As bebidas são maravilhosas. Provei umas três dos meus amigos e amei todas!
Achei os valores ótimos.
Curti também a forma de fazer o pedido pelo tablet, poder personalizar meu pedido e pagar ali mesmo.
Voltarei mais vezes!

Name: Coffee House Tatuapé
Address: R. Tuiuti, 2641 - Tatuapé, São Paulo
Author: Luiz Cardan
Review: Show

Name: Coffee House Tatuapé
Address: R. Tuiuti, 2641 - Tatuapé, São Paulo
Author: Sergio Fonseca
Review: Dentro das expectativas, bom atendimento, preço padrão, café saboroso …

Name: Coffee House Tatuapé
Address: R. Tuiuti, 2641 - Tatuapé, São Paulo
Author: Laura Salgueiro
Review: A comida estava muito boa, mas há muitas outras coisas para melhorar. Pedi um prato que acompanhava salada, mas eles só dão de tempero um molho pré pronto industrializado, nada do clássico azeite e vinagre. Os guardados são aqueles bem de baixa qualidade, meio impermeáveis. Não tem opções de doce zero açúcar.

Name: Coffee House Tatuapé
Address: R. Tuiuti, 2641 - Tatuapé, São Paulo
Author: Edilson Brito
Review:
Excelente atendimento
Ambiente moderno
Muitas guloseimas gostosas
E aquele café maravilhoso.
Vo retornar mais vezes
Super indico

Name: Coffee House Tatuapé
Address: R. Tuiuti, 2641 - Tatuapé, São Paulo
Author: patricia Eva Patrcia
Review: Top..ambiente maravilhoso..atendimento 10..comida perfeita.

Name: The Coffee
Address: Alameda Jaú, 476 - Jardim Paulista, São Paulo
Author: Nemo Chen
Review: I was in Sao Paulo for three days. The little coffee shop was near my hotel. Good coffee, friendly staff, highly recommended!

Name: The Coffee
Address: Alameda Jaú, 476 - Jardim Paulista, São Paulo
Author: Will C
Review: Ok

Name: The Coffee
Address: Alameda Jaú, 476 - Jardim Paulista, São Paulo
Author: Max Malysh

Name: The Coffee
Address: Alameda Jaú, 476 - Jardim Paulista, São Paulo
Author: e. t.
Review:
Pedi um coado white, pq não botei fé no barista e errei feio. Extraiu direitinho as notas adocicadas deste café. Da próxima, vou pedir meu preferido kraft. E colocou uma playlist brit pop anos 80 top.

O espaço é bem conceitual, onde o barista tem espaço para trabalhar e o cliente fica mal acomodado.

Name: The Coffee
Address: Alameda Jaú, 476 - Jardim Paulista, São Paulo
Author: Cátia Khouri
Review:
Experiência maravilhosa!
Fomos atendidos pela Júlia - barista super simpática e atenciosa.
Ela preparou com muito cuidado um café de torra média, coado, excepcional.
A torta de banana com gotas de chocolate meio amargo e pedacinhos de castanha (acho que do Pará) estava simplesmente divina! No ponto de açúcar, gordura, maciez e sabor.
Pra quem ama café e quer curtir uma experiência gostosa e agradável, super recomendo!!

Name: The Coffee Tatuapé
Address: R. Itapura, 1345 - Vila Gomes Cardim, São Paulo
Author: Patrick Klostermeier
Review:
I went there twice. Ordered a flat white every time. First time it was done by a guy and it was very very delicious. The Flat white was on point.
Second time, done by a girl that didn‘t seem to enjoy her job. Our flat whites were very bad. Milk was steamed wrong (No microfoam). It was FAR too hot and there for milky once we were able to drink it.
Consistency is key to customer satisfaction. Please give your stuff proper education.

Name: The Coffee Tatuapé
Address: R. Itapura, 1345 - Vila Gomes Cardim, São Paulo
Author: Shaun Webb
Review: This gets five stars not because it's the best coffee ever, it's because it's the best/only of its kind in Brazil. Coming from Australia you can get a serious craving for an actual barista made coffee and not just a Nespresso disappointment, this is where "The Coffee" comes in. They've managed to use Japanese minimalism to create a international style barista coffee bar that actually works here in Brazil. The espresso that I had was well balanced had good clarity and a very long sweet finish. The flat white was ok, bit heavy on the milk for me. I look forward to getting a coffee here everyday for the rest of my stay in São Paulo.

Name: The Coffee Tatuapé
Address: R. Itapura, 1345 - Vila Gomes Cardim, São Paulo
Author: Forest Lee
Review:
I drink coffee from here every day. I get an ice coffee with milk.

My Suggestion for the bussines: I think it would be great if you had "cold brew" coffee becaue that would make you the only coffee shop in town to have this.

Thank you for the wonderful coffee and service

Name: The Coffee Tatuapé
Address: R. Itapura, 1345 - Vila Gomes Cardim, São Paulo
Author: Alberto Alves Pinheiro
Review:
Me surpreendeu, Tonka latte meu favorito.
Gosto muito da linha padoca, Misto com tomate cereja,  Pão de queijo, croissant e o café de banana.
Conceito bacana recomendo.Melhor da Região

Name: The Coffee Tatuapé
Address: R. Itapura, 1345 - Vila Gomes Cardim, São Paulo
Author: Alberto Junior
Review: Péssima! Começando pelo atendimento, horrível! Zero empatia com o cliente. Já o produto segue a mesma linha que o atendimento, zero empatia com o cliente. Comprei uma banoffee, e presumo que tenha sido feito pela “Alexa”, pois me recuso a acreditar que tenha sido um chef, confeiteiro ou um cozinheiro que tenha feito algo tão artificial!

Name: The Coffee
Address: R. Vieira de Morais, 1110 - Campo Belo, São Paulo
Author: cristiana lee
Review: Great experience with Carol

Name: The Coffee
Address: R. Vieira de Morais, 1110 - Campo Belo, São Paulo
Author: Marina Ventura
Review: Fui num domingo, e tinha apenas um funcionário atendendo todos os pedidos do salão e ifood - demorou mais de 30 minutos para receber um café

Name: The Coffee
Address: R. Vieira de Morais, 1110 - Campo Belo, São Paulo
Author: Sara Ferreira
Review:
Amei o ambiente e em especial o atendimento da Manuele uma simpatia e muito sorridente o que fez uma enorme diferença pra mim no ambiente.

Estão parabéns pelo atendimento. Voltarei mais vezes concerteza.

Name: The Coffee
Address: R. Vieira de Morais, 1110 - Campo Belo, São Paulo
Author: Roberta Carnevali Alvares
Review: Meu café favorito! Saboroso, lugar tranquilo e atendimento nota 10! Sempre passo correndo antes do trabalho e a Thai é sempre muito atenciosa, gentil e rápida! Super recomendo!!

Name: The Coffee
Address: R. Vieira de Morais, 1110 - Campo Belo, São Paulo
Author: Vitória Rodrigues
Review:
Foi uma ótima experiência, lugar bem aconchegante e moderno.
Tive um ótimo atendimento pela atendente Thai super simpática e atenciosa.

Name: Coffee.7
Address: R. Dr. Costa Júnior, 390 - Água Branca, São Paulo
Author: Rene Junior
Review:
Vamos lá!
Café muito bem preparado, tinha várias opções e escolhi café coado na hora! Fantástico e muito saboroso. O cheiro do café sendo coado na hora é muito gostoso.

Ambiente muito aconchegante e limpo. Tinha um espaço para mensagens no post-it super legal, revistas e revistinhas para crianças.

Serviço muito bom com cordialidade e atenção.

Ahhh! Não posso deixar de registrar que os combos no cardápio são nomes de músicas 🎷 🎸. Som ambiente muito agradável.

Conta ainda com um espaço de coworking.

Vale muito passar para um café e conferir!

Name: Coffee.7
Address: R. Dr. Costa Júnior, 390 - Água Branca, São Paulo
Author: Marcos Moreira
Review:
Que lugar Aconchegante 😊.. localizado no Bairro Água Branca .. SP .. com cardápio de cafés que vc escolhe através da títulos de música 🎧 …. decoração alegre 😀 e música ambiente compõem um ambiente muito acolhedor !!
Atendimento outro diferencial - Vanessa .. .. super prestativo e muito atenciosa  !!
😊

Name: Coffee.7
Address: R. Dr. Costa Júnior, 390 - Água Branca, São Paulo
Author: Rogério Hiroshi
Review: Muito boa a experiência! Local agradável, bom café e delícias doces e salgadas variadas. Atendimento ótimo! Hoje dia 12/12 após um longo tempo sem voltar ao Coffee.7 tomei um belíssimo spresso e provei 2 quiches alho poro e bacon muito boas! Local agradavel, atendimento primoroso super Recomendo a visita. Estão sempre atualizando decoração de acordo época ano e confraternizações.

Name: Coffee.7
Address: R. Dr. Costa Júnior, 390 - Água Branca, São Paulo
Author: SEV S. Jr
Review: Um local em que o café é valorizado, sempre bem tirado ou coado pela Barista Vanessa Flosi. Ambiente com wi-fi e salas para reuniões.

Name: Coffee.7
Address: R. Dr. Costa Júnior, 390 - Água Branca, São Paulo
Author: Bianca Foratori
Review: Costumava comer sempre na loja física, gostava muito do lugar. Fiz um pedido no iFood, estou a poucos mts de distância do local, e atrasou absurdamente. Pedi a loja pra cancelar antes do pedido sair e eles enviaram mesmo assim e depois de mandar, responderam que não era culpa deles e que foi o iFood que “bugou”. Pra piorar, o lanche veio cheio de pelos dentro da embalagem, tenho fotos. Obviamente não pude comer. Fiquei muito surpresa pois sempre fui bem atendida pessoalmente, uma pena. Vou tentar subir a foto depois.

Name: My Coffee Premium
Address: Hiper Mercado Bergamini - My Coffee Premium, Av. Luís Stamatis, 431 - loja 62, São Paulo
Author: Li Rizzi
Review: Muito agradável, super bem recebidos ! Café maravilhoso

Name: My Coffee Premium
Address: Hiper Mercado Bergamini - My Coffee Premium, Av. Luís Stamatis, 431 - loja 62, São Paulo
Author: Lucia Castro
Review: Que lugar lindo e aconchegante os produtos são de extrema qualidade amei e recomendo ❤️🥰

Name: My Coffee Premium
Address: Hiper Mercado Bergamini - My Coffee Premium, Av. Luís Stamatis, 431 - loja 62, São Paulo
Author: Day Ribeiro
Review:
Simplesmente amei....
Ambiente bonito,limpo e ótimo atendimento.
Pedi uma torta de palmito e um Frozen de café ☕.
Confesso que fazia tempo que não encontrava qualidade nas cafeterias e eles estão de parabéns.Prezo pela qualidade.👏🏼🎇

Name: My Coffee Premium
Address: Hiper Mercado Bergamini - My Coffee Premium, Av. Luís Stamatis, 431 - loja 62, São Paulo
Author: bianca ri
Review: Melhor lugar para quem quer tomar um café e relaxar , ambiente tranquilo e agradável, fora os doces que são os melhores que ja provei , super recomendo 😁

Name: My Coffee Premium
Address: Hiper Mercado Bergamini - My Coffee Premium, Av. Luís Stamatis, 431 - loja 62, São Paulo
Author: Tamires Ferreira
Review:
O atendimento é maravilhoso muito atenciosas

Os chescake é perfeito uma delícia da pra sentir cada sabor, a calda de frutas vermelhas maravilhosa 😍😍

Name: Sensory Coffee
Address: Alameda Min. Rocha Azevedo, 1094 - Jardim Paulista, São Paulo
Author: hideki nakaya
Review:
Atendimento e sabor, fusão de qualidade!

A cafeteria é super bem decorada, clara e com atmosfera tranquila, tem uns três espaços e bar no fundo, fui com amigos passar a tarde e foi maravilhoso.

O atendimento super personalizado, explicam como funciona o local e sobre seus cafés, tudo com calma e educação.

O café acho que era com toque de doce de leite no fundo, achei interessante.
Os drinks também são ótimos, os pratos são bem decorados e saborosos, o toast de figo é divino, o sanduiche que peguei new york, achei um pouco duro o pão e queijo crocante no meio, porém gostoso, a carne estava bem temperada.

A puff da mesa que sentamos achei um pouco manchado, por ser branco, senti um pouco e falta de cuidado, mas nada que não me faça voltar de novo.

Quero voltar para experimentar mais bebidas e as sobremesas!

Name: Sensory Coffee
Address: Alameda Min. Rocha Azevedo, 1094 - Jardim Paulista, São Paulo
Author: Roger Ohayashi
Review:
Bem atendidos, recebemos uma dose para degustar. A pessoa que nos atendeu foi super legal, explicou sobre a torra e o café que íamos tomar.
O espaço é amplo, muitas mesas. Tudo muito clean. Gostei da ideia do balcão ser misturado com as pessoas. Com certeza é um bom espaço para conversar ou até trabalhar um pouco.

Name: Sensory Coffee
Address: Alameda Min. Rocha Azevedo, 1094 - Jardim Paulista, São Paulo
Author: Giovana
Review:
Unidade da cafeteria Sensory, que torra seus próprios cafés, são uma delícia.

Pedimos 2 filtrados na Hario, um de fruta do conde e outro de iogurte de morango, ambos deliciosos.

Pra comer pedimos uma fatia de babka, cujas fotos eu sempre vejo no Instagram e tenho vontade de comer. Fiquei decepcionada porque veio uma fatia massuda e seca, feita há alguns dias, sem o brilho de açúcar que parece haver nas fotos.

Na vitrine as comidas pareciam meio xoxinhas mesmo mas achei que eram só amostras. Agora fiquei na dúvida.

Mas os pratos de torradas que o pessoal das outras mesas pediu estavam bem bonitos!

O atendimento é gentil, mas mesmo com o lugar vazio os cafés demoraram um pouco (mas nada demais) e a babka demorou bem.

O ambiente é bonito, minimalista e moderno, com bastante luz natural. Mas por ser tudo em tons claros dá pra ver o desgaste.

Vale muito a visita pelo café! Mas escolha bem o que quer comer e tenha paciência.

@gigicomidinhas

Name: Sensory Coffee
Address: Alameda Min. Rocha Azevedo, 1094 - Jardim Paulista, São Paulo
Author: Tatiana Theoto
Review: ótimo ambiente, parece que você está dentro de um sonho… não dá pra explicar direito. Dentro de uma pasta do Pinterest de bom gosto. Bem aesthetic. Pedi um sanduba chamado Shalom e estava bem gostoso, mas infelizmente eles não tinham o gravlax. O smoothie de cupuaçu era delicioso.

Name: Sensory Coffee
Address: Alameda Min. Rocha Azevedo, 1094 - Jardim Paulista, São Paulo
Author: João V.
Review: nossa foi uma agradabilíssimo inicio de dia com uma comidinha deliciosa e atendimento atencioso e gentil. a karina arrasou no atendimento. o croissant estava delicioso e ameeei a saladinha de maçã que acompanhava. o cafe foi babado tambem amei demais. ai super gostei e vou voltar pra provar mais pratos 🌟💋🌟💋🌟💋

Name: The Coffee
Address: Av. Caminho do Mar, 2941 - Rudge Ramos, São Bernardo do Campo
Author: Danielo D2
Review: I'm loving the fact that we have such a high quality coffee here at our doorstep in Rudge Ramos, our neighborhood deserved it for quite a while and the wait is over. Let me break it down for you: it's cashless,  so you're going to need a credit or debit card. Either that or you download their app and order in advance, then you just come pick it up. If you're not tech savvy, don't worry, the staff is super friendly and well trained, they'll help you out . The place itself has a japanese minimalist style, there's music too, awesome. There's not a whole bunch of food to choose from, but the options they have are quite nice, special note to the plain croissant,  it's heavenly made. The coffee is the best part, of course, and that is what you won't be disappointed by, solid "A" from me.

Name: The Coffee
Address: Av. Caminho do Mar, 2941 - Rudge Ramos, São Bernardo do Campo
Author: Esra Kaliber
Review: A quite, lovely cafe. Nice coffee, savoury options, desserts and perfect service

Name: The Coffee
Address: Av. Caminho do Mar, 2941 - Rudge Ramos, São Bernardo do Campo
Author: CAIO VINTURINI
Review: Ótimo local para degustar um café especial de verdade. Possível encontrar doces e salgados bem elaborados. Não há estacionamento no local.

Name: The Coffee
Address: Av. Caminho do Mar, 2941 - Rudge Ramos, São Bernardo do Campo
Author: Guilherme Elias
Review:
Encontrei essa cafeteria perto de onde trabalho, e como estava com um tempo livre decidi visitar.

Para um Cafe To Go, não acho que o local possa ser considerado pequeno. O ambiente é agradável e esteticamente bonito, e o fato de ter tocado Duvet (Bôa) enquanto eu estava lá me conquistou um pouco rs.

Os pedidos são feitos de forma prática através de um tablet, e o cliente realiza o pagamento ali mesmo. O café que pedi estava excelente!

O único ponto negativo do local é que não aceitam VR, porém mesmo assim eu pretendo visitar mais vezes.

Name: The Coffee
Address: Av. Caminho do Mar, 2941 - Rudge Ramos, São Bernardo do Campo
Author: Cynthia Samora
Review: Estive aí no sábado à tarde e tive uma queda no degrau de entrada de vocês que é totalmente mau sinalizado e tem uma falha em uma parte dele! Isso precisa ser sinalizado urgente e a falha ser arrumada! Tive uma lesão no tendão do tornozelo por isso, e se fosse uma criança ou idoso? Poderia ser muito pior

Name: Mana Coffee 마나
Address: Rua Correia de Melo, 192 - Bom Retiro, São Paulo
Author: Jojo Dio
Review: Good, affordable, kind staff and a pleasant environment.

Name: Mana Coffee 마나
Address: Rua Correia de Melo, 192 - Bom Retiro, São Paulo
Author: Akemi Kazihara
Review:
Fui hoje e pedi um matcha latte com yakult e um cookie de matcha. As duas coisas que pedi estavam muito boas, mas o cookie poderia ter mais gosto de matcha.
O ambiente é bem tranquilo com mesas ao ar livre e guarda-sóis. O lugar é meio escondido, é uma porta ao lado do Shoshana, mas vale a pena conhecer.

Name: Mana Coffee 마나
Address: Rua Correia de Melo, 192 - Bom Retiro, São Paulo
Author: Beatriz Lima
Review: Pratos muito bons, bebidas diferentes vale sempre experimentar, atendimento fenomenal. Preço super ok para o bolso!

Name: Mana Coffee 마나
Address: Rua Correia de Melo, 192 - Bom Retiro, São Paulo
Author: Victoria Botaro
Review: O café é bem gostoso e a experiência é incrível! Pra quem gosta de matcha, esse é o verdadeiro destino no Bom Retiro!

Name: Mana Coffee 마나
Address: Rua Correia de Melo, 192 - Bom Retiro, São Paulo
Author: Cassia Netto
Review: É um refúgio nessa cidade agitada. O ambiente aconchegante e o ótimo atendimento me fazem querer fugir para a cafeteria em qualquer horário livre do meu dia. Claro que também adoro experimentar todos os itens do cardápio diferenciado.  Dá pra notar o carinho dos proprietários com o lugar.

Name: Alzo Coffee
Address: R. Prof. Herbert Baldus, 141 - Vila Lageado, São Paulo
Author: Robson Pissinatti
Review:
Ambiente aconchegante com atendimento.

Eles possuem alguns grãos especiais, hoje provamos dois grãos  mokaju e nego drama recomendo.

Brownie aprovado.

Name: Alzo Coffee
Address: R. Prof. Herbert Baldus, 141 - Vila Lageado, São Paulo
Author: Bruno Vasconcelos (BrunoEasy)
Review:
Alzo Coffee é incrível! O lugar é muito gostoso, perfeito para relaxar.

O pessoal que trabalha lá é super legal, sempre atencioso e simpático, o que deixa tudo ainda melhor. A comida é uma delícia, com várias opções legais para experimentar, tanto para comer lá quanto para levar. Eu recomendo muito!

Se você está procurando um lugar legal para tomar um café, Alzo Coffee é uma ótima escolha!

Name: Alzo Coffee
Address: R. Prof. Herbert Baldus, 141 - Vila Lageado, São Paulo
Author: Rafaela Cardoso
Review: Tudo muito gostoso e bem servido. Preço justo. Ambiente simples, mas aconchegante com boa trilha sonora. Atendimento solícito. Não aceita Sodexo.

Name: Alzo Coffee
Address: R. Prof. Herbert Baldus, 141 - Vila Lageado, São Paulo
Author: Bianca Blanco
Review: A experiência com os cafés foram excelentes! Além do espaço acolhedor e sabores, tivemos uma aula incrível sobre processo de produção daqueles grãos, bem como formas de explorar ao máximo a extração. Degustamos duas empadas também. Saborosas, mas achamos pequena. No mais, voltaremos outras vezes com certeza! Ah, ainda recebi um mimo pelo outubro rosa :)

Name: Alzo Coffee
Address: R. Prof. Herbert Baldus, 141 - Vila Lageado, São Paulo
Author: Bruna Dezuani
Review:
Impecável!!! Atendimento diferenciado, as atendentes, o dono, muito simpáticos e solícitos! Nos deu uma aula sobre café, e falando em café, o melhor que já tomei na vida, os grãos de minas são maravilhosos!

Realmente uma experiência maravilhosa, voltaremos para provar as comidinhas e outros tipos de cafés!

Name: The Coffee
Address: R. Oscar Freire, 1911 - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: Bruce McCarthy
Review: Friendly place, quick service. Espresso was well made but slightly under-extracted (a little sour). Suggest you grind the beans just a little finer.

Name: The Coffee
Address: R. Oscar Freire, 1911 - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: ali rez
Review: Lovely staff and the loveliest coffee all made authentically. If you don’t speak Portuguese you can order with the sexy iPad 😜 very European style outdoor seating area in the Oscar area, which is very swanky and stylish.

Name: The Coffee
Address: R. Oscar Freire, 1911 - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: Neto Antonio
Review: The coffee is not very good and it’s sooooooo expensive

Name: The Coffee
Address: R. Oscar Freire, 1911 - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: Ang
Review: Drip coffee hit the spot. 👌

Name: The Coffee
Address: R. Oscar Freire, 1911 - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: Nathan Wicker
Review: Good coffee

Name: The Coffee
Address: R. Oscar Freire, 1119 - Cerqueira César, São Paulo
Author: Victoria Conti
Review: They always keep the quality. The app is pretty great and works perfectly well.

Name: The Coffee
Address: R. Oscar Freire, 1119 - Cerqueira César, São Paulo
Author: Jaime Flores Aristizábal
Review: not great at all, the matcha coffee is watery, no coffee flavour and no matcha flavour, maybe it's a one time thing but, happened to me, best!

Name: The Coffee
Address: R. Oscar Freire, 1119 - Cerqueira César, São Paulo
Author: Lauren Jordon
Review: I was in desperate need for a coffee fix as I am from London and we live off coffee! I had the Tonka iced latte, and my family members had the iced salted caramel latte and a black americano. Very yummy! There was also two very nice gents that were working and helped me to order in English. I will return! Thank you.

Name: The Coffee
Address: R. Oscar Freire, 1119 - Cerqueira César, São Paulo
Author: amehrer1
Review:
The coffee: outstanding!! Really fantastic!! Very rich and complex flavor.
The matcha: not great. It's pre-mixed in a squeeze bottle instead of freshly frothed. Also a little bitter/oxidized. Better storage/preparation practices might help this, but it may just be lower-quality matcha powder.
Very cute cafe, come for "The Coffee"!

Name: The Coffee
Address: R. Oscar Freire, 1119 - Cerqueira César, São Paulo
Author: Kostas Papadopoulos
Review: Friendly place with great coffee! Highly recommended

Name: Over Coffee Roasters
Address: R. Eugênio de Medeiros, 466 - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: Pia
Review: Such good coffee, atmosphere is good to chat with a friend or to work! It’s full of space and the snacks are amazing. I recommend the cinnamon roll!!

Name: Over Coffee Roasters
Address: R. Eugênio de Medeiros, 466 - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: Alexis
Review: I had a great cup of coffee, with some nice technical explanation about the coffee i had and extra beans that i have bought. Nice hidden  gem in the far west of the neighbourhood of Pinheiros.

Name: Over Coffee Roasters
Address: R. Eugênio de Medeiros, 466 - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: T J
Review: Great place for speciality coffee

Name: Over Coffee Roasters
Address: R. Eugênio de Medeiros, 466 - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: Ricardo Sabesp
Review: Good for break.

Name: Over Coffee Roasters
Address: R. Eugênio de Medeiros, 466 - Pinheiros, São Paulo
Author: Cláudio Oliveira
Review: Show

Name: THE SMOKIST COFFEE Shinjukugyoenmae Shop
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 1 Chome−14−5 新宿Kmビル 1F
Author: René Bus
Review: Cute little coffee place where you can also smoke inside, a must because smoking areas are very rare in Shinjuku. Good coffee, great coffee jelly!

Name: THE SMOKIST COFFEE Shinjukugyoenmae Shop
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 1 Chome−14−5 新宿Kmビル 1F
Author: Roger Liao
Review: Thought it only had a designated area for smoking, but actually is allowed everywhere, justifying its name I guess. So come here if you're a heavy smoker, or simply enjoy watching people binge smoking.

Name: THE SMOKIST COFFEE Shinjukugyoenmae Shop
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 1 Chome−14−5 新宿Kmビル 1F
Author: Haldana Elliott
Review: SMOKIST cafe…my beloved… full of depressed salaryman and cheap coffee… it has my whole heart. I did all of my schoolwork here, burned through three packs over a six hour sit down. SMOKIST, I will love you forever

Name: THE SMOKIST COFFEE Shinjukugyoenmae Shop
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 1 Chome−14−5 新宿Kmビル 1F
Author: Xiro Ar (Alphonz)
Review:
This is the 4th branch shop of “THE SMOKIST COFFEE”, not a Caffe Veloce as it used to be. A new concept café chain under Veloce franchise, “a coffee and light meal place for smokers”.
So, the entire café is “free-smoking”, not smoke-free, in fact, an ashtray is automatically served when you make a first order at the counter.

The place is equipped with a specially-made powerful air purifier, and its website says “customers (i.e. smokers) say they sense no hint of smell nor feel smoky inside”… While I do like such new concepts, appreciate their marketing challenge and I usually don’t care about secondary smoking or cigarette smell much, sorry, this place is actually a bit smelly and my eyes catch a little smoky irritation after half an hour in the café.

Besides, the basic coffee prices are, again, a bit higher than Veloce even though almost everything other than the ashtray (and mug) service seems the same as its brother shops. I’ve got to say that I would avoid these The Smokiest Coffee shops when having a cup next time. The service of staff and coffee are fine, though.

Name: THE SMOKIST COFFEE Shinjukugyoenmae Shop
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 1 Chome−14−5 新宿Kmビル 1F
Author: Sergej Paris
Review: The place is nice, but only if you are a smoker or if you don't mind to be covered in smoke from people who are smoking around you 🚬

Name: OMUSUBI CAFE
Address: Shibuya City, Sarugakucho, 3−7 ヘーベルSTAY代官山 1階 Daikanyama Kinoshita Bld
Author: Joshua Temple
Review: We stopped by for breakfast at the start of our trip and lunch at the end of our trip! We loved this cafe so much we went twice and would go again. The set menus are fantastic. The vibe is excellent, beautiful interior, nice music, wonderfully attentive staff. Coffee is good and refreshing. Food was all fantastic. We loved their pork, chicken, spinach, and onigiri of course. The set menus can add up quickly as you add items that are not the cheapest on the menu, which can rack the bill up but I do believe it’s very worth it.

Name: OMUSUBI CAFE
Address: Shibuya City, Sarugakucho, 3−7 ヘーベルSTAY代官山 1階 Daikanyama Kinoshita Bld
Author: Harry Lee
Review:
Really chill place for a light lunch. The vibe is very relaxing. The onigiri was very nicely prepared. Sides have a very delicate flavour. Great attention to detail, down to their choice of chopsticks

Drop me a like if you doing this helpful

Name: OMUSUBI CAFE
Address: Shibuya City, Sarugakucho, 3−7 ヘーベルSTAY代官山 1階 Daikanyama Kinoshita Bld
Author: Maria K
Review:
We went there for lunch and liked it so much that we returned for dinner. The Onigiri are freshly prepared, the salmon was tasty and the service was foreigner friendly even though they didn’t speak English. We used Google translate, then.
Would definitely recommend!

Name: OMUSUBI CAFE
Address: Shibuya City, Sarugakucho, 3−7 ヘーベルSTAY代官山 1階 Daikanyama Kinoshita Bld
Author: Justin Shircliff
Review: I have passed this place countless times and never stopped in, but I’ve been to the small Omusubi branch in Toritsudaigaku, and enjoyed my meal there. So I thought I would finally stop in here. Before I just tried the onigiri, but this time I opted for the set, which includes two sides and miso soup. Everything was good, but I just find the price a little high. For two onigiri and the sides, plus a drink, the price is over 2000 yen. I’ll go back for the onigiri, but the sets are just a little too steep. The service has been fast and friendly always.

Name: OMUSUBI CAFE
Address: Shibuya City, Sarugakucho, 3−7 ヘーベルSTAY代官山 1階 Daikanyama Kinoshita Bld
Author: Jason Chuei
Review: Pleasant looking cafe, with natural woods and a lattice bar structure. Matcha latte was like warm and too milky unfortunately.

Name: Noa Cafe
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 5 Chome−8−5 １０号館 地下１階 ニュー銀座ビル
Author: Stephen Chan
Review: Ordered Chocolate Banana and Strawberry Waffle. Both are crispy and fluffy. Golden brown in color. Sweetness wise, it tasted just nice and not too sweet. Good.

Name: Noa Cafe
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 5 Chome−8−5 １０号館 地下１階 ニュー銀座ビル
Author: Arda
Review: Has an entry at the side of the building or you can go one floor down. Sandwiches and waffles are only options but there are different kinds and ones I tried were good. While it is pricey (still quite cheap in Ginza standards) portions are large enough that it justifies. While personnel doesn't speak English, they can help and direct enough. There is a QR on the table you use to order without calling the waitress.

Name: Noa Cafe
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 5 Chome−8−5 １０号館 地下１階 ニュー銀座ビル
Author: Sara
Review: We had breakfast here and unfortunately it was below expectation, especially considering the price point. First of all, it took 40 minutes for the food to arrive. The waffles are not good, very dry and tasteless. They put a lot of syrup on it to camouflage it, but that only makes it dry and overly sweet. Presentation wise it looks very pretty though. We payed 4000¥ for 2 people which is not that much in Ginza but at this rate we could've just gotten waffles from a convenience store. Would not recommend going here.

Name: Noa Cafe
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 5 Chome−8−5 １０号館 地下１階 ニュー銀座ビル
Author: T. GeBrim
Review:
Carefully cooked in the restaurant.

I went there for the Belgian waffles.
It's hard to find a place that offers such a wide variety of toppings.

The food is carefully prepared in-store, so it's hot and cold, as you'd expect.
The prices are high, but you'll be convinced if you consider the cost of the location and the white, relaxed atmosphere despite being underground.
It's a good deal.

Name: Noa Cafe
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 5 Chome−8−5 １０号館 地下１階 ニュー銀座ビル
Author: T Saka
Review:
visited here on weekend to eat breakfast.
I ordered Cafe-Latte with toast, my wife did Strong blend with waffle. Toast and Waffle were quite fluffy!
I spent cozy time in here.
If you are smoker, you can do it. Smoking area is totally separated.

Name: Double Tall
Address: Shibuya City, Jingumae, 1 Chome−11−11, Green Fantasia, ２階
Author: Justin Shircliff
Review: I really like the coffee here, and have been to another one of their stores in Shinjuku. This one is much busier and has more food options than the other one, but the Shinjuku location is a little more laid back. Not only is the coffee good, but the cheesecake was solid. Friendly and fast service too. Can get crowded on the weekends, but worth your time.

Name: Double Tall
Address: Shibuya City, Jingumae, 1 Chome−11−11, Green Fantasia, ２階
Author: Christine Joy Mapatac
Review: Tried their chicken curry and cheesecake, so good! Even though it's a weekend and lunchtime, we did not have to wait long to be seated. You can smell the food from the street and the taste did not disappoint.

Name: Double Tall
Address: Shibuya City, Jingumae, 1 Chome−11−11, Green Fantasia, ２階
Author: Julius “Jules” Veloria
Review: Food is good, served quickly. Lunch was 1,400 yen and you can add a salad, drink, and dessert (the affogato wa recommended to me) for not much more.  The service is also friendly.  The location is great, in the middle of Harajuku. The ambience feels nice, a very  intimate coffee shop, with good background music but you don't feel out of place having an alcoholic drink. One minor issue was the pricing doesn't match what they ultimately charge, which led to being overcharged.

Name: Double Tall
Address: Shibuya City, Jingumae, 1 Chome−11−11, Green Fantasia, ２階
Author: Emily
Review: The curry wasn’t the most flavorful I’ve ever had, but the toppings (egg, pickles, cashews, tomato) were a nice touch. The coffee was VERY good. I got a cafe latte and was impressed at the quality, even as someone who drinks a lot of coffee. I’d come back just for the coffee to be honest.

Name: Double Tall
Address: Shibuya City, Jingumae, 1 Chome−11−11, Green Fantasia, ２階
Author: payel basu
Review: The best banana caramel pudding and spicy chicken wings in tokyo as per me. I visit again and again for these two. Do try shrimp cocktail and the awesome collection of alcoholic beverages. Worth visiting

Name: coto cafe
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 5 Chome−17−6 中田ビル 2F
Author: the kidddo
Review: Food was great and staff nice, but there was a line in the saircase and we had to wait in the heat, no big problem but if you are hungry go somewhere else.

Name: coto cafe
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 5 Chome−17−6 中田ビル 2F
Author: Michael Mauer
Review: Great hidden gem of a cafe. I had scones, which were exceptional - I think they came right out of the oven. The mocha I had was also great. The drinks are much more centered on sweeter, espresso+milk kind of stuff but they’ve got more simple options too. It’s kind of slim pickings for stuff like this in the area so I’m glad I found it.

Name: coto cafe
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 5 Chome−17−6 中田ビル 2F
Author: Janelle
Review: Nice place to go if you're in Shinjuku. This cafe is quite popular so better have a reservation first before you visit here or you have to wait for an hour or more to get a table when it's busy. The cafe is not that spacious but they serve great food (taco rice and tea cheesecake 👍). Interior decor is something to look forward to when you visit there.

Name: coto cafe
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 5 Chome−17−6 中田ビル 2F
Author: Jason Chuei
Review: Cute little cafe, located near Shinjuku 3-Chome station. On the second floor, up a couple flights of stairs. Old wooden tables, nice natural light, quaint setting. Friendly and smiley staff.

Name: coto cafe
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 5 Chome−17−6 中田ビル 2F
Author: Torsten Scholz
Review: Excellent food and service. Small, but cozy cafe. We really enjoyed our time here. Atmosphere and music were on point.

Name: Blue Bottle Coffee Shibuya
Address: 1 Chome-7-3 Jinnan, Shibuya City
Author: Aleš Chromec
Review:
Amazing cafe. It's located within small park.

From the side of of building there is nice outside seating area which can be used even in the rain.

On the second floor there are places suitable for sitting in with laptop and also few sofas.

Name: Blue Bottle Coffee Shibuya
Address: 1 Chome-7-3 Jinnan, Shibuya City
Author: Kayne (Kano La La)
Review:
From the coffee to the sweets, there's no room for doubt.
Architectural delight, blending right in the scene,
Outdoor seating 'mongst the trees, so serene.
Inside's a stunner, designed with such flair,
Upstairs meeting room, chill or connect, if you dare.
Blue Bottle Cafe, where style meets taste,
In Shibuya, it's the spot, ain't no time to waste.

Name: Blue Bottle Coffee Shibuya
Address: 1 Chome-7-3 Jinnan, Shibuya City
Author: Eric Miller
Review:
Ample space for early morning caffeine-hounds. Tucked away in a semi-convenient location in Shibuya, Blue Bottle does it again with another exceptionally well thought out space-within-a-space. Counter and outdoor seating on the ground floor, lounge seating on the second. Though not as large as the Daikanyama location, it is larger than the Aoyama location.

A trend has seemingly emerged with Blue Bottle offering unique menu items at different locations. Here they offer a new twist on their hand crafted sweet or savory waffles with the addition of “Cinnamon Butter.” Sprinkled with finely chopped chocolate bits, the cinnamon infused air-whipped butter brings a new level of sweetness and texture to their mainstay breakfast treat offering.

Name: Blue Bottle Coffee Shibuya
Address: 1 Chome-7-3 Jinnan, Shibuya City
Author: Tanisha Hippolyte
Review: The staff here are so friendly and helpful. We had the grilled cheese with tomato soup and the Waffle with cream. My grilled cheese was so warm and comforting. The waffle wasn’t too sweet and presented really nicely. The cafe had a mellow atmosphere with nice lighting.

Name: Blue Bottle Coffee Shibuya
Address: 1 Chome-7-3 Jinnan, Shibuya City
Author: Hang Man Helen Fung
Review: It's a hot day but worth going. It's a nice spacious environment and very relaxing, The single origin coffee and the limited cheesecake are good (not a NY cheesecake style)! 😋😋 Would definitely come back again!

Name: Mobomoga
Address: Shibuya City, Udagawacho, 4−9, Kuretake Bldg., 2F
Author: A Fowles
Review: Nice atmosphere, dark and relaxed. Food was nice, a bit salty but good flavour. Quite far from the station but worth a trip.

Name: Mobomoga
Address: Shibuya City, Udagawacho, 4−9, Kuretake Bldg., 2F
Author: Markus Lehr-Unger
Review:
Delicious food with huge portions in cozy flair with extremely friendly staff.
Only the ordering mechanism is weird (scan QR code on your phone to get to a website and order online for your table. there's wifi so tourists can do it too).

Name: Mobomoga
Address: Shibuya City, Udagawacho, 4−9, Kuretake Bldg., 2F
Author: Isaac Ruperez
Review: 美味しい。I had the Bacon-egg curry and a Mogajuice, both amazing.

Name: Mobomoga
Address: Shibuya City, Udagawacho, 4−9, Kuretake Bldg., 2F
Author: Andrey Georgiev
Review: Food is good, portions are bigger than your stomach.

Name: Mobomoga
Address: Shibuya City, Udagawacho, 4−9, Kuretake Bldg., 2F
Author: J B
Review:
the taco salad is excellent and great portion size for the money. The drinks are too expensive I thought.
Atmosphere is very antique cafe style. I'd go again.

Name: Cure Maid Café
Address: Chiyoda City, Sotokanda, 1 Chome−2−7 オノデンビル 4F 本店
Author: Dana Victoria
Review: Service is straight & to the point, I think the server may have been irritated since we did not speak Japanese. Along with the menus there is also a set of rules printed about taking photos, no outside food, etc. We did not order food but it did look tasty! Our party number was odd; therefore we may have been louder since we could not sit together. Keep in mind that each person must order something. There is also a restroom inside the restaurant for reference.

Name: Cure Maid Café
Address: Chiyoda City, Sotokanda, 1 Chome−2−7 オノデンビル 4F 本店
Author: Ethan C
Review: I’ve been here twice and highly recommend it. The food is good and it has such a relaxed environment. This is Japans oldest Maid Cafe.

Name: Cure Maid Café
Address: Chiyoda City, Sotokanda, 1 Chome−2−7 オノデンビル 4F 本店
Author: Lapiz Razuli
Review:
The teas were very nice, I ordered both cure originals, both had a very pleasant fragrant.
Also ordered the LL tea, not quite my thing, but nothing wrong with that too.
The omurice was nice too.
Others were okay.

Just a word of caution, make up your mind and order all at once at the start, the staffs are pretty busy. I made 2 additional orders after my initial, which caused abit of confusion. Thankfully it got sorted out pretty quickly. But I would imagine it can make life difficult if you don't speak any Japanese.

Name: Cure Maid Café
Address: Chiyoda City, Sotokanda, 1 Chome−2−7 オノデンビル 4F 本店
Author: Mewslie
Review:
We came for an afternoon break on the recommendation for a cafe where the servers are girls in maid uniforms and not the commercialized maid café sing and dance production. It was mostly quiet but filled up while we ate. While most of the patrons were men, there were a few couples and a group of girls who came for the showcase anime.

Service was pretty fast and just like at a normal cafe. Payment is at register at the entrance after you eat.

The food was average, although we only had desserts. The price is maybe slightly high for the food itself so I guess you are also paying for the theme and location. But it's a nice option for a rest, and it's quiet too.

The furniture is quite dark with white accents but the space is still echo-y enough that it has a cafeteria vibe. I like the how there's a showcase show on that switches now and then so you can catch some episodes, order themed food and check out some merchandise. Everything is clean and there's no weird smell that some other stores tend to have. The bathroom was also surprisingly nice.

Name: Cure Maid Café
Address: Chiyoda City, Sotokanda, 1 Chome−2−7 オノデンビル 4F 本店
Author: Ariella Rollins
Review: Went with my family. It's our first time in Japan. I wanted a classy maid cafe and it did not disappoint. The five of us came on a weekend and got a reservation ticket. One hour later, we returned and they gave us a table. The food was wonderful. Please don't take pictures of the maids, it is not allowed without permission. Due to the European theme, the staff here knows much more English than other restaurants. The only thing that could be improved is faster service but I understand since it's such a popular place, with many customers and only about 3 maids to host and serve. Finally, please don't order too much food as take out is not allowed. (Google maps says it's allowed but the maids informed me that it is not allowed.)

Name: Time Out
Address: Shibuya City, Higashi, 3 Chome−16−6 リキッドルーム 2F
Author: Eric Khun
Review: Great place to get some work done with a laptop! I like this deal where you pay 250yen and you get unlimited drinks included juice and coffee! The only small thing is that they allow people to smoke, ao it can get really smoky during lunch. You'll have to reconnect to the wifi every 2 hours.

Name: Time Out
Address: Shibuya City, Higashi, 3 Chome−16−6 リキッドルーム 2F
Author: Jet Nakajima
Review:
One of the best coffee shoo in Ebisu city. Usually coffee shop in thr heart of Tokyo especially somewhere near from the train stations. This is 5 minute walk from there, quiete atomoaphere. Alao the interior design here soothes me with some nice coffee.
Im pretty sure i will come back here

Name: Time Out
Address: Shibuya City, Higashi, 3 Chome−16−6 リキッドルーム 2F
Author: Vanessa L Quintana
Review: Chill and laid back atmosphere. Friendly staff, yummy food, and reasonably priced. All you can drink tea, juice, and coffee . My favorite was the peach black tea.  They also sell alcohol and have events in the liquid room below. Free wifi , plenty of seats, and places to plug in for a day of work on your lap top. Super foreign friendly.

Name: Time Out
Address: Shibuya City, Higashi, 3 Chome−16−6 リキッドルーム 2F
Author: Philip Bergqvist
Review: I heard this place was supposed to be a good "work spot". The place was full of smokers. Total deal breaker for me. Won't come back.

Name: Time Out
Address: Shibuya City, Higashi, 3 Chome−16−6 リキッドルーム 2F
Author: Lily Meng
Review:
It gave me the impression of a hippie and hide out space. Too many smokers ;(
The food is so so, and maybe too noisy for working and wanting to read a book.

Name: GLOBAL RING CAFÉ
Address: Toshima City, Nishiikebukuro, 1 Chome−8−26 池袋西口公園内
Author: Hannah D
Review: It's such a cute cafe. I love to sit here and do homework with a cup of tea and a snack. I've been here a few times with a couple of my classmates to study before class and it's such a cozy spot to enjoy. I love the cold jasmine earl grey tea, and I've had the toast cheese and ham bread before. The tea is quite flavourful and the toast was small but quite filling for me.

Name: GLOBAL RING CAFÉ
Address: Toshima City, Nishiikebukuro, 1 Chome−8−26 池袋西口公園内
Author: Jan B
Review: Great location and so refreshing to enjoy time outside. A really pleasant experience with good food and drink. While not amazing, the location, hospitality of the staff, and friendly locals make this a nice change from the crowded bars and pubs in the area. If the weather is nice, definitely have a few drinks.

Name: GLOBAL RING CAFÉ
Address: Toshima City, Nishiikebukuro, 1 Chome−8−26 池袋西口公園内
Author: Antonio Logronio
Review: Nice cafe both inside n out, unfortunately the roast beef sandwich I ordered was not nice at all! I give my 🥪 1 st⭐️r, but service n cafe ambience, fitout etc a 4 st⭐️rs!

Name: GLOBAL RING CAFÉ
Address: Toshima City, Nishiikebukuro, 1 Chome−8−26 池袋西口公園内
Author: rae
Review:
Staff was rude. They seem young.
Our food looked good but tasted alright. Perhaps it was the bad service that made it taste less good.
Good location. We like the area and the other customers were polite.

Name: GLOBAL RING CAFÉ
Address: Toshima City, Nishiikebukuro, 1 Chome−8−26 池袋西口公園内
Author: law ANYA
Review:
I tried the sakura matcha one it was 9/10
Great atmosphere to study and for a cute date... I recommend here to chill

Name: ANAKUMA CAFE Harajuku
Address: 1 Chome-23-28 Jingumae, Shibuya City
Author: Faye
Review: Super cute experience! Came from Seattle to try this and it was a wonderful experience! I love the interaction with the bear and the cute little notes on the board the bear paw brought out ❤️ I had alot of fun just interacting and playing and it made me smile and laugh alot. The iced mocha I got was really good as well. I would love to visit again when we come to Japan the next time 🥰

Name: ANAKUMA CAFE Harajuku
Address: 1 Chome-23-28 Jingumae, Shibuya City
Author: MC Kwan
Review:
Fun experience and interactions with the bear 🐻😂🤎
And I got the “A” prize from the gotcha machine! 😍 I hope to visit the shop again!  The iced latte and iced apple tea were great!! 👍🏻😋😋 Highly recommended!

Name: ANAKUMA CAFE Harajuku
Address: 1 Chome-23-28 Jingumae, Shibuya City
Author: Dusty Fields (Dustmajesty)
Review: This place is just the kind of magical place that you go to Japan to experience. Something as simple as getting coffee is made into an entertaining, novel experience. And the coffee is excellent too! I would consider this a must-see for a trip to Tokyo!

Name: ANAKUMA CAFE Harajuku
Address: 1 Chome-23-28 Jingumae, Shibuya City
Author: Leecie Suyeda
Review: i didn't know what this was when i walked up to it, but it made me so happy i'm coming back again. the bears talk to you by writing and hold your hand. i really loved them. the coffee was yummy!

Name: ANAKUMA CAFE Harajuku
Address: 1 Chome-23-28 Jingumae, Shibuya City
Author: Bex
Review: A very quaint little green hole in the wall. The bear hand would talk to you through a tablet & adjust accordingly to the language you speak. For every order you get a coin to turn in the gacha where the bear would direct you to. They also do give you candy as well. Definitely something to experience while you’re in Japan 🫶🏻

Name: Caffè Veloce - Shinjuku 3(San)-chome
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−1−26 三丁目 新宿 イーストビル Ｂ１
Author: ARBN
Review:
The place is very big, made possible by placing the whole resto in the basement. Nonetheless, it can get very very busy anytime of day!

This is a one of a chain of coffee shops around Japan but the menu can be quite limited. However, most people will fond something they can enjoy from the menu of coffee drinks, sandwiches. There are a few cakes available which you can see from the showcase.

Name: Caffè Veloce - Shinjuku 3(San)-chome
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−1−26 三丁目 新宿 イーストビル Ｂ１
Author: Andres Emilio Soto
Review: Staff is always polite and food is excellent, great spot to sit and relax for a few before the large mall nearby opens up at 11AM.

Name: Caffè Veloce - Shinjuku 3(San)-chome
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−1−26 三丁目 新宿 イーストビル Ｂ１
Author: Eli K
Review: We tried the garlic shrimp baguette, because it looked so good in the poster outside. It was not bad, but not great either. The prawns still had their tails on. Free WiFi and polite servers.

Name: Caffè Veloce - Shinjuku 3(San)-chome
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−1−26 三丁目 新宿 イーストビル Ｂ１
Author: Tom Caffrey
Review: Perfect place to stop and get a bit of work done, lots of tables with power and free WiFi. Very clean and nice, the coffee and sandwiches were good.

Name: Caffè Veloce - Shinjuku 3(San)-chome
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−1−26 三丁目 新宿 イーストビル Ｂ１
Author: Lavinia Isaac
Review: Delicious. I had the breakfast set. I added this on with my accomodation at nine hours women’s hostel. Great staff and fast service and delicious food.

Name: Common Cafe
Address: Shinjuku City, Kabukicho, 1 Chome−20−2, APA Hotel Higashi Shinjuku Kabukicho, 2階
Author: O007
Review: I saw the photos of the food, I'm not sure where those were because I paid $2300 yen per person and got sausages, runny eggs, green salad, potatoes, fruit and bread. Just sad, i felt ripped off. My mistake was i paid without first physically looking At the available items; darn Internet photos. I posted a photo of what they advertised. The service staff wouldn't allow my girl to sit with our group unless she was buying food, i should have walked away, but I didn't.

Name: Common Cafe
Address: Shinjuku City, Kabukicho, 1 Chome−20−2, APA Hotel Higashi Shinjuku Kabukicho, 2階
Author: Natsu Misaki
Review:
very spacious, nice attention too
the menu was varied !
gatou Chocolat was very good

Name: Common Cafe
Address: Shinjuku City, Kabukicho, 1 Chome−20−2, APA Hotel Higashi Shinjuku Kabukicho, 2階
Author: shashank B
Review: Racist place. Foreigners don’t visit. We tried multiple times different times of day and they told us to leave, couple of times told us busy or closed when customer who went in before us and they were seated but we were turned away.

Name: Common Cafe
Address: Shinjuku City, Kabukicho, 1 Chome−20−2, APA Hotel Higashi Shinjuku Kabukicho, 2階
Author: Linda L
Review:
Greatly shocked with such rude and poor service. Got sat at a dirty table and was told that it'll be cleaned; went to grab my food from the breakfast spread and came back to the same dirty table; cooked food was cold and not fresh. Was subsequently chased out of the restaurant after being given 5 minutes' notice that the restaurant is closing at 10am, and the service staff went on to argue with me that he gave me 10 minutes grace time instead and thus I should leave halfway through my breakfast -this horrendous treatment was right in front of his supervisor who passively watched after telling him something in Japanese.

Such a disgraceful place.
Save your money for anywhere else that would be way better with its quality of food and service like true Japanese.

Name: Common Cafe
Address: Shinjuku City, Kabukicho, 1 Chome−20−2, APA Hotel Higashi Shinjuku Kabukicho, 2階
Author: Vijayendra Surve
Review: It's good.... Nothing great about the food.... Staff is friendly..... Basically I used to have breakfast here while staying at APA hotel

Name: SUZU CAFE Roppongi
Address: Minato City, Roppongi, 3 Chome−10−1 相鉄フレッサイン
Author: ririri
Review: Probably my second time trying Dutch baby pancakes! Went for the ‘Very Berry’ flavor and paired it with an iced café latte. Loved the pancake’s texture. The café is along the main road, with nice vibes, but nothing particularly memorable. It feels like a spot for nearby hotel guests or those who couldn’t get into more mainstream cafes.

Name: SUZU CAFE Roppongi
Address: Minato City, Roppongi, 3 Chome−10−1 相鉄フレッサイン
Author: Barry
Review:
APRIL 2023

Came here during late lunch hour when it was not busy. Menu is provided and when you are ready to order they have a call button on the table to notify the wait staff. Ordered the matcha pudding as a set with a café latte which comes out slightly cheaper. The matcha pudding sits in a pool of very rich earthy matcha sauce and topped with a scoop of light matcha chantilly cream. The pudding itself was sweet and strong in matcha flavor as well, creamy with a slight graininess. I quite enjoyed the matcha pudding, coffee was decent.

Name: SUZU CAFE Roppongi
Address: Minato City, Roppongi, 3 Chome−10−1 相鉄フレッサイン
Author: Liah Cha
Review: SUZU cafe is a small cafe in Roppongi, Tokyo. The green tea pudding is soft and sweet, and the taste of the green tea is strong. The coffee served with it is also delicious. SUZU cafe has a quiet and cozy atmosphere, and the staff are friendly.

Name: SUZU CAFE Roppongi
Address: Minato City, Roppongi, 3 Chome−10−1 相鉄フレッサイン
Author: ベナクリス
Review: A nice little cafe to stop by and grab lunch or a desert, reservations may be required as this place fills up fast. The wasabi and soy sauce pasta was great, noodles are prepared al dente if that is your style. Lunch menu items come with a drink bar, mostly juice and and tea. The pudding was tasty without being too sweet; more firm than most flan puddings, it was a good texture for us. The Suzu house coffee had a great taste overall. One note, if you come in just for the sweets, there is a one drink minimum, but if you're having sweets, you're likely here for a drink as well.

Name: SUZU CAFE Roppongi
Address: Minato City, Roppongi, 3 Chome−10−1 相鉄フレッサイン
Author: J C (EV Man Japan)
Review: Very fancy for a café! I got the coconut flavoured cafe latte which was fantastic, my friend got the tea latte which he said was also good. There seems to be a time limit of 90 minutes during peak time

Name: Blue Bottle Coffee - Shinjuku Cafe
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 4 Chome−1−6 NEWoMan SHINJUKU 1F
Author: Rostono
Review:
Located on the first floor, have access from inside and outside (across the Victoria golf building).

They have a big and spacious place with a high chair. They also sell merchandise and beans.

Although its relatively more expensive compare to the similar coffe brands but they have a good long black. Almost every morning while I stayed at shinjuku, i have a breakfast and coffe in this place.

The staff also polite and good in english.

Recommended

Name: Blue Bottle Coffee - Shinjuku Cafe
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 4 Chome−1−6 NEWoMan SHINJUKU 1F
Author: Miesha
Review: Coffee and choc drinks are very nice but the place is way overpriced. We were lucky finding a seat for our family of 3. Range of pastries and cookies quite limited but drinks were top notch.

Name: Blue Bottle Coffee - Shinjuku Cafe
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 4 Chome−1−6 NEWoMan SHINJUKU 1F
Author: Bryan D
Review: Hip coffee shop in Shinjuku serving up excellent coffee. It gets very busy, so you may struggle to get a seat.

Name: Blue Bottle Coffee - Shinjuku Cafe
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 4 Chome−1−6 NEWoMan SHINJUKU 1F
Author: Nina V
Review: Spacious cafe that is light and bright. The food was not remarkable (3 stars). The drinks were okay (3-4 stars). Loved the contrast of this cafe to the dark Starbucks across the street. We had a 20+ year reunion and felt comfortable enough to have a private conversation for about 80 minutes.

Name: Blue Bottle Coffee - Shinjuku Cafe
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 4 Chome−1−6 NEWoMan SHINJUKU 1F
Author: Bradley Jolly
Review:
While the service and atmosphere of the cafe was lovely, I couldn’t quite agree with the taste of the coffee. With so many other amazing cafes nearby, only go here if you really want to try Blue Bottle once.

That said, they have many exclusive coffee types and a wonderful range of supplies as well. Maybe I just got unlucky!

Name: August Moon Cafe
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashihamacho, 2 Chome−54−5 The LOCK
Author: Justin Shircliff
Review: One of my favorite new cafes in Tokyo. I had the pleasure of meeting the owners and they were absolutely lovely. I sat and talked with them for a bit and they were just so nice and took the time to talk. The guy working at the cafe was great too, as he was super friendly. And then there was the cheesecake. It was a pumpkin cheesecake that was amazing. The coffee was good too. And the setup was cool and cozy. No doubt I will be back and if you’re in the area, stop by.

Name: August Moon Cafe
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashihamacho, 2 Chome−54−5 The LOCK
Author: Alec Venida
Review: we stopped here right when they opened for coffee and brunch. Mae was so kind to us, and the place had the comfiest atmosphere and charm. it was the perfect little moment of Zen before reentering the hustle and bustle of big city life. all the heat, the noise, the buzz, the crowds... they all kind of melted away for the perfect slice of serenity. thank you all for such an incredible memory.

Name: August Moon Cafe
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashihamacho, 2 Chome−54−5 The LOCK
Author: Zachary Wong
Review: Small cozy cafe that serves some tasty food and drinks. Nice atmosphere with very friendly staff.

Name: August Moon Cafe
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashihamacho, 2 Chome−54−5 The LOCK
Author: Samantha Chen
Review: Had the pleasure of meeting the lovely owner who made me feel at home, I ordered a Ham & Cheese sandwich & a latte which were both delicious, not to mention the decor of the cafe was super nice!

Name: August Moon Cafe
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashihamacho, 2 Chome−54−5 The LOCK
Author: Edita
Review: Cozy little cafe with a pleasant atmosphere and delicious home made cakes. Owner was very nice. I had a brownie and a latte and left happy 😊

Name: CAFE TANTON
Address: Koto City, Miyoshi, 2 Chome−9−9 ブルーウッド三好 103
Author: Isaiah O-B
Review:
Overall - delicious food that reminds you of home, yet rather healthy and well balanced.

Service was excellent and attentive, on top of that the cafe itself was generously spaced out.

Also seems pet owners can bring their pets along with them into the store which is refreshing and worth a mention.

The cafe is located in a side street that’s not busy at all, so the atmosphere is really quite relaxed and great for concentration.

Recommend you pay it a visit!

Name: CAFE TANTON
Address: Koto City, Miyoshi, 2 Chome−9−9 ブルーウッド三好 103
Author: Alice Lee
Review: I️ accidentally stumbled upon this place and was really happy I️ did! you can tell they use fresh ingredients and the meal I️ had was the roasted chicken. I️ definitely recommend:)

Name: CAFE TANTON
Address: Koto City, Miyoshi, 2 Chome−9−9 ブルーウッド三好 103
Author: Hao Lee
Review: Great place to have lunch after museum hopping. The set meal is healthy but impressing.

Name: CAFE TANTON
Address: Koto City, Miyoshi, 2 Chome−9−9 ブルーウッド三好 103
Author: KC
Review: Loved being welcomed by the owners of this cafe. Very knowledgeable about gluten. Only one thing on the menu I could eat, it was delicious! If you have a gluten allergy, they may be able to find something you can enjoy. Better to call before going to be sure!

Name: CAFE TANTON
Address: Koto City, Miyoshi, 2 Chome−9−9 ブルーウッド三好 103
Author: Edward Kuo
Review: A cozy local shop with delicious food and good service.

Name: Cafe & Bar R ～アール～
Address: Shibuya City, Shibuya, 3 Chome−10−19 MJ2ビル1F
Author: shan
Review: Nice and Yummy lunch… they have a nice filling salad for lunch.

Name: Cafe & Bar R ～アール～
Address: Shibuya City, Shibuya, 3 Chome−10−19 MJ2ビル1F
Author: Noah
Review: recommend coming in the afternoon, chill vibe, good food, guy speaks good english, good music

Name: Cafe & Bar R ～アール～
Address: Shibuya City, Shibuya, 3 Chome−10−19 MJ2ビル1F
Author: Barcelonakeita
Review: Good food good music and good staff. They make good spanish food,there are so many cocktail and hard licor. good coffee,tea.

Name: Cafe & Bar R ～アール～
Address: Shibuya City, Shibuya, 3 Chome−10−19 MJ2ビル1F
Author: adrian morris
Review: Great food and service, plus relaxing atmosphere

Name: Cafe & Bar R ～アール～
Address: Shibuya City, Shibuya, 3 Chome−10−19 MJ2ビル1F
Author: Tamar Friedland
Review: Delicious lunch. Great vibes.

Name: SYNdicate cafe
Address: 1 Chome-10-34 Jingumae, Shibuya City
Author: Anne Lee
Review:
Came here on a hot day, beautiful cafe with a cute menu. My French friend tried the French toast and his review was “bravo Japan”.

Matcha: banger
French toast: banger

Name: SYNdicate cafe
Address: 1 Chome-10-34 Jingumae, Shibuya City
Author: Idan Helzer
Review:
AMAZING FOOD!!!
Had the vegetable pasta and the french toast. They were both delicious!
The chef absolutely knows his way around food. The ingredients are fresh, and everything is is very well prepared.

The french toast might be the best I have had, so soft and at the exactly right amount of sweet. Amazing.

Name: SYNdicate cafe
Address: 1 Chome-10-34 Jingumae, Shibuya City
Author: Christy Mae Betos
Review:
GREAT.ENGLISH-SPEAKING. STAFF.
Girly staff, if you can read this; love u, keep speaking and practicing English to ur customers! Great work 💖
Definitely a great おしゃれand若いもの kinda cafe. The interior just screams ✨industrial aesthetic✨but yeah, it’s givin’ teens-young adult kinda vibe or maybe my late 20’s Auntie vibe is just too old for this 😝
They have coffee, pasta, ice cream, cakes, and french toast. Had the usual Cafe Latte and french toast, they served it with apple slices and a little soup as palate cleanser I guess.. Decent. Tbh nothing phenomenal about the taste buttt it was good. Worth a visit!

Name: SYNdicate cafe
Address: 1 Chome-10-34 Jingumae, Shibuya City
Author: Agathe Zongo
Review: The hojicha latte was way too sweet, and I couldn't taste the tea. The cheesecake was alright.

Name: SYNdicate cafe
Address: 1 Chome-10-34 Jingumae, Shibuya City
Author: 宇宙云
Review: Our rest stop from shopping in Harajuku. The affogato has just the right balance of strong coffee and vanilla ice cream. Also had the Pineapple Frozen Tea which is a pineapple slushy with a lovely delicate hint of lavender. Truly refreshing for this hot summer.

Name: Cafe & Bar CARESS
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishiwaseda, 3 Chome−15−2 田口ビル 1F
Author: Nicole N.
Review:
I stopped here for a little lunch-coffee-break and had the french toast and an iced Caffè latte. It's a cute and cozy little spot to calm down and have a short rest. The food and the coffee was very delicious, the staff there is also really nice and friendly. I wanted to buy one mug, but they can't find any at first... So they called someone and so I was able to get the display item from the shelf. Thank you so much for your effort! 🙇🏼‍♀️
Unfortunately, I'm leaving Japan soon, otherwise I would definitely come by more often.
I highly recommend this place! 🥰

Name: Cafe & Bar CARESS
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishiwaseda, 3 Chome−15−2 田口ビル 1F
Author: Paige Dawson
Review: super cute place to come for a coffee or to study. they have good coffee and their food is also really good. it’s a little expensive coffee wise, but not bad. they usually play jazz music and it has such a cute vibe. i got their vanilla latte and two cheese omurice!

Name: Cafe & Bar CARESS
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishiwaseda, 3 Chome−15−2 田口ビル 1F
Author: Oksana
Review:
Very nice atmosphere and great choice of music. Staff was very nice and respectful. The desserts were perfect both by the looks and taste.
Overall, the cafe is a great place to sit and study, have a quiet talk with a friend, or even for a date.

Name: Cafe & Bar CARESS
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishiwaseda, 3 Chome−15−2 田口ビル 1F
Author: Sim On
Review: Cozy place with English speaking staff. Had an ice cream which was delicious!

Name: Cafe & Bar CARESS
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishiwaseda, 3 Chome−15−2 田口ビル 1F
Author: ゆめみるこ
Review:
I always pass by, but this is my first time using it.
My companion had an iced hojicha latte and I had an iced latte. Hojicha latte has added sugar and is quite sweet. It looks like milk was probably poured into ready-made syrup. The latte was unsweetened.
The raised seats seemed to be popular and were reserved in advance.

Name: Head Quarters Cafe
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−3 小田急新宿ミロード 8F
Author: Vee Man
Review:
I recently dined at this establishment and wanted to share my experience. The food was undeniably good and bursting with flavors, but unfortunately, the portion sizes left much to be desired – they were barely enough for a small dog, let alone a grown adult person. An issue that compounded this was the staggered serving of meals. My wife's dish arrived significantly later, and by the time it did, I had already finished my petite-sized portion.

Adding to the disappointment was the encounter with the staff, who, regrettably, displayed a level of rudeness, especially in their handling of our son. Our child had an accident, and in our attempt to swiftly change his diaper, the staff failed to assist or guide us to an appropriate area. Instead, they bluntly told us to cease the changing process. It's disheartening that they responded this way to a situation involving a mere three-month-old baby.

The overall vibe was, unfortunately, far from pleasant, and the lack of empathy during a situation involving our child was distressing. Considering these aspects, it's unlikely that we will revisit this establishment. The overall experience left us with a negative impression, and we hope that the management addresses these concerns to create a more welcoming environment for future patrons.

Name: Head Quarters Cafe
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−3 小田急新宿ミロード 8F
Author: Bagus Tris Atmaja
Review: They provide coffee, electricity plug, and wifi. Good place for waiting train/bus.

Name: Head Quarters Cafe
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−3 小田急新宿ミロード 8F
Author: Thomas Metral
Review:
This place was good but they've put chocolate inside the strawberry milkshake. Who does that?
(also, there is a full chocolate milkshake).

Name: Head Quarters Cafe
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−3 小田急新宿ミロード 8F
Author: M K
Review:
I ate French toast.
(plane)

The bread is well soaked with flavor and is sweet and delicious.
It's light and fluffy and comes with toasted marshmallows, maple sauce, nuts, and vanilla ice cream.
The price is a little high, but the quality is worth it.

Name: Head Quarters Cafe
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−3 小田急新宿ミロード 8F
Author: yuika
Review:
The inside of the store is stylish.
It was located on the Milord restaurant floor near the south exit of JR Shinjuku Station.

There are many plates of rice with plenty of vegetables, which is popular with women.
In addition to taco rice and yangnyeom chicken plates, there is a wide variety of food on the menu.
There are also sweets such as cakes and seasonal French toast, and you can also use the cafe.

For women on dates.
There was a 2 hour limit because it was so crowded.

Name: Freeman Cafe
Address: Shibuya City, Shibuya, 1 Chome−16−14 メトロプラザ ２階
Author: Erin Power
Review: Sat in this cafe while waiting out the rain. It has a nice, relaxed ambiance. Many people are working or reading, so it seems like a place you can comfortably stay for a bit. Ordering is easy through a QR code, and an English menu is available. I enjoyed the Flamenco Tea - which came with a cute timer to let me know when it was done brewing. It was a nice tea, a bit over priced, but I saw it as part of the cost of being able to use the space for a chunk of time.

Name: Freeman Cafe
Address: Shibuya City, Shibuya, 1 Chome−16−14 メトロプラザ ２階
Author: Fenix D'Joan
Review:
The waiting time can vary, but overall it’s a nice cafe. You can keep your table for 90 minutes on weekends due to the popularity of the cafe.

The menu options are pretty vast I want impressed with a tuna rice salad that was recommended but the sauce on it was good, there just wasn’t enough for the amount of rice and lettuce that came with it.

Name: Freeman Cafe
Address: Shibuya City, Shibuya, 1 Chome−16−14 メトロプラザ ２階
Author: Brent Stoddard
Review: So many places to choose from in Shibuya but for some reason I liked the atmosphere when I saw it. Very busy but my food arrived very fast. I picked the Dirty Chicken Rice and it tasted pretty good. Also had a glass of draft beer 🍺 and it was nice and cold.

Name: Freeman Cafe
Address: Shibuya City, Shibuya, 1 Chome−16−14 メトロプラザ ２階
Author: Natalie Kang
Review:
Very lively and busy café. I got in with little waiting during a Saturday evening because I was by myself, but it seems that there is not so much turn over because many people use their 2 hour time limit. I noticed alot of plugs, so many people come here to work.

The service was minimal, and not necessarily friendly as is typical with Japan, but I personally don't mind because I'm introverted and they were still polite and efficient. As for the food, it was pretty pricey (especially the tea, 700円), but I think that is a sort of "fee" for using the space because many people tend to stay for longer periods of time to relax, talk, or work (2 hours at most). But the pasta and tea was very tasty and served hot!

Overall I would come here again to work, but I will likely not order a full meal again because it can get expensive.

Name: Freeman Cafe
Address: Shibuya City, Shibuya, 1 Chome−16−14 メトロプラザ ２階
Author: Adam Borja Garcia (Adán)
Review:
Order at the table with your phone using your the QR code provided at the table.

They have outlets to charge your phone.

Smoking Section available! 😁

Food was VERY VERY IMPRESSIVE! I got a lunch special with Churrasco Steak.

Sangria was really good and refreshing too!

Service was fast and kind.

Pay yourself at the kiosk after your ticket/bill is given.

Overall, good experience. If I was in Tokyo longer, I would hang out here all day! LOL

Name: UPLIGHT CAFE
Address: Shibuya City, Shibuya, 2 Chome−23−16 東口地下広場 地下2F
Author: Moon Leo
Review:
As I’ve recently visited Tokyo, on my way to exit Shibuya station, I spotted this cute coffee shop.
I ordered this ice latte with soya milk and cream - soooo delicious!
Later on, as I finished my exploration of the city, I came back for more… 🥰
And together with coffee ☕️, I got the seasonal dessert- tiramisu 🤤
I loved it!
The staff recognized me and greeted me, it was such a lovely exchange of energy. ✨
Looking forward to come back! ☺️
P.S. they don’t sell decaf 👈🏻

Name: UPLIGHT CAFE
Address: Shibuya City, Shibuya, 2 Chome−23−16 東口地下広場 地下2F
Author: Mazda Queen
Review: I traveled to Japan back in September 2023. I saw a lot of amazing places while there. I stumbled across this cute little cafe in the busy part of Tokyo and decided to get a bite before heading out. I had a coffee, salad and a cute little puff ball (sorry not sure of the name) but it was great. I remember it was a little pricey not sure how much at the time I spent so I don’t want to post the cost unknowingly.

Name: UPLIGHT CAFE
Address: Shibuya City, Shibuya, 2 Chome−23−16 東口地下広場 地下2F
Author: Yuko
Review: It's a convenient cafe located underground passage near the ticket gates of Shibuya station. You can spend time before appointments. The cream puff was good.

Name: UPLIGHT CAFE
Address: Shibuya City, Shibuya, 2 Chome−23−16 東口地下広場 地下2F
Author: R
Review: I asked for a drip coffee, but the staff directed me to an Americano instead. It was very disappointing; she could have just politely told me they were out of drip coffee. I come here regularly and always order the same thing, but I won't be coming back anymore because of the poor service.

Name: UPLIGHT CAFE
Address: Shibuya City, Shibuya, 2 Chome−23−16 東口地下広場 地下2F
Author: Vitamin K
Review: A cozy cafe , great place for breakfast and coffee. Food is delicious, love the cream puff and scones. Easy to access came down infront of Shibuya Scramble Square via train line exits. It is located at the stations passage.

Name: GOOD MORNING CAFE NOWADAYS
Address: Shinjuku City, Daikyocho, 31−4 Brillia ist 千駄ヶ谷 1F
Author: Bboyrecord
Review:
Beautiful and quiet place. I went there around 6 pm on weekdays, so I'm not sure about the weekend.

The minus i found there not much food as i thought. I ate a regular size of pasta (ravioli style), but the portion was really small. For the ¥2,390 I hope a little bit more food.

However, i really enjoyed the atmosphere, and the good was delicious. So I'm definitely coming back.

Name: GOOD MORNING CAFE NOWADAYS
Address: Shinjuku City, Daikyocho, 31−4 Brillia ist 千駄ヶ谷 1F
Author: Hguh Iguh
Review:
The breakfast plate is good. The pic has butter but I didn’t get any butter.

Despite feeling rushed to place an order, the service was nice. If I lived nearby I might go again.

Name: GOOD MORNING CAFE NOWADAYS
Address: Shinjuku City, Daikyocho, 31−4 Brillia ist 千駄ヶ谷 1F
Author: Samantha Phung
Review: Pass by around 8:15am on a Monday and got seated right away. Not too busy. Delicious food and lovely atmosphere.

Name: GOOD MORNING CAFE NOWADAYS
Address: Shinjuku City, Daikyocho, 31−4 Brillia ist 千駄ヶ谷 1F
Author: Sepideh Payami
Review:
Good Morning Cafe Nowadays is a great cafe to spend time with friends. It has a nice atmosphere and is very close to the station, so it is easy to access. I went there for breakfast with a friend, and the menu was rich and the coffee was delicious. (English menu is available)
The staff were also kind and made us feel comfortable.
