She also has several other handmade and bio products such as clothing, food and a variety or articles.

Name: Tea House Rosemary
Address: 3 Chome-70-4 Kosugimachi, Nakahara Ward, Kawasaki
Author: やなぎ
Review:
I had uva and scones.
The scones and homemade jam were delicious.

Connecting with customers (regulars)
I think it's taken care of.
While talking with other customers
They put tea and sweets on my table.
I guess it's because it's a first glance.
I felt a little disappointed. . .
I went on Saturday and Sunday
Next time I go
I'd like to visit by myself on a weekday.

Name: Tea House Rosemary
Address: 3 Chome-70-4 Kosugimachi, Nakahara Ward, Kawasaki
Author: Ma Ple
Review:
I visited this shop because it had a good reputation for its black tea. The owner seemed to be very busy with one operation, so even after we were seated, he did not bring us the menu. I was already talking to a regular customer, so it was difficult to ask for anything.

What I received was Victoria cake and Ruhuna. I thought Victoria cake usually had jam in between, but the one I had here was simple. It was delicious. I really wanted to try drinking Rufuna with milk, but it didn't come out.

I was a little disappointed because it received very high reviews and naturally had high expectations.

Name: Tea House Rosemary
Address: 3 Chome-70-4 Kosugimachi, Nakahara Ward, Kawasaki
Author: Hyu Ogawa
Review:
I had been interested in this shop for a while, and since the timing was right, I visited it in the afternoon.
They mainly sell seasonal tea leaves, and you can feel the commitment of the owner, who is very knowledgeable.
As other people's reviews have said, I feel like they place emphasis on the connections between regulars, and I don't think people have different tastes. Recommended if you like tea. If anything, it's best suited for one person, with a community-like atmosphere, so I think it's best viewed from a casual perspective.
I recently started making my own scones, so I ordered some, but as the owner said, they were a little hard. And maybe you make your own clotted cream...? I'll ask next time.

Name: Tea House Rosemary
Address: 3 Chome-70-4 Kosugimachi, Nakahara Ward, Kawasaki
Author: s s
Review:
As other people have written, this is a shop where there is a strong connection between the owner and the regulars, and there is a lot of chatter.
Because of that, I sometimes couldn't get a seat, and I found it quite difficult to take orders.
It's not like I'm trying to tone down the tone of my voice, but it's just a middle-aged woman's meeting at the waterfront that goes on forever, so it's quite uncomfortable in scenes where everyone but me is a regular.
(Of course, I think this depends on each person's personality.)
I wanted to relax and enjoy a cup of tea while reading a book by myself, but I don't think that's possible at this restaurant.
It's a restaurant like the one mentioned above, so even though I like the taste, I've always wanted to go there, but I just can't find it. It will be troublesome.

By the way, the owner himself is a very polite person. I don't remember his attitude or customer service being unpleasant at all.
That's why I feel even more regretful.

postscript
There are some comments that say it's a waste to come here and shut yourself up in your own shell, so I think they're trying to welcome you.
``This kind of people are regulars at this store''
"The biggest drawback of this store"
I felt that again.
Another review said that the women were classy, ​​but when I actually went there, there were many conversations that didn't seem like the kind of conversation that would be had by a classy person, so I think that's how I would rate this restaurant. It depends on what you think.

Name: Afternoon Tea TEA ROOM Keio Shinjuku Branch
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−4 京王百貨店新宿店 3階
Author: Thomas Thio
Review: Cozy atmosphere, wide menu range and large portions for decent price. Staff are also friendly. Accepts credit card,  IC, and e-payments. They also have artwork for their menus and mounts, makes for an interesting place for drawing inspiration.

Name: Afternoon Tea TEA ROOM Keio Shinjuku Branch
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−4 京王百貨店新宿店 3階
Author: Nicole Lee
Review: Service is just very slow for some reason.. but Im pretty satisfied with my crepe cake 🍰

Name: Afternoon Tea TEA ROOM Keio Shinjuku Branch
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−4 京王百貨店新宿店 3階
Author: Ming Chee
Review: Very tasty and healthy food. Staff are very attentive and friendly. Nice ambiance 👍🏻

Name: Afternoon Tea TEA ROOM Keio Shinjuku Branch
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−4 京王百貨店新宿店 3階
Author: Coys Richo
Review: They serve the best drinks in the world.

Name: Afternoon Tea TEA ROOM Keio Shinjuku Branch
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−4 京王百貨店新宿店 3階
Author: Nick Sint Nicolaas
Review: Friendly staff, tasty seasonal selections

Name: Le Salon De Nina's Shinjuku
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−5−1 小田急百貨店新宿店 M2F
Author: Harley Harris
Review:
Beautiful place to have afternoon tea.  Comfortable seating looking outside .   Impeccable service by staff.   Afternoon tea set was wonderful.   I would absolutely come here again .

My only complaint was the business advertised various forms of payments being accepted, to include Apple Pay and several  forms of credit.  Their credit machine would not work,  nor would Apple Pay.  My husband had to leave to go and get Yen to pay for our tea.

Name: Le Salon De Nina's Shinjuku
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−5−1 小田急百貨店新宿店 M2F
Author: AC ZPB
Review: Great food presentation! Service, taste of the food & customer service are so so and do not match the price. Better to order the afternoon tea set at empty stomach as they will not support taking out (however, I rook out in my own way: wrapped with tissue & put in bag that they made me pay for). The area in which that Nina’s is located, is absolutely beautiful!

Name: Le Salon De Nina's Shinjuku
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−5−1 小田急百貨店新宿店 M2F
Author: Steve Medina
Review: Pleasant casual tea salon.  Low ceiling since it’s on the mezzanine of Odakyu Dept. Store.  Just a nice place to meet and chat but not to impress anyone.  Seasonal (Spring) Afternoon Tea Set was good but not great, pretty much meeting expectations for a low end ATS.  For a light lunch for two you can get an ATS plus a sandwich with set drink.

Name: Le Salon De Nina's Shinjuku
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−5−1 小田急百貨店新宿店 M2F
Author: Daria P
Review:
Afternoon tea is relatively cheap and does not require a prior reservation. However, it is also pretty small. It is a snakc, it will not make you feel full.
The vibe is fine, cute cafe but not very modern or new.

Name: Le Salon De Nina's Shinjuku
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−5−1 小田急百貨店新宿店 M2F
Author: T. GeBrim
Review: Le Salon de Ninas, located on the second floor of the Shinjuku branch of Odakyu Department Store, is a popular tea spot for madams. The interior is gorgeously decorated in the image of the Palace of Versailles, and the afternoon tea set is very popular. The set costs 2,640 yen and includes a drink, and the sweets change with the seasons. It is served quickly and the generous set is very satisfying. It also features refills and additions to the tea, which can be enjoyed in a glamorous atmosphere. Ninas is a French tea brand with a tea inspired by Marie-Antoinette's favourite perfume. Other shops are located in Hibiya, Yokohama and Musashimurayama.

Name: norm tea house
Address: 1 Chome-11-8 Misuji, Taito City
Author: Ines le breton
Review: We were walking in the neighborhood yesterday and stumbled upon this wonderful tea shop with my husband. We both love ice tea and had to try this place. The two ladies were so welcoming and adorable. We felt so welcome and the tea was amazing. They make the tea with very high standards and we had the chance to try different options before buying some to bring back home. It was also very nice to be at the bar and discuss with local customers. I will definitely remember this place and highly recommend to stop by if you have a chance. We will be back!

Name: norm tea house
Address: 1 Chome-11-8 Misuji, Taito City
Author: Romie Asplund
Review: This is Tokyo’s hidden tea gem. If you want to try real Japanese tea, you need to come here. As a Japanese person who studied tea for four years, let me tell you, this is some of the best I’ve had. Apart from the sublime quality of the tea hand-sourced by the young woman who runs the shop, it’s the way she masterfully prepares each pour—from chilling the glasses with ice cubes before removing them so they don’t dilute the nectar; to weighing the leaves in order to brew utter perfection—that makes Norm Tea House so special. All teas here are sourced within Japan, including blacks and oolongs, which are traditionally sourced from India/Africa and Taiwan respectively. I indulged in a glass of a seasonal iced green oolong that imparted the most delicate, luscious, and almost fruity caress to my palate with absolutely no lingering astringency whatsoever. You have no idea how much skill this requires to brew an unoxidized tea in a way that doesn’t dry out your mouth. I also tried their iced hojicha latte using hojicha powder sourced from Kagoshima. It was like drinking chocolate liquor. Stunningly delicious. The young tea master shared that this was the only form of powdered hojicha she could find that didn’t impart a chalky mouthfeel. I can’t wait to pay Norm Tea House another visit soon.

Name: norm tea house
Address: 1 Chome-11-8 Misuji, Taito City
Author: Bahroze
Review:
This cozy tea house & tea shop is a wonderful place where people can gather to enjoy tea, chat, and relax. The staff and owner are kind and wonderful. Norm was my absolute favorite tea house in Tokyo and I ended up going several times and purchasing so many bags of tea to take home.

When you walk in to Norm, you are treated to a sample of 2-3 cold brewed Japanese tea varieties (complimentary). You then have the option to order from a menu of green, oolong, roasted, and black Japanese teas. The staff will then brew the tea of your choice, hot or iced, served in a wine glass so you can really smell the yummy tea as you sip and savor it. You will also get a tea snack to go with it.

The tea is of high quality and the tea ware the owner has selected is unique and shows how passionate she is about tea. All the tea served or sold is sourced from Japanese tea farms that she has visited or knows the farmers. Some of the staff speak English, so if you are a tourist and looking for a place to have tea or purchase tea to take home, this is the best place.

Name: norm tea house
Address: 1 Chome-11-8 Misuji, Taito City
Author: Sherry Zheng
Review: A very special place for people who love tea! Ai travels to tea farms all around Japan regularly - highly recommended if you are looking to taste or buy unique Japanese tea. First time trying the cold milk brew here, brewed with roasted Oolong tea !! Will be back soon 💗

Name: norm tea house
Address: 1 Chome-11-8 Misuji, Taito City
Author: A. P.
Review: Norm Tea House is such a beautiful, hidden gem - the atmosphere and the tea are wonderful! The owner is super nice and very happy to share her knowledge on all things tea. If you are travelling to Tokyo, I highly recommend adding Norm Tea House experience to your itinerary. As I made it my mission to visit as many Tea Houses as possible during my stay in Japan, I can confidently say that this one was the best by far

Name: Green Witch TEA HOUSE
Address: 1 Chome-11-22 Kasuya, Setagaya City
Author: I am here
Review:
Lovely atmosphere and delicious tea.
Relaxing!
I recommend the apple pie.

Name: Green Witch TEA HOUSE
Address: 1 Chome-11-22 Kasuya, Setagaya City
Author: sean cheng
Review: Awesome place and feeling relax!!

Name: Green Witch TEA HOUSE
Address: 1 Chome-11-22 Kasuya, Setagaya City
Author: M T
Review:
The shop had a great atmosphere!
All the food looked delicious, but I ordered the lunch menu.
Especially the soup was very delicious!
I also ordered some herbal tea, but this may be the first time I've had herbal tea that is so effective.
Even after drinking it for a while, I feel relieved from stress, so I would like to drink it again on a regular basis.
The atmosphere inside the store was good, and the staff were very kind and made me feel comfortable!
Next time I wanted to relax for hours!

Name: Green Witch TEA HOUSE
Address: 1 Chome-11-22 Kasuya, Setagaya City
Author: まっしゅ
Review:
・Chocolate banana toast (450 yen)
The staff at the store were kind and even put bananas on separate plates for the children to eat. It was delicious and full of chocolate!

It's a beautiful and relaxing atmosphere, so I'd like to use it again (◜ᴗ◝)

Name: Green Witch TEA HOUSE
Address: 1 Chome-11-22 Kasuya, Setagaya City
Author: keiko Inagaki (メロディー)
Review:
There are many types of herbal tea 💖
What's more, the candle light keeps you warm, so you can keep your drinks warm for a long time, which is great. The sweets were also delicious.

Name: Teahouse Among The Steps
Address: 5 Chome-2-5 Yoyogi, Shibuya City
Author: Elly Hawkins
Review:
A cute cafe hidden in the residential area of Yoyogi Hachiman. They have a really cute cat that roams around too.

The delicious Japanese sweets & hot tea were perfect for a quick snack. There were quite a few folks reading so I would say it's more of a quiet place to relax than be very chatty with friends.

Name: Teahouse Among The Steps
Address: 5 Chome-2-5 Yoyogi, Shibuya City
Author: 李蕙芳
Review: The tea house is amazing!!! Tea and desserts are wonderful and tasty!! The decorations and atmosphere inside the tea house are warm and comfy! I would definitely want to visit here again to try different tea and desserts~~ The tea house is located in a small, quiet and beautiful lane with a stairway up! And if you are a cat person, there will be a super friendly cat- miszuri (not sure if I spell that right, haha) welcoming you in the house🥰 Oh, and the overall service and environment that the owner provides are fantastic!!!! Come to visit here, my friends, you won’t regret!

Name: Teahouse Among The Steps
Address: 5 Chome-2-5 Yoyogi, Shibuya City
Author: Alex Greene
Review:
Friendly, hidden cafe with a playful housecat, Matsuri. Google hours are incorrect. Check Instagram (@dan.de.chaya) for openings Thursday-Sundays with some holidays.

Operated by a knowledgeable woman with a beautiful selection of teas and pastries. She can speak some English, but use Google translate as needed and remember to be curious first. You'll put on slippers and head up into the second floor, to a cozy living room and kitchen. The decor is Japandi modern and the music very soothing.

Go on the weekdays. The weekend can get a little crowded and this is a place to savor a quiet cup of tea (and play with Matsuri!) And enjoy a little something away from the usual tourist traps. It's adjacent to a beautiful shrine too!

Name: Teahouse Among The Steps
Address: 5 Chome-2-5 Yoyogi, Shibuya City
Author: Graham Travers
Review: Beautiful location on a quiet street close to Yoyogi Park this cafe has a wonderful selection of teas and delicious treats. The owner is very welcoming and speaks fluent English. The resident cat, Matsuri, is very friendly.

Name: Teahouse Among The Steps
Address: 5 Chome-2-5 Yoyogi, Shibuya City
Author: Shlomi Salina
Review:
An amazing Japanese tea, coffee and sweets. High quality, it feels like home, great atmosphere and very talented person who runs the place. We enjoyed very much and definitely recommend to stop by!
5/5 and definitely come back again

Name: amsu tea house TOKYO
Address: Shinagawa City, Kitashinagawa, 5 Chome−6−1 大崎ブライトタワー 1階103
Author: Conna C
Review:
The scone set is ¥1900 and comes with a glass of tea and tea affogato is served after the meal. I got the Royal milk tea and it’s strong and sweet! Similar to Hong Kong milk tea.

I came on a weekday afternoon and was surprised that every table was reserved except for one. It’s a recently renovated and beautiful space with lots of light and the staff is kind. I will definitely come back to try the rest of the menu 🎶

Name: amsu tea house TOKYO
Address: Shinagawa City, Kitashinagawa, 5 Chome−6−1 大崎ブライトタワー 1階103
Author: Chloe
Review: Excellent teahouse.  The food and teas are all delicious.  Very relaxing atmosphere.

Name: amsu tea house TOKYO
Address: Shinagawa City, Kitashinagawa, 5 Chome−6−1 大崎ブライトタワー 1階103
Author: はるかんぼharukambo
Review:
There is a tea specialty store right next to Osaki Station.
They also sell good souvenir items.

I visited on a weekday at noon, and the store was busy with customers.

I ordered the curry set for lunch.
The curry came with salad, drink, and dessert.

You can choose from a variety of drinks by paying an additional fee.

There were counter seats, so it seemed comfortable to go alone.

Also, they served me tea instead of cold drinks, which I thought was a wonderful hospitality.
The afternoon tea and desserts looked delicious, so I would like to visit again.

Name: amsu tea house TOKYO
Address: Shinagawa City, Kitashinagawa, 5 Chome−6−1 大崎ブライトタワー 1階103
Author: やきざかな
Review:
I ordered a top up tea and scone set. Apparently the time limit is 2 hours when it's busy, but it was empty so I ended up staying for a long time. . There are probably about 60 types of black tea, including black tea, flavored tea, and infused tea. With top-up tea, a staff member will come and pour you a cup of tea each time. Although you cannot choose the type of tea, you can enjoy a variety of different types of tea. And the tea affogato in the scone set is the royal milk tea sauce? It matched perfectly with the ice cream and was delicious.
I had never had flavored tea before, so I really enjoyed it! You can purchase the tea leaves you like, and there are various types of tea leaves on sale as gifts.

The staff explained various aspects of Amshu Tea's history (such as how they purchase tea leaves directly without using a trading company).
We had a wonderful time, thank you very much ☕️😊

Name: amsu tea house TOKYO
Address: Shinagawa City, Kitashinagawa, 5 Chome−6−1 大崎ブライトタワー 1階103
Author: 隠九条
Review:
Exit the south exit of Osaki Station, walk along the main street, and after crossing the river, you will see it on your left.

There are many types of flavored tea, so this store is especially recommended for flavored tea lovers.

Since it was a holiday, I made a reservation.

When I sat down, I looked at the menu listing the types of food and set drinks, and ordered a sandwich set and a top-up tea with a variety of popular black teas brewed in small quantities.

The sandwich is a hot sandwich with sliced ​​tomatoes and cheese sandwiched between basil paste spread on the top and bottom of the bread, so when you pick it up, it's warm and when it covers the bread, the melted cheese inside draws strings and mixes with the warm tomatoes. It's delicious together.

Top-up tea is a set that allows you to pour a small amount of multiple teas each time the cup is opened, and there are many flavored teas. All of the tea is sold in stores, so it is recommended for flavor lovers who want to decide after drinking it.

*If you let the staff know that you would like to avoid flavored tea, they will be able to accommodate you.
However, the frequency of people coming for pouring will naturally decrease.

I ordered a sandwich and the flavor didn't suit me, so next time I'll order a top-up tea with a scone.
*The scones here are also recommended, and I've seen a few customers come to the store just to buy scones, so I'd definitely like to try the scones next time.

If it was a meal, I thought I would change the tea in the set.

Even though you're drinking hot tea, the air conditioning is quite effective in the summer, so I think it's better to wear something warm.

There is no restroom inside the store, but the restroom in the building where the store is located is right outside the store, so you will have to use that.

Top-up tea pours tea every time you open the cup, so you can't help but linger.

They also sell teas that you don't often see, such as Japanese black tea and Lumbini, so it's recommended for those who like black tea or those who just want to buy tea leaves.

I was debating between Lumbini and Sabaragamuwa, so I decided to try it. I listened to his words and drank two types, but I liked the Lumbini so much that I decided to buy it the next time I went there.

Also, the sweet tea with ice cream and milk that I drank just before the end was really delicious. *The two female customers who seemed to have come just to buy tea leaves were also delicious! delicious! I could even hear the staff member explaining to the two of us how to make the undiluted solution and use it with milk.

I was almost on my way home, so I wanted to check it out next time.

Name: Aoyama Flower Market Tea House Akasaka Biz Tower
Address: Minato City, Akasaka, 5 Chome−3−1 Bizタワ 1F
Author: Paula
Review: We enjoyed the two meals we ordered. It was delicious and very fresh. The staff is kind and the atmosphere is very welcoming. Great location, near a metro station. Didn’t end up trying the teas nor buying flowers but they all looked very good. So so recommended!

Name: Aoyama Flower Market Tea House Akasaka Biz Tower
Address: Minato City, Akasaka, 5 Chome−3−1 Bizタワ 1F
Author: Jacob Coles
Review: I saw the reviews and pictures and it convinced me to make the trip to Akasaka, and boy it didn't disappoint. I had the french toast with wild flowers and fruit and it was delicious. I highly recommend.

Name: Aoyama Flower Market Tea House Akasaka Biz Tower
Address: Minato City, Akasaka, 5 Chome−3−1 Bizタワ 1F
Author: Ottilie Cools
Review:
Lovely decorated cozy place with indoor and outdoor seating. Flowers and plants everywhere. Really nice atmosphere, very friendly service, good food and great teas.
Also a good selection for vegetarians.

Name: Aoyama Flower Market Tea House Akasaka Biz Tower
Address: Minato City, Akasaka, 5 Chome−3−1 Bizタワ 1F
Author: Alexis Busso
Review:
There’s 3 Aoyama Flower Market Teahouse location. This one is across from the Harry Potter merchandise store in Akasaka. There’s also outdoor seating available. Came here just as lunch ended, at 14:00, but you can still order food from the menu. The food menu is limited, mostly sweet items. The French toast was so beautifully plated that I didn’t want to it.

I highly recommend their tea blends. A lovely place to be completely surrounded by live plants and flowers which change  depending on the season. Currently, it’s sunflower season. Would definitely recommend for those interested in a unique cafe/tea experience.

Name: Aoyama Flower Market Tea House Akasaka Biz Tower
Address: Minato City, Akasaka, 5 Chome−3−1 Bizタワ 1F
Author: asyaad7
Review:
Definitely a beautiful cafe with flowers & green surrounding 😊
The flower plating was pretty delicate on the warm toasts, pair with soft cream, fresh cream & homemade jam.  Ordered fruity flower hot tea, smells & tastes good.

The cafe opens quite early at 8am, went at 930am and no queue on holiday. Started full house around 10am. The terrace area is quite nice too, would love to drink outside on a sunny day next time around.

Name: Ippodo Tea Tokyo Marunouchi
Address: Chiyoda City, Marunouchi, 3 Chome−1−1 仲通り 国際ビル1階
Author: Trong Duc Truong
Review: Went here to buy some matcha powder, but ended up buying some matcha utensils and sencha tea alongside the matcha powder! Very kind and knowledgeable staff. Recommend taking a trip here if you love Japanese tea!

Name: Ippodo Tea Tokyo Marunouchi
Address: Chiyoda City, Marunouchi, 3 Chome−1−1 仲通り 国際ビル1階
Author: George Curry
Review: Went for the Five petal tea experience and was not let down. Yes it was quite pricey for the experience but I do recommend it to anyone wants to explore a little more than Sencha green tea. A worthy experience and education to explore and taste the best green teas in one sitting.

Name: Ippodo Tea Tokyo Marunouchi
Address: Chiyoda City, Marunouchi, 3 Chome−1−1 仲通り 国際ビル1階
Author: Max Bell
Review: It was such a lovely tea room. I think the four petals tasting was great but just a little pricey, but going to Ippodo after trying their teas for awhile is like a dream come true for me. The koicha and wasgashi were out of this world. I really reccomend the experience for Matcha lovers!!

Name: Ippodo Tea Tokyo Marunouchi
Address: Chiyoda City, Marunouchi, 3 Chome−1−1 仲通り 国際ビル1階
Author: Jason Chuei
Review: Sophisticated tea house located in the heart of Marunouchi. Sit down for a green tea of your choice, or pop in for a purchase.

Name: Ippodo Tea Tokyo Marunouchi
Address: Chiyoda City, Marunouchi, 3 Chome−1−1 仲通り 国際ビル1階
Author: D H
Review: You can never go wrong with Ippudo. The tea quality and selection were decent, and the service was top-notch and professionally executed.

Name: Aoyama Flower Market Green House
Address: Minato City, Minamiaoyama, 5 Chome−4−41 グラッセリア青山 １階
Author: Sherilyn Rong
Review:
Beautiful relaxing place full of greenery and flowers. Delicious "small" dishes and teas.

When you enter in, you might accidentally enter the flower store, absolutely gorgeous. They seem to have a great variety for you to select from.

The first door to the right is their store.
Second door further down is the cafe.
Third door down is their group workshop.

The wait was roughly 15-20 minutes I went closer to sun down. It has a few seats outside and inside.

When you are brought to your table, you will be scanning a QR code, and then ordering from their online menu. (You may get a unique code for order, please remember it or screenshot it.)

I ordered a couple different teas and they all have their uniqueness that makes me wish I could taste them all. I highly recommend their French toast, you can't go wrong with any of them. As someone who travels with people that prefers something familiar and still somewhat open to trying new things, this is a nice place to try their mango French toast. Small bites and nice amount of flavor.

If you love any of the teas, they have them sold in small batches on your way out.

For price and value of the experience, this place will suit you better if you value more of the experience than affordability.

Restroom: Yes
Wheelchair accessible: Partially - can't confirm the restroom part.

Photos are from Late May to Early June.

Name: Aoyama Flower Market Green House
Address: Minato City, Minamiaoyama, 5 Chome−4−41 グラッセリア青山 １階
Author: Anna Fhaumnuaypol
Review: Omg we were so impressed by all the flowers!! It was incredible how they design the space and incorporate all the flowers in 😍😍 and we learned that they change it every month which makes it even more interesting. Everything we ordered was so yummy too. Definitely worth a visit!!

Name: Aoyama Flower Market Green House
Address: Minato City, Minamiaoyama, 5 Chome−4−41 グラッセリア青山 １階
Author: Yihsin Chen
Review:
It's a amazing place which is like a fair tale world.
The flower toast was not only aesthetic but also delicious. I really recommend the herbal tea!
I ordered a cup of rose black tea, and the scent of rose was so great!!!!! The taste was also smooth and delightful.
The atmosphere was so good! There are many  photogenic places ,girls will definitely love it!

Name: Aoyama Flower Market Green House
Address: Minato City, Minamiaoyama, 5 Chome−4−41 グラッセリア青山 １階
Author: Steven Tep
Review: What a beautiful tea house with a whole garden inside. What a beautiful experience to be surrounded by flowers while having a nice cup of tea and a few desserts and bake snacks with your significant other.

Name: Aoyama Flower Market Green House
Address: Minato City, Minamiaoyama, 5 Chome−4−41 グラッセリア青山 １階
Author: Elaine Lee
Review: This is a great place for catching up with a friend and the herbal tea with fresh cut herbs was great. French toast was fun and I enjoyed the seasonal edible flowers. The beef stew was tough and olive rice interesting. Strong herbs in the various side dishes. Overall a very cute concept.

Name: Mayoor
Address: 2 Chome-20-8 Higashigotanda, Shinagawa City
Author: mizuki ᴗ̈*
Review:
A tea specialty store located between Osaki and Gotanda.
Visited at 4pm on a weekday between work.
When I entered the store, I could smell the lingering aroma of curry and it made me hungry. I thought it was a curry specialty store.
We had cake and tea at the eat-in space. Since it's a tea specialty store, there are many types, so it's worth a visit!
You can also buy teabags and leaf-type black tea for home use♩¨̮

Name: Mayoor
Address: 2 Chome-20-8 Higashigotanda, Shinagawa City
Author: 山本紘子
Review: Very satisfied. The iced milk tea, a drink with a choice of curry or black tea jelly, is also authentic. The curry has lots of ingredients and plenty of spices like fennel seeds, which makes your body feel warm. It goes very well with fluffy rice. The portion of the curry set is quite large, so I am grateful for the 1,000 yen. The wallpaper and furniture inside the store are cute and make you feel like you're traveling.

Name: Mayoor
Address: 2 Chome-20-8 Higashigotanda, Shinagawa City
Author: T M
Review:
This restaurant is always full and popular for lunch.
The set comes with three types (toast sandwich, Indian curry, and paratha), and comes with a drink, salad, and jelly.
Being a tea shop, the milk tea and tea jelly are delicious.
The portions aren't large, so men may not be satisfied with it, but it's delicious, so I recommend it!

The store also has miscellaneous goods and many types of tea.
We also have Indian curry kits for lunch, so you can make it at home.

Name: Mayoor
Address: 2 Chome-20-8 Higashigotanda, Shinagawa City
Author: はるかんぼharukambo
Review:
Visited for lunch on a weekday.
I get the impression that there are a lot of solo female customers.
The place was almost full at lunchtime.

I get the impression that many people eat quietly and silently.

Tandoori chicken paratha sandwich 900 yen
For drinks, you can choose one cup of hot coffee, straight tea, milk tea, or rooibos tea.

Tandoori chicken is moist.
It wasn't spicy and had lots of vegetables in it.
The texture of the moist and chewy paratha dough is irresistibly delicious!
It also came with a salad and fruit dessert.

European-style tea saucer
It was stylish.

Tea leaves and teapots were sold in the store. The tea seems delicious, so I would like to visit again during tea time.

It feels like it's run by a parent and child.
Payment is cash only.

Name: Mayoor
Address: 2 Chome-20-8 Higashigotanda, Shinagawa City
Author: M from
Review: Black tea isn't just bitter, it has a delicious bitterness that is unique to black tea. The cakes are also delicious. You can enjoy authentic black tea. The downside is that they only accept cash. It's such a waste.

Name: INARI TEA
Address: Shibuya City, Ebisu, 1 Chome−5−2 こうげつビル 101
Author: Danielle Veluz
Review: Great atmosphere and relaxing ambience for a quiet afternoon sipping well prepared tea. Only 5 seats available so it's very quiet and peaceful for reading your favorite book. I will come back!

Name: INARI TEA
Address: Shibuya City, Ebisu, 1 Chome−5−2 こうげつビル 101
Author: Shayla Aggarwal
Review: Delicious tea and desserts. We got the matcha cheesecake, and it was one of the best cheesecakes I have had. The iced matcha latte was incredible and it gave the perfect balance of sweet and bitter. The lady serving and making the stuff was so friendly and tried to understand us, as she mainly spoke Japanese. 9.7 out of ten recommend.

Name: INARI TEA
Address: Shibuya City, Ebisu, 1 Chome−5−2 こうげつビル 101
Author: Josh Kaldor
Review:
This place is out of this world.

This is not a place you go just for tea, it's a place you go for an amazing experience involving both tea and deserts.

The tea is absolutely incredible, and the way it is prepared, presented and served makes this an experience that is hard to describe. The deserts here are also amazing, best I have ever eaten and not too sweet.

Definitely will return and highly recommend anyone visiting this area to come here if they like unique experiences and either tea or deserts.

Name: INARI TEA
Address: Shibuya City, Ebisu, 1 Chome−5−2 こうげつビル 101
Author: Jason H
Review: The experience was great! The owner made 2 additional teas (black tea and sweet green tea) and I was able to experience them despite ordering only the matcha latte and tiramisu. The owner is also really nice. She speaks a bit of English. I visited at 1.30pm on a Saturday and I was alone. Hopefully more people will frequent the store.

Name: INARI TEA
Address: Shibuya City, Ebisu, 1 Chome−5−2 こうげつビル 101
Author: Emilly M.
Review: I loved the cheesecake! Smooth and creamy texture that just melts in your mouth with every bite! The customer service was top tier! The two ladies working the shop were very nice and helpful even when I did not know much Japanese!

Name: EN TEA HOUSE 幻花亭
Address: 1 Chome-3-8 Aomi, Koto City
Author: Kelly in Japan
Review: The tea wasn't amazing by any stretch of the imagination, but the experience itself was great. If you went to the Odaiba location, this is exactly the same. The lights will follow your tea around - it's so cool. After a while, the lights will stop. I guess that's to prevent people from staying for too long. If you go to teamLab, definitely do this if you have a chance - it's super fun.

Name: EN TEA HOUSE 幻花亭
Address: 1 Chome-3-8 Aomi, Koto City
Author: I’m not a guest
Review: This is in the border less exhibit as the experience of drinking your tea is also a borderless experience. You have to go to the end and find the tea house and order your tea, it actually is fairly priced too. They’ll give you your leaves and tell you to wait until you’re seated. Try it out!! It’s pretty cool what happens to your tea.

Name: EN TEA HOUSE 幻花亭
Address: 1 Chome-3-8 Aomi, Koto City
Author: QC
Review:
Tea is ok but the experience itself is incomparable!

Initially we thought it uses some temperature detection but then realized you can order either cold or hot drinks.

We also thought that the position of the flower was fixed but then the flower would just appear anywhere your teacup is - even if your teacup is not placed on the table.

Also if you want your photos to look nicer then don’t order tea latte like me lol.

Name: EN TEA HOUSE 幻花亭
Address: 1 Chome-3-8 Aomi, Koto City
Author: Ella Grape
Review: I spent 1 hour reaching there; it is closed permanently! The website says the place might be closed (or opened), people post viral videos with their experience… It’s not good to misinform customers :(

Name: EN TEA HOUSE 幻花亭
Address: 1 Chome-3-8 Aomi, Koto City
Author: Tanuki Eric
Review: Badass experience, especially if you bring little ones. The tea is amazing and a memorable event!

Name: Demmers Teehaus
Address: Minato City, Roppongi, 7 Chome−21−22 セイコー六本木ビル
Author: Joseph Goodman
Review: Slightly pricy (1400 yen for the tea I ordered) but good

Name: Demmers Teehaus
Address: Minato City, Roppongi, 7 Chome−21−22 セイコー六本木ビル
Author: Riichi Ota
Review: This café exudes a captivating European ambiance perfect for enjoying tea, but unfortunately, both the tea and cakes are priced at over 1000 Japanese yen. The strict one-hour limit for patrons detracts from the experience. Despite the premium cost, the tea lacked the expected exceptional taste, and the cakes were merely average. Regrettably, this falls short of being a place I'd revisit for either tea or cake.

Name: Demmers Teehaus
Address: Minato City, Roppongi, 7 Chome−21−22 セイコー六本木ビル
Author: Tracy Fabre
Review: I went to Demmers TeaHause to pick up a tea kettle for my daughter in laws Christmas gift. When I arrived, the tea kettle had already sold out weeks ago, but the wonder girl working that day stopped and checked the incoming inventory. To my delight the kettles had arrived in an earlier shipment so I wS able to get 5he desired kettle!

Name: Demmers Teehaus
Address: Minato City, Roppongi, 7 Chome−21−22 セイコー六本木ビル
Author: ありちゃん
Review: Went here to celebrate Mother's Day with my wife and two children aged 9 and 13. Greeted by a short miserable woman who made us feel about as welcome as a pack of wild animals. Wide eyed and completely unwelcoming with a panicked look on her face. Proceeds to make a pained appeal to my son to use the alcohol spray. Advised we would be seated on the 2nd floor and asked to order at the counter for a tea costing 1,000 ea. Sheer laziness. Nice place and atmosphere but the staff are diabolical

Name: Demmers Teehaus
Address: Minato City, Roppongi, 7 Chome−21−22 セイコー六本木ビル
Author: M Y
Review: My favourite type of tranquil teahouse.

Name: IPPUKU&MATCHA 日本橋店
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashimuromachi, 2 Chome−1−1 日本橋三井タワ １階
Author: Joakim Johansson
Review:
I had the Matcha Latte Triple (unsweetened), Hojicha Chocolate Croissant, and a Matcha Matcha Matcha Tart.
As a person who doesn't like too sweet things, the fine balance of bitterness and low sweetness was really good and nice, it brought out the rich flavor of the matcha.
The personal was kind and clear spoken, explaining extra information when needed.
I highly recommend this place.

Name: IPPUKU&MATCHA 日本橋店
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashimuromachi, 2 Chome−1−1 日本橋三井タワ １階
Author: Graphael How (Iroha)
Review: The taste is fantastic, ESPECIALLY recommend the croissant with the houjicha or matcha bar, it is incredibly comforting for a cold rainy day. The staff is incredibly sweet, exceptional service and checked for the allergies for us because my partner has a peanut allergy. It was a very chill and nice experience, even when it was a gloomy rainy day!

Name: IPPUKU&MATCHA 日本橋店
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashimuromachi, 2 Chome−1−1 日本橋三井タワ １階
Author: Katrina Trinh
Review:
Booked the private matcha tasting here and the experience was AMAZING. We had 3 people in total and we were able to try 4 different types of matcha paired with different matcha desserts.

The private room itself was intimate, every detail of its design catered towards ambiance. The lovely staff who attended to us was knowledgeable and could also speak English.

Overall it was a great experience for matcha lovers and beginners.

Name: IPPUKU&MATCHA 日本橋店
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashimuromachi, 2 Chome−1−1 日本橋三井タワ １階
Author: Mirko Mantovani
Review: The special Matcha cheesecake was amazing. Might have been the best Matcha dessert I've ever had. Matcha latte is okay, not as spectacular in my opinion

Name: IPPUKU&MATCHA 日本橋店
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashimuromachi, 2 Chome−1−1 日本橋三井タワ １階
Author: teddymecheto
Review: Delicious and great matcha! The pudding has a different consistency compared to others. It's quite thick but I like that it's different! They give you a side of matcha sauce to pour on top for that Instagram post which I find great 😆 the matcha latte is top tier! Recommend!

Name: BATEAU The Tea House
Address: 2 Chome-15-7 Haramachi, Meguro City
Author: NORIO OGAWA
Review:
This is a rare and tasteful tea shop located in a residential area. We're only open on select days of the week, so check our Instagram for opening days and hours. The store's name means boat in French, and the anchor symbol on the Instagram calendar indicates business days.

There are several types of tea leaves that the shop owner has obtained, and he explains them carefully. I'm not familiar with cups and saucers, but they have a tasteful shape that gives me a feeling of being particular about them.

From what I can hear, it is said that the shop operates under a division of labor system with multiple people making sweets. Therefore, the sweets may be different every time you go. I love things that express personal tastes like this. If you like England, tea, and small sweets, you should go. When I heard the name of the store, bateau, I thought of Motoko.

Name: BATEAU The Tea House
Address: 2 Chome-15-7 Haramachi, Meguro City
Author: 田戸遼佑
Review: I received a delicious cake set and tea. According to the owner of the shop, they use rice flour, so it was chewy and delicious. The tea was refreshing and delicious.

Name: BATEAU The Tea House
Address: 2 Chome-15-7 Haramachi, Meguro City
Author: Noriko Kawashima

Name: TEA wiz Sandwich
Address: Taito City, Yanaka, 2 Chome−1−14 富士コーポ １Ｆ
Author: bootan K
Review:
A shop near Kitte Street that serves delicious hot and cold tea and sandwiches.
Although it is not a cafe but a take-out shop, there are benches outside, so if there is an empty spot, you can sit and drink tea.

Name: TEA wiz Sandwich
Address: Taito City, Yanaka, 2 Chome−1−14 富士コーポ １Ｆ
Author: aya
Review:
All the sandwiches here are excellent. It's a bit of a twist, but it's very elaborate. Even the egg sandwich is different from the ones sold around here.
I think this is especially true with cucumbers. The only thing I regret is that it's only takeout. I want to relax while drinking tea. Maybe the locals are a little jealous. The scones are also delicious.

Name: TEA wiz Sandwich
Address: Taito City, Yanaka, 2 Chome−1−14 富士コーポ １Ｆ
Author: YUICHI
Review: A shop with delicious tea and baked goods. You can also eat on the bench in front of the store. It's open from 6am, so it's perfect for breakfast. The scones and sandwiches that were warmed up were very delicious.

Name: TEA wiz Sandwich
Address: Taito City, Yanaka, 2 Chome−1−14 富士コーポ １Ｆ
Author: 松崎優
Review:
I remember that the store I found on my walk was a used bookstore. It was a sandwich specialty store and something looked delicious, so I decided to try it out and went in. Perhaps because it was so popular, there was only one sandwich left. A croissant sandwich made with ham costs 500 yen. I asked the staff and they said they would be able to make something with salami in a little while. What do you think? However, I don't really like salami, so I bought ham.
In addition to sandwiches, they also sold hot dogs, donuts, and baked goods. Takeout specialty store, no eat-in.
When I got home and ate it, it tasted delicious, but I felt that the volume was a little lacking.For 500 yen, I think it could be a little more filling.
It seems that only one person is making it, so they can't make a lot at once, so they sell out quickly, so it's best to get there early.

Name: TEA wiz Sandwich
Address: Taito City, Yanaka, 2 Chome−1−14 富士コーポ １Ｆ
Author: 高野菜々子
Review:
It's a shop I go to so much that I go there several times every week!
Sweets, sandwiches, tea, whatever you eat is delicious. We help you with everything from morning to evening, including a quick breakfast, lunch, afternoon snack, and tea to wake you up.
The store manager is very creative with his products, and new drinks and food items are introduced regularly. It seems that they are aiming for a variety that can be used for afternoon tea.

it's recommended!

Name: KIMONO RENTAL TOKYO MAIKOYA Asakusa
Address: 1 Chome-12-2 Asakusa, Taito City
Author: Constance Kilby
Review: My friends and I had a lovely experience, we made wagashi, dressed in kimono, and witnessed a beautiful tea ceremony. Thank you so much, for making our trip to Japan so valuable. Will recommend to my family when we visit Tokyo next.

Name: KIMONO RENTAL TOKYO MAIKOYA Asakusa
Address: 1 Chome-12-2 Asakusa, Taito City
Author: Kym Hayat
Review: Highly recommend this experience. We really enjoyed getting dressed into traditional Japanese clothes and learning more about the tea ceremony. The kids (11 & 10) also really this.

Name: KIMONO RENTAL TOKYO MAIKOYA Asakusa
Address: 1 Chome-12-2 Asakusa, Taito City
Author: Neesh M
Review: Mina was our host and she was amazing! She was also Very informational and made us all feel very welcomed. I enjoyed my experience here, everyone was great

Name: KIMONO RENTAL TOKYO MAIKOYA Asakusa
Address: 1 Chome-12-2 Asakusa, Taito City
Author: Rachel Halverson
Review: This was such an exceptional experience from beginning to end!! If you are looking for an immaculate traditional tea ceremony experience, where you get to learn how to make wagashi and matcha, look no further (: This was such a special experience to do and Mini was so knowledge and welcoming. Thank you to all of the women here who made it so magical!!!

Name: KIMONO RENTAL TOKYO MAIKOYA Asakusa
Address: 1 Chome-12-2 Asakusa, Taito City
Author: Michelle Bishop
Review: Mina was the best host. Very informative and full of history of the tea ceremony. They take good care of you and the details of picking out a kimono and dressing you.

Name: リーフルダージリンハウス銀座
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 5 Chome−9−17 銀座あづまビル １F
Author: Justin Hooper
Review: Awesome tea shop in Ginza. They have a ton of tea available and you can taste a good amount of samples to see what you like. Prices are fairly good. The teas I bought are China Special DJ-193 Castleton 2nd wash, Gao Shan tea, and a few herbal teas (lemon verbana, blue mallow, lavender). Highly recommend this shop. They also give you a small sample tea with your purchase.

Name: リーフルダージリンハウス銀座
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 5 Chome−9−17 銀座あづまビル １F
Author: いのき
Review:
There are so many different kinds of tea!
Recommended as a gift or souvenir!

It also has 0 caffeine!
If you ask a member of the staff, they will tell you a lot of things, so please give it a try!

Name: リーフルダージリンハウス銀座
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 5 Chome−9−17 銀座あづまビル １F
Author: Natsu Rarara
Review:
The store is large and easy to shop.
I'm really happy to receive one tea bag as a service when I buy it.
Cold brewed tea has a great scent and is easy to drink in the summer 😃

Name: リーフルダージリンハウス銀座
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 5 Chome−9−17 銀座あづまビル １F
Author: Yukemuri Yuke
Review:
The staff is very polite and will give you detailed information on recommended teas and tips on how to brew them. You can also sample the tea, so I'm sure you'll find your favorite tea.
After buying a delicious black tea with a lot of golden chips in India a long time ago, I was so impressed that I tried various black teas in Japan as well, but I'm grateful that this shop has a very high quality at a reasonable price.

This time I also bought milk jam, and although it had a mild texture, it was like a thick milk caramel, and it tasted like it would go well with black tea and berry fruits.

Name: リーフルダージリンハウス銀座
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 5 Chome−9−17 銀座あづまビル １F
Author: a i
Review:
Is good! Irresistible for Darjeeling lovers🌱
This is a high-end tea leaf shop that only sells merchandise, but they also sell tea bags for around 1,000 to 2,000 yen. (Contains about 10 pieces)
There are many types, so it's best to ask the store staff. You can try it.
There's no pushy sales, but it's a small store, so you still feel like you have to buy something.
When you purchase, you will receive a free tea bag of your choice.
There aren't many stores, and they seem to sell wholesale to restaurants.

Name: Hachiya
Address: 3 Chome-2-10 Sendagaya, Shibuya City
Author: Serene Quek
Review: A cute little matcha shop. I really like that it’s open early and the castella is must have. Personally I would prefer a richer matcha latte so if you like strong drinks get the rich one instead of the typical one. Worth a visit if you are looking for places to try in the morning and is nearby

Name: Hachiya
Address: 3 Chome-2-10 Sendagaya, Shibuya City
Author: JJ Chan
Review:
After hours of walking, I was exhausted and randomly stumbled into this store. I ordered 2 matcha drinks. One had a whipped cream on top which I thought was a bit too sweet, but that's personal preference. The second drink was an iced matcha which was good.

Maybe it's because the store wasn't busy when I arrived, but the staff were incredibly accommodating and kind with my Google translate.

Name: Hachiya
Address: 3 Chome-2-10 Sendagaya, Shibuya City
Author: Jason Chuei
Review: Lovely little matcha cafe, only open during the week. Simple yet stylish setting. Very tasty matcha latte.

Name: Hachiya
Address: 3 Chome-2-10 Sendagaya, Shibuya City
Author: Cynthia LI
Review: Very good matcha flavor and good space for the store. They offer WiFi and charging outlets.

Name: Hachiya
Address: 3 Chome-2-10 Sendagaya, Shibuya City
Author: Alice Park
Review:
Really small place inside. You can even can't seat inside for 10mins. It seems like they only serverd by takeaway. Anyway all the beverage was so good. A small matcha latte was so smooth and creamy. It's 680yen and large size was almost 1700yen!!! Its pretty big gap with small size. And the other black bean frappuccino was so savory and yammy!
Try it!

Name: ことこ茶店
Address: Setagaya City, Miyasaka, 3 Chome−4−1 ライオンズマンション経堂 1F
Author: Sayuri A
Review:
There are many Taiwanese teas. It's a nice shop with very polite and polite staff.
Shops I want to go to 💕

I found another wonderful menu. This is Oyaki.
Crispy on the outside, chewy on the inside. It's full of bean paste. It was so delicious that I was already happy.

Added on 9/14

Since September, due to the declaration of a state of emergency, we have been unable to eat in, but instead we have started offering lunch boxes. This is also very delicious and will fill you up.
The chimaki had jujube in it and was authentic, and the shrimp shumai was plump and really delicious😍The meat bun had a lot of anchovies and was very meaty, and the steamed dumplings were also plump.

Name: ことこ茶店
Address: Setagaya City, Miyasaka, 3 Chome−4−1 ライオンズマンション経堂 1F
Author: 晃
Review: The atmosphere was nice and I liked the tea and food. However, I was disappointed that the staff did not warn me that there was a very noisy customer. Next time I'll check the customer base before deciding whether to sit or not.

Name: ことこ茶店
Address: Setagaya City, Miyasaka, 3 Chome−4−1 ライオンズマンション経堂 1F
Author: *MAQUI*
Review:
I discovered it on a walk and visited for the first time. In addition to Taiwanese tea, you can also enjoy rare Japanese tea.
The owner is very kind, pleasant, and very knowledgeable. You can enjoy carefully brewed tea while chatting happily. This is a shop where you can feel the love for tea.

Name: ことこ茶店
Address: Setagaya City, Miyasaka, 3 Chome−4−1 ライオンズマンション経堂 1F
Author: tomonari azuma
Review: You can drink Alishan oolong tea from iced to hot and enjoy the change. It felt like I was in Taiwan and I had a great time listening to the explanations. Thank you 😊

Name: ことこ茶店
Address: Setagaya City, Miyasaka, 3 Chome−4−1 ライオンズマンション経堂 1F
Author: ことまる
Review: You can feel the owner's love for Taiwanese tea. It's a space where you can relax and enjoy a coffee. When I visited the store, Clambong was playing. thank you.

Name: English Teahouse Pekoe
Address: 4 Chome-22-8 Ikenohata, Taito City
Author: Caroline Trippenbach
Review: Really adorable British/Japanese tea house near Ueno Park. The owner is an absolute delight and will try to help you with the menu if you are not super familiar with Japanese. Otherwise, if you know Katakana, you should be able to navigate the menu provided. It is quiet and peaceful and the desserts are to die for. There are little details in every part of this place that shows how detail oriented the owner is. A must repeat tea house.

Name: English Teahouse Pekoe
Address: 4 Chome-22-8 Ikenohata, Taito City
Author: Yamada Ryosuke
Review: Good cafe with traditional Japanese building.

Name: English Teahouse Pekoe
Address: 4 Chome-22-8 Ikenohata, Taito City
Author: Ward Vivian
Review: Quite and lovely place.

Name: English Teahouse Pekoe
Address: 4 Chome-22-8 Ikenohata, Taito City
Author: たかモン
Review:
This cafe is located 4-5 minutes walk from Nezu Station in the direction of Uguisudani.
An old folk cafe located in a quiet residential area.
If you don't know about it, you'll definitely pass by, or rather, you won't notice because you'll never pass by here. It feels like a normal house.
I was curious about it, so I went to see it when I was nearby.

There are many antique ornaments inside the store, and the atmosphere is reminiscent of an old folk house.
It's a small space with only three tables.

The interior of the store is unique and cute, but since there are a lot of works by artists on display, you are not allowed to take photos inside the store, so be sure to give it a try.
You can purchase the accessories displayed.

Since it's a tea specialty store, they have a wide variety of teas, including some like lattes.
There were also creative winter-only drinks.

Ordered tea and fruit cake.
Fruit cake is a pound cake that is simple and delicious. It also comes with whipped cream.
Since it's an English cafe, they also have scones.

It's the perfect space to relax and drink tea.

Name: English Teahouse Pekoe
Address: 4 Chome-22-8 Ikenohata, Taito City
Author: ジャン
Review:
*Currently open from 14:00 to 18:00 *Information for [1 person only] *Please note that photography is prohibited inside the store as the artist's works are on display.
A tea specialty store in Nezu.
Since it's an old folk house, is it a good idea to take off your shoes for a moment? It's a bit of an illusion, but it's okay to go up with your shoes on 👠💕
The inside is more British than you might imagine from the outside.
Speaking of the atmosphere, I'm just imagining what British grandparents would be like☺

Cream tea (tea and scone set) is a warm scone that I like.
The ticking sound of the clock and the classical harmony were also great.
There were some reviews saying that the owner was picky and that the food was expensive, but the prices were reasonable. The owner was also a wonderful person and I was impressed.
Oh, I recommend making a reservation even on weekdays.

Name: EN SHI DA JI PAI Shibuya
Address: 12-12 Udagawacho, Shibuya City
Author: Naomi
Review: I visited this place around 7 pm and no more brown sugar tapioca tea available. I just got an original Taiwanese castella. One block for ¥700 and one slice for ¥400. I recommend to orde one whole. I always wanted to try this Taiwanese castella and glad I did. The texture is similar to Japanese cheese cake but not too sweet. It goes well with tea or coffee.

Name: EN SHI DA JI PAI Shibuya
Address: 12-12 Udagawacho, Shibuya City
Author: elliza jose
Review: We only ordered one slice of taiwanese castella cake and it came out smoking hot and delicious. I can only imagine taking home one big loaf. I wish we had. So so good.

Name: EN SHI DA JI PAI Shibuya
Address: 12-12 Udagawacho, Shibuya City
Author: Justin Shircliff
Review: A nice alternative to the bubble tea scene popping up all over Tokyo. I typically like sweet tea, but the brown sugar option here was too sweet (with regular amounts of ingredients). The taste was delicious, it was just too much. I’d try it again and would say it’s worth stopping by.

Name: EN SHI DA JI PAI Shibuya
Address: 12-12 Udagawacho, Shibuya City
Author: Gregg Tavares
Review:
So against my better judgement I tried this place. It definitely fits Taiwan's preference for bland food. Their signature dish is a flattened chicken breast breaded and deep fried and then sprinkled with one of five seasonings. I tried there original flavour and their pakuchi (celantro) flavor. It tasted like bland fried chicken with salt and pepper. I tasted no pakuchi at all.

If you want fried chicken you'd be far better of going to one of the department store basement food floors a short walk away and getting Japanese fried chicken. It will be way more flavorful.

It's a large piece of chicken. You might want to split one if your ignoring my review above

Name: EN SHI DA JI PAI Shibuya
Address: 12-12 Udagawacho, Shibuya City
Author: Celine
Review: The castella (Taiwanese sponge cake) was so good. It was light and not too sweet.

Name: Chai Tea Cafe 幕張新都心店
Address: 1-1 Toyosuna, Mihama Ward, Chiba
Author: Shruti Tonk
Review: The shop has great collection of Indian continent specialities. Especially the small and common things like matchsticks which is not so common in first world countries. The print of Indian gods on different objects was fascinated, although on a personal note it would be hurtful to see those objects (gods) lying in the dustbin once they have been used. Of course the prices were high but it’s worth the experience. The quality of mats, cushion covers were pretty good

Name: Chai Tea Cafe 幕張新都心店
Address: 1-1 Toyosuna, Mihama Ward, Chiba
Author: pita *
Review: I had Ginger Honey Chai for eat-in. Even though it wasn't crowded, I took my time at a table in the back. It's kind of relaxing... ^^ I would have been happy if there was a dessert.

Name: Chai Tea Cafe 幕張新都心店
Address: 1-1 Toyosuna, Mihama Ward, Chiba
Author: YOU HoNo
Review:
I will buy the meal ticket in advance.
I don't understand without explanation, but I'll go to the drink register to pick it up.
Milk chai was hot
The taste felt weak
The inside of the store was colorful and it was nice to be able to see a lot of things while waiting.
The seats are bright by the entrance.
I was able to sit comfortably

Name: Chai Tea Cafe 幕張新都心店
Address: 1-1 Toyosuna, Mihama Ward, Chiba
Author: Natsuki
Review: There was so much ice in the iced chai that it was almost legal lol It ran out quickly, I think hot is probably better. It was empty, probably because the seats couldn't be seen from outside.

Name: Chai Tea Cafe 幕張新都心店
Address: 1-1 Toyosuna, Mihama Ward, Chiba
Author: info carused.jp
Review:
This cafe is located next to the oriental general store Chaihane in Aeon Mall Makuhari New City. They have a variety of chai teas and sweets, all of which are delicious. The atmosphere is very nice and there are blankets and wifi so you can relax.
Chai tea cafe, attached to variety shop Chai Hane in Aeon shopping mall. Various kinds of chai tea and sweets, all are good. Chilly atmosphere, blanket and WiFi are available.

Name: Monmouth Tea
Address: 1 Chome-21-2 Sendagaya, Shibuya City
Author: Monica
Review:
Delicious sweetened black milk tea. The tea is strong in flavor and enriched with milk and sugar. For someone who never adds sugar to my coffee or tea, it’s definitely on the sweet side. But it’s not as sweet as sugary Starbucks drink or soda, so it was somewhat tolerable. You can’t make any changes or modifications to the drink. Since this is a black milk tea specialty store, the menu only consists of black milk tea (cold, hot, with whip cream, without whip cream…).

I wish they had a less sweet option. If they reduced the sugar a bit, it’d be perfect.

Service is very fast, you’ll be in and out in minutes with your drink.

Name: Monmouth Tea
Address: 1 Chome-21-2 Sendagaya, Shibuya City
Author: Edía Paff
Review: You can have milktea with ice cream here! I really like it. It's a sweet treat. The ice cream floats on a layer of whipped cream, so you can either mix it all together, or deink the tea as is and have the ice cream later on :3c

Name: Monmouth Tea
Address: 1 Chome-21-2 Sendagaya, Shibuya City
Author: Agnes S
Review: Legit milk tea. Nicely extracted tea + good quality milk. Not too sweet

Name: Monmouth Tea
Address: 1 Chome-21-2 Sendagaya, Shibuya City
Author: Kevin Kwok
Review: Get the hot milk tea with cream. There's a few benches outside. But if it's raining there's not really anywhere to sit

Name: Monmouth Tea
Address: 1 Chome-21-2 Sendagaya, Shibuya City
Author: Alyssa Bender
Review:
I am ADDICTED to Monmouth’s tea - in my past two visits I got two drinks per visit 😅 I appreciate that the taste of the tea is strong and is not overpowered by the milk or sugar, it reminds me so much of HK milk tea.

the owner and staff are very friendly ☺️

Name: Afternoon Tea
Address: Chiyoda City, Yurakucho, 2 Chome−5−1 ルミネ有楽町 B1階
Author: Wanda Wang
Review: Casual cafe in lumina, had cakes for tea time.  It was quite popular and the cakes were good!! There is a starting area along a nearby corridor as well as in the cafe.

Name: Afternoon Tea
Address: Chiyoda City, Yurakucho, 2 Chome−5−1 ルミネ有楽町 B1階
Author: merve gk
Review: Waited in the line for more than 40 mins, after ordering my food, I just wanted to charge my Phone for 10mins because as a lonely tourist I only had only a little battery left while waiting and needed to charge urgently. They told me to go somewhere else. The deserts are no special. Tea is less than average. Does not worth the wait. I should have spent 20$ on somewhere more kind and delicious

Name: Afternoon Tea
Address: Chiyoda City, Yurakucho, 2 Chome−5−1 ルミネ有楽町 B1階
Author: Luke Petelczyc
Review: Expensive, but delicious scones. Ok coffee. Tea selection is very nice

Name: Afternoon Tea
Address: Chiyoda City, Yurakucho, 2 Chome−5−1 ルミネ有楽町 B1階
Author: B Shine
Review: A quiet and comfortable tea room.

Name: Afternoon Tea
Address: Chiyoda City, Yurakucho, 2 Chome−5−1 ルミネ有楽町 B1階
Author: Jojo chibi
Review: Strawberry shortcake was average.

Name: Afternoon Tea Tea Room
Address: Taito City, Ueno, 7 Chome−1−1 アトレ上野 1階
Author: lemon
Review: very good place not only  at this place or ueno but other places too but limited menu  of food cause the main is still TEA (usally if you order its better to have set menu )

Name: Afternoon Tea Tea Room
Address: Taito City, Ueno, 7 Chome−1−1 アトレ上野 1階
Author: Ninja Kevin
Review: Fantastic happy staff made feel so welcome and speak English too. Beautiful store but it's under a train line which can be noisy. Amazing desserts and tea!

Name: Afternoon Tea Tea Room
Address: Taito City, Ueno, 7 Chome−1−1 アトレ上野 1階
Author: Emily
Review: The parfait and the tea were good but we ended up waiting 40 minutes with no indication of how long we’d have to wait. Not sure that it’s worth it honestly but if it’s empty and doesn’t have a wait then it’s a nice little spot.

Name: Afternoon Tea Tea Room
Address: Taito City, Ueno, 7 Chome−1−1 アトレ上野 1階
Author: Peihsi Lin
Review: Good access inside Ueno Station. Both meals and desserts are amazing! It is a good place to enjoy lunch or tea time and the service is also wonderful. After having meal, you can also do some shopping on home fashion goods or accessories.

Name: Afternoon Tea Tea Room
Address: Taito City, Ueno, 7 Chome−1−1 アトレ上野 1階
Author: Deana Miller
Review: Fairly busy tea room with a cute shop inside. I came in during the Strawberry Festival month and they offered a lot of strawberry desserts as well as a strawberry tea. The desserts were good; sweet but not sugary, while the tea was too sweet for my liking.

Name: Alpaca cafe
Address: Toshima City, Ikebukuro, 2 Chome−23−1 中西ビル 1F
Author: Abby Brewer
Review: Cutest & tastiest tapioca shop in Ikebukuro area! Perfect place to grab a drink on a hot or cold day while exploring the city. The shop owner is very kind!

Name: Alpaca cafe
Address: Toshima City, Ikebukuro, 2 Chome−23−1 中西ビル 1F
Author: Nora Ti
Review: My all time favorite boba shop! The owner is super kind and uses fresh ingredients and fruits for their teas. I once had a whole lemon inside my boba. Would go there again every single day.

Name: Alpaca cafe
Address: Toshima City, Ikebukuro, 2 Chome−23−1 中西ビル 1F
Author: Jeff C.
Review: Great tea! Love the theme. No seating area, but the attendant was nice enough to let us sit on the side stools to enjoy our drinks.

Name: Alpaca cafe
Address: Toshima City, Ikebukuro, 2 Chome−23−1 中西ビル 1F
Author: Lanette Sok
Review: The tea was super delicious and made perfectly! Very nice and clean shop. Also super cute!! 💖

Name: Alpaca cafe
Address: Toshima City, Ikebukuro, 2 Chome−23−1 中西ビル 1F
Author: Kyle
Review: Best tapioca tea Iv had!! So tasty and the serving is so big! Great value! The staff was super friendly and helpful!

Name: nana's green tea (Ueno Marui)
Address: Taito City, Ueno, 6 Chome−15−1 上野マルイ 1F
Author: Made Yudha
Review:
I tried matcha latte and original matcha. Both tastes so good i fell in love with them. The matcha latte has strong with modest sweetness. The matcha comes with two pleasant sweet cookies.

Perfect closure after a long day strolling around ueno. They also provide power outlet to charge your electronic device. Will definitely come back 😁

Name: nana's green tea (Ueno Marui)
Address: Taito City, Ueno, 6 Chome−15−1 上野マルイ 1F
Author: Sinthia Tan
Review: Love their matcha parfait and hojicha latte. The matcha is just the right amount of bitter, not overly sweet at all.

Name: nana's green tea (Ueno Marui)
Address: Taito City, Ueno, 6 Chome−15−1 上野マルイ 1F
Author: Rainie Dhanoa
Review: Excellent, heathly, set menu & huge Matcha desert, enough for two to share.  Ueno has amazing food, but this is a great (safe) place to take your nervous food companions.

Name: nana's green tea (Ueno Marui)
Address: Taito City, Ueno, 6 Chome−15−1 上野マルイ 1F
Author: Ananya Mahesh
Review: some of the best matcha i’ve had in tokyo ! highly recommend. they have SOY MILK so VEGAN FRIENDLY. inside the mall, can’t miss it!

Name: nana's green tea (Ueno Marui)
Address: Taito City, Ueno, 6 Chome−15−1 上野マルイ 1F
Author: emyaj _mil
Review: Ice Matcha Latte was good. Rich and thick. Perfect for matcha lovers

Name: MLESNA TEA
Address: Chiyoda City, Marunouchi, 1 Chome−9−1 東京ギフトパレットムレスナティ 東京駅
Author: harinder takhar
Review:
They only offer Sri Lankan tea now. The Google listing is out of date. I spent a LOT of time finding this place for nothing.

In case you are looking for Sri Lankan tea, you will find this within the Tokyo Gift Pallete section on 1F at the Tokyo station.

My 2 stars only reflect the wrong information on Google- not the quality of their product or anything.

Name: MLESNA TEA
Address: Chiyoda City, Marunouchi, 1 Chome−9−1 東京ギフトパレットムレスナティ 東京駅
Author: 海神
Review:
A gift for my mother who loves tea. It also had a message written on it, which I thought was cute.
This place makes a great gift as there are many unique flavors that you won't find anywhere else. The taste and aroma were strong and delicious.

Name: MLESNA TEA
Address: Chiyoda City, Marunouchi, 1 Chome−9−1 東京ギフトパレットムレスナティ 東京駅
Author: Hanayo Matsuda
Review:
I used it in a hurry at a late hour.
I wanted to take my time choosing one for myself due to the wide variety and cute packaging, but I quickly bought just one box.
A very nice female clerk was kind enough to help us with the tasting.
I feel sorry for only purchasing one box (sweat)

Next time, I would like to purchase various items for my home!

Name: MLESNA TEA
Address: Chiyoda City, Marunouchi, 1 Chome−9−1 東京ギフトパレットムレスナティ 東京駅
Author: T scott.
Review:
I like mulberry tea, especially the rose variety.
Up until now, I had purchased items from Umeda, Kyoto, or the nearby Kitano Ace.
I learned that there was one at Tokyo Station, so I went out to find something I hadn't tried yet.

Visited around 10 o'clock on weekdays.
There is only one other customer besides me. It seems that he is listening to his favorite things while talking loudly with someone.
I didn't feel like I could choose a tea calmly, so I tried only three scents, but in the end I ended up buying two that I always drink and were running out.

Someday, I would like to consult with the store staff and make a selection.

Name: MLESNA TEA
Address: Chiyoda City, Marunouchi, 1 Chome−9−1 東京ギフトパレットムレスナティ 東京駅
Author: 上野花子
Review:
I came to the store to use TOKAI points.
Now that I know that the tea is pesticide-free, pesticide-free, and naturally flavored, I would like to use it as a gift in the future.

Name: TEA BUCKS
Address: 2 Chome-12-14 Ebisunishi, Shibuya City
Author: E K
Review:
Absolutely one of my favorite places to stop by for a delicious tea(
and some snacks)!!
I personally love Genmai Tea and they do it perfect! But my favorite tea here is Shiro Bone(白骨茶) cha!
Also they do have alcoholic beverages available. Ocha-wari will go perfect on a hot humid Tokyo summer.
Very much recommended!

Name: TEA BUCKS
Address: 2 Chome-12-14 Ebisunishi, Shibuya City
Author: L Naomi
Review: Located around the residential area, its small but the variety of tea they have is amazing! Late post.. but I enjoyed their summer limited shaved ice and tea. They also serve alcohol (chawari ) using the different teas.

Name: TEA BUCKS
Address: 2 Chome-12-14 Ebisunishi, Shibuya City
Author: Mariel Rancel
Review: The shop owner is very kind and was able to recommend a sencha tea based on the flavor profile I was looking for. He gave specific at home brewing instructions and shared a quiet enthusiasm for tea. I will be back if I am in the area - the tea selection is first class.

Name: TEA BUCKS
Address: 2 Chome-12-14 Ebisunishi, Shibuya City
Author: Hoon Y
Review: Cosy and friendly off the beaten track Japanese tea themed cafe/bar that you can’t find anywhere else.

Name: TEA BUCKS
Address: 2 Chome-12-14 Ebisunishi, Shibuya City
Author: Langer Lee
Review: Recommend the different varieties of Hojicha lattes available. Quaint location but homely experience.

Name: Afternoon Tea
Address: Chiyoda City, Marunouchi, 1 Chome−5−1 新丸の内ビルディング 4階
Author: Louise Zhou
Review: We ordered the cream tea set. Very pleased with the attention to detail - the temperature of the tea was perfect when served, and the scones were served hot and absolutely delightful. It’s a nice little place with massive windows and we like the vibes. Would recommend.

Name: Afternoon Tea
Address: Chiyoda City, Marunouchi, 1 Chome−5−1 新丸の内ビルディング 4階
Author: Ben S
Review: Cafe entrance is located inside the shop if the same name.  I forget taking picture but the view toward the direction of the palace is open and quite nice.  During weekdays afternoon, 99% of customers are ladies.  Drink is around 900 yen so at a premium compared to Starbucks etc but you can sit and chat for about 2 hours in more relaxed environment.  If there is a waiting customer, you will be gently reminded about the time after 2 hours.

Name: Afternoon Tea
Address: Chiyoda City, Marunouchi, 1 Chome−5−1 新丸の内ビルディング 4階
Author: Nickawanna Shaw
Review: A delight for all the senses. Citrus-Mint tea, yummy salad, and a wee purchase.  The building is connected via underground to the Maranouchi Tokyo Stop. Very convenient!

Name: Afternoon Tea
Address: Chiyoda City, Marunouchi, 1 Chome−5−1 新丸の内ビルディング 4階
Author: C
Review: It has a beautiful relaxed atmosphere with wonderful views, we went late afternoon in winter so already dark out but still gorgeous. The chocolate souffle was to die for, I highly recommend you try any of the souffle varieties. It's a small wait that is absolutely worth it. The tea selection is ample, we had their decaffeinated black tea which comes in a pot with a cute cosy, they refill the pot too if you want. Apple pie was delicious too, I'm sure anything on their menu would be scrumptious. Hospitality was great, attentive and kind. English menu was available to us and we had an English speaking server. Highly recommended this simply styled joint.

Name: Afternoon Tea
Address: Chiyoda City, Marunouchi, 1 Chome−5−1 新丸の内ビルディング 4階
Author: Ken Yasumoto-Nicolson
Review:
Ordered the scone set with one of them their September special apricot flavour. It came with cream, blackcurrant jam, and raspberry chocolate mousse spread thingy.

Wife ordered the same with a fudge milk tea, which is as disgustingly (in a good way, of course) sweet as it sounds!

Oh, and despite being called Afternoon Tea, it doesn't have an afternoon tea set!

Name: boba tea 稲毛店
Address: 6 Chome-1-1 Konakadai, Inage Ward, Chiba
Author: Sarleen Castro
Review: They have the best boba pearls. It's so chewy and delicious and it won't hurt your jaws. The staff is very kind. You can stay there in their shop, they have internet and outlet. Afforfable milk tea! I always come visit every week.

Name: boba tea 稲毛店
Address: 6 Chome-1-1 Konakadai, Inage Ward, Chiba
Author: Nguyệt Phong Anh
Review:
The shop looks like a family restaurant. The staff speaks with heavy Taiwanese accent. I was impressed by their colorful mask (lol).

I visited there on Saturday afternoon and they seems to have a busy day, few people lined up to order.

As a hobby, I always choose Jasmine flavor if the store has. And here it is Jasmine Milk Tea with bubble. I forgot the drink itself already has one topping (tapioka), so i did call extra red beans. The drink is neutral, but the price is more reasonable than other brand such as Ryushoudou.

It stays within the diameter of 400m from Inage Station and also in busy area on the google map. Since it is next to the main road, there is no parking area. If you're driving through, u may stop at Lawson' parking area at 100m far from the shop.

Name: boba tea 稲毛店
Address: 6 Chome-1-1 Konakadai, Inage Ward, Chiba
Author: Samimuzzaman
Review: It’s very popular nowadays in Inage. Especially in summer days, there is often queue of the customers. Just three minutes to walk from Inage JR station.

Name: boba tea 稲毛店
Address: 6 Chome-1-1 Konakadai, Inage Ward, Chiba
Author: Thi Nguyen
Review: Delicious milk, quick staff, reasonable prices.

Name: boba tea 稲毛店
Address: 6 Chome-1-1 Konakadai, Inage Ward, Chiba
Author: Theijan edirisuriya
Review: Great service and superb delicious❤️highly recommended✌️

Name: TWG Tea at Ginza
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 5 Chome−2−1 東急プラザ銀座 3階
Author: Brianna Vought
Review: Very lovely and fancy tea shop in Ginza! They have all sorts ranging from red, green, white, black and oolong. I was disappointed with their oolong selection, it was super small. However, be sure to get their macarons, they are the best flavors and infused with tea! I've never been do happy to eat macarons with each bite :)

Name: TWG Tea at Ginza
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 5 Chome−2−1 東急プラザ銀座 3階
Author: Daniel Dyrnes
Review:
Good selection with friendly staff.
However it was a little hard to get their attention as there was to many customers to service representatives when I went, so I would consider adding 2 more staff members in the holiday season’s to deal with the rush of customers.
Other than that, good tea!~ ☕️

Name: TWG Tea at Ginza
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 5 Chome−2−1 東急プラザ銀座 3階
Author: Daniel
Review: Located on the 3rd floor or Tokyu Plaza. Super friendly staff. Not as many variety as Singapore and many of the tea leafs are out of stock and not available. They would be happy to wrap your tea if you intend it for a gift.

Name: TWG Tea at Ginza
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 5 Chome−2−1 東急プラザ銀座 3階
Author: Екатерина Дубельштейн
Review: Good shop, best tea 🍵

Name: TWG Tea at Ginza
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 5 Chome−2−1 東急プラザ銀座 3階
Author: Daniel Pinheiro
Review:
Several teas of excellent quality ready to be packaged for your travel back... or maybe just back home if you do live in the city, of course.

Utensils are also for sale, quite the collection of options they have there!

Name: Pearl Lady
Address: Toshima City, Minamiikebukuro, 1 Chome−29−1 池袋ショッピングパーク南館
Author: Hungry CLS
Review: This is my favourite boba shop chain in tokyo.  Tea flavour perfect, toppings perfect.  I only tried the milk teas but I'm confident other items will b good too.  They do 4 types of milk tea, all good but I prefer Taiwan black with black sugar pearl and shiratama

Name: Pearl Lady
Address: Toshima City, Minamiikebukuro, 1 Chome−29−1 池袋ショッピングパーク南館
Author: Mo W
Review: I got a fruit tea with kiwi + strawberry chunks, with brown sugar boba. I got the recommended sweetness level. It ended up being not very sweet at all, so definitely go up in sweetness if you're looking for something sweet. The boba also did not have too much flavor, but overall the drink felt unique and refreshing, which was what I was looking for. Service was quick and kind.

Name: Pearl Lady
Address: Toshima City, Minamiikebukuro, 1 Chome−29−1 池袋ショッピングパーク南館
Author: Annemarie Rose
Review: Great quality bubble tea, nice matcha, more toppings options than other local Boba shops, and fun seasonal options! It's a bit hard to find, but it is on B1, back around the corner (so that Tobu basement level is behind you to your right) Like them on LINE for coupons!

Name: Pearl Lady
Address: Toshima City, Minamiikebukuro, 1 Chome−29−1 池袋ショッピングパーク南館
Author: Evitya Haryanto
Review: Quite long queue but staff service was fast. Tried their matcha latte with shiratama/mochi balls instead of regular tapioca balls, it was ok and affordable.

Name: Pearl Lady
Address: Toshima City, Minamiikebukuro, 1 Chome−29−1 池袋ショッピングパーク南館
Author: Nara Froz
Review:
Strongly recommend Taiwan cha with salt cream and without any additions and hot! Around 400 yen
The shop is under the streets

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM
Address: Toshima City, Nishiikebukuro, 1 Chome−1−25 東武百貨店池袋店 3階
Author: MASAKI
Review: Beautiful & comfortable cafe restaurant in Tobu department store !

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM
Address: Toshima City, Nishiikebukuro, 1 Chome−1−25 東武百貨店池袋店 3階
Author: o a
Review:
I visited before 6pm on a weekday.
I got in without lining up.
Ordered the high tea set after 5pm.
A set of main food, drink, and half-sized dessert (or salad or soup).
I had scallops and scallops peperoncino, decaf iced tea, and shortcake. The price was 2,030 yen including tax, but I was very satisfied with the dessert.
The food and desserts change with the seasons, so I'd like to go again.

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM
Address: Toshima City, Nishiikebukuro, 1 Chome−1−25 東武百貨店池袋店 3階
Author: min dada
Review:
I wanted to eat delicious tea and cake, so I went to afternoon tea.
The fresh cream on top of the cakes and scones was unsweetened and not too sweet, so it was very delicious.
The lemon cream decorated around the cheesecake was so delicious!
There were many different kinds of pot tea, and it was a novel tea with fruit that reminded me of a tropical country.
The inside of the store is calm and I can't help but be drawn to the cute products sold at the entrance.

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM
Address: Toshima City, Nishiikebukuro, 1 Chome−1−25 東武百貨店池袋店 3階
Author: S R
Review:
It's very crowded on Saturdays and Sundays, but there are a lot of seats, so I feel like the turnover rate is faster than other restaurants. It can get a bit crowded due to the large number of people, so I recommend going during the day on weekdays or at night.

I often eat the standard tomato pasta because it always has a consistent taste, but I also look forward to the seasonal menu.

The tea pot holds 2 or 3 teacups, so you can fully enjoy your tea until you've finished your meal and dessert, and the tea comes out without tea leaves, so it doesn't taste bitter.

The store staff are also very courteous.

*Photo 2024 Spring Seasonal Menu

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM
Address: Toshima City, Nishiikebukuro, 1 Chome−1−25 東武百貨店池袋店 3階
Author: Ken
Review:
It's a cafe with delicious food. Enjoy the menu, which changes seasonally.
There's a line on Saturdays and Sundays, but it's still worth going.

Name: Tea Room Green
Address: Minato City, Minamiazabu, 4 Chome−1−29 2階
Author: Therese Wong
Review: Tea Room Green is a nice little cafe next to the bookstore on the second floor of Hiroo Garden. The floor-to-ceiling window provides a tranquil, green view so it's quite a good place to read a book or do some work over a cup of coffee. It's usually not crowded on weekday afternoons.

Name: Tea Room Green
Address: Minato City, Minamiazabu, 4 Chome−1−29 2階
Author: Nathalie Weydert
Review: Hidden gem just off the Main Street. Connected to a book shop, it’s a quiet place if you want a quick sit down and drink/snack between schedules. Calming view onto greenery

Name: Tea Room Green
Address: Minato City, Minamiazabu, 4 Chome−1−29 2階
Author: Vanessa
Review: The hamburger box and short cakes delicious!! I gave the food 4 though because the drinks are in my opinion substandard for the price. The atmosphere is also great for studying with a view of the greenery outside — hence the name tearoom green. Also connected to a bookstore.

Name: Tea Room Green
Address: Minato City, Minamiazabu, 4 Chome−1−29 2階
Author: NANA
Review:
I was planning to go to Hiroo for dinner.
