I was about to arrive at my destination an hour early, so I searched online to kill some time in Hiroo, and ended up stopping at Bunkyodo Bookstore, which was right next to the exit.
Surprisingly, the bookstore has been renovated, and the inside of the bookstore itself is super clean.
There isn't a huge selection of books, but the attached cafe is open around dinner time on holidays, so it's probably a neighborhood experience. There were only about 100 people there.

This place is quite a hidden gem.
Rather than wondering how the coffee tastes,
I think you can buy a book and read it leisurely at a cafe with few people, or do some work or study.
I don't know how crowded it will be at noon or at night on weekdays, but it seems like it's a place that not many people know about, so I thought I had found a really nice place.

I will use it again! !

Name: Tea Room Green
Address: Minato City, Minamiazabu, 4 Chome−1−29 2階
Author: YOSHIKO T
Review:
Oh my God! There was a nice cafe tucked away in the back of the bookstore ✨
It is a relaxing cafe where you can enjoy the greenery from the large windows.
I thought I'd have lunch, but it felt more like a light meal, so I thought it would be better to take a break rather than eat a big meal. It's a very nice cafe.
I think it depends on your taste, but I felt like the food was expensive, including the atmosphere.

Name: nana’s green tea ルミネエスト新宿店
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−38−1 ルミネエスト 8F
Author: Theresa
Review: Go the 8th floor for this parfait spot. Had the hojicha parfait and although it was tasty and satisfied my ice cream craving, I found it to be overall unremarkable. The hojicha flavour could’ve been stronger.

Name: nana’s green tea ルミネエスト新宿店
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−38−1 ルミネエスト 8F
Author: edwardyhm
Review:
Very modern cafe with a range of drinks and desserts. There can be queues during peak time and it can get loud.
First time having matcha soda, honestly just stick to a tea or matcha latte lol. The dessert snack combo was very tasty

Name: nana’s green tea ルミネエスト新宿店
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−38−1 ルミネエスト 8F
Author: Shi
Review:
If you want to try REAL matcha, don’t come here.

The matcha cheesecake was just a plain cheesecake dyed in green.
The matcha latte had no taste, very bland - again, it felt like it was just dyed in green.

Atmosphere is loud - many high schoolers were there.

The clerk made me and my other foreigner friend pay beforehand, even though we saw other Japanese customers pay when they exit the cafe. Pretty xenophobic if you ask me.

Name: nana’s green tea ルミネエスト新宿店
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−38−1 ルミネエスト 8F
Author: Wennessa Bonin
Review: Great service! Many varieties of mostly matcha desserts and drinks. Good range of decadent to light desserts. If you're a matcha fan like I am, this place is perfect for you! Might have to wait in line for a table during peak hours.

Name: nana’s green tea ルミネエスト新宿店
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−38−1 ルミネエスト 8F
Author: Robert Ilijason
Review:
A nice little place with a friendly staff. Very happy to help out, even though there was a language barrier to overcome.

The matcha shake was really good. The sweets less so. Not bad, but I kind of expected more.

The biggest drawback is that it’s located in a boring space. A bit sterile.

Name: Sakurai Japanese Tea Experience
Address: スパイラルビル 5F, 5 Chome-6-23 Minamiaoyama, Minato City
Author: Roxy Thomas
Review: My husband and I went in today and were able to get sat without a reservation. This was on a Tuesday at noon, and there was a steady stream of customers. This was a highlight of our trip as we appreciated the care their team put into each part of the tasting. It was incredibly fascinating watching the tea maker prepare the water and teas, and the food/tasters paired nicely with the drinks. We found the experience to be extremely calming and sedating, with a sprinkle of ASMR. We highly recommend it for those that want to open up their palate to the regional teas Japan has to offer. PS their cashew dessert is insanely good.

Name: Sakurai Japanese Tea Experience
Address: スパイラルビル 5F, 5 Chome-6-23 Minamiaoyama, Minato City
Author: Max Bell
Review: Even though it was a little pricey, it was so good! The service and attention to detail was unparalleled. Me and my mother did two different tasting; I did a traditional set and my mom did the seasonal cold teas. The experience and experimentally left us talking about the great tea we had for the next week! Truly a one of a kind experience I cannot recommend enough. I think the more expensive tasting menus have more value here as they employ more experimental methods. Truly great! The Hojicha and Gyokuro were my favorites, and my moms were the Gyokuro over ice and the Kyobancha and Corn-foam

Name: Sakurai Japanese Tea Experience
Address: スパイラルビル 5F, 5 Chome-6-23 Minamiaoyama, Minato City
Author: Mischief Adler
Review: My husband and I were looking for something to do and decided to book this last minute. We were not expecting much; however, we were pleasantly surprised! The tasting experience was wonderful, with the tea and cocktails tasting quite good and unique. The tea master's were great at explaining everything in English as they did their preparations and took great care with their attention to detail. It was really interesting what them roast the tea leaves in front of you, and the candied snacks that accompanied the drinks were lovely! Definitely check it out!

Name: Sakurai Japanese Tea Experience
Address: スパイラルビル 5F, 5 Chome-6-23 Minamiaoyama, Minato City
Author: Vocaloid Anna
Review:
Ok, here’s my honest opinion:
A very cool experience but borderline pretentious. Now hear me out.

The way they prepare the tea was with very careful thought and timing. I can understand some elements from how they handle the cups to pouring, pulling inspiration from the Japanese tea ceremony. You feel they've done this a thousand times, it’s like their movements follow a dance/conducting an orchestra. You get to learn the different leaves and the subtle nuances between each one as they present it to you with leaves subdivided in each platter.

And… thats about it. The food/sweets was very mediocre and each time they pour you a cup, you're left wondering at the direction of if theres sweets coming out to complement the tea.. or drink while they simultaneously serve the other guests.

Afterwards, it felt like everybody got up and left quiet compliments as if convincing themselves their 1.5 hr experience was worth it. Was it because the tea taste was not to their liking..?

I ordered the most expensive on the menu to fully give my opinion. At 6,230 yen (~$40) you get about 3 small cups of tea, a half pinky nail size of sweet chestnut, a small rectangular size bento the size of your hand (rice, 3-4 pieces of sweet potato?, tiny grilled fish, and two other veggies), ending off your meal with s selection of sweet. I chose kashiwa mochi. Overall, I think for $40 with the experience was not so bad.

I wanna warn that the tea may not be for everyone. It may be too intense for some, being that it has this slight bitter but earthiness taste. They strain the tea leaves so you get the maximum taste from the tea leaves. I'm assuming thats why some guests made nervous comments: ah, I'm so full of tea… that was interesting.. Or even better, the gentlemen beside me looked like they were struggling to finish their tea sake.

I also noted that during my experience they didn’t let us record any videos, only take pics. But I see a few videos uploaded here..?

Since I was so satisfied and amused after the experienced, I wanted to support the shop further by buying a very expensive medium size tea scoop. I saw at their front and again when they used it during the tea experience. Excited,  purchased it without a second thought about the price tag thinking, this is a great buy since the yen conversion is so low! WRONG. Unfortunately they hike up the price when I checked the online store for the original merchant (kaikado.jp). The website sells for 20,200 yen (As of today about $131.99). Ok, surely there’s shipping that causes the inflation..? Nope total was $200.60 after shipping. In the store was priced at 38,500 yen (About $249.27 when I purchased 1 week ago, today would have been $246.62).

Buyers beware! Anyway, I recommend if there’s anything interesting in store you’d like to purchase, they can be found elsewhere for cheaper.

Come for the tourist trap experience. Stay for the different tea tastings.

Name: Sakurai Japanese Tea Experience
Address: スパイラルビル 5F, 5 Chome-6-23 Minamiaoyama, Minato City
Author: John Kenney
Review: I showed up without a reservation and had to come back 90 minutes later. The experience was worth it. each tea was unique and the way they prepared it was entertaining to watch. It was especially cool seeing what other people were getting. The tea makers were really knowledgeable and were able to explain how each tea was different in English. I will definitely come back during my next visit to Tokyo.

Name: Urn Chai & Tea | Ebisu
Address: 1 Chome-22-23 Ebisu, Shibuya City
Author: Antolin Mendoza
Review: Felt like having Chai and was happily surprised. You can smell the chai just walking by, and their menu is just a variety of Chai for any who love it. The place also has a nice little charm and is near Ebisu station. The treats also have gluten free options, which aren't my thing but aren't bad if you have gluten allergies. Definitely recommend it for those who want to drink some Chai and take some home for themselves.

Name: Urn Chai & Tea | Ebisu
Address: 1 Chome-22-23 Ebisu, Shibuya City
Author: M K
Review: The chocolate chai was good, it tasted like your average chocolate milk. The frozen chai wasn’t very good. It lacked depth, flavour and sweetness- it just felt spicy. But the back of your throat kind of spicy. I couldn’t finish it. I’d like to go back and try other chai varieties on their menu but for the price and what I got with the frozen chai…

Name: Urn Chai & Tea | Ebisu
Address: 1 Chome-22-23 Ebisu, Shibuya City
Author: Mai Le
Review:
Cute Chai Cafe located on a small street near Ebisu station. The vibe is chilled and definitely worth checking out.
Ordered the original chai and the matcha chai. Both amazing.

Name: Urn Chai & Tea | Ebisu
Address: 1 Chome-22-23 Ebisu, Shibuya City
Author: Rimpa Karmakar
Review: Moist, decadent, and utterly divine! The rich chocolate flavor melted in my mouth, while the velvety frosting added a luxurious touch. The perfect balance of sweet and savory, this cake is a masterpiece. A must-have for any celebration or indulgent treat. ❤❤❤❤❤

Name: Urn Chai & Tea | Ebisu
Address: 1 Chome-22-23 Ebisu, Shibuya City
Author: Jason Chuei
Review: Lovely little cafe specialising in chai, located on the east side of Ebisu. Well designed aesthetic, with great use of the space. Homely yet hipster. Upstairs alcove overlooking the main space adds a nice touch. The matcha chai combines my two favourite teas. Accompanied by an apple early grey scone, a great combination.

Name: TEA TATAMO! 本店
Address: 2 Chome-6-1 Taishido, Setagaya City
Author: Yaël Bégel
Review: I came to draw a little bit, I really needed a cold drink after walking around under the sun and let me tell you this was perfect ! Its very original, very relaxing and theres some ghibli music playing wich I love ! I'll definetly come back if im around !

Name: TEA TATAMO! 本店
Address: 2 Chome-6-1 Taishido, Setagaya City
Author: Julia P.
Review: Came to the place since I’d only been ordering on UberEats. It’s a bit cheaper but the prices are still high imo. I like their matcha latte with boba and it’s basically the only boba place in Sancha. It’s more like a stand than a cafe because of the size. Though got delivery today of their matcha shake to give it a try but it was too powdery. I don’t mind it in the latte, but it was too much in the shake. Would still recommend to others though!

Name: TEA TATAMO! 本店
Address: 2 Chome-6-1 Taishido, Setagaya City
Author: C. Rhodes
Review:
TEA TATAMO! is a small shop on the side of a busy road. Despite this, its appearance is very charming and welcoming. I ordered a houjicha latte with soymilk. I liked how the menu had alternative milk recommendations for its top drinks; super helpful for those of us who don’t drink dairy milk!
The taste of the houjicha was lovely: the texture was a bit on the grainy side but overall it wasn’t unpleasant. The tatami mat seating inside provided for great shop theming: I really liked how the coaster was tatami themed!
Overall, this shop is a great stop, and one I want to go to again.

Name: TEA TATAMO! 本店
Address: 2 Chome-6-1 Taishido, Setagaya City
Author: Olivia Wood
Review: I went several times across the span of a few weeks, trying out most of the green tea drinks and sweets, both take-away and sitting in. All of them were delicious. The staff was extremely kind and helpful, happily adjusting the sweetness to just the right level. Non-dairy/vegan alternatives for milk are available. There is a small area to sit in. It is quite small but nicely decorated and very cozy. The door can be closed for a bit of quiet or shelter from the heat in summer (air-conditioning available).

Name: TEA TATAMO! 本店
Address: 2 Chome-6-1 Taishido, Setagaya City
Author: Mackenzie Mayer
Review: This was the best matcha I’ve ever had, and the staff was incredibly sweet. The eating space is very small but cozy. Definitely recommend this place to anyone in the area.

Name: Afternoon Tea Love & Table 1 Shinjuku Lumine 1
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−5 ルミネ新宿1 4階
Author: R AY
Review: Lunch combo. A spaghetti, a piece of cake and a pot of tea. The cake is beautifully made and fine cream, very nice. The spaghetti is very chewy (a bit hard to me), no salty, ok in general.

Name: Afternoon Tea Love & Table 1 Shinjuku Lumine 1
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−5 ルミネ新宿1 4階
Author: Jenny Hsu
Review: Normal service and normal food. The salad portion was small, and the spaghetti lacked vegetables and meat. The cake included in the lunch set was bland. The only positive aspect was that the lunch set came with a pot of tea.

Name: Afternoon Tea Love & Table 1 Shinjuku Lumine 1
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−5 ルミネ新宿1 4階
Author: Jason Kwok
Review:
nice place to chill, eat sum food and drink sum stuff. they vibemaxing and gyat W rizz. food was bussin.

~1900 yen for pasta + salad or bread + small crepe + drink
~1000 for da pasta
:>

Name: Afternoon Tea Love & Table 1 Shinjuku Lumine 1
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−5 ルミネ新宿1 4階
Author: yichun wu
Review:
I’d order the lunch combo
I contained with a salad ,main course,and a slice of cake . The spaghetti was seasonal special.sweet potatoes flavor .that’s good for me .but I prefer the other one .haha
The banana chocolate cake was delicious for me .not so sweet and also in the middle there is chocolate inside,so the crunchy and soft texture comes to me .Afternoon tea is completely become my [must go ]in Japan 🇯🇵

Name: Afternoon Tea Love & Table 1 Shinjuku Lumine 1
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−5 ルミネ新宿1 4階
Author: Aleksandra Ivanchenko
Review: Pretty and tasty deserts. The place is cute. The price is a bit high for my standards, but it’s the center of a big shopping mall in Shinjuku, and the berries on these little tarts are delicious, so it’s worth it.

Name: Mian Tea Nippori
Address: Arakawa City, Higashinippori, 6 Chome−57−9 エクセレントⅡ 1階
Author: Summer Hello
Review:
The best milk tea + matcha latte in the town.
The taste is amazing like no other and the people are very kind. And the shop is very clean.

Name: Mian Tea Nippori
Address: Arakawa City, Higashinippori, 6 Chome−57−9 エクセレントⅡ 1階
Author: Joaquin Ramas
Review: Mint tea was fantastic, was a foreigner and was truly welcomed in here. Recommend for all :D

Name: Mian Tea Nippori
Address: Arakawa City, Higashinippori, 6 Chome−57−9 エクセレントⅡ 1階
Author: Eric K
Review: Extremely friendly staff and a wonderful atmosphere. The tea and coffee are fantastic. It's the perfect spot to unwind and relax.

Name: Mian Tea Nippori
Address: Arakawa City, Higashinippori, 6 Chome−57−9 エクセレントⅡ 1階
Author: Ji Hyuk Kim
Review:
First time I came here I ordered 2 milk teas. Both were very good. 5 stars. The next time it was a hot day so I ordered a fresh grape smoothie. They gave me a semi cold grape juice with a little foam floating on top. 850 yen for grape juice. Definitely not worth it. Not coming back.

I came back. Their desserts are awesome and i finally re tried a grapefruit smoothie. Was much better. Upgraded 2 more stars.

Name: Mian Tea Nippori
Address: Arakawa City, Higashinippori, 6 Chome−57−9 エクセレントⅡ 1階
Author: Audrey Chin Quan
Review: My favourite Taiwanese dessert is served here. Not too sweet like some other places. Loved it.

Name: 茶語（Cha Yū）TEA SALON 新宿髙島屋店
Address: 5 Chome-24-2 Sendagaya, Shibuya City
Author: 吉田栗栖
Review: A little hidden tea oasis. Food is so so but the selection of tea is great, especially if you're a fan of chinese tea and brewing tea gongfu style. It was really fun browsing their wide tea selection and wares at the entrance of their shop as well. Would definitely come back again to try more teas. Great place to catch up with friends or go on a chatty date. Suica, credit card and other electronic payments are accepted.

Name: 茶語（Cha Yū）TEA SALON 新宿髙島屋店
Address: 5 Chome-24-2 Sendagaya, Shibuya City
Author: Annie Time
Review: A nice Chinese tea set experience with my local friends. Finest Chinese Tea pair with amazing desert. 90 mins seating time limited.

Name: 茶語（Cha Yū）TEA SALON 新宿髙島屋店
Address: 5 Chome-24-2 Sendagaya, Shibuya City
Author: Mary
Review: Very long wait on the weekend but it was worth it. Chinese tea experience like an oasis in the heart of Shinjuku.

Name: 茶語（Cha Yū）TEA SALON 新宿髙島屋店
Address: 5 Chome-24-2 Sendagaya, Shibuya City
Author: ごちそうやby fifteen
Review: Great tea place. If you are looking for Chinese tea experience in Shinjyuku, this place is it.

Name: 茶語（Cha Yū）TEA SALON 新宿髙島屋店
Address: 5 Chome-24-2 Sendagaya, Shibuya City
Author: Ahmed Assadi
Review: Really healthy dishes and the dessert was epic.

Name: Yanaka coffee and tea
Address: 2 Chome-33-6 Kitazawa, Setagaya City
Author: achinoam rikin
Review:
Rude and unwelcoming. We were trying to order and sit they wouldn’t let us and not only did they kick us out, they made us buy their bad coffee for using the toilet, before they kicked us out. Avoid going!
The worst experience we had in Tokyo. There are so many nice places and welcoming people don’t bother wasting your time in this lame place

Name: Yanaka coffee and tea
Address: 2 Chome-33-6 Kitazawa, Setagaya City
Author: MeT
Review: Fantastic hideaway cafe that does excellent coffee. Both indoor n el fresco seating. Besides great coffee n teas, they also retail beans. Quite a wide variety for brewing in or take away. Yanaka’s is located in a side lane on a corner, ambience there is quiet relaxed and contemplative- perfect after the hustle n bustle of trendy Shimokitazawa! Prices are very reasonable and it’s a wonderful cafe to kick back your heels and have a cuppa or two of your favourite Java. Always make it a point to visit whenever we’re in that part of the city. Highly recommended 🎖🎖🎖🎖🎖

Name: Yanaka coffee and tea
Address: 2 Chome-33-6 Kitazawa, Setagaya City
Author: Divyanshu Solanki
Review: Their coffee tastes really great !

Name: Yanaka coffee and tea
Address: 2 Chome-33-6 Kitazawa, Setagaya City
Author: Moshe Ashkenazi
Review: It looks like amazing place, but the attend didn't want to serve a coffee without milk/cream, which I can not have.

Name: Yanaka coffee and tea
Address: 2 Chome-33-6 Kitazawa, Setagaya City
Author: Leo Smith
Review: banging coffee hot ppl

Name: Coffee tea house SHŪ Premium Shibuya Station
Address: Shibuya City, Dogenzaka, 2 Chome−29−3 共同ビル 1 ・ 2F
Author: Han Yu Tan
Review:
I tried some of the desserts here and they’re pretty good, though quite pricey.

The apple pie is good, it’s not overly sweet, and there’s some cold ice cream to pair with the warm pie. The strawberry shortcake is pretty good, quite sweet. The roll cake is decent as well.

Name: Coffee tea house SHŪ Premium Shibuya Station
Address: Shibuya City, Dogenzaka, 2 Chome−29−3 共同ビル 1 ・ 2F
Author: Frodo821
Review: A (Japanese) traditional cafe with decent but relaxed atmosphere, that offer us neat drinks and desserts at reasonable price. Recommended.

Name: Coffee tea house SHŪ Premium Shibuya Station
Address: Shibuya City, Dogenzaka, 2 Chome−29−3 共同ビル 1 ・ 2F
Author: AJ M
Review:
The fruit desserts tasted great, but seriously how long does it take to bring out already made and ready to be served cakes? It also took a while to flag down staff to take our order.
Service was atrocious. Discriminating and snobbish staff, especially the glasses wearing one called Nakayama. You should be ashamed to work in a posh looking restaurant.

Name: Coffee tea house SHŪ Premium Shibuya Station
Address: Shibuya City, Dogenzaka, 2 Chome−29−3 共同ビル 1 ・ 2F
Author: Samson Ong
Review: Coffee is average (siphon), but their dessert is decent. Come here for the atmosphere and/or their dessert

Name: Coffee tea house SHŪ Premium Shibuya Station
Address: Shibuya City, Dogenzaka, 2 Chome−29−3 共同ビル 1 ・ 2F
Author: Jason Hiak
Review:
Quiet place in the middle of busy Shibuya. Was expecting a normal restaurant as it wasn’t crowded. Had a pleasant surprise with the coffee standard and the Christmas cake. Even the decorative chocolate taste of good quality.

Pretty expensive for a cake and a coffee.

Name: Urn Chai & Tea | Coredo
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashimuromachi, 1 Chome−5−5, COREDO Muromachi 3, 2F
Author: happy happy
Review: I'm fond of this Chai tea.and quite satisfied with atmosphere of this.

Name: Urn Chai & Tea | Coredo
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashimuromachi, 1 Chome−5−5, COREDO Muromachi 3, 2F
Author: NAM
Review:
2024.08 I came to the store around 14:00 on a weekday, and it was full when I entered. There were a lot of people coming in, mainly female customers, so there were three of us, so we used the mini table inside the store to sit on a bench.
(There are a lot of seats, so if you are 1 or 2 people, you may be able to use it even during crowded tea time if you wait a little while, but if you have 3 or more people, it will be difficult to use anything other than a bench. There is a seat in the back that seems to be comfortable for 4 or more people. Yes)

The store's signature product, the original chai, was delicious with just the right amount of sweetness and the flavor of spices. However, I was shocked at how delicious the ponleta cake I ordered with it was! This time I ordered the seasonal pineapple coconut pop lettuce cake, but next time I would like to try the carrot cake. Although it had a firm sweetness, it wasn't heavy and I could eat it easily. It's said to be a cake made with corn flour, but it's actually gluten-free! An impressive level. (Pon leta cake is quite sweet, so next time I have it with pon leta cake, I will use non-sweet chai instead.)

I couldn't resist the cuteness of the interior design. It has a Scandinavian chic and Korean taste, and the inside is decorated with bright pop colors, which is unusual for a Japanese cafe, so I was excited. The plates, trays, and paper cup (hot) markings are also wonderful! My friend who was with me dropped a cup of chai on the floor on the way there, but the staff was kind enough to help me out even though it was a busy time, which I was grateful for. I will come again 🫶

Name: Urn Chai & Tea | Coredo
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashimuromachi, 1 Chome−5−5, COREDO Muromachi 3, 2F
Author: 無患子
Review:
It may be a hidden gem among cafes in this area. Even though it's a chai shop, I ordered a green tea type, but I recommend drinking chai instead. It's delicious with plenty of spice and sweetness 🎶 I only drink chai at Indian curry restaurants, so it's unusual for me to have chai available 😳☕

It's deep and has plenty of seats, but some of the seats by the window are low chairs with no backrests that are surprisingly difficult to sit in, and the bench seats are a little awkward because there's no separation between you and the person next to you. There is no problem if you are seated at a table. The customer service from the staff was also good. The cakes sold at the cash register looked delicious, but they were small and expensive so I decided not to try them.

Name: Urn Chai & Tea | Coredo
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashimuromachi, 1 Chome−5−5, COREDO Muromachi 3, 2F
Author: メシメシ
Review:
I was really interested in this chai shop in Ebisu. I went on a Sunday around 3pm and it was empty ^ ^
At first, I got lost because I didn't know that there were many Coredos, but this one is located at Coredo Muromachi 3!
I feel like I got off at Mitsukoshi-mae and A5 was close 🙋‍♂️

I think it's easy to spend time because there is Wi-Fi.
The chai had a good amount of spice, which I liked, and above all, I was surprised at how delicious the hot sandwich I ordered was ✨
I think it was a chicken margherita...it had so many toppings inside that it was enough for lunch on its own.

I would like to go to Ebisu next time too 🍰

The second time I went there was around 6:30 pm and I was able to sit normally ^ ^
This time I ordered a chocolate scone and iced matcha chai 🙋‍♂️
She was the same blonde lady as before, and she was really nice and responsive♪
It's cozy. I went to Ebisu, but there was a line outside so I gave up. 🙅‍♂️ I had the impression that there weren't many seats 😌

I like it here 🙂

Name: Urn Chai & Tea | Coredo
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashimuromachi, 1 Chome−5−5, COREDO Muromachi 3, 2F
Author: OKAYAS。ぐるめっと。
Review:
.
•Chai spice polenta cake 600 yen (-100 yen with drink)
•Non-sweet chile rooibos tea M (hot) 600 yen
.
I have time near Mitsukoshimae Station,
I was wandering around looking for a cafe and found this place.
Located on the 2nd floor of COREDO Muromachi 3
To uRn.chAi&TeA COREDO.
I visited the Ebisu branch once, and I remember being impressed by the deliciousness of the carrot cake and chai there.
This time too, I was drawn to carrot cake.
I still want to try something different! and.
Chai spice polenta cake.
Choose non-sweet chile rooibos tea to accompany it!
I'm also happy that from 14:00 to 17:00, you can get a drink and cake set for -100 yen.
A spacious store.
There is a power supply and Wi-Fi at the counter seats, so you can do some small work.
Relax at the counter seat.
Chubby and cute chai spice polenta cake ♡
Take a bite and you'll be shocked! !
Very chai! ! Spicy! !
I was impressed by the chai, which had a strong spice that made it tingle in my throat.
Polenta has a unique moist yet crumbly texture◎
It feels like you are eating chai itself ♡
Adult taste◎
The sweetness of the crunchy top layer of icing does a great job! !
Also, it's a chai specialty store.
The non-sweet chile rooibos tea is also incredibly delicious ♡
It's also very spicy.
As someone like me who loves chai with its unrelenting spiciness, I'm so happy ♡
Subtle sweetness of rooibos.
And a gentle richness.
A gentle yet stimulating spice that gradually permeates through the skin◎
It's true here! Heaven for chai lovers.
I feel like my body is warming up naturally◎
The atmosphere and concept are really great!
I like cafe latte, but I realized that I also like chai.
After all, I can't quit visiting cafes!
Thank you for the meal.

Name: THE TEA ROOMS 日本橋三越店
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashimuromachi, 1 Chome−4−1 Ｂ1
Author: que será, será
Review:
I visited on a Sunday before 11am. There always seemed to be one or two empty seats until around 11:30.

I ordered cream tea and carrot cake for eat-in and it cost just under 3,000 yen. I had lunch after this, but I ordered too much by myself💦

The carrot cake also has a sweet frosting. And the first taste. The texture is similar to pumpkin pudding. The pickled raisins are hardened at the bottom, and the walnuts are also large.

The clotted cream of the scone has a rich, buttery consistency. The scone itself has a strong buttery aroma, and is crispy on the outside and moist and delicious on the inside.

The Earl Gray tasted bitter at the end, but when they brought it to me, they offered to add hot water to it. It was about 3 cups worth even without adding hot water.

It was very comfortable and easy to spend time.

Name: THE TEA ROOMS 日本橋三越店
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashimuromachi, 1 Chome−4−1 Ｂ1
Author: dt k
Review:
I wanted to eat authentic scones, so I entered the store around 2pm on a weekday. There were several groups waiting to get in without a reservation.
I ordered a cream tea set that included two scones and a pot of tea.
The combination of the warm scones with a crunchy and fragrant filling, rich clotted cream, and strawberry jam was delicious and filling. The smell of butter when it was delivered whetted my appetite.
I ordered Earl Gray tea, and the pot is enough for 3 cups, and they will add hot water if you ask.
It was a great satisfaction.
I would like to try the afternoon tea next time♪

Name: THE TEA ROOMS 日本橋三越店
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashimuromachi, 1 Chome−4−1 Ｂ1
Author: k.はるみ
Review:
[Cream tea] is served, and the clotted cream is authentic.
When I attended a special tour of the Mitsukoshi Theater, there were so many people lining up before and after the event that I gave up on eating inside.

I bought scones and clotted cream for takeout. *4 scones...I purchased and paid for one additional scone, but unfortunately it seems that the staff forgot to include the extra scone. I guess he was busy...

The scones had a rich aroma and taste, probably because they were made with good ingredients. The clotted cream was also very delicious.

I wasn't able to eat it inside the store, but I thought it would be a good idea to enjoy it casually with my family.

Name: THE TEA ROOMS 日本橋三越店
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashimuromachi, 1 Chome−4−1 Ｂ1
Author: 安本明美
Review:
I didn't have much time before departure, so my lunch plans were more like brunch.
I added some clotted cream and it was really nice. The scones and tea6 were perfect and delicious.
However, the leaves (herb?) on top of the fruit were wilting, and I could hear the staff talking privately (like your child's school), which seemed to ruin the atmosphere of the store. It was a bit disappointing because it was delicious.

Name: THE TEA ROOMS 日本橋三越店
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashimuromachi, 1 Chome−4−1 Ｂ1
Author: TAKE O.
Review:
A coffee shop located in the food district on the basement floor of the Nihonbashi Mitsukoshi Main Building where you can enjoy homemade scones and cakes made with fermented butter.

This time I ordered a simple ``Strawberry shortcake with drink (2090 yen)''.

The combination of moist sponge cake, mildly sweet cream that melts in your mouth, and sweet and sour strawberries was simple but exquisite.

It's located in the basement of Nihonbashi Mitsukoshi, so it's quite crowded during the holidays, and you'll have to wait in line, but if you have time, this is the cafe you'll want to go to.

Name: BRITANNIA TEA
Address: Chiyoda City, Kanda Jinbocho, 1 Chome−１
Author: 吉田栗栖
Review: Looks pretty fancy at the entrance, but the price and quality of the menu is affordable and totally worth it! The mood upstairs is completely different too! Very chill, seem to have theme of outdoor picnic especially if you order the scone set menu because it comes with a cute little paper box that opens up into a picnic mat looking thing. The scones are delicious and the teas are delightful as well. You can check out their teabags too, they have several interesting flavours. This cafe has solo workspaces on the 3rd and 4th floor, with wifi, plugs and even a copy machine. Recommended for people who wants a quiet and chill place to study and work, while enjoying yummy stuff.

Name: BRITANNIA TEA
Address: Chiyoda City, Kanda Jinbocho, 1 Chome−１
Author: ゆり
Review:
I entered the store looking for a place to kill time and read without waiting in line.
It's on the second floor with only stairs, hard chairs, and the interior is clean, but it's quite lively with many groups of young women.
The tea served is in a take-out container, so it is bland.
After ordering and paying, wait at your seat.
You can take it to the second floor.

The prices are reasonable considering the fast food atmosphere.
Due to the location, there are few non-smoking cafes.
Next time, I'm thinking of splitting the cost of the space with drinks only.
Wi-Fi and power outlets available.
The taste of the tea is okay. The scent is good.
Scones are normal.

If you are traveling with two or more people, it may be difficult to find an empty seat.

Name: BRITANNIA TEA
Address: Chiyoda City, Kanda Jinbocho, 1 Chome−１
Author: 森裕次（ピッチ）
Review:
The atmosphere on the 1st floor and the 2nd floor is completely different~☆
The first floor is a sophisticated white-based space, and the second floor features a tree that is integrated with the lighting, and the walls are light blue, creating a different atmosphere from the first floor!

What makes me happy is that there is a tea stand on the table and a place to put used tea bags!
If you order it with ice cream, water drops will fall, but with this stand you don't have to worry about it falling.

There is also an outlet, so you can work perfectly ✨

Britney Hamada's signature was written on the wall along with a cute illustration☆

Darjeeling (ice cream) is quite easy to drink.
I would like to use it again ☆

Name: BRITANNIA TEA
Address: Chiyoda City, Kanda Jinbocho, 1 Chome−１
Author: Charlie
Review:
Delicious tea (Iced Earl Gray)
The cake is normal (lemon pound)
Beautiful refreshing light blue walls

Sales are on the 1st floor and eating and drinking is on the 2nd floor, but the stairs are steep and difficult for the elderly (there is no elevator, and the 3rd floor seems to be a co-working space).

Name: BRITANNIA TEA
Address: Chiyoda City, Kanda Jinbocho, 1 Chome−１
Author: de ad
Review:
【postscript】
From around summer, it seems that instead of being closed irregularly, it has become a fixed holiday on Mondays and Tuesdays.
(Tuesdays are irregular holidays, but they are almost always closed)
It's a shame because it was the only place available when the nearby cafe was closed or full.

−−−−−−−−−−−−−−−−−−−−−−−−−−−−−−−−−−−
This cafe is perfect for drinking tea, eating sweets, and taking a quick break.
However, the taste is really delicious! That's not to say, just enough to fill your stomach. By the way, even if you eat in, tea utensils are not available.
If you want to drink tea in a sturdy tea set, eat sweets, or have afternoon tea, it might be better to go to a specialty store nearby.
In addition, the 3rd and 4th floors are co-working spaces, but when groups of customers come to the open space on the 2nd floor and it gets noisy, you can hear the sound of laughter and chairs being pulled, and when you are on the 4th floor, you can hear the noise from the 2nd floor. You can also hear people on the third floor typing on their PCs and making phone calls (remote conferences?), so it's generally noisy no matter where you are. Are you taking advantage of coworking spaces? I think...
If you want to concentrate or drink in complete silence, you may want to spend the money and rent a special box.
Also, personally, I wish the 2nd to 4th floors would be built with the cleanliness and royal interior of the ordering space on the 1st floor.

One thing to note in particular is that the lights in the restrooms are powered by a motion sensor and will automatically turn off after about 30 seconds. You will have to relieve yourself in the dark for a while. In the first place, I can't find the switch anywhere, so I have to fight with this sensor to relieve myself, and in terms of hygiene, it's like the toilet at a nearby karaoke bar, so I don't really want to use it. .

Name: Aoyama Tea Factory
Address: Chiyoda City, Kanda Jinbocho, 1 Chome−１８−6 望月ビル １階
Author: treeleaf64
Review:
I visited from America. This is the best quality tea from Sri Lanka and is well priced. I recommend drinking the tea without milk.
The owner is very friendly and gave me recommendations of many other tea places to visit.
Usually, there are other people to talk to. It’s a small shop. Good music selection.

Name: Aoyama Tea Factory
Address: Chiyoda City, Kanda Jinbocho, 1 Chome−１８−6 望月ビル １階
Author: Brian Chien
Review: This is a really nice tea place. The owner is friendly and talkative.

Name: Aoyama Tea Factory
Address: Chiyoda City, Kanda Jinbocho, 1 Chome−１８−6 望月ビル １階
Author: MARU 3 (まる3)
Review:
Aoyama Tea Factory in Jimbocho.
A specialty store for Ceylon tea. Not only is the tea delicious, but it goes extremely well with American waffles.
I was concerned about the loud voices of the regulars, but it doesn't seem like a place where you can spend your time in peace, so that's it.

Name: Aoyama Tea Factory
Address: Chiyoda City, Kanda Jinbocho, 1 Chome−１８−6 望月ビル １階
Author: る
Review:
I visited around lunchtime on a weekday. It was just the female clerk and I inside the not-so-large store, and we were able to spend a relaxing time while the zabadak music played. .

You can enjoy delicious tea and hot sandwiches for 1,100 yen. I had the beef stroganoff sandwich.
You can also order hot water for your tea, and best of all, it's cheap, as everyone said! !
Depending on the time of day, it was a wonderful shop where you might want to stay longer and get a refill of the pot.

Name: Aoyama Tea Factory
Address: Chiyoda City, Kanda Jinbocho, 1 Chome−１８−6 望月ビル １階
Author: kiwi0359
Review:
A tea shop that was on my bucket list
I went to Kanda to renew my license on a weekday, so now is definitely the time! I thought and charged

It was a really delicious milk tea!
I was full after eating tandan noodles for lunch, but I ended up ordering waffles from a tea shop like this (I was so full on the way home).

Probably because it was a weekday, there were a lot of other customers who were like the same type of people who were going to rush in.

Name: Tea Lounge The Garden
Address: Minato City, Roppongi, 5 Chome−11−16 国際文化会館
Author: Chanuthi Rajapaksha
Review: Stunning atmosphere.. very nice for a slow breakfast or lunch .. reservation is always recommended.

Name: Tea Lounge The Garden
Address: Minato City, Roppongi, 5 Chome−11−16 国際文化会館
Author: Haruto Kanamori
Review: This building was designed by the great talents of Japanese modernism architecture. Great foods and drinks, nice staffs, and amazing space.

Name: Tea Lounge The Garden
Address: Minato City, Roppongi, 5 Chome−11−16 国際文化会館
Author: V
Review: Very pleasant place to go and relax with a cup of tea. Classy ambience, great view of a garden.

Name: Tea Lounge The Garden
Address: Minato City, Roppongi, 5 Chome−11−16 国際文化会館
Author: dreamer J
Review: nice

Name: Tea Lounge The Garden
Address: Minato City, Roppongi, 5 Chome−11−16 国際文化会館
Author: KEI YOSHIMURA
Review:
6 minutes walk from Azabujuban station!

I visited [Tea Lounge The Garden].

This lounge is located inside the International House of Japan, which was built as a place for international conferences and cultural exchange.

It can be used all day, from buffet style breakfast to lunch, dinner and tea time.

The International House of Japan itself is a members-only facility, but non-members can also enjoy the Tea Lounge The Garden and restaurant SAKURA.

In 1955, the vast site of 3,000 tsubo, which was originally a feudal lord's residence and then managed by the Mitsubishi Zaibatsu, was transformed into the current building by a joint design by three masters of Japanese architecture: Kunio Maekawa, Junzo Sakakura, and Junzo Yoshimura. The old building was expanded into a new building in 1976, designed by Kunio Maekawa.

It has been certified as a registered tangible cultural property.

The building overlooks the magnificent garden, which has been designated as a scenic spot in Minato City, and allows you to spend an elegant moment forgetting your daily life.

The location is Torii-zaka, a 5-minute walk from Azabu-Juban Station.

It is also accessible from Roppongi Station in less than 10 minutes.

The restaurant has 68 seats including table seats and terrace seats.

All of the dishes served are said to be prepared by the chefs of the Royal Park Hotel, so you can enjoy high-quality meals in a stunning location.

This time at lunch

"Seafood course"
¥5,580

I asked for it.

Below are the contents and impressions received on this day.

★Smoked salmon salad

★Today's soup (red pepper)

★White fish poire and head shrimp salad with sour cream and herbs

★Rice

The menu is supervised by a famous hotel chef, so the menu is classic and classic.

I really liked the taste of not only the main white fish, which was brought together by the sour cream, but also the red peppers that were served with today's soup!

Overall, the hospitality was great and it was a great lunch!

I would definitely like to visit again.

Thank you for the meal!

Name: Brew Tea Co. { ブリュー ティー カンパニー }
Address: Minato City, Minamiaoyama, 6 Chome−6−21 グロービル青山 3F
Author: S. A.
Review:
Lovely tea, great people!
Best tea combination and creation. Amazing kinds of speciality teas that change according to month and season. The community of tea lovers are picked by up and a nice postcard wall is there to showcase the community.

Keep up the great work ❤️the tea and staff!!

Name: Brew Tea Co. { ブリュー ティー カンパニー }
Address: Minato City, Minamiaoyama, 6 Chome−6−21 グロービル青山 3F
Author: Daniel K
Review: Cool little tea store. Cute store.

Name: Brew Tea Co. { ブリュー ティー カンパニー }
Address: Minato City, Minamiaoyama, 6 Chome−6−21 グロービル青山 3F
Author: Takétoshi NAKAMURA
Review:
Cost    ＄
Food   ★★★★★
Decor  ❤❤❤

Name: Brew Tea Co. { ブリュー ティー カンパニー }
Address: Minato City, Minamiaoyama, 6 Chome−6−21 グロービル青山 3F
Author: MIWA MITAMURA
Review: I learned about their existence when a scone shop in Kobe sold this tea, and I bought it at a department store event in Osaka. I came to the store for the first time when I was in Tokyo. It's a bit of a walk from the station, but it's fun just looking at the rows of teas in pop-up packaging. You can also take out at the store, but I took a break and cooled down. Now that I've moved to Tokyo, I'll be stopping by again when I'm out for a walk!

Name: Brew Tea Co. { ブリュー ティー カンパニー }
Address: Minato City, Minamiaoyama, 6 Chome−6−21 グロービル青山 3F
Author: YY
Review:
“We want you to take your time while we brew your tea.”
So you can make each one carefully.

It has a strong aroma, the tea leaves have been removed neatly, and the aftertaste is very refreshing.

Both were delicious 😉

Fruit punch 330 yen
Jasmine green 330 yen

It's a British company with only one store in the world, in Omotesando. This is a store that I hope will continue for a long time.

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM atré Kawasaki
Address: Kawasaki, Kawasaki Ward, Ekimae Honcho, 26-1 アトレ川崎 1階
Author: aLvin Yee
Review:
Good place to take an afternoon tea break. Cozy bright atmosphere. Popular among ladies. Very friendly and efficient services. Visited during late lunch time. Usually crowded.
Wide selection of delicious or seasonal recommended sweets and teas.
(Pastas were was just OK.)

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM atré Kawasaki
Address: Kawasaki, Kawasaki Ward, Ekimae Honcho, 26-1 アトレ川崎 1階
Author: Mewslie
Review: Full disclosure, I'd been to another branch before where the service was pretty bad and decided to give this one a go before I wrote them off forever. I was pleased to find that the service at this branch was a lot better than the other one; the staff were attentive and professional. This shop isn't enclosed in its own room so the noise from surrounding shops might be bother. The food and drink was nice, but if you can get coupons or some other discount, I highly recommend that you try. Overall, not bad if you want to treat yourself or your friends with an expensive meal.

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM atré Kawasaki
Address: Kawasaki, Kawasaki Ward, Ekimae Honcho, 26-1 アトレ川崎 1階
Author: ピー子
Review:
The store is spacious and located in an open area.
It seemed like there were a lot of single customers.
I chose a lunch set that included pasta, half salad and half cake.
Comes with delicious warm bread and a drink.
Thank you for the meal!

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM atré Kawasaki
Address: Kawasaki, Kawasaki Ward, Ekimae Honcho, 26-1 アトレ川崎 1階
Author: Bauhinia flower
Review:
Used for lunch. It's been a long time since I've been in the Afternoon Tea Room. I had a mushroom salad sandwich that I had often eaten before, so I ordered it and a cup of hot tea with lemon.
Compared to the previous version of the mushroom salad sandwich, the boiled egg used to be sliced, but now it's only a spoonful of small pieces, and the only leafy vegetable is lettuce.
It might have been better to enjoy dessert rather than lunch.

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM atré Kawasaki
Address: Kawasaki, Kawasaki Ward, Ekimae Honcho, 26-1 アトレ川崎 1階
Author: 一条桜子
Review:
The food is delicious, especially the pasta, so I come here regularly.
Around 3,000 to 4,000 yen for a meal and sweets
You can relax unless it's crowded.
It's a pity that it closes before 9pm because it's inside Atre.
I really like it, but considering the price, I'm disappointed that I can't come to the store often and can't take out.
There are a lot of electric lights and the inside of the store feels hot.
Especially in the summer, I feel like I'm sweating even when I'm sitting.

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM
Address: Funabashi, Honcho, 7 Chome−1−1 東武百貨店 船橋店 1階
Author: いみ
Review: It's located in the back of Tobu. You can relax and take a break in a relaxing space that makes you feel like you're near a station. The staff members are attentive and make you feel comfortable. The cakes and tea look good but the taste is average. But I like it because it's a place where I can take a break.

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM
Address: Funabashi, Honcho, 7 Chome−1−1 東武百貨店 船橋店 1階
Author: 北沢聡子
Review:
I love afternoon tea rooms, but there are long lines in popular and fashionable cities.
You can enter the shops in Funabashi Tobu side by side, and the atmosphere is good.
I installed the app and was looking forward to the Shine Muscat cake, but since it was seasonal, it ended quickly, so this time I had a mini afternoon tea set of chestnut cake, sweet potato cake, and autumn scones. It was full of autumn and it was really delicious, I'm thinking about strawberries next with my friends.
I love this cafe and the staff are kind.

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM
Address: Funabashi, Honcho, 7 Chome−1−1 東武百貨店 船橋店 1階
Author: 政子
Review:
Located at the back of the 1st floor of Funabashi Tobu
I'll stop by for a break after shopping for cute miscellaneous goods.
The tables are empty, but for some reason there is a line near the entrance.
My favorite is the corner seat in the back.
Relax and enjoy some tea
The cake is light and easy to eat

Seafood pasta is delicious without being too oily, but I would be happy if it came with a salad even if it was small 😄
I think the green salad is better than the bread for the pasta set, but I guess I'm being selfish.
The set cake after the meal is small and just the right size.

The customer base is mostly women who appear to be in their 30s or older.
We also see one male person every time.
There are several chain cafes near the station, but this one is my favorite because it's the most calm and relaxing.It's easy to come by even by yourself.

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM
Address: Funabashi, Honcho, 7 Chome−1−1 東武百貨店 船橋店 1階
Author: 2en ko
Review:
Used for weekend lunch.
Compared to the Funabashi LaLaport store, I got the impression that the customers were older, so I was able to enjoy my meal in peace.
It might be recommended for people who want to spend a quiet time.

The winter-only beef stew had mashed potatoes inside and was delicious.
The set dessert looked cute, tasted refreshing and not too sweet, and was easy to eat.
The menu changes seasonally, so it's fun just checking out the menu.

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM
Address: Funabashi, Honcho, 7 Chome−1−1 東武百貨店 船橋店 1階
Author: ゆっこ
Review:
The fact that you stay for a long time every time is proof that you are comfortable.
The staff came to check on my order several times, probably because they were not used to it. For some reason, the drinks come out quite slowly every time. But I will definitely go again.

Name: Ippodo Tea Ginza Mitsukoshi
Address: 三越本館, 地下２階, 4 Chome-6-16 Ginza, Chuo City
Author: ZulLé Ali
Review:
English friendly employees ready to help cater your needs. My favorite ippodo to drop by everytime and i always buy in bulks

There’a tax free also above 5500¥ and reclaimable on the 7th floor

Name: Ippodo Tea Ginza Mitsukoshi
Address: 三越本館, 地下２階, 4 Chome-6-16 Ginza, Chuo City
Author: K L
Review: They sell matcha as well as other tea leaves (sencha, gyokuro, etc.). Small store and selections but good enough.

Name: Ippodo Tea Ginza Mitsukoshi
Address: 三越本館, 地下２階, 4 Chome-6-16 Ginza, Chuo City
Author: Theodore Angliongto
Review: Bought ceremonial grade matcha here. Very friendly and accommodating staff. They even helped me choose which best blend to try, according to the taste profile I was looking for. Not all spoke English, so they guided me thru a manual. It was a very pleasant transaction and interaction.

Name: Ippodo Tea Ginza Mitsukoshi
Address: 三越本館, 地下２階, 4 Chome-6-16 Ginza, Chuo City
Author: Man Ho Yu
Review:
I visited Ippodo main store in kyoto 5 years ago. Its tea is almost the best in Japan.

I decided to buy again during my Tokyo trip. However many types of gyokuro were sold out in this shop.

Staff is very friendly and patient 👍🏻

Name: Ippodo Tea Ginza Mitsukoshi
Address: 三越本館, 地下２階, 4 Chome-6-16 Ginza, Chuo City
Author: Huyen Diep
Review: I was helped and given advice by a young lady (sorry I don't know her name). She was attentive, warm and helpful. I took quite a lot of time to decide on the tea selection and quantity, she didn't mind at all and was sooo patience.

Name: Afternoon Tea LOVE&TABLE Lumine Yokohama
Address: Yokohama, Nishi Ward, Takashima, 2 Chome−16−1 ルミネ横浜 5階
Author: Volitian
Review:
NOT RECOMMEND FOR VISIT.
IS IT CORRECT PRICE FOR THIS? ¥1848?
Adding ice tea? Really great visual, aren't they?🤯

Name: Afternoon Tea LOVE&TABLE Lumine Yokohama
Address: Yokohama, Nishi Ward, Takashima, 2 Chome−16−1 ルミネ横浜 5階
Author: ママ桜井（アンママちゃん）
Review:
Afternoon Tea Love and Table on the 5th floor of Yokohama Lumine✨
I went there because Momo🍑's mille-feuille ends on the 31st😊
The peaches🍑 were so sweet, juicy and delicious😋
I had a choice of set drinks and today's tea was peach🍑 tea🫖, so I chose peach🍑😊
The peach 🍑 smell was good and it was delicious 🫖
The store was cute and I had a relaxing time 😊

Name: Afternoon Tea LOVE&TABLE Lumine Yokohama
Address: Yokohama, Nishi Ward, Takashima, 2 Chome−16−1 ルミネ横浜 5階
Author: 小胖橘
Review:
Delicious layer cake
Cantaloupe and fresh cream are both delicious
It's just that it's a little too sweet after eating.

Name: Afternoon Tea LOVE&TABLE Lumine Yokohama
Address: Yokohama, Nishi Ward, Takashima, 2 Chome−16−1 ルミネ横浜 5階
Author: 陳冠甫
Review:
Two stars for the fruit itself, it’s delicious
But considering the cake and crust itself, Harbs wins!

Name: Afternoon Tea LOVE&TABLE Lumine Yokohama
Address: Yokohama, Nishi Ward, Takashima, 2 Chome−16−1 ルミネ横浜 5階
Author: yun
Review:
We recommend the pasta and cake set available only on Saturdays and Sundays!
We serve cakes using seasonal fruits.
If you have a favorite fruit, you might want to look into it!
I plan to go again when strawberries are in season 😌🍰

Name: Cha x Ten Boba
Address: Arakawa City, Nishinippori, 2 Chome−26−10 メゾン丸十 1Ｆ
Author: Jasmine Usui
Review:
Great bubble tea place.
I always order the standard milk tea. The normal sugar level is not very sweet so if you like sweetness I recommend adding more sugar.

Name: Cha x Ten Boba
Address: Arakawa City, Nishinippori, 2 Chome−26−10 メゾン丸十 1Ｆ
Author: Abibia Berri
Review: It is a little cozy place with good prizes, delicious bubble tea, many different options, and costumization. Their secret grass jelly recipe is amazing. They know a bit of english and accept card.

Name: Cha x Ten Boba
Address: Arakawa City, Nishinippori, 2 Chome−26−10 メゾン丸十 1Ｆ
Author: Trisha P
Review: Got the brown sugar bubble tea. Fast service and delicious! Great option when you’re in the Nippori area. :)

Name: Cha x Ten Boba
Address: Arakawa City, Nishinippori, 2 Chome−26−10 メゾン丸十 1Ｆ
Author: E T
Review: The bubble is really chewy, gret texture. Milk tea is also very nice.

Name: Cha x Ten Boba
Address: Arakawa City, Nishinippori, 2 Chome−26−10 メゾン丸十 1Ｆ
Author: Deb C
Review: One of the better milk teas in japan. At least it tasted original and not accustomed to japanese taste. They also sell some taiwan snacks like 卤蛋 and pineapple tarts!

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM
Address: Kashiwa, Suehirocho, 1−1, S Building, ４階 Kashiwa Takashimaya Station Mall
Author: 日本侍
Review:
Chai set for afternoon tea.
Hot chai is rich and delicious.
It comes out in a pot. The amount is about 2 to 3 cups,
Choose your favorite 3 types of dessert!
Both are satisfying to drink and eat.

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM
Address: Kashiwa, Suehirocho, 1−1, S Building, ４階 Kashiwa Takashimaya Station Mall
Author: プルーンバーゴ
Review:
It's on the 4th floor of Takashimaya and I've used it 3 times.
It's a nice and relaxing atmosphere.

There is Afternoon Tea LIVING next door, which you can enjoy watching.

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM
Address: Kashiwa, Suehirocho, 1−1, S Building, ４階 Kashiwa Takashimaya Station Mall
Author: ま
Review: The last order at this cafe is 7:30pm, but I really wanted to eat this cake for my birthday, so I managed to rush in 2 minutes early. The clerk was dealing with something in the back and confirmed my presence through eye contact. While I was waiting at the entrance to be shown around, it seemed like one minute past 7:30pm. When the clerk finished serving customers and came over, she said, ``Last order is 7:30 pm, one minute past.'' ” and refused my visit. I was really shocked. . . I have always loved this store, but I will never go to this store again.

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM
Address: Kashiwa, Suehirocho, 1−1, S Building, ４階 Kashiwa Takashimaya Station Mall
Author: YO SHI
Review:
We had tea at the Afternoon Tea Tea Room on the 4th floor of Kashiwa Takashimaya S Building 🍰

Order the afternoon tea set where you can choose your favorite 3 items and drink from 8 types of sweets! ☕️
I chose the following 🍰
🔸Strawberry and raspberry parfait
🔹Sweet potato pudding
🔸Earl Gray and lemon cheesecake
🔹Tea (afternoon tea blend with milk)

It's nice to be able to choose your own instead of a pre-determined set!
The plate was on the basket and it looked cute 👍️

The taste of the strawberry and raspberry parfait was below average (lol)
The sweet potato pudding is delicious, but I wish it had a little more potato flavor. It's overpowered by the caramel sauce, and it's hard, so it doesn't have much of a pudding feel 😅
The Earl Gray and lemon cheesecake had the refreshing taste of lemon and was delicious😋

I also wanted to try other sweets!
Being able to eat a variety of different foods is a great value, and girls like it 😊

However, please note that this set is only available from 2pm!

Many of the customers around me were ordering light meals such as pasta.

This is the situation when I visited the store in August 2022.

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM
Address: Kashiwa, Suehirocho, 1−1, S Building, ４階 Kashiwa Takashimaya Station Mall
Author: 渡辺恵生
Review:
Visited around 13:00 on weekdays. It was sparsely crowded, but by 2pm more than 80% of the seats were occupied. There were many single customers, and measures were taken with partitions for two customers. The atmosphere is quiet and calm, and the staff are very polite and pleasant.
The menu that changes seasonally is attractive, and the curry and Zespri parfait were a hit! ! I want to eat it again!

Name: Cayhane party cafe
Address: 80 Yamashitacho, Naka Ward, Yokohama
Author: Ashley Lee
Review:
I wanted a light lunch so I skipped the curry. But for ¥638, you get half a sandwich. I feel jipped ☹️  perhaps the curry was the better choice. No wonder there were no pictures on the menu.

Here are the “hot sandwicheS with hot spicy keema curry” that I ordered:

Name: Cayhane party cafe
Address: 80 Yamashitacho, Naka Ward, Yokohama
Author: Anne
Review:
My friend is a regular at this cafe, she brought me to this cafe last week and I was amazed by the uniqueness of the interior. You can find hamocks, plants, stained glass lamps and more. The detail to the design was cute and had a great atmosphere. I enjoyed sipping some chai tea while looking around. It’s a great place to read or relax.

The bathroom was located on the 6th floor and you need to take the elevator to get there. I recommend sitting on the second floor corner window side. I heard that’s the most popular seat because it gives you a little privacy.

I ordered the kinako black sugar chai soy tea. It was ok, I should of ordered the regular one instead.

Name: Cayhane party cafe
Address: 80 Yamashitacho, Naka Ward, Yokohama
Author: Nate Wick
Review:
Wow I'm so happy I found this place! When I've drank Chai drinks in England I've hated them but the people who work here really know how to make a beautiful chai coffee! I drank 2 in an hour I loved them so much!
Not only that but the staff are very friendly, the atmosphere is very relaxing and the way they have decorated the cafe is spot on!
I love this place and will definitely be visiting again soon! My favourite cafe so far on my travels around Tokyo.

Name: Cayhane party cafe
Address: 80 Yamashitacho, Naka Ward, Yokohama
Author: Lara Khazhakyan
Review:
Very cozy cafe. The decor inside is really interesting with lots of hanging plants.

Their chai is very tasty and they have soy milk options! Tarts are pretty nice. I recommend the cheese one as it has a stronger taste.

Name: Cayhane party cafe
Address: 80 Yamashitacho, Naka Ward, Yokohama
Author: Daria P
Review: Really nice cafe. Soft cream was delicious. The drink was good too, but it said coffee on the menu and there was no coffee taste whatsoever.

Name: 台湾タピオカ BoBa Tea
Address: 2 Chome-7-19 Kamishinjo, Nakahara Ward, Kawasaki
Author: Shal McG
Review: The boba here is very good, reminds me of how it should be! If you have been to Taiwan or China you would know. I really like how they use real fruit and the drinks are nice and creamy. They also have stamp cards which is nice.

Name: 台湾タピオカ BoBa Tea
Address: 2 Chome-7-19 Kamishinjo, Nakahara Ward, Kawasaki
Author: DAGU CHING LONG
Review:
the best Tapioca juice shop I have ever visited in Nakahara area!
I bought a lot of Tapioca juice and it was tasty! I'll buy Tapioca juices here over and over again!

Name: 台湾タピオカ BoBa Tea
Address: 2 Chome-7-19 Kamishinjo, Nakahara Ward, Kawasaki
Author: Sabrina Jensen
Review: Fast and delicious! Also you can adjust the sweetness of your drink which is amazing!

Name: 台湾タピオカ BoBa Tea
Address: 2 Chome-7-19 Kamishinjo, Nakahara Ward, Kawasaki
Author: Ryan Su
Review: Not as good as expected, the taste of milk tea seems to be using cream instead of actual milk, so it’s not my taste.  Also, taro ball has no taste as well, will probably not buy again…

Name: 台湾タピオカ BoBa Tea
Address: 2 Chome-7-19 Kamishinjo, Nakahara Ward, Kawasaki
Author: K
Review:
The best bubble tea shop around here. Highly recommended.
The staffs are friendly and kind.
I like them.

Name: TULLY'S COFFEE & TEA Lumine Yurakucho Shop
Address: Chiyoda City, Yurakucho, 2 Chome−5−1 ルミネ有楽町 8F
Author: Sholes K
Review:
Very big Cafe
Can seat around 50 people I think.
Ordered the new chocolista which was good but not great.
Very crowded in holidays and weekends but can still get a seat.
They have lots of variety of ground coffee packs and also whole coffee beans
They have gift bags too, but is quite expensive like 6,000 yen
Overall a good cafe if you’re in that area!

Name: TULLY'S COFFEE & TEA Lumine Yurakucho Shop
Address: Chiyoda City, Yurakucho, 2 Chome−5−1 ルミネ有楽町 8F
Author: Victor Irie
Review: Great place but crowded. I would recommend hot Caramel Houjicha Latte.

Name: TULLY'S COFFEE & TEA Lumine Yurakucho Shop
Address: Chiyoda City, Yurakucho, 2 Chome−5−1 ルミネ有楽町 8F
Author: Denis Y.
Review: Great wide and quiet place, not many customers during lunch time. Many seats, all is convenient and clean. Extremely polite and friendly staff. Unfortunately not everything out of the Tully's menu is presented here, but everything is clean and fresh. Recommend!

Name: TULLY'S COFFEE & TEA Lumine Yurakucho Shop
Address: Chiyoda City, Yurakucho, 2 Chome−5−1 ルミネ有楽町 8F
Author: s m
Review: tea good

Name: TULLY'S COFFEE & TEA Lumine Yurakucho Shop
Address: Chiyoda City, Yurakucho, 2 Chome−5−1 ルミネ有楽町 8F
Author: paru chan
Review:
This is one of nine concept stores called &TEA, which is a new type of tea business, and has opened mainly in major cities.
I stopped by to get a caramel latte without doing any research.
I didn't have any, so I took out a cafe latte.
The tea menu is amazing and the coffee menu is very limited, so if you're looking for coffee, it's best to go to a regular store.

The inside of this store had a very open feel, and although it was a weekday evening, it was almost full. It wasn't noisy, so I thought I could take it easy ◎ Next time I want to drink tea, I'll stop by lol

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM Metro M Korakuen
Address: Bunkyo City, Kasuga, 1 Chome−2−3 メトロ・エム後楽園 2階
Author: masako nagao
Review:
I stopped in to take a break while shopping.
I refreshed myself with some cold fruit tea.
The female staff was very friendly. The view of Tokyo Dome City from the restaurant added to the relaxing atmosphere♡♡

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM Metro M Korakuen
Address: Bunkyo City, Kasuga, 1 Chome−2−3 メトロ・エム後楽園 2階
Author: Aditi
Review: I went by myself. This pasta was so tasty. Got the pasta and tea set for 1600 yen. The staff were really nice and ambience was good too. Will definitely go there again!

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM Metro M Korakuen
Address: Bunkyo City, Kasuga, 1 Chome−2−3 メトロ・エム後楽園 2階
Author: Just Me
Review: Its a sin they own the brand name afternoon tea as their afternoon tea would make the queen of England weep. The scones were not scones, not even American scones. They  were some dry, round abomination that came with whipped cream (bork) and not clotted cream. The tea was ok.

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM Metro M Korakuen
Address: Bunkyo City, Kasuga, 1 Chome−2−3 メトロ・エム後楽園 2階
Author: Jillian P
Review: Jasmine and framboise tea with scones, jam and cream were delicious.

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM Metro M Korakuen
Address: Bunkyo City, Kasuga, 1 Chome−2−3 メトロ・エム後楽園 2階
Author: tal shavit
Review: excellent cakes and bakes and a very goid tea variety

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM LaLaPort Yokohama
Address: Yokohama, Tsuzuki Ward, Ikonobecho, 4035-1 JP 224-0053 ららぽーと横浜 1階
Author: 月餅
Review:
I couldn't decide between the seasonal cake or the afternoon tea cake set. Everything looks delicious.
I came to get peaches, so I got a peach cake.
The cream on the cake wasn't too sweet, and the ingredients were used to make the best use of it, so no matter where you ate it, it was a peach, so I was happy♪
I thought it would be difficult to peel so many peaches! !

My companions each took a bite of apple pie and scones, and they were all extremely delicious.
Apple pie and scones are also warm.
Thank you very much for the delicious tea and sweet time during the holidays. I would like to visit you for dinner next time. Thank you for the meal.

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM LaLaPort Yokohama
Address: Yokohama, Tsuzuki Ward, Ikonobecho, 4035-1 JP 224-0053 ららぽーと横浜 1階
Author: 貝原篤信
Review: I guess the main focus was tea and cake, so if you consider that the food there can't be helped, I think it's a good enough score. If you ask me if it's insanely delicious, it's not that good, and considering the price, I'd give it an average score. The set's iced coffee is deep roasted and strong, as is customary, but it certainly seems like a tea shop, so the quality is above average. However, if I didn't add milk, it might have been too bitter. Chardonnay tea with gum syrup is the best choice. It tastes like grape tea in a non-obscene way. Delicious. I think this is a tea shop after all.

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM LaLaPort Yokohama
Address: Yokohama, Tsuzuki Ward, Ikonobecho, 4035-1 JP 224-0053 ららぽーと横浜 1階
Author: 自然愛好家
Review:
Shine Muscat looks delicious on the poster
I saw the cake and immediately entered the store.
The store has a calm atmosphere on weekday evenings.
I ordered the Darjeeling tea set. The sponge cake has a fine texture, the fresh cream has just the right amount of sweetness, and the Shine Muscat remains fresh, making it a great pairing with black tea. My fatigue was relieved every day. It was delicious. Thank you for the meal😋

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM LaLaPort Yokohama
Address: Yokohama, Tsuzuki Ward, Ikonobecho, 4035-1 JP 224-0053 ららぽーと横浜 1階
Author: 横浜子
Review:
Arrived at the store after 11 o'clock on Sunday, November 5, 2023.
I was guided to the seat of my choice.

I forgot the name of the menu I ordered.
sandwich dessert set
I asked.

I ordered shortcake and tea.

I had a very elegant time (lol)

I really like the atmosphere!

This time I went with a friend,
I want to go with my husband next time (●´ω｀●)

Name: Afternoon Tea TEAROOM LaLaPort Yokohama
Address: Yokohama, Tsuzuki Ward, Ikonobecho, 4035-1 JP 224-0053 ららぽーと横浜 1階
Author: N T
Review:
The seasonal Shine Muscat cake was delicious. Tea of ​​your choice is included, but many items come with an additional charge.
You can also choose the Afternoon Tea Set, but please note that the Afternoon Tea Set starts at 14:00.

As for the drink, the chai ice cream tastes surprisingly unusual, and syrup and spices are provided separately so you can adjust the flavor to your liking. Iced chai also comes in a pot and contains 2 cups.

Name: nanaha jiyugaoka
Address: Meguro City, Jiyugaoka, 1 Chome−14−16, Nanaha.bldg, 1F
Author: Jason Chuei
Review: Chill matcha cafe, located in Jiyugaoka. Spacious, with a couple of other snack and pastry businesses co-located. Friendly and welcoming staff. Freshly whisked matcha, with a choice of normal and higher grade bitter matcha.

Name: nanaha jiyugaoka
Address: Meguro City, Jiyugaoka, 1 Chome−14−16, Nanaha.bldg, 1F
Author: Michael Bidzos
Review:
Insanely tasty matcha and sweet treats with wide open seating- (at 5pm on a Sunday)

Fantastico !

Name: nanaha jiyugaoka
Address: Meguro City, Jiyugaoka, 1 Chome−14−16, Nanaha.bldg, 1F
Author: vera s
Review: I am glad that they renewed this place, I used to go to its previous (more relaxed) incarnations. This one still delivers on the green tea variations, good onigiri, and on the delicious Warabi mochi, even though it feels more like a factory with the electronic ordering and the large size. There are several options for people with different tastes on another hand (there is even some attempt at Pastel de Nata)

Name: nanaha jiyugaoka
Address: Meguro City, Jiyugaoka, 1 Chome−14−16, Nanaha.bldg, 1F
Author: Mini Rabbitz
Review: I love this cozy green tea cafe located in Jiyugaoka. I used to visit their shop in Yokohama. This honey soft cream is soooo yummy!

Name: nanaha jiyugaoka
Address: Meguro City, Jiyugaoka, 1 Chome−14−16, Nanaha.bldg, 1F
Author: Vicky Wong
Review: Good dessert, nice place for a short break.

Name: Afternoon Tea TEA ROOM Keio Shinjuku Branch
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−4 京王百貨店新宿店 3階
Author: Thomas Thio
Review: Cozy atmosphere, wide menu range and large portions for decent price. Staff are also friendly. Accepts credit card,  IC, and e-payments. They also have artwork for their menus and mounts, makes for an interesting place for drawing inspiration.

Name: Afternoon Tea TEA ROOM Keio Shinjuku Branch
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−4 京王百貨店新宿店 3階
Author: Nicole Lee
Review: Service is just very slow for some reason.. but Im pretty satisfied with my crepe cake 🍰

Name: Afternoon Tea TEA ROOM Keio Shinjuku Branch
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−4 京王百貨店新宿店 3階
Author: Ming Chee
Review: Very tasty and healthy food. Staff are very attentive and friendly. Nice ambiance 👍🏻

Name: Afternoon Tea TEA ROOM Keio Shinjuku Branch
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−4 京王百貨店新宿店 3階
Author: Coys Richo
Review: They serve the best drinks in the world.

Name: Afternoon Tea TEA ROOM Keio Shinjuku Branch
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−4 京王百貨店新宿店 3階
Author: Nick Sint Nicolaas
Review: Friendly staff, tasty seasonal selections

Name: nana's green tea (Tokyo Dome City LaQua)
Address: Bunkyo City, Kasuga, 1 Chome−1−1 ラクーアビル 3F
Author: Salim Ali Khan
Review:
Loved, loved and absolutely loved the green tea and the cheesecake

After a wonderful dinner, we wanted to stop by at one and only Nana's tea (in the mall of course :) ) to grab as much desert delights as we could.

Warm welcome and extremely amazing customer service is what defines them in totality. In addition to  that some top notch deserts, tea et al make the visit so much more worth while.  We ordered a Matcha cheesecake, mochi parfait , green tea and matcha latte. The green tea definitely balanced out the sweetness from the parfait and the cheesecake and was prepared with just the right amount so as to not overwhelm you, rather let you enjoy with the dessert.

They have some tables inside the cafe and we were able to park ourselves towards the very end and it gave us a bit of intimacy as well though there is no intimate/private seating available.

Amazing experience and its an absolute absolute must do if you happen to be around Tokyo!!!

Name: nana's green tea (Tokyo Dome City LaQua)
Address: Bunkyo City, Kasuga, 1 Chome−1−1 ラクーアビル 3F
Author: Naomi Reich
Review: Third floor of the mall, in one back corner, very nice view on the te roller coaster in a very airy and bright space. Order at the cashier and wait for your food to be brought to your table. Very carefully prepared parfait, not over the tip elaborate but simple and nice. Also many savory options and lunch sets.

Name: nana's green tea (Tokyo Dome City LaQua)
Address: Bunkyo City, Kasuga, 1 Chome−1−1 ラクーアビル 3F
Author: Revie Rose Pegarido
Review: My to-go lunch whenever I visit Tokyo or go shopping nearby. I ordered the fish and avocado lunch set and it goes with warabi mochi and matcha tea and I'm satisfied! The dining are is clean and the staff are friendly and attentive!

Name: nana's green tea (Tokyo Dome City LaQua)
Address: Bunkyo City, Kasuga, 1 Chome−1−1 ラクーアビル 3F
Author: Anca M.
Review:
I didn’t look at the reviews, I was hungry and the view was great so I just ordered in. Staff very nice and there is nothing bad to say about the service.
The food however was not good, I mean there was supposed to be a beef and rice dish, but the beef was nowhere to be found in the sauce, that was full of onions. The small soup was inedible, unless you never tasted a good soup.

I regret I ate there and I had the rice with a part of the meatless sauce.

Name: nana's green tea (Tokyo Dome City LaQua)
Address: Bunkyo City, Kasuga, 1 Chome−1−1 ラクーアビル 3F
Author: Mira Serrill-Robins
Review: Third floor of the Tokyo Dome Mall, in the middle of the floor. Decent frappe with soft serve. The soft serve was very rich compared to American vanilla soft serve. The green tea frappe was nice, not super sweet. They have a few seats in the main cafe area where you order, and more seating in a section over by a window.

Name: Yifang Taiwan Fruit Tea Shinookubo
Address: 1 Chome-3-11 Okubo, Shinjuku City
Author: Sofia V.
Review: I have been to a lot of different Yifangs mainly in London but also to the one in Stockholm. I always get the same bubble tea, therefore I can compare the quality of them very well. Somehow I felt a little let down by this one in Tokyo. The tapioca pearls were cooked for too long. I mean it was not bad but just not as good as the Yifang standard I am used to. However I‘d still recommend 8/10

Name: Yifang Taiwan Fruit Tea Shinookubo
Address: 1 Chome-3-11 Okubo, Shinjuku City
Author: Megan Wimberley
Review: Delicious tea (I got matcha latte and added tapioca, reduced sweetness and reduced the amount of ice). The inside of the shop is small but lovely and it smells nice too. Staff was friendly and drink was made super quickly

Name: Yifang Taiwan Fruit Tea Shinookubo
Address: 1 Chome-3-11 Okubo, Shinjuku City
Author: Seema Saleh
Review: For my first boba try in Japan it was pretty good! I would probably next time try a different flavor but it was still really good! Highly recommend as they made the boba super quick too!

Name: Yifang Taiwan Fruit Tea Shinookubo
Address: 1 Chome-3-11 Okubo, Shinjuku City
Author: ellen q
Review: Really good fruit tea here! There was only one worker when we went and they were super fast and polite.

Name: Yifang Taiwan Fruit Tea Shinookubo
Address: 1 Chome-3-11 Okubo, Shinjuku City
Author: Jurian
Review: Pretty good, chill atmosphere and indoor seating available

Name: TEA FORTE 銀座店
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 6 Chome−10−1 GINZA SIX B2
Author: Ayman J.
Review:
Nice Darjeeling tea, good grade.

I would recommend it to those who want a good cup of tea, though i wish they had a bigger selection for the cafe.

Name: TEA FORTE 銀座店
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 6 Chome−10−1 GINZA SIX B2
Author: Ken
Review: Tea is great but the service can be improved.

Name: TEA FORTE 銀座店
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 6 Chome−10−1 GINZA SIX B2
Author: Herbert Barbutti
Review: A cool specialty tea shop. Heard it was featured on tv and came to try it out. Had some tea at the store and was the best tea I've had in Ginza so far!  Recommended.

Name: TEA FORTE 銀座店
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 6 Chome−10−1 GINZA SIX B2
Author: Kazufumi M
Review:
You can purchase not only tea but also tea accessories here.

I purchased a gift for Mother's Day here and was grateful for the message card service.
When I sent my message to the store clerk, she printed it and created it for me on the spot.

The eat-in space is small, so it feels more like a place to take a short break than a place to relax.

Name: TEA FORTE 銀座店
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 6 Chome−10−1 GINZA SIX B2
Author: ハチ公
Review:
It was delicious and fun! I went to various cafes in the building and was drawn to the wonderfully shaped tea, so I went here! I received a discount coupon and was able to purchase a gift for a loved one.
I had a great time!

Name: TEA ROOM KIKI -TEA & SCONE SPECIALTY STORE HIBIYA-
Address: Chiyoda City, Yurakucho, 1 Chome−1−2 東京ミッドタウン日比谷 地下1階
Author: Kuna Pun
Review:
Quite a small place. Only 10 counter bar seats.
I went here 10.45am and get the first queue.

Order food or dessert with free flow hot tea.

I ordered scone set with clotted cream and homemade berry jam with added on fresh whole peach 🍑 which very delicious and refreshingly.

Name: TEA ROOM KIKI -TEA & SCONE SPECIALTY STORE HIBIYA-
Address: Chiyoda City, Yurakucho, 1 Chome−1−2 東京ミッドタウン日比谷 地下1階
Author: Shu Tomikawa
Review:
The store is located on the basement floor of Tokyo Midtown Hibiya. It feels like a very classy store.

Enjoy delicious tea and homemade traditional British sweets such as scones and cakes in our British-style tea room.

Using tableware from Burley, a long-established British pottery brand, you can enjoy a relaxing lunch or afternoon tea while admiring the elegant designs.

There are only about 10 seats in the tea room area and reservations are required. You can also take home the scones, so you can take your favorite scones home with you. Currently, there are three types of scones on sale, and the three types are sold in sets of two. We also sell 3-piece sets of 3 types, so we recommend that.

Name: TEA ROOM KIKI -TEA & SCONE SPECIALTY STORE HIBIYA-
Address: Chiyoda City, Yurakucho, 1 Chome−1−2 東京ミッドタウン日比谷 地下1階
Author: 弥生（ちーてん）
Review:
I finally made a reservation and went with my friend!
A small shop with only counter seats.
However, I received a delicious sandwich set using Barley tableware (^o^)
It's a small shop, so you can place your order from your mobile phone (the staff will confirm it for you), and the shop will also brew the free tea for you. (I drank 9 types)
Reservations are required, but I would love to go again!

Name: TEA ROOM KIKI -TEA & SCONE SPECIALTY STORE HIBIYA-
Address: Chiyoda City, Yurakucho, 1 Chome−1−2 東京ミッドタウン日比谷 地下1階
Author: Natsu Rarara
Review:
It's a bit difficult to make reservations due to its popularity, but it's worth it for the quality and price.
The tea they brewed for me was absolutely delicious.
I bought something I liked with the tea I drank on the way home.
I am grateful that they sell tea bags in packs of 5, which makes it easy to try.

Name: TEA ROOM KIKI -TEA & SCONE SPECIALTY STORE HIBIYA-
Address: Chiyoda City, Yurakucho, 1 Chome−1−2 東京ミッドタウン日比谷 地下1階
Author: あん
Review:
Make a reservation the day before.
I wandered over and found that it was as small as the counter at a ramen shop, and I was in close contact with the person next to me (who I was meeting for the first time).
Well, I knew that from word of mouth, but the person next to me was wearing a harsh perfume. . .
When I try to smell the tea, the smell of the person next to me hits my nose first.
It seems that you can't change seats, so I thought about canceling and going home, but I didn't want to pay a cancellation fee for someone who doesn't have good manners, so I held back...
The reason why the seats are not spaced out is due to the store's convenience, and the fact that there are many flavored teas means that the scent is also part of the product. Is it possible to address this by mentioning it in the store's notes?
The homemade sandwiches were delicious, and the waiter's introduction of tea, which I couldn't understand at all, sounded like a cultural festival and made me smile, but the smell of perfume was really bothersome.

Name: Aoyama Flower Market Tea House Kichijoji
Address: Musashino, Kichijoji Minamicho, 1 Chome−1−24 アトレ吉祥寺 B1
Author: Jing Yao
Review: I will highly recommend this cafe to any cafe connoisseur. Food's amazing ! Plating is out of the world, totally down to the details with so much effort and thought put into it; 10/10 for aesthetics. Ambience is on the point as well. Staff service is excellent. Keep up the good work ! (:

Name: Aoyama Flower Market Tea House Kichijoji
Address: Musashino, Kichijoji Minamicho, 1 Chome−1−24 アトレ吉祥寺 B1
Author: O.H G.
Review:
Relaxing!!! This beautiful green house is filled with flowers. The place truly delights your senses.

👅Taste: Fresh salads, sanwiches, tea or coffee
👃Smell: Floral, depending on the flowers they choose weekly
👁️Sight: The walls and table sides are covered in greens and flowers, calm and soothing.
🖐️Touch: You can touch the flowers but be gentle with them.
👂Hearing: Not too quiet or noisy, you can have tea witb your friends or have a meeting at this place.

Name: Aoyama Flower Market Tea House Kichijoji
Address: Musashino, Kichijoji Minamicho, 1 Chome−1−24 アトレ吉祥寺 B1
Author: Miffafia
Review:
It's a little difficult to find but once you head down to B1 you can easily spot it!
Very sophisticated and relaxing cafe! The interior is decked with flowers and the staff were friendly and attentive.
I highly recommend their french toast, I could eat a million of them idk how they get it sooo perfect! Budget around ￥4000 for A special tea (800￥), lunch(1000-1300￥) and dessert (around 1000￥).
