Review: Great latte and coffee jelly for coffee lovers. They have a wide range of coffee menu, from affordable coffee blends to 3000yen geishas.  They also have a wide variety of coffee beans  available for purchase as well. It is right in front of the station exit so it's a great place to wait for friends.

Name: Saza Coffee
Address: 2 Chome-17-14 Shinbashi, Minato City
Author: Julian Toedter
Review:
Conveniently located coffee shop outside of JR's Shinbashi station. It's a bit small and cramped but they're quick on your orders, accept every payment option (e.g. pasmo/suica, credit card, R Pay/PayPay, etc.).

Coffee and matcha tea that we ordered were pretty decent. We enjoyed the layer cake as well!

If you're signed up for JRE points, you can get extra points at this store!

Name: Saza Coffee
Address: 2 Chome-17-14 Shinbashi, Minato City
Author: jay inka
Review:
During our recent visit to Tokyo, my companions and I had the pleasure of exploring various cafes in search of a truly exceptional cup of cappuccino. While we encountered numerous establishments, the majority fell short of our expectations. However, we were fortunate enough to stumble upon a hidden gem known as Saza Coffee, located in the charming district of Shinbashi.

Despite its modest size, Saza Coffee boasts an impressive lineup of dedicated baristas who possess an exceptional level of professionalism and talent. The moment we entered, we were greeted by their kind and cheerful staff, setting the stage for an unforgettable coffee experience.

Our expectations were not only met but exceeded when we tasted the cappuccinos prepared by the skilled baristas at Saza Coffee. The attention to detail and precision in crafting each cup was truly remarkable. From the perfectly balanced espresso base to the flawlessly textured milk, every sip offered a harmonious symphony of flavors that delighted our palates.

We were particularly impressed by the baristas' ability to consistently deliver a high-quality cappuccino, showcasing their mastery of the craft. Their passion for coffee was evident in every pour, and their dedication to their art was truly inspiring.

If you find yourself in Tokyo and share our love for a good cup of cappuccino, we wholeheartedly recommend paying a visit to Saza Coffee. Despite its small size, this unassuming establishment houses a team of talented professionals who have mastered the art of coffee-making. Prepare to indulge in the best cappuccino Tokyo has to offer, and allow the friendly atmosphere and exceptional service to enhance your overall experience. Saza Coffee in Shinbashi is undoubtedly a destination worth seeking out for coffee enthusiasts seeking perfection in every sip.

Name: Blue Bottle Coffee Shibuya
Address: 1 Chome-7-3 Jinnan, Shibuya City
Author: Aleš Chromec
Review:
Amazing cafe. It's located within small park.

From the side of of building there is nice outside seating area which can be used even in the rain.

On the second floor there are places suitable for sitting in with laptop and also few sofas.

Name: Blue Bottle Coffee Shibuya
Address: 1 Chome-7-3 Jinnan, Shibuya City
Author: Kayne (Kano La La)
Review:
From the coffee to the sweets, there's no room for doubt.
Architectural delight, blending right in the scene,
Outdoor seating 'mongst the trees, so serene.
Inside's a stunner, designed with such flair,
Upstairs meeting room, chill or connect, if you dare.
Blue Bottle Cafe, where style meets taste,
In Shibuya, it's the spot, ain't no time to waste.

Name: Blue Bottle Coffee Shibuya
Address: 1 Chome-7-3 Jinnan, Shibuya City
Author: Eric Miller
Review:
Ample space for early morning caffeine-hounds. Tucked away in a semi-convenient location in Shibuya, Blue Bottle does it again with another exceptionally well thought out space-within-a-space. Counter and outdoor seating on the ground floor, lounge seating on the second. Though not as large as the Daikanyama location, it is larger than the Aoyama location.

A trend has seemingly emerged with Blue Bottle offering unique menu items at different locations. Here they offer a new twist on their hand crafted sweet or savory waffles with the addition of “Cinnamon Butter.” Sprinkled with finely chopped chocolate bits, the cinnamon infused air-whipped butter brings a new level of sweetness and texture to their mainstay breakfast treat offering.

Name: Blue Bottle Coffee Shibuya
Address: 1 Chome-7-3 Jinnan, Shibuya City
Author: Tanisha Hippolyte
Review: The staff here are so friendly and helpful. We had the grilled cheese with tomato soup and the Waffle with cream. My grilled cheese was so warm and comforting. The waffle wasn’t too sweet and presented really nicely. The cafe had a mellow atmosphere with nice lighting.

Name: Blue Bottle Coffee Shibuya
Address: 1 Chome-7-3 Jinnan, Shibuya City
Author: Hang Man Helen Fung
Review: It's a hot day but worth going. It's a nice spacious environment and very relaxing, The single origin coffee and the limited cheesecake are good (not a NY cheesecake style)! 😋😋 Would definitely come back again!

Name: AMAZING COFFEE
Address: Meguro City, Aobadai, 1 Chome−18−7 カスタリア中目黒 211 1F6区画
Author: ELSE
Review: I really loved the ambience of the shop. It's simple, quaint and rustic. I ordered the caramel latte and was pleasantly surprised that it wasn't too sweet. The MPV is the milk. It was creamy and delicious for a latte.

Name: AMAZING COFFEE
Address: Meguro City, Aobadai, 1 Chome−18−7 カスタリア中目黒 211 1F6区画
Author: Lera Lera
Review: Great coffee and service, and super cute vibe

Name: AMAZING COFFEE
Address: Meguro City, Aobadai, 1 Chome−18−7 カスタリア中目黒 211 1F6区画
Author: H Katharina
Review: Tried the really yummy Happy Latte, some sweet spots for a fully great treat. Queuing takes time here, too long for my taste. No cookies or cake or other is sold to go with the coffee.

Name: AMAZING COFFEE
Address: Meguro City, Aobadai, 1 Chome−18−7 カスタリア中目黒 211 1F6区画
Author: HECTOR NAVA
Review: We were there with friends some days ago. I tried glace as always which was so-so, can't say it was good. But for only coffee break its nice place.

Name: AMAZING COFFEE
Address: Meguro City, Aobadai, 1 Chome−18−7 カスタリア中目黒 211 1F6区画
Author: 官沛柔
Review: It’s a good place to have an amazing coffee 👍

Name: Tully’s Coffee - Shinjuku 2-chome
Address: 2 Chome-5-9 Shinjuku, Shinjuku City
Author: Debi Slinger
Review:
I keep coming back And that’s because of the service, the food and the warm atmosphere. Today was pancakes with a mocha latte. Meal was a good size and at around 1130Yen not too bad value for money. Staff were very sweet and patient with me as a I chose my order. They were doing a brisk trade with locals and internationals and certainly giving the McDonalds on the other corner a run for its money.
Plenty of nice coffee and other treats to buy to take with you as well.
Wheelchair accessible and kid friendly.

Name: Tully’s Coffee - Shinjuku 2-chome
Address: 2 Chome-5-9 Shinjuku, Shinjuku City
Author: Lea L
Review: The service was excellent. The food wasn't satisfying sadly. We came here in the morning for breakfast, so there aren't many people here. There are seats on the second floor where you can people watch.

Name: Tully’s Coffee - Shinjuku 2-chome
Address: 2 Chome-5-9 Shinjuku, Shinjuku City
Author: Levi Flaman
Review: Food was okay; got some kind of spaghetti dish but although it tasted fine, it wasn't particularly filling. Tried to order an iced coffee with a scoop of T's Ice inside similar to an article I read on SoraNews24 a while back, but either I wasn't ordering correctly or the cashier misunderstood me because I ended up getting the ice cream scoop on the side which I didn't want.

Name: Tully’s Coffee - Shinjuku 2-chome
Address: 2 Chome-5-9 Shinjuku, Shinjuku City
Author: Elaine Farore-Love
Review: Equivalent to Starbucks. Great gourmet coffee and matcha drinks with large indoor and outdoor spaces to sit down, walking distance to the train station near Shinjoko Garden (cherry blossom)

Name: Tully’s Coffee - Shinjuku 2-chome
Address: 2 Chome-5-9 Shinjuku, Shinjuku City
Author: Regina Falconer
Review: Great coffee and I'm not a coffee drinker and fresh breakfast sandwich...

Name: Ginza Coffee - Ginza Sukiyabashi
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 4 Chome−2−14 DK銀座ビル 2F
Author: Bume Thongsri
Review: The atmosphere looks like a dating spot to me. The coffee is great with good aroma. I also order pasta and toast. They taste great! The service is up to Japan standards, nice hospitality.

Name: Ginza Coffee - Ginza Sukiyabashi
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 4 Chome−2−14 DK銀座ビル 2F
Author: Kalen Tang
Review: Finished shopping at 9pm on a Tuesday night and passed by this coffee house, so I decided to have a dinner there.  Nice environment, not noisy, not crowded, clean, no need to wait for tables.  The staff who served me was super nice.   Food was not bad, meeting my expectations.  Overall an above par experience.

Name: Ginza Coffee - Ginza Sukiyabashi
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 4 Chome−2−14 DK銀座ビル 2F
Author: lynn
Review: such a hidden gem for a late night cafe, walked in around at 9.40 pm and they were so accomodating to serve us late - cannot really comment on the food but for a late night dessert it was lovely just to hangout here and relax - would come back if i stay in ginza again

Name: Ginza Coffee - Ginza Sukiyabashi
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 4 Chome−2−14 DK銀座ビル 2F
Author: Rita
Review: We came here for coffee to take a rest in between shopping. It’s Sunday so need to wait about 30 min. We try their afternoon set - choose french toast and pancake.  Food and coffee is ok but no surprise.  Seating is quite comfy though, a place good for hang out.

Name: Ginza Coffee - Ginza Sukiyabashi
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 4 Chome−2−14 DK銀座ビル 2F
Author: Nic Uyliapco
Review:
Just searched Coffee shops nearby and I didn’t want the usual mainstream coffee shops like StarB… or the likes.
Great atmosphere
Selection is decent
Kids can have Pancakes and Shakes

Name: Streamer Coffee Company
Address: 1 Chome-20-28 Shibuya, Shibuya City
Author: Agista Jung
Review:
Discovered this place through a content creator and one of my followed barista usually comes to this place.

This place is popular for its beautiful latte art. But when I got here the place is too crowded so I decided to do a take away order. I had the simple latte. The coffee is smooth and creamy. I love Japanese coffee that is not too strong for me so I enjoy it the most. I would say that the coffee itself can be taken lightly by my stomach. And the texture of the coffee itself is smooth unlike coffee I had in Indonesia.

The staff are friendly and they accept cashless payment. A good place to go for a good coffee instead.

Name: Streamer Coffee Company
Address: 1 Chome-20-28 Shibuya, Shibuya City
Author: JH
Review: Love the vibe here, the crew was also very charismatic-chill. Had the revolver latte which is a double shot and it was superb.

Name: Streamer Coffee Company
Address: 1 Chome-20-28 Shibuya, Shibuya City
Author: Welly Lim
Review: I dont review much on cafe normally, but i kind of think this one has a potential. The latte and matcha coffee we ordered....average (latte may below average if you are a stronger coffee drinker...it tastes milk...remind me of starbucks) But, atmosphere wise, its great place to chill and meet ur friends. Hope next time i will have better comments on the coffee :)

Name: Streamer Coffee Company
Address: 1 Chome-20-28 Shibuya, Shibuya City
Author: Pongsathorn Surapab
Review: Great, but sorry. Overrated. The oreo cheesecake is TOO MELTED. Coffee is probably dark roasted. The staff didn’t tell anything about the coffee. I order large Iced Americano and Oreo Cheesecake cost ¥1,550. Much more price than quality

Name: Streamer Coffee Company
Address: 1 Chome-20-28 Shibuya, Shibuya City
Author: Sadaphong Kitiphankul
Review: I had a delightful experience at Steamer Coffee Roaster, conveniently located near the station. The warm and cozy atmosphere, coupled with the best-tasting coffee, made my visit memorable. The place was not too crowded, and the staff exhibited great hospitality. They spoke English fluently and were very friendly. Highly recommend!

Name: Murrma Coffee Stop
Address: 2 Chome-6-1 Honmachi, Shibuya City
Author: Xiro Ar (Alphonz)
Review:
A coffee stop where the polite and pleasant shopkeeper serves meticulously crafted fairly tasty coffee varieties.
A cup on your ordered beans is slightly more expensive than the fast “Today’s coffee” but worth a try to appreciate the value. Cash payment only.
You can have your favourite one inside or just outside the shop if you like though the space are limited.
A little pity that its opening days and hours are also somewhat limited maybe due to a solo-run store, like Mondays, Tuesdays and late afternoons are off.

Name: Murrma Coffee Stop
Address: 2 Chome-6-1 Honmachi, Shibuya City
Author: Justin Tan
Review: Very good coffee tucked away at the outskirts of Shinjuku area. This small café has a very quaint look and chill vibe to on the outside to just sit and people watch. Definitely worth checking out if you are in the area. White coffee was very creamy and nutty while the black was well balance, not too fruity not too floral.

Name: Murrma Coffee Stop
Address: 2 Chome-6-1 Honmachi, Shibuya City
Author: Jason Chuei
Review: Cool pocket cafe with chill vibes, a welcome reprieve from the busy main road outside. Wooden raw decor scattered with coffee beans and sacks. Chai latte made with Prana Chai, always good. Cash only.

Name: Murrma Coffee Stop
Address: 2 Chome-6-1 Honmachi, Shibuya City
Author: Peter Galante

Name: Murrma Coffee Stop
Address: 2 Chome-6-1 Honmachi, Shibuya City
Author: Claire Williamson
Review: A lovely coffee shop near Hatsudai station. A variety of beans roasted in-house (I had the Peru, it was a lovely tea-like light roast) and a small selection of pound cake and scones (also beer). Only four or so seats so to-go would also be an excellent option as you wander around the neighborhood.

Name: Blue Bottle Coffee Ginza Cafe
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 6 Chome−10−1 GINZA SIX B2F
Author: Ali Chua
Review:
Grabbed a coffee here, it's consistent across branches in other countries. Would prefer if they offered skimmed milk.

It's decently priced and there was too long a queue. Saw the staff making the drip coffee and he is very conscientious about it.

Name: Blue Bottle Coffee Ginza Cafe
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 6 Chome−10−1 GINZA SIX B2F
Author: Skye Cai
Review:
Tried their cakes which is quite disappointing.
The cheese cake doesn’t taste made with good milk and cheese. That it doesn’t melt in the mouth or has heavy cheese flavours.
The brownie is not tasty too. Super hard and not soft.
The better one is the coconut pound cake that has strong coconut taste.
In overall not much services but good atmosphere. Merchandises are expensive.

Name: Blue Bottle Coffee Ginza Cafe
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 6 Chome−10−1 GINZA SIX B2F
Author: Rakhmadi Kusumo
Review:
Visiting Blue Bottle Coffee at the bustling B2 Ginza Six Mall can be a challenging experience due to its popularity. The cafe was extremely packed during my visit, resulting in long waits for both seating and ordering. The crowd, characteristic of such a renowned spot, unfortunately detracts from the usually serene coffee experience one might expect from Blue Bottle.

I ordered a cappuccino and an iced latte. While both drinks were up to the high standards Blue Bottle is known for, with the right balance of flavors and expertly brewed coffee, the overall experience was overshadowed by the excessive wait times and the chaotic environment. Additionally, a significant error occurred during my transaction, as I was charged twice for my order, further complicating my visit.

Given the stress and inconvenience of navigating the crowded space and dealing with billing errors, I would recommend seeking out a quieter, less crowded venue for those looking to enjoy their coffee in peace. While Blue Bottle Coffee offers quality beverages, the Ginza Six location might not be the best choice for those who prefer a more relaxed setting to truly savor their coffee.

Name: Blue Bottle Coffee Ginza Cafe
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 6 Chome−10−1 GINZA SIX B2F
Author: Hi Goat Oh Deer迷鹿与高羊
Review:
Blue bottle is like the better version of Starbucks franchise.

Nola Float (736Y with tax) smooth coffee, Coffee not sweet, but the ice cream is sweet. Not bad.

The place is pretty crowded and noisy though.

Name: Blue Bottle Coffee Ginza Cafe
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 6 Chome−10−1 GINZA SIX B2F
Author: Eileen Neo (Sgsohotleh)
Review: Not as iconic compared to the rest of the Blue Bottle Coffee Cafe! But the interior of the design is still very beautiful and minimalistic. Coffee wise, on the slightly pricey side. I guess due to branding. They also carry their own merchandise too, if you are a fan of blue bottle. In the outlet, we tried the basque cheesecake! It’s so so good! Ended up, I thought the cheesecake was a better choice compared to the coffee. Sadly, they don’t allow takeaway for the cheesecake. Definitely a must visit, given its popularity. 💯

Name: Sarutahiko Coffee Shimokitazawa
Address: Setagaya City, Kitazawa, 2 Chome−24−5 シモキタフロント 1F
Author: Raluca Antuca Bordot
Review: Absolutely delicious. I loved the warm sandwich and the limited edition honey latte was one of the best I ever had. The staff was also friendly and spoke English. I highly recommend it, especially as a sweet break from thrift shopping in the area.

Name: Sarutahiko Coffee Shimokitazawa
Address: Setagaya City, Kitazawa, 2 Chome−24−5 シモキタフロント 1F
Author: Foong Yee Loh
Review: Pretty good coffee here. You can’t miss this shop as it’s located right outside the train station. It has an interesting interior layout too. Had a hot latte and iced latte, extra shot. Both were good.

Name: Sarutahiko Coffee Shimokitazawa
Address: Setagaya City, Kitazawa, 2 Chome−24−5 シモキタフロント 1F
Author: thomas sipes
Review: I seek out great espresso, specifically cortados or gibraltars, and beans wherever I travel (we're 3rd wave people). I've been to sarutahiko in Kyoto and was wildly impressed. In Shimo They are just as great  with  a delicate fruity and pineapple flavor to the beans. They have a San Remo machine, which makes fantastic espressos. We're not into lattes, and that seems to be the only choice on their menu. How to explain  a cortado  was a challenge and some Google translation. The staff are amazing, The barista seemed to know what she was doing. So in the end they served us a shot of  espresso and a small cup of cold milk. Granted it was 90 degrees outside...so they do understand Iced drinks too.

Name: Sarutahiko Coffee Shimokitazawa
Address: Setagaya City, Kitazawa, 2 Chome−24−5 シモキタフロント 1F
Author: Ivan Michael Pung
Review: Very short walk from the rail station. Staff are friendly and they know their coffee. Make such an effort to brew my coffee, I’m really impress.

Name: Sarutahiko Coffee Shimokitazawa
Address: Setagaya City, Kitazawa, 2 Chome−24−5 シモキタフロント 1F
Author: Charis Wong
Review:
very nice staff. Will serve you with patience and ask you for coffee tasting. We tried Christmas Tiramisu Latte and Honey latte. Nice to have a drink and relax after shopping.
Very near to the 下北沢station東口

Name: Beck's Coffee Shop
Address: 5 Chome-27-8 Ueno, Taito City
Author: Danielle Roy
Review: We really liked Beck's Coffee Shop, so we visited a second time before leaving. The egg and ham sandwich with coffee was great. We enjoyed the self-service machine to place our order and read the menu in English. The tables are quite close together, but a good amount of seating.

Name: Beck's Coffee Shop
Address: 5 Chome-27-8 Ueno, Taito City
Author: Hang Man Helen Fung
Review:
I was having breakfast there and the toast set with the whipped cream was very delicious! 🤤
The location is just near the station!

Name: Beck's Coffee Shop
Address: 5 Chome-27-8 Ueno, Taito City
Author: Susan Tan
Review: Ordering is done via a self help machine, which has various languages to choose from. Certainly tourist friendly. However their coffee wasn't that great. Nice, quiet atmosphere though.

Name: Beck's Coffee Shop
Address: 5 Chome-27-8 Ueno, Taito City
Author: Little L (and the family)
Review: I found this coffee shop when I was exploring around okachimachi for a bite to eat and then I found this chain coffee shop nearby the station which was already a good thing for me since I can easily walk back to the station. I ordered an iced Americano there and tried it without any fuss. The coffee was very light which made it easy and relaxing for me to drink it.

Name: Beck's Coffee Shop
Address: 5 Chome-27-8 Ueno, Taito City
Author: Dee A
Review: Glad they have an English menu (ordering via touch screen)! Great and very quick service. The food was also good.  Perfect for a quick bite.   They also have outlets to charge your devices :)

Name: Yanaka coffee and tea
Address: 2 Chome-33-6 Kitazawa, Setagaya City
Author: achinoam rikin
Review:
Rude and unwelcoming. We were trying to order and sit they wouldn’t let us and not only did they kick us out, they made us buy their bad coffee for using the toilet, before they kicked us out. Avoid going!
The worst experience we had in Tokyo. There are so many nice places and welcoming people don’t bother wasting your time in this lame place

Name: Yanaka coffee and tea
Address: 2 Chome-33-6 Kitazawa, Setagaya City
Author: MeT
Review: Fantastic hideaway cafe that does excellent coffee. Both indoor n el fresco seating. Besides great coffee n teas, they also retail beans. Quite a wide variety for brewing in or take away. Yanaka’s is located in a side lane on a corner, ambience there is quiet relaxed and contemplative- perfect after the hustle n bustle of trendy Shimokitazawa! Prices are very reasonable and it’s a wonderful cafe to kick back your heels and have a cuppa or two of your favourite Java. Always make it a point to visit whenever we’re in that part of the city. Highly recommended 🎖🎖🎖🎖🎖

Name: Yanaka coffee and tea
Address: 2 Chome-33-6 Kitazawa, Setagaya City
Author: Divyanshu Solanki
Review: Their coffee tastes really great !

Name: Yanaka coffee and tea
Address: 2 Chome-33-6 Kitazawa, Setagaya City
Author: Moshe Ashkenazi
Review: It looks like amazing place, but the attend didn't want to serve a coffee without milk/cream, which I can not have.

Name: Yanaka coffee and tea
Address: 2 Chome-33-6 Kitazawa, Setagaya City
Author: Leo Smith
Review: banging coffee hot ppl

Name: Coffee Shop Top
Address: Shibuya City, Dogenzaka, 2 Chome−29−8 道玄坂センタービル 地下１階
Author: Mikel Carr (Reckless Thor)
Review: A tiny bit expensive and no wifi but decent food and interesting atmosphere away from the hustle and bustle. Smoke is heavy in the air. Make sure to drink water and don't stay too long.

Name: Coffee Shop Top
Address: Shibuya City, Dogenzaka, 2 Chome−29−8 道玄坂センタービル 地下１階
Author: Hamish
Review:
Yes people smoke in there. But that’s just Japan, and it’s pretty obvious before or as soon as you walk in.

No they don’t do espresso. They do real coffee, and it’s very good.

Ignore the reviews from intolerant American clowns.

Name: Coffee Shop Top
Address: Shibuya City, Dogenzaka, 2 Chome−29−8 道玄坂センタービル 地下１階
Author: Chung C.K.
Review:
Heavy cigarette smell in the shop. Nearly all customers here would smoke. Not recommend to girls.
Coffee is not bad though.

Name: Coffee Shop Top
Address: Shibuya City, Dogenzaka, 2 Chome−29−8 道玄坂センタービル 地下１階
Author: Robert Orynich
Review: Do NOT go here unless you are an avid tobacco smoker. It smells like US bars in the 90s. Also, they don’t serve espresso.

Name: Coffee Shop Top
Address: Shibuya City, Dogenzaka, 2 Chome−29−8 道玄坂センタービル 地下１階
Author: Junichi Uozumi
Review:
A traditional style Japanese cafe.

Note: smoking allowed.

Name: Starbucks Coffee - Ginza Exitmelsa
Address: 5 Chome-7-10 Ginza, Chuo City
Author: Lea L
Review: Even though it was crowded in the morning, we managed to get a seat. Looking through the variety of cooked food, they do have a lot more options than what is offered in Singapore. I see more options for vegetarians. Staff is able to understand English so you can order in English. Tried out their offerings that Singapofe doesn't have, and I love it. Great place to have breakfast in Ginza as many places nearby only open at 11AM.

Name: Starbucks Coffee - Ginza Exitmelsa
Address: 5 Chome-7-10 Ginza, Chuo City
Author: Andy O.Y
Review: Coffee was ok but table was very dirty, there were food bits, and sticky traces, very disgusting

Name: Starbucks Coffee - Ginza Exitmelsa
Address: 5 Chome-7-10 Ginza, Chuo City
Author: Sake Sommelier
Review: Very crowded on the day i went, the trash is overflowing and the tables are not wiped and left as is after customers left.  Very busy i guess… but coffee is the same.

Name: Starbucks Coffee - Ginza Exitmelsa
Address: 5 Chome-7-10 Ginza, Chuo City
Author: Boss
Review:
What a great Starbucks, huge, clean and hidden.
Definitely worth coming to relax or work.
Came at 2pm on a weekday and was able to find a space to sit and talk in private.
Even though it's in the basement it didn't feel as it was.
Recommended

Name: Starbucks Coffee - Ginza Exitmelsa
Address: 5 Chome-7-10 Ginza, Chuo City
Author: Chong Peng How
Review: A reprieve from the shopping and crowd. Ample seating but can be crowded

Name: Hoshino Coffee
Address: Taito City, Ueno, 2 Chome−12−1 セントラル２１ビル 2F
Author: Fon Rize
Review:
Cute and cosy café, nice and friendly staff but a little tired due to the amount of guests.

Drinks and desserts are 10/10, especially soufflé with anglaise sauce, it's just heavenly.

Name: Hoshino Coffee
Address: Taito City, Ueno, 2 Chome−12−1 セントラル２１ビル 2F
Author: Denisa-Stefania-Adriana Tudor
Review: It’s a good place to have breakfast, the fluffy strawberry pancakes were very nice. I’m not a fan of their coffee, as it was too bitter and roasted for my taste, but the iced tea was nice - strong and full of flavour. Also, they don’t have any vegan food options - they do have plain toast but I’m not sure if that’s vegan. Queuing time is small or nonexistent, as they have lots of locations around Tokyo.

Name: Hoshino Coffee
Address: Taito City, Ueno, 2 Chome−12−1 セントラル２１ビル 2F
Author: Francois Pradeau
Review: Very cozy place, particularly on a rainy day. Pancake was very good and so was the coffee! Easy to order, English menu available, fast service, nice jazz music. A restful stop from the city crowds.

Name: Hoshino Coffee
Address: Taito City, Ueno, 2 Chome−12−1 セントラル２１ビル 2F
Author: Scott Savage
Review: Old school timber panelled breakfast diner. Souffle pancakes and great french toast. Nice to offset the sugar with a side salad. Great service. Nice booths overlooking the intersection. Take the lift to the second floor.

Name: Hoshino Coffee
Address: Taito City, Ueno, 2 Chome−12−1 セントラル２１ビル 2F
Author: Dingo Ko
Review: Nice cup of coffee! Good and simple tradition Japan style curry and napoleon spaghetti just like in First Love drama. A nice place to refreshing yourself.

Name: Tully's Coffee
Address: Chuo City, Kyobashi, 3 Chome−1−1 東京スクエアガーデン B1F
Author: Helio Ciffoni
Review: This place used to be an European coffee house, with no attraction as cafeteria. Now, as a Tully’s, it is always full, with neighboring office workers come not only to sip a café on Tully’s style but to work or get together.

Name: Tully's Coffee
Address: Chuo City, Kyobashi, 3 Chome−1−1 東京スクエアガーデン B1F
Author: Newberry Ishi
Review:
You can sit out side that a bit relaxation environment.
and off course Kind staff.

Name: Tully's Coffee
Address: Chuo City, Kyobashi, 3 Chome−1−1 東京スクエアガーデン B1F
Author: Lidia Alejandra Romero
Review:
Let me tell you….
We landed here by chance, after having breakfast at a very disappointing place we decided to have our espresso here and it was the best coffee!!! I would comeback but just for the espresso because they have nothing to offer gluten free.

Name: Tully's Coffee
Address: Chuo City, Kyobashi, 3 Chome−1−1 東京スクエアガーデン B1F
Author: Lana Clara
Review:
Three times I said "soy milk", but I still got a "soy latte" for pay🤷‍♀️
Too loooooong service at all

Name: Tully's Coffee
Address: Chuo City, Kyobashi, 3 Chome−1−1 東京スクエアガーデン B1F
Author: Willian Santos
Review: very pleasant, good location, excellent service

Name: Tully’s Coffee - Tsukiji St. Luke Street
Address: 3 Chome-6-2 Tsukiji, Chuo City
Author: doris
Review: Excellent place to relax. The staff are friendly and professional. The place is clean. There are plenty of desks with charging stations for people to work at comfortably. Everyone there is quiet and respectful. High ceiling with tall windows all around providing good natural sunlight. Their free wifi there was strong and stable, and does not automatically disconnect you like some other option laces. If you’re looking for somewhere spacious and comfortable to read a book or work, this place is it.

Name: Tully’s Coffee - Tsukiji St. Luke Street
Address: 3 Chome-6-2 Tsukiji, Chuo City
Author: Luis M.
Review: The coffee itself is not amazing, but the place is really good, especially to work. You have many plugs to charge your phone or connect your laptop, there’s free Wi-Fi and a huge window that brings good light and lets you check the street. There are many tables, so it’s not difficult to find a seat. They have plastic screens between seats as a measure against COVID-19, apart from sanitizer gel and employees wearing masks. Friendly staff.

Name: Tully’s Coffee - Tsukiji St. Luke Street
Address: 3 Chome-6-2 Tsukiji, Chuo City
Author: Diana Peko
Review: Very spacious venue with lots of tables, free wifi, and (my favourite) a high ceiling and a beautiful window. There is a nice working space where you can charge your laptop. Coffee is more expensive than in other places, that is why I gave it 4 stars.

Name: Tully’s Coffee - Tsukiji St. Luke Street
Address: 3 Chome-6-2 Tsukiji, Chuo City
Author: Hatsujoukikuma naster
Review:
Not for coffee Aficionados, the coffee is not great but the place is  spacious and nice.
Charging spots are available for free.

Name: Tully’s Coffee - Tsukiji St. Luke Street
Address: 3 Chome-6-2 Tsukiji, Chuo City
Author: Zachary Hubbell
Review: This is one of our favorite coffee shops in Chuo-ku. The cafe is large with high ceilings and the cafe offers free and very fast WiFi.

Name: Starbucks Coffee - Azabu-Juban
Address: Minato City, Azabujuban, 1 Chome−11−14 ＳＢＳビル
Author: Hank Chang
Review: Quick and efficient Starbucks, two levels (seating upstairs), and great sakura donuts!

Name: Starbucks Coffee - Azabu-Juban
Address: Minato City, Azabujuban, 1 Chome−11−14 ＳＢＳビル
Author: Jason Chuei
Review: Cool branch on the Main Street of Azabujuban, spanning three floors with a small outdoor garden and seating area on the third floor.

Name: Starbucks Coffee - Azabu-Juban
Address: Minato City, Azabujuban, 1 Chome−11−14 ＳＢＳビル
Author: Gabe Garriga
Review: Quite honestly in the states I’m not a big Starbucks fan but here it’s way better. The coffee is not bitter. The latte is very smooth and creamy. I wish my Starbucks At home was like here. Very good place for Ordering in English too.

Name: Starbucks Coffee - Azabu-Juban
Address: Minato City, Azabujuban, 1 Chome−11−14 ＳＢＳビル
Author: Brent
Review: Starbucks food is pretty average, nothing amazing. They do have seasonal things that are worth trying once. They also have pretty average coffee, there’s better coffee options less than 1 minute walk from here. This starbucks though, has 3 floors for meeting up with friends, studying, reading a book, or just lounging. I think this is the main reason to come to starbucks. It can get very busy 3-6 and there will be no where to sit.

Name: Starbucks Coffee - Azabu-Juban
Address: Minato City, Azabujuban, 1 Chome−11−14 ＳＢＳビル
Author: Sun Shakur
Review: It's a three story building so easier to find a table. They keep the place nice and clean as any other starbucks in Japan. I like how they have a bench you can sit since you don't see any place to sit outside in Japan. The tables are pretty close to each other and it's so quiet that I felt like I had to stay quite too. lol

Name: Bookends Coffee Service
Address: Setagaya City, Kitazawa, 2 Chome−11−17 佐藤ビル １F
Author: Tom James
Review: Cute little coffee shop. Had an amazing caramel cream latte. Friendly staff and nice vibe.

Name: Bookends Coffee Service
Address: Setagaya City, Kitazawa, 2 Chome−11−17 佐藤ビル １F
Author: Ayoob Ilyas
Review: The shop is really small and has a nice vibe to it. It has old and unique posters, books and many things on display, along with the music and has a relaxed and retro atmosphere. I had the coffee jelly with ice cream (and coffee), which tasted pretty good. The prices are quite low as well, I haven't seen a cheaper cafe yet in Tokyo. The beans seemed to be roasted quite a bit.

Name: Bookends Coffee Service
Address: Setagaya City, Kitazawa, 2 Chome−11−17 佐藤ビル １F
Author: Hannah Goh
Review:
my flat white was great - nutty and robust, perfectly warm so i can drink immediately (i love it when baristas nail the temperature!)

the pastries were delicious and sitting outside made for a perfect afternoon of people-watching and reading. music was really good too.

Name: Bookends Coffee Service
Address: Setagaya City, Kitazawa, 2 Chome−11−17 佐藤ビル １F
Author: Justin Shircliff
Review: Really enjoyed my experience here, from the decor to the service to the coffee. The staff was super friendly and helpful, and the iced coffee was brewed perfectly. The ambiance is very eclectic, with the Millennium Falcon even making an appearance. I will come back for sure. Great option in the area and close to the station.

Name: Bookends Coffee Service
Address: Setagaya City, Kitazawa, 2 Chome−11−17 佐藤ビル １F
Author: Andrew Lam
Review: We finished lunch in the area and needed a caffeine fix so we decided we would try this little coffee shop out. The decor theme is vintage-hipster kind of vibes and the inside is very well decorated, we loved sitting inside to have coffee. We came here in December and the shop had all  Christmas themed decorations and cups, very festive! They have very good selection of coffee and drinks with pictures on the menu posted on the door. The coffee was really good, smooth and there are some small baked goods like cakes that go well with the drinks. Overall would definitely return for coffee!

Name: COFFEE・KAN Asakusa store(珈琲館 浅草店)
Address: Taito City, Asakusa, 1 Chome−6−1 味乃一番ビル
Author: Bryant Zeng
Review:
We stopped here for a busy morning around Asakusa.

The hotcakes were good. I've never had red beans as a pancake topping before, which was really tasty and interesting.

The only thing I'd have to point out was the wait times. It took a bit to get a table, to get a menu, then get our food. It was the morning so slightly understandable on wait times.

Name: COFFEE・KAN Asakusa store(珈琲館 浅草店)
Address: Taito City, Asakusa, 1 Chome−6−1 味乃一番ビル
Author: Stefanie Molina
Review: Highly recommend this place! We came here for breakfast two days in a row. Their pancakes are so delicious and I enjoyed their coffee as well. We are back home now and the kids are still talking about the pancakes from Coffee Kan. Will visit again next time when we are in Tokyo.

Name: COFFEE・KAN Asakusa store(珈琲館 浅草店)
Address: Taito City, Asakusa, 1 Chome−6−1 味乃一番ビル
Author: Jeff Mak
Review:
I've ordered 3 morning sets for me and my parents. I tried the pancakes and Blue Mountain Coffee.

For pancakes, it tastes good and likes eating a cake, can have a try for pancake lover.

For the blue mountain coffee, it's a joke as a scaled coffee shop. As a hand drip coffee lover, I can say this coffee (black) is full of the taste of astringency, really not like a good blue mountain coffee, I will give zero for the blue mountain, not worth to pay extra money to try it.

For the service, my father is disabled. When we arrived the coffee shop, I showed our number of person to a waitress but she has no reaction and at last skip us when they arranged the table to the queue.  Luckily the table before us left due to some reason. I am not saying their service is bad, they have some waiters very hardworking, I can only give an average score to their service.

Overall, it's still a good coffee shop if you would find a place to take some rest.

Name: COFFEE・KAN Asakusa store(珈琲館 浅草店)
Address: Taito City, Asakusa, 1 Chome−6−1 味乃一番ビル
Author: Indra Isnato
Review: really like eating here, especially the dessert is very delicious. The location is also very comfortable and Instagrammable. Don't forget to take pictures, IG: @Indra_Isnato

Name: COFFEE・KAN Asakusa store(珈琲館 浅草店)
Address: Taito City, Asakusa, 1 Chome−6−1 味乃一番ビル
Author: Teresa K.
Review: Cute place! Lots of wonderful brunch options and lots of variations of their sumibi (charcoal fire) coffee. I got the iced “sumibi cafe au lait harmony”, which was beautifully smooth, and their seasonal lemon mascarpone pancake set with choco coffee. There was ice cream in both the main dish and my choco coffee which was a surprise. The choco coffee was too sweet for me, as there was choco ice cream on top and choco syrup at the bottom. Service was lovely. They also sell bags of coffee and some other merchandise near the cash register. Cute, lovely place to have breakfast/brunch/lunch!

Name: Live Coffee
Address: Chuo City, Tsukiji, 3 Chome−5−13 北村ビル 1F
Author: JUHYUN PARK
Review:
Really good tasty and what a great baristas in here! They are very kind and sweet to us.
And no.1 blue mountain coffee was also great♥️♥️♥️

Name: Live Coffee
Address: Chuo City, Tsukiji, 3 Chome−5−13 北村ビル 1F
Author: Sinan Mandaci
Review:
I stop here to drink coffee every time after my annual health check-up in nearby St.Luke Hospital. It is cozy and lovely place just to sit down and enjoy the coffee from variety of beans.

You get free coupon/discount if you buy beans though surprisingly reasonably priced shop (~250¥) if you are here to drink coffee only.

Name: Live Coffee
Address: Chuo City, Tsukiji, 3 Chome−5−13 北村ビル 1F
Author: matthew fong
Review: Stopped by on the way to the markets, people queuing is always a good sign. I had the mocha and a cupcake, nice and hot and very friendly staff. Definitely pop by people

Name: Live Coffee
Address: Chuo City, Tsukiji, 3 Chome−5−13 北村ビル 1F
Author: Matthew Stovall
Review: Spending my morning in Ginza/Tsukiji area and needed a coffee. Sadly, thought we might have to settle for a Starbucks/Doutor/Cafe de Crie when we stumbled upon this gem of a coffee roastery. To begin, the tiny little shop consisting of five tables, smells incredible. Second, there was a stream of locals grabbing coffees to go, always a good sign. Third, the four women working behind the counter were super helpful, kind, and friendly—when we arrived, all of the tables were filled so one of the women opened up some counter space for us and once a table opened, she ushered us to it almost immediately. Fourth, the coffee was inexpensive—¥300 for an iced coffee. And fifth, it was delicious. Well done Live Coffee!!

Name: Live Coffee
Address: Chuo City, Tsukiji, 3 Chome−5−13 北村ビル 1F
Author: Hana
Review:
This is a hidden gem in Tsukiji.
Loved the coffee, service, and the atmosphere.  Price range is 250-500 yen for a cup of coffee. hugely recommend!

Name: Cat Coffee
Address: 1 Chome-6-9 Jingumae, Shibuya City
Author: T Nicks
Review: Very nice, clean and friendly

Name: Cat Coffee
Address: 1 Chome-6-9 Jingumae, Shibuya City
Author: Mark Grixti
Review: Cat

Name: Cat Coffee
Address: 1 Chome-6-9 Jingumae, Shibuya City
Author: Ali Grixti
Review: Cat

Name: Cat Coffee
Address: 1 Chome-6-9 Jingumae, Shibuya City
Author: E S

Name: Starbucks Coffee - Kaminarimon
Address: Taito City, Asakusa, 1 Chome−18−2 雷門旅館
Author: Kyle Scouter
Review:
This Starbucks is busy, but the level of hospitality is outstanding.

When I visited, the barista was communicating in multiple languages—English, Chinese, Russian, Spanish, and Korean. It’s rare to see someone so talented.

If you want an experience beyond just coffee, this is the place to be.

Name: Starbucks Coffee - Kaminarimon
Address: Taito City, Asakusa, 1 Chome−18−2 雷門旅館
Author: Ras
Review:
This Starbucks has all the views 😍

This is an incredibly busy Starbucks BUT the service was so smooth and it was very quick. It has such amazing views of the Kaminarimon Gate. Potentially one of the best Starbucks I’ve been to.

If you go onto the second floor, there is a balcony area where you can sit and relax and take in the beautiful view. 🤩

Name: Starbucks Coffee - Kaminarimon
Address: Taito City, Asakusa, 1 Chome−18−2 雷門旅館
Author: Ornella B
Review: It's always a must in my opinion to go to an Starbucks at every country you visit. I thought Starbucks in Japan might be better than Starbucks in Korea but it wasn't the case? I think it was similar or even more alike to the US.. there are some items you can only catch on their season. For example in spring they have the Sakura chiffon, I've always wanted to try it. It was fluffy, not dry, and decent Sakura flavor. They didn't have their Sakura drinks anymore, so it was dissapointing. I ordered matcha and it was if not the same, super similar with overseas. Nevertheless, visit a Starbucks in every country you go to!

Name: Starbucks Coffee - Kaminarimon
Address: Taito City, Asakusa, 1 Chome−18−2 雷門旅館
Author: Clarisse De Guzman
Review: 5 stars for the very friendly staff, and the convenient location in a high-tourist area. We went around 8:00AM so it wasn't busy at all and there weren't crowds around Kaminarimon yet. We tried some seasonal menu items like pumpkin and matcha mochi in October. The rest of the menu is pretty standard for a Starbucks.

Name: Starbucks Coffee - Kaminarimon
Address: Taito City, Asakusa, 1 Chome−18−2 雷門旅館
Author: April Kerslake
Review: Was nice to pop into Starbucks to get away from the huge crowds of Senso-ji. It wasn’t overly busy so we had a lovely view of senso-ji sitting on the balcony. They have soy milk and give you a ticket that says “soy milk” to hand to the barista when you pick up your drink so you know your drink is soy milk. They also had this plant based/vegan matcha roll which was delicious.

Name: DUCT COFFEE LAB
Address: Shibuya City, Ebisunishi, 1 Chome−33−18 コート代官山 1F
Author: Chris Henry
Review:
We love the puffins!! It’s like, a flat muffin? I had the blueberry and cream cheese and my daughter had the chocolate one. Both were super tasty and not too sweet. Also, not sure if it’s cause we came near the closing time, but the puffins were 50% off.

The cafe latte was quite decent and well made, but not my favorite. The espresso was a bit more bitter than sour. So if you like that, you’d probably love it.

Name: DUCT COFFEE LAB
Address: Shibuya City, Ebisunishi, 1 Chome−33−18 コート代官山 1F
Author: ruth tan
Review: lovely coffee shop we stumbled upon on the way to the river. came here with 6 people and everyone managed to find something they liked! the stand outs were the milk tea and gingerbread latte (may be seasonal). got both with oat milk and they tasted great :)

Name: DUCT COFFEE LAB
Address: Shibuya City, Ebisunishi, 1 Chome−33−18 コート代官山 1F
Author: Hichem Merabet
Review:
A good place if you want to work on your computer or just read a book.
The latte is delicious, with a good amount of coffee. I also tried those kind of cookies bread which was delicious !

It’s a bit expensive but at least you are sure to enjoy what you are eating or drinking.

You can even charge your phone and computer there.

I recommend

Check my travel in my Instagram : @im_xyer

Name: DUCT COFFEE LAB
Address: Shibuya City, Ebisunishi, 1 Chome−33−18 コート代官山 1F
Author: Therese Wong
Review: I was the first customer so I was able to grab the best seat at the table facing the street. Ordered an ice hand-drip coffee. I usually prefer a dark roast but it was ok. Will try the yummy-looking "puffins" next time.

Name: DUCT COFFEE LAB
Address: Shibuya City, Ebisunishi, 1 Chome−33−18 コート代官山 1F
Author: Justin Shircliff
Review: Quality spot to grab a coffee. The drip coffee was especially good, but the latte was on bar with some of the best I’ve tried. The space is cool with a nice vibe. The staff was friendly and helpful in picking what bean to try. I’ll add this to my list of regular coffee strips, so I think you should give it a try.

Name: Yamamoto Coffee
Address: 3 Chome-17-11 Shinjuku, Shinjuku City
Author: Eric
Review: Nicest Coffee store in Tokyo for fresh beans like you want them. Great service and every little machine you want, they have it.

Name: Yamamoto Coffee
Address: 3 Chome-17-11 Shinjuku, Shinjuku City
Author: Kevin Kwok
Review: This place has been here forever. Lots of great coffee equipment but don't forget to get some very affordable freshly roasted beans as well. 100g as low as ¥550. And they can grind them for free of you ask nicely.

Name: Yamamoto Coffee
Address: 3 Chome-17-11 Shinjuku, Shinjuku City
Author: Cameron Pratt
Review: Really nice shop selling pretty much anything a coffee enthusiast might want. So many different brewers and ceramics available, it trully is a nice shop for me. I wanted to get something from Origami while traveling in Japan and they had a really beautiful red tasting cup from them that I really love. Shop owner is kind and friendly.

Name: Yamamoto Coffee
Address: 3 Chome-17-11 Shinjuku, Shinjuku City
Author: Lauren Bowman
Review: Like others have said, this shop has a truly impressive array of coffee brewing equipment and accessories for most hand-drip systems. The clerks speak some English and are super friendly and helpful. Don't pass it by if you're a coffee lover visiting Shinjuku!

Name: Yamamoto Coffee
Address: 3 Chome-17-11 Shinjuku, Shinjuku City
Author: Megan Griffith
Review:
Great little coffee place, got to see them roast their own beans in store while I was going downstairs to look at their teas.

They have a lovely selection of loose leaf black teas downstairs, as well as herbal teas perfect for sleep and making your own brews at home. Very interesting small store with antique coffee drips, grinders, brewers, along with unroasted beans, and an assortment of pre roasted, unique beans. Very cool store! Love it! I always walk by when I can, even if I don’t plan to go inside so I can smell the store on my way to work ;)

Name: Sarutahiko Coffee atré Ebisu Westside Store
Address: Shibuya City, Ebisuminami, 1 Chome−6−1 アトレ恵比寿 西館 １階
Author: Jason Chuei
Review: One of three Sarutahiko stores in Ebisu, this one located in the west building of Atre. Open setting adjacent to the mall traffic. French accordion music playing overhead. Matcha latte was pretty good.

Name: Sarutahiko Coffee atré Ebisu Westside Store
Address: Shibuya City, Ebisuminami, 1 Chome−6−1 アトレ恵比寿 西館 １階
Author: Karen On
Review: Had a very nice experience here. Their caffe latte is very delicious! The staff taking my order spoke really fluent English so it was easy for me to order. There's a dine-in area beside the counter, but the nice thing is that there are many benches in front of the store, so if you cannot find a seat inside you can sit outside on the benches directly facing the store. When I finished my drink, a kind staff member asked me if I enjoyed my drink. I had a really nice experience here and have been back here 3 times since my first visit, introducing it to new people each time.

Name: Sarutahiko Coffee atré Ebisu Westside Store
Address: Shibuya City, Ebisuminami, 1 Chome−6−1 アトレ恵比寿 西館 １階
Author: Justin Shircliff
Review: I came across the other Sarutahiko coffee shop in Ebisu a year or so ago and really enjoyed the flavor, so thought I’d try here too. You’re still getting the same delicious cup here with fast and friendly service. A few seats to sit and enjoy your drink. Located right behind Shake Shack. A nice pit stop while in the area.

Name: Sarutahiko Coffee atré Ebisu Westside Store
Address: Shibuya City, Ebisuminami, 1 Chome−6−1 アトレ恵比寿 西館 １階
Author: Omri R
Review: Sarutahiko’s premium coffee take (similar to Starbucks Reserve). This shop is really nicely designed and the staff is very nice and polite (they really go the extra mile in being serviceable). The coffee is good and is about 400-500 yen per cup which is higher than the regular Sarutahiko coffee branches. I liked the furniture design in this shop and the the nice colors and lighting. The choice of foods is quite limited, but pretty high quality. Portions are small in a similar vein to Blue Bottle and other higher-end shops.

Name: Sarutahiko Coffee atré Ebisu Westside Store
Address: Shibuya City, Ebisuminami, 1 Chome−6−1 アトレ恵比寿 西館 １階
Author: Edmund Yip
Review:
Great coffee, friendly staff and superb breakfast!

Excellent hand-dripped coffees and espresso drinks!

You must try the eggslut here! It is a satiating mix of steamed egg and mashed potato, eaten with crispy toast! And the most beautiful takeaway coffee cups in the world! Look out also for coffee beans and attractive merchandise. They open early and it's just beside Ebisu station!

Name: Coffee by Jalana
Address: 6 Chome-10-1 Ueno, Taito City
Author: Kelsi Walker
Review: Great service! Drinks came out quick. They have a great selection of hot eats along with coffee and different alcoholic drinks. We both got the Carmel latte and it’s the best one we’ve had in Tokyo.

Name: Coffee by Jalana
Address: 6 Chome-10-1 Ueno, Taito City
Author: Shannan & Christine Delawski
Review: Friendly staff and surprisingly decent espresso. Probably a medium roast, so it's not really acidic, but not burnt or bitter, either. The place is on a really busy shopping street, with  mostly outdoor seating, but a few indoor bar stools. A decent selection of imported beer, mostly European and American, some canned and others bottled.

Name: Coffee by Jalana
Address: 6 Chome-10-1 Ueno, Taito City
Author: Kendra Pietruszewski
Review: The anko and cream cheese butter sandwich was one of a kind! Served hot and crispy on the outside! Coffee was freshly-ground espresso. Friendly yet relaxed service, perfect for grabbing a casual coffee and snack - savoury or sweet!

Name: Coffee by Jalana
Address: 6 Chome-10-1 Ueno, Taito City
Author: James Barton
Review: Coffee by Jalana in Ueno, Tokyo, is a cozy spot perfect for unwinding. With a simple yet inviting menu of coffee, beer, and snacks, it's an ideal place to relax on a hot day. The casual atmosphere and prime location make it a great choice for enjoying a couple of cold beers while exploring the area.

Name: Coffee by Jalana
Address: 6 Chome-10-1 Ueno, Taito City
Author: M
Review: A great spot on the corner to relax with a coffee or enjoy one of their delicious sandwiches. The staff is very friendly.

Name: Kanno Coffee Ginza
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 5 Chome−8−9 ＢＩＮＯ ２Ｆ
Author: Daisy Tsai
Review: If you're looking for a relaxing spot to unwind after a day of shopping, I highly recommend this cozy restaurant. The food is delicious, with a menu offering a variety of flavorful dishes that cater to different tastes. The atmosphere is warm and inviting, perfect for a quiet meal or a casual gathering with friends. The staff is exceptionally friendly and attentive, making sure you feel right at home. Whether you're seeking a peaceful break or a place to enjoy a great meal, this restaurant is the ideal choice for a pleasant dining experience.

Name: Kanno Coffee Ginza
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 5 Chome−8−9 ＢＩＮＯ ２Ｆ
Author: Ja /Ja
Review: Nice ambiance, delicious food. There is a cake & coffee/tea set with a selection of cakes to choose from. We had a baked cheesecake and chocolate tarte. Very light and delicious. The tomato mozzarella pasta is awesome!

Name: Kanno Coffee Ginza
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 5 Chome−8−9 ＢＩＮＯ ２Ｆ
Author: Tony Yeung
Review: Nice quiet corner on 2nd floor in Ginza area.  Gd place to take a rest in midst of shopping where most street floor shops are full.  Coffee n cakes are gd but not excellent but the coffee presentation is kind of special .

Name: Kanno Coffee Ginza
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 5 Chome−8−9 ＢＩＮＯ ２Ｆ
Author: CR
Review: All drinks (coffee, orange juice, tea) are at least ¥1000. French toast is under ¥900 and very delicious. Comes with a side salad you can eat in one bite. French toast is gooey throughout . Came on a Tuesday at 6:00 and it was empty

Name: Kanno Coffee Ginza
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 5 Chome−8−9 ＢＩＮＯ ２Ｆ
Author: Edwin Mok
Review:
To continue our dinning experience the first 24 hours arrived from New York, we randomly picked a cafe for afternoon tea.

Ordered two desserts. Encore with another round of coffee. Photos - self explanatory.

We were seated in a booth seat by the window. Pretty nice environment and services were decent. 😋😋

Name: Key Coffee
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−4 新宿京王中地階
Author: M O
Review: I bought coffee sugar. The staff at the store were also kind.

Name: Key Coffee
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−4 新宿京王中地階
Author: おはぎ

Name: Key Coffee
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−4 新宿京王中地階
Author: 高橋忠雄

Name: Key Coffee
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−4 新宿京王中地階
Author: さいきYZR

Name: Ralph's Coffee Shinjuku
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−38−2 ルミネ新宿店 ルミネ2 1F
Author: Mart MAK
Review: A Quick service and effective by the lady at the 13th of March 2023 at 7PM. Got my cutie tumbler for bringing home to Sydney Australia 🇦🇺- Arigato

Name: Ralph's Coffee Shinjuku
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−38−2 ルミネ新宿店 ルミネ2 1F
Author: Dimitar Stanimiroff
Review: Waste of time - they don’t actually serve coffee. They only sell Ralph’s merch.

Name: Ralph's Coffee Shinjuku
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−38−2 ルミネ新宿店 ルミネ2 1F
Author: Amélie Noir
Review: Nice gifts but name is deceptive no coffee is served there

Name: Ralph's Coffee Shinjuku
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−38−2 ルミネ新宿店 ルミネ2 1F
Author: Andrew Fisher
Review: Misleading they don't actually make coffee, just sell some mugs and beans for home

Name: Ralph's Coffee Shinjuku
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−38−2 ルミネ新宿店 ルミネ2 1F
Author: Zahraa Al Hiti
Review: The best

Name: Kakuya Coffee Stand
Address: Funabashi, Nishifuna, 5 Chome−15−5 2階
Author: Nicole Wang
Review: Beautiful cafe, milk tea was so creamy and smooth! Would visit again!

Name: Kakuya Coffee Stand
Address: Funabashi, Nishifuna, 5 Chome−15−5 2階
Author: Ana Maria
Review: Great and unique place to meet and make nee friends. The owner is extremely nice and cool and his coffee is made with care and a passion. He loves his customers and his work.

Name: Kakuya Coffee Stand
Address: Funabashi, Nishifuna, 5 Chome−15−5 2階
Author: Yosh โยชิ Nak
Review: You can enjoy Brazilian deep roasted coffee slowly in a calm brown space that you can not imagine from the outside.

Name: Kakuya Coffee Stand
Address: Funabashi, Nishifuna, 5 Chome−15−5 2階
Author: No Game No Life
Review: Highly recommend coming here. Very nice barista working there. Coffee was great. I really enjoyed the atmosphere.

Name: Kakuya Coffee Stand
Address: Funabashi, Nishifuna, 5 Chome−15−5 2階
Author: robert kaleta
Review: Beautiful place, fantastic atmosphere, very good coffee.

Name: UESHIMA COFFEE LOUNGE Akasaka Hitotsugi-dori Shop
Address: Minato City, Akasaka, 4 Chome−3−2 ホテルビスタプレミオ東京[赤坂 １F
Author: AyeJayAytch
Review: Came here for breakfast on my first day in Tokyo and was very happy. The food was inexpensive, the coffee and food was very yummy. It's was very quiet.

Name: UESHIMA COFFEE LOUNGE Akasaka Hitotsugi-dori Shop
Address: Minato City, Akasaka, 4 Chome−3−2 ホテルビスタプレミオ東京[赤坂 １F
Author: K Ling
Review:
When you stay at OMO3 hotel guest upstairs, you can order from breakfast menu for OMO3 guest only. We tried the toast brick and toast with omelette and ham.
The set comes with a choice of coffee ☕️. The cafe atmosphere is nice in the morning. We enjoy it alot. Staffs are very nice and helpful.

Name: UESHIMA COFFEE LOUNGE Akasaka Hitotsugi-dori Shop
Address: Minato City, Akasaka, 4 Chome−3−2 ホテルビスタプレミオ東京[赤坂 １F
Author: Игорь Цибизов
Review:
Rude unreasonable stuff decided to push off family with kids because we want only to take 2 coffee and 1 drink for kids. We need to follow pirate rules or fet out.
Unpolite and rude.

Name: UESHIMA COFFEE LOUNGE Akasaka Hitotsugi-dori Shop
Address: Minato City, Akasaka, 4 Chome−3−2 ホテルビスタプレミオ東京[赤坂 １F
Author: Kyle Heroy
Review:
Great coffee, great service, chill environment. Not too busy when we went, but on a day we passed by it was popping!
I also went back and had a snack and a lemonade. Now, if you're American, the lemonade will kinda confuse you. I think we put too much sugar in ours haha but I still enjoyed my drink. Would return for a morning coffee to start each day if I had more time and was better at time management.

Name: UESHIMA COFFEE LOUNGE Akasaka Hitotsugi-dori Shop
Address: Minato City, Akasaka, 4 Chome−3−2 ホテルビスタプレミオ東京[赤坂 １F
Author: Bonnie Tomlinson
Review: Breakfast was a welcome treat as part of my hotel stay. The staff was very polite and accommodating. I spent many happy mornings planning my day's adventures over a delicious cup of coffee and house specialty meals. Highly recommend.

Name: Yifang Taiwan Fruit Tea
Address: Taito City, Kaminarimon, 2 Chome−18−15 ＴＳビル 1F
Author: Alisa B.
Review:
New location near Asakusa Station! Staff are friendly and quick. They also speak English with translated menus, which is very foreigner friendly.

If you need a refreshing drink, I recommend the Wintermelon Lemon Tea. The Oolong Milk Tea never fails either. I have been to several Yi Fang locations throughout the US, and the quality is on par.

Name: Yifang Taiwan Fruit Tea
Address: Taito City, Kaminarimon, 2 Chome−18−15 ＴＳビル 1F
Author: J L
Review:
I ordered a boba milk tea, as it was cold outside (well its still cold but warmer than fruit tea most of the time) and I prefer not to drink cold drinks when it is cold or raining outside.

The drink was classic, and the boba wasn’t the best. It was a bit sticky and cube like, and kind of jammed my straw.

Interior was clean and had nice comfy seats.

Service was good, I asked for napkins, and she pulled out a set of napkins and gave it to me. She was really nice.

Name: Yifang Taiwan Fruit Tea
Address: Taito City, Kaminarimon, 2 Chome−18−15 ＴＳビル 1F
Author: Ben Qu
Review: Large drink is tiny. No option for no ice unless you pay more. Less ice nonetheless has about 25 percent of the drink as ice. Ordered regular sweetness but not sweet at all. Should have known better since it was a hot day but no customers.

Name: Yifang Taiwan Fruit Tea
Address: Taito City, Kaminarimon, 2 Chome−18−15 ＴＳビル 1F
Author: Kylie Dan
Review: Yi Fang never disappoints with their fruity drinks. I got the mango fruit tea which is one of their Halloween limited edition drinks. It tasted like their classic fruit tea with some added mango purée, a wonderful combination. As usual, it comes with real fruit in it! The staff were super nice and poked the straw in the drink for me, which never happens in the US. They take credit card, which is always a plus for me.

Name: Yifang Taiwan Fruit Tea
Address: Taito City, Kaminarimon, 2 Chome−18−15 ＴＳビル 1F
Author: aki yeh
Review: Cake outside crispy, inside soft, great taste with egg and flour

Name: Pearl Lady
Address: Toshima City, Minamiikebukuro, 1 Chome−29−1 池袋ショッピングパーク南館
Author: Hungry CLS
Review: This is my favourite boba shop chain in tokyo.  Tea flavour perfect, toppings perfect.  I only tried the milk teas but I'm confident other items will b good too.  They do 4 types of milk tea, all good but I prefer Taiwan black with black sugar pearl and shiratama

Name: Pearl Lady
Address: Toshima City, Minamiikebukuro, 1 Chome−29−1 池袋ショッピングパーク南館
Author: Mo W
Review: I got a fruit tea with kiwi + strawberry chunks, with brown sugar boba. I got the recommended sweetness level. It ended up being not very sweet at all, so definitely go up in sweetness if you're looking for something sweet. The boba also did not have too much flavor, but overall the drink felt unique and refreshing, which was what I was looking for. Service was quick and kind.

Name: Pearl Lady
Address: Toshima City, Minamiikebukuro, 1 Chome−29−1 池袋ショッピングパーク南館
Author: Annemarie Rose
Review: Great quality bubble tea, nice matcha, more toppings options than other local Boba shops, and fun seasonal options! It's a bit hard to find, but it is on B1, back around the corner (so that Tobu basement level is behind you to your right) Like them on LINE for coupons!

Name: Pearl Lady
Address: Toshima City, Minamiikebukuro, 1 Chome−29−1 池袋ショッピングパーク南館
Author: Evitya Haryanto
Review: Quite long queue but staff service was fast. Tried their matcha latte with shiratama/mochi balls instead of regular tapioca balls, it was ok and affordable.

Name: Pearl Lady
Address: Toshima City, Minamiikebukuro, 1 Chome−29−1 池袋ショッピングパーク南館
Author: Nara Froz
Review:
Strongly recommend Taiwan cha with salt cream and without any additions and hot! Around 400 yen
The shop is under the streets

Name: TRUEDAN (Tokyu Plaza Ginza)
Address: 東急プラザ銀座, B2-G, 5 Chome-2-1 Ginza, Chuo City
Author: Leonard “Leo” Pak
Review: They recently moved from Shibuya Magnet 109 (in March 2023) to this new location in Ginza Tokyu Plaza (from May 2023). My spouse is a milk tea connoisseur and insists this is the best milk tea in Tokyo and I agree with her. The tea is very strong and flavorful, and they use fresh milk from Hokkaido. I highly recommend their Assam Milk Tea, their Matcha Milk Tea, and their Coffee Milk. All very delicious with strong flavor and a good caffeine boost.

Name: TRUEDAN (Tokyu Plaza Ginza)
Address: 東急プラザ銀座, B2-G, 5 Chome-2-1 Ginza, Chuo City
Author: Gator of Wall Street
Review:
Friendly staff who spoke English. As the kids had not have a cup of bubble tea for nearly two weeks, we allowed them to order one here. After all it’s a bubble tea store in japan.

The jasmine tea was fragrant and my in law ordered the 卤肉饭 and it was pretty good. Guess they prepared their food at a central kitchen so rather standard.

Name: TRUEDAN (Tokyu Plaza Ginza)
Address: 東急プラザ銀座, B2-G, 5 Chome-2-1 Ginza, Chuo City
Author: Elizabeth O
Review: I tried the assam milk tea, it was delicious. Boba was chewy and delicious. Foreigner friendly.

Name: TRUEDAN (Tokyu Plaza Ginza)
Address: 東急プラザ銀座, B2-G, 5 Chome-2-1 Ginza, Chuo City
Author: Kevin Kwok
Review: Friendly staff that spoke some English. They have many menus available in many languages for your convenience. The Thai tea was just ok, the boba was nice and chewy.

Name: TRUEDAN (Tokyu Plaza Ginza)
Address: 東急プラザ銀座, B2-G, 5 Chome-2-1 Ginza, Chuo City
Author: Nicholas Chan
Review:
For my fellow SGV 90's buddies, this place tastes exactly like Shau May restaurant (remember $1.50 styrofoam cup boba?). While I appreciate the nostalgia trip, the 700JPY shouldn't taste like $1.50 boba.

Had the assam milk tea with tapioca (which didn't taste like brown sugar boba at all)

Name: Xing Fu Tang
Address: 1 Chome-6-12 Jingumae, Shibuya City
Author: Jupiter Nguyễn
Review:
I passed this place and it looked cool, so I decided to give a try.
And yeah it didnt disappoint me at all :)) the brown sugar boba was great!! They didnt make it too sweet and you can see clearly how they prepare all the materials for it. Loved it!

Name: Xing Fu Tang
Address: 1 Chome-6-12 Jingumae, Shibuya City
Author: Andrew Todtenkopf
Review: Way tastier than I realized it would be, given I've also had a lot of boba tea in Taiwan. The burnt marshmallow stuff on top was a game changer. Really unique and delicious. Forgot it was Japan/Tokyo, so best to enjoy the tea inside the shop and finish it before moving on. There are no public trash bins along Takeshita St., so bringing the tea outside the shop is a mistake

Name: Xing Fu Tang
Address: 1 Chome-6-12 Jingumae, Shibuya City
Author: Shayla Deppen
Review: Delicious boba that my daughter got last year when we visited Japan.  She remembered it and we both enjoyed some together.  I enjoyed watching it being made.  Yum, yum so good.

Name: Xing Fu Tang
Address: 1 Chome-6-12 Jingumae, Shibuya City
Author: Lena !!
Review: I stopped at Xing Fu Tang without knowing its reputation - this is by FAR the best milk tea & boba pearls I've ever had! I had the Roasted Brown Sugar Milk Tea, and didn't realize until they started making the drink in front of me that the pearls are handmade in-store, and they're absolutely incredible. The brown sugar gets roasted on top of the drink, and you can still taste its crunch even in the drink which is something I've never had before. I was awestruck. It was fast, the prices are great, the staff are friendly and an English menu is available at the counter. The whole process was really cool but the drink itself I will never forget. Whatever you do, get a drink at Xing Fu Tang!

Name: Xing Fu Tang
Address: 1 Chome-6-12 Jingumae, Shibuya City
Author: Namasee Ganguly
Review: This has to be one of the best boba I have ever had and I have had quite some. If you are in the area and love boba, be sure to check this place out. I loved the Brown Sugar Boba Milk tea.

Name: Gong Cha
Address: Shibuya City, Udagawacho, 16−13 渋谷井上ビル 1F
Author: Ploy RU
Review: We were there almost everyday when we were in tokyo. The milk tea was delicious

Name: Gong Cha
Address: Shibuya City, Udagawacho, 16−13 渋谷井上ビル 1F
Author: tokyo joe
Review: This hidden gem is wonderful especially if the other Gong Cha store is busy with a lot of customers. This location is just a few minutes walk from the Modi store I highly recommend going to any of these locations while it is raining to get two stamps on your stamp card. The staff is so friendly and also speak good English.

Name: Gong Cha
Address: Shibuya City, Udagawacho, 16−13 渋谷井上ビル 1F
Author: Guo Rong Zhou
Review: Fast service and cute store. The most important the bubble tea was delicious!

Name: Gong Cha
Address: Shibuya City, Udagawacho, 16−13 渋谷井上ビル 1F
Author: M T
Review: Love their bubble tea. Tapiocas are always on point and the fruit teas are great and refreshing. Get it 30% sugar if you don’t like it too sweet

Name: Gong Cha
Address: Shibuya City, Udagawacho, 16−13 渋谷井上ビル 1F
Author: Sungmin Oh
Review: They don’t blend enough. I already ate a few ice cubes and there are a few more to go. If you want some ice, this place would be where you may want to visit.

Name: Chun Shui Tang Ginza
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 5 Chome−8−1, Ginza Place, B1F
Author: Nam “Sip” Quang
Review: The location is hard to find, underground B1F of the Nissan Crossing. It’s inside another place called The Bar, which you have to look for the LED sign in front of The Bar for this coffee place. If you go here using the lift accessed from Nissan Crossing, this place should be on your left right after you come out of the lift. I have the original boba tea, didn’t taste good, kinda bland for 650 yen. The atmosphere just like normal coffee place, nothing special. They only have 2 people so you have to be patient with the order.

Name: Chun Shui Tang Ginza
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 5 Chome−8−1, Ginza Place, B1F
Author: zeppe linz
Review: It was fine. Bubble tea leaves was good but the pearl could be better. Location hard to find, its beside the bar!

Name: Chun Shui Tang Ginza
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 5 Chome−8−1, Ginza Place, B1F
Author: Chanpanharith Ek
Review: Fantastic find! The Tapioca Fruits Tofu was a delight with its fresh flavors, and the Small Minced Pork Rice was savory and comforting. Cozy place with great service. A must-visit for unique and tasty eats!

Name: Chun Shui Tang Ginza
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 5 Chome−8−1, Ginza Place, B1F
Author: Winston L
Review: There were a lot of seats (5-6 tables) available and we were a party of 2 but they had us wait outside the store for 15 minutes with no explanations. Us and another group were the only ones waiting. Unacceptable in terms of punctuality and wasted our time.

Name: Chun Shui Tang Ginza
Address: Chuo City, Ginza, 5 Chome−8−1, Ginza Place, B1F
Author: Lily Chen
Review: Took them roughly about 10 mins to make three mini drinks. Drinks are not even filled up to the top, each costs 650 yen + tax. Tastes okay but definitely not worth it.

Name: Pearl Lady
Address: 1 Chome-19-1 Kabukicho, Shinjuku City
Author: Mellissa Kerry
Review: The glass window appearance it what caught our attention, because the food looked amazing. But the service here was not. I wish we spent our money somewhere else. I never give bad reviews, so I'm disappointed having to write this. We asked the last at the window making the food if she can do mine without the caramel twice because we didn't get a response and figured she might not have heard the first time. We were polite, yet got rude service in return. She still put caramel on it, despite asking if I can have it without the caramel (she was putting the contents in the middle while I was asking, so it wasn't last minute). When she handed it to me, my husband said "she was asking if she could have it without the care..." and got cut off by the lady with a big solid "no." Like what was the issue that you couldn't just hand it to me without that topping? At least I am not allergic to it, but I feel bad for anyone who is allergic to certain foods, because they will NOT care. I wish there was an option to rate no stars. The crepe cone only had 2 little scoops of icecream in it and was mostly stuffed with whip cream in the middle, so it wasn't even satisfying to eat.

Name: Pearl Lady
Address: 1 Chome-19-1 Kabukicho, Shinjuku City
Author: Derek Wu
Review:
The drink itself is good but I'd steer clear of the whipped cream. It looks nice but doesn't taste great.
You should be able to order in English.

Name: Pearl Lady
Address: 1 Chome-19-1 Kabukicho, Shinjuku City
Author: My Bui
Review: Worst crepe ever. The crepe sticked on the wrap paper that I cannot eat properly. Not to mention the taste was also not good.

Name: Pearl Lady
Address: 1 Chome-19-1 Kabukicho, Shinjuku City
Author: Dávid Kovács
Review: Good selection of  sweets. Although I'm not a big fan of the sweet red bean paste, their crepes are tasty and looks great.

Name: Pearl Lady
Address: 1 Chome-19-1 Kabukicho, Shinjuku City
Author: Keira Deane
Review: Pearl Lady is great!!! They are located in a very nice place in Shinjuku.. there’s a lot of nice restaurants and other stores right around so it is perfect to stop and grab a drink or dessert. Their chocolate tapioca pearls are the best..! I love all of their drinks and crepes. They are really friendly there always. For people who don’t know Japanese, you should be able to order well even without knowledge of the language. Their prices are really fair too, especially for Tokyo. I love them!! (〃ω〃) ありがとうございますPearl Lady！

Name: Gong Cha Shibuya Scramble Square Shop
Address: Shibuya City, Shibuya, 2 Chome−24−12 スクランブルスクエア 1F
Author: Kira Wang
Review: It has nice bubble tea lods ppl buying from them.

Name: Gong Cha Shibuya Scramble Square Shop
Address: Shibuya City, Shibuya, 2 Chome−24−12 スクランブルスクエア 1F
Author: c.
Review: Good mango smoothie but a bit too sweet since the sweetness isn't adjustable.

Name: Gong Cha Shibuya Scramble Square Shop
Address: Shibuya City, Shibuya, 2 Chome−24−12 スクランブルスクエア 1F
Author: Joe Vu
Review:
Good and tasty drinks
Nice staffs

Name: Gong Cha Shibuya Scramble Square Shop
Address: Shibuya City, Shibuya, 2 Chome−24−12 スクランブルスクエア 1F
Author: Kevin Kwok
Review: Hard to o get to this location. It's on the first floor of Shibuya scramble but you cannot get to it through the inside of the building you will have to walk around the building and under the bridge. It can get very busy with long lines.

Name: Gong Cha Shibuya Scramble Square Shop
Address: Shibuya City, Shibuya, 2 Chome−24−12 スクランブルスクエア 1F
Author: Jiramet Tassanapirom
Review: Terrible location, very hard to find

Name: Pearl Lady
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−27−10, Musashino Building, 1F
Author: David Yoshihara
Review: This was in the food court area of one of the big department stores.  We went around 7 pm on a Sunday evening, and there was a decent line.  There is not really a sitting area, and only two people preparing orders, so it was a bit on the slower side.  The drinks were fine, though.

Name: Pearl Lady
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−27−10, Musashino Building, 1F
Author: Naomi
Review: The Oolong honey milk tea with cream foam on top is amazing! The bubble is also soft and chewy. The only downside is only take away.

Name: Pearl Lady
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−27−10, Musashino Building, 1F
Author: Kotomi Asai
Review: Would not recommend tourists to come here, being Asian is bad enough here and being Japanese raised outside of Japan and equipped with little Japanese is well, sour. And I would assume the same treatment to Asian tourists. My Japanese is rusty due to being raised abroad where other languages are often used than the said language, though it's not an excuse. Due to this has attributed or at least revealed the workers' attitude to customers. Was buying milk tea and had slower reactions to understand the cashier's instruction (yes, yes I know, I'm Asian and it's easy to assume) after she handed me the receipt and the milk tea was ready, but of course I stood there spacing out as I waited for my order and lo and behold, the 3 workers, including the cashier were laughing at me, not discretely, but very obviously. And Yea, I admit my Japanese is bad alright? I don't hold Japanese citizenship but I'm of Japanese descent. Welp it's pretty obvious the people here are just having some superiority complex but eh, I ain't stopping others from coming, but just a warm reminder to tourists who are not equipped with "Japanese" Japanese and they "look" Asian has decided to buy here to avoid unpleasant experiences. (keep in mind I came here twice and yep, their behaviours were consistently bad)

Name: Pearl Lady
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−27−10, Musashino Building, 1F
Author: Jonno Senior
Review: Little hideaway pearl tea place! I was the only guy visible in the place but nonetheless a good cuppa tea. Hojicha tea latte with tapioca is a good choice. Plenty of other fruity stuff on the menu too

Name: Pearl Lady
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−27−10, Musashino Building, 1F
Author: Dixon Wong
Review: Pearl Lady seemed to have done a revamp on their branding and looks better and tastes better! It’s always been good!

Name: Gong Cha
Address: Chiyoda City, Marunouchi, 1 Chome−9−1 東京駅八重洲中央口B1F グランスタ八重洲内
Author: E D
Review: I like the various milk and plain teas at Gong Cha. I only wish their English menu were clear when choosing sugar and ice preferences. The store is located in the underground shopping of Tokyo station, next to Daimaru and can be accessed using escalators located outside the shinkansen entrance. There are plenty of seats but the place was too busy when we went on Saturday evening.

Name: Gong Cha
Address: Chiyoda City, Marunouchi, 1 Chome−9−1 東京駅八重洲中央口B1F グランスタ八重洲内
Author: Carlos HK
Review: Compared with other locations the taro milk tea was very watery. Almost no taste

Name: Gong Cha
Address: Chiyoda City, Marunouchi, 1 Chome−9−1 東京駅八重洲中央口B1F グランスタ八重洲内
Author: Bryan Wong
Review: Got the Mango Alisan Frozen with Nata de Coco and the Strawberry Alisan Tea. Great service. Helped me out with my poor Japanese speaking. Was able to get my drink and had plenty of seats!

Name: Gong Cha
Address: Chiyoda City, Marunouchi, 1 Chome−9−1 東京駅八重洲中央口B1F グランスタ八重洲内
Author: Anna Ayvazov
Review: Wow! They are so fast compared to BBT places in Canada! And the BBT is good too!

Name: Gong Cha
Address: Chiyoda City, Marunouchi, 1 Chome−9−1 東京駅八重洲中央口B1F グランスタ八重洲内
Author: free 2
Review: They have the best boba you should try the milk tea no ice max of sweetness with pearl

Name: CoCo-Toka Fresh Tea & Juice
Address: Chiyoda City, Sotokanda, 4 Chome−4−8, A-Front, 1階
Author: Gabriel Dale
Review: Great milk tea!! Tasted very good. Bought the large milk tea with pearl for 790yen but they had a 30% discount because it was raining. Able to pay by card or cash! Either way is fine. No regrets! First time trying milk tea in japan. Highly recommended for anyone who loves boba tea

Name: CoCo-Toka Fresh Tea & Juice
Address: Chiyoda City, Sotokanda, 4 Chome−4−8, A-Front, 1階
Author: Aiko G
Review:
My friend recommended this drink place to me and I love the fruit drinks! I’ve tried the passionfruit and mango tea and love both of them 🥤 Perfect for summer ☀️⛱️

You can choose the amount of ice, sweetness, and the toppings as well! If you prefer drinks that aren’t too sweet like me, opt for the 30% or 50% sugar 🫶🏻

Name: CoCo-Toka Fresh Tea & Juice
Address: Chiyoda City, Sotokanda, 4 Chome−4−8, A-Front, 1階
Author: Skye Cai
Review:
Ordered three drinks but only one was prepared.
The staff asked us to queue again which doesn’t make sense.
Ordered the passion fruit tea which is very sweet that taste like syrup.
The pearls and the jelly in it doesn’t taste good too.

Name: CoCo-Toka Fresh Tea & Juice
Address: Chiyoda City, Sotokanda, 4 Chome−4−8, A-Front, 1階
Author: J Ry Pen
Review:
Slow staff, slow service, long waiting time! That’s why you can’t compete with Gong Cha!

Your business is here in Japan so keep up with the courtesy, speed and promptness to your customer OR better yet do your business in other country!

Name: CoCo-Toka Fresh Tea & Juice
Address: Chiyoda City, Sotokanda, 4 Chome−4−8, A-Front, 1階
Author: Iris
Review: The mango tropical was sooo good I got 70% sweet it wasn’t too sweet it was perfect.

Name: Gong cha Shinjuku Southeast
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−35−6 アウンビル 1F
Author: Mary
Review: We always say if there line is not too bad, now is your chance! I prefer plain teas with boba, but they also serve fruit tea and of course, milk teas. You choose your level of sweetness—always recommend little ice and little sweet. Otherwise you lose all of the tea flavor.

Name: Gong cha Shinjuku Southeast
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−35−6 アウンビル 1F
Author: Solo Traveler
Review: It’s a tiny store front, but in Shinjuku, it’s expected. Quite congested due to the people ordering and then having to back out, then join another line to get their orders of bubble tea. Always yummy, though, so if you’re looking for a drink, then it’s worth a visit.

Name: Gong cha Shinjuku Southeast
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−35−6 アウンビル 1F
Author: Caleb W
Review: Really tasty drink. High quality. Not the best service, seemed rushed and unprofessional. It was busy though so I understood. Pretty poor atmosphere. Nowhere to stand. I’ll come back. The drink was perfect. I was happy with it.

Name: Gong cha Shinjuku Southeast
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−35−6 アウンビル 1F
Author: Chris Nicholas
Review: Awesome. Great food and good for foreigners as you can interact with an app

Name: Gong cha Shinjuku Southeast
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−35−6 アウンビル 1F
Author: Lee Lee (LeeM)
Review: Ordered from self serve terminal in English (yay!!). Free wifi and charging enabled spaces.  How awesome is that?

Name: Chun Shui Tang LUMINE EST Shinjuku Shop
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−38−1 ルミネエスト B1F
Author: Chris Jeng
Review: Hard to find, no seating, and it didn’t taste good. A canned drink from the supermarket is better. The tapioca was hard.

Name: Chun Shui Tang LUMINE EST Shinjuku Shop
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−38−1 ルミネエスト B1F
Author: あやな
Review: I got the chocolate milk boba milk! It was really delicious

Name: Chun Shui Tang LUMINE EST Shinjuku Shop
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−38−1 ルミネエスト B1F
Author: Faisal Khan
Review:
