Tea wasn’t good taste, the tea they put on there poster was not available, only some selected tea’s were available,
Waste of money not recommended,

Name: Chun Shui Tang LUMINE EST Shinjuku Shop
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−38−1 ルミネエスト B1F
Author: Angela
Review:
夜21:00にわざわざ電話で営業時間伺ってみたら22:00まで営業してると聞きまして、実際行ってみたら（21:30に注文窓口到着）、望月と言うスタッフに「ラストオーダーがもう既に過ぎてるので」と失礼な態度と言い方されました。本当にびっくりしました。わざわざ電話で確認したものの残念です。

I’m a long-time customer of their tea and go to their Taipei store every time I visit Taiwan. I was super excited to learn that they opened up a store in Shinjuku, downstairs at the Lumine. Having moved to Tokyo recently, I instantly became a regular here. The tea they serve at the Shinjuku location is pretty much spot-on and tastes almost identical to the Taipei location. One day, on a particularly hot and humid Friday night, I had an irresistible craving for their iced tapioca milk tea, but it was somewhat late (9:00 PM) so I called in just to be sure they were open. They told me they would be open as long as I arrived before their last order cutoff, which is 9:45PM. Excited (and thirsty), I rushed over from Higashi-Shinjuku and managed to make it at 9:30, only to be turned down rudely by a particularly rude staff member by the name of “MOCHIZUKI” (望月、or もちづき in Japanese), telling me that last order was already over and they wouldn’t be able to serve me. What was the point of me calling and working up a sweat to get there then? It’s so unfortunate, as I was super looking forward to having some tasty tea. SHAME ON YOU, MS. MOCHIZUKI; YOU SHOULD REALLY LEARN SOME MANNERS. I’m appalled they would even allow her to speak to customers, let alone, taint the store image with her negativity and know-it-all demeanor. I will not be returning to this location; will go to the Harajuku-Aiyana location from now on. Thank you for ruining it for me, MOCHIZUKI, I sincerely hope you learn some basic manners.

Name: Chun Shui Tang LUMINE EST Shinjuku Shop
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−38−1 ルミネエスト B1F
Author: Joseph Swernofsky
Review: Very hard to find - had to go twice - it's on level B1. Matcha soy milk tea and milk pudding. No seating but you can go upstairs.

Name: Alpaca cafe
Address: Toshima City, Ikebukuro, 2 Chome−23−1 中西ビル 1F
Author: Abby Brewer
Review: Cutest & tastiest tapioca shop in Ikebukuro area! Perfect place to grab a drink on a hot or cold day while exploring the city. The shop owner is very kind!

Name: Alpaca cafe
Address: Toshima City, Ikebukuro, 2 Chome−23−1 中西ビル 1F
Author: Nora Ti
Review: My all time favorite boba shop! The owner is super kind and uses fresh ingredients and fruits for their teas. I once had a whole lemon inside my boba. Would go there again every single day.

Name: Alpaca cafe
Address: Toshima City, Ikebukuro, 2 Chome−23−1 中西ビル 1F
Author: Jeff C.
Review: Great tea! Love the theme. No seating area, but the attendant was nice enough to let us sit on the side stools to enjoy our drinks.

Name: Alpaca cafe
Address: Toshima City, Ikebukuro, 2 Chome−23−1 中西ビル 1F
Author: Lanette Sok
Review: The tea was super delicious and made perfectly! Very nice and clean shop. Also super cute!! 💖

Name: Alpaca cafe
Address: Toshima City, Ikebukuro, 2 Chome−23−1 中西ビル 1F
Author: Kyle
Review: Best tapioca tea Iv had!! So tasty and the serving is so big! Great value! The staff was super friendly and helpful!

Name: freshy made by coco
Address: Shibuya Center-Gai, 29 Udagawacho, Shibuya City
Author: David Yoshihara
Review: We went here in the evening after our first choice was out of brown sugar boba.  Turns out that it was pretty good.  They had a decent line at around 7:15 pm on a Saturday night.  They have an A/C or something blowing heat on the line that forms at the place.  It's probably nice in the winter, but it makes for an uncomfortable wait in the summer months.  There is no dine-in option, so you have to find a place to stand and eat.

Name: freshy made by coco
Address: Shibuya Center-Gai, 29 Udagawacho, Shibuya City
Author: Abdulnaser Mohammed
Review: Indulging in Coco's 3Q Chocolate with Taro Bubble Tea was a delightful departure from the ordinary. The fusion of rich chocolate and the unique essence of taro created a harmonious symphony of flavors that danced on my palate. The chewy texture of the bubbles added an exciting twist to every sip, elevating the drinking experience. It's a refreshing departure from the usual, and I thoroughly enjoyed every moment of it

Name: freshy made by coco
Address: Shibuya Center-Gai, 29 Udagawacho, Shibuya City
Author: Bryan Yoz
Review: Familiar taste of the milk tea from CoCo; yummy boba. The cashier was friendly and sweet.

Name: freshy made by coco
Address: Shibuya Center-Gai, 29 Udagawacho, Shibuya City
Author: Sophia N.
Review: VERY RUDE PLACE! Disrespectful service, moved people out of the line for no reason. Me and my family were near the menu looking, first before the people behind us, then the server allowed the person behind us to go first. We were ready to order, waiting for almost 30 minutes. Bad customer service, unfair, and unkind.

Name: freshy made by coco
Address: Shibuya Center-Gai, 29 Udagawacho, Shibuya City
Author: Rodrigo Cardoso
Review: Best bubble tea I’ve ever had 😋💯🔝

Name: Gong Cha
Address: Taito City, Ueno, 7 Chome−1−1 3F JR東日本上野駅構内
Author: Marie C
Review:
I had a frozen strawberry almond and it was really yummy. With strawberry frappe hiding egg and almond flan😋

Will definitely ho back for more of these new products with almond milk.

There is no option for dine in😗, only take out. Totally no seating area

Name: Gong Cha
Address: Taito City, Ueno, 7 Chome−1−1 3F JR東日本上野駅構内
Author: Andy Ng
Review:
Stop the presses - Gong Cha at ecute Ueno has something I've long been wanting Japan boba shops to finally have: non-dairy milk options!

This specific shop offers a Black Milk Tea and Brown Sugar Milk Tea option with soy or oat milk, which even two years ago was something unheard of. Each drink comes to around ¥700 which is "average" if you compare it to the likes of California. My brown sugar milk tea was just as expected and I was pleased that this was something I could enjoy in Tokyo.

My previous experiences at Gong Cha's in the city have always been met with confusion by staff whenever I ask for non-dairy milk alternatives. Kudos to the team for expanding and I hope this trend continues moving forward.

Name: Gong Cha
Address: Taito City, Ueno, 7 Chome−1−1 3F JR東日本上野駅構内
Author: RHEA MENON
Review:
Tried my first bubble tea today !!!
It was yummy 🤤
It’s inside Ueno station near Uniqlo store
We had chocolate milk tea and earl grey tea 🧋

Name: Gong Cha
Address: Taito City, Ueno, 7 Chome−1−1 3F JR東日本上野駅構内
Author: Jocy Cooke
Review:
Had something called 鉄観音 フローズンティー, Tieguanyin Frozen Tea. It was really delicious and I hope I can try it again in the future! I think it is something new, so possibly might be limited.
Didn't have to wait at all for service and was quick to make.

Name: Gong Cha
Address: Taito City, Ueno, 7 Chome−1−1 3F JR東日本上野駅構内
Author: 天野ゲーマー
Review:
This is the first time I bought something like this in Japan.
Even though it’s expensive, it’s still so stingy. Although the nearby Coco is also expensive, at least it is well stocked and not opportunistic like Gong Cha.
Is it worth saving a few bucks in exchange for a disappointing and unsatisfactory experience for guests?
I will definitely share this experience truthfully in my circle of friends.
No need to improve, I won't buy it again anyway.

Name: Shinjiki Ohkubo
Address: 吉野ビル 1階, 1 Chome-17-3 Hyakunincho, Shinjuku City
Author: Manasvi Kanna
Review: We bought the mango yogurt and choco oreo boba, I think even on the max sweetness it lacked a little bit of sweetness. Overall I guess it was okey if you don't like too much sweetness. The boba is not that chewy too (I prefer them chewy) lol but yea overall 7/10

Name: Shinjiki Ohkubo
Address: 吉野ビル 1階, 1 Chome-17-3 Hyakunincho, Shinjuku City
Author: Krissyy Kraft
Review:
Tea shop close to Okubo station. Super delicious and the cutest cups the lids are shaped like bear ears!
I had the Cheese brown sugar pearl milk and it was divine. Probably the best tasting one I’ve had to date. If you’re uncertain what to get 10/10 recommend that one. It also had cookie pieces on top *chef kiss*
Staff were friendly and quick service. Will definitely be back!

Name: Shinjiki Ohkubo
Address: 吉野ビル 1階, 1 Chome-17-3 Hyakunincho, Shinjuku City
Author: Nguyệt Phong Anh
Review: The local is good. The shop looks lovely. But the drink is not my favorite. It has the price of a big city, means expensive than my favorite one in Soga for the same drink.

Name: Shinjiki Ohkubo
Address: 吉野ビル 1階, 1 Chome-17-3 Hyakunincho, Shinjuku City
Author: Hadil
Review: Of of my favorite places to get delicious bubble tea 🧋 ! their fruit tea is the best ✨ and the staff are very quick and polite .

Name: Shinjiki Ohkubo
Address: 吉野ビル 1階, 1 Chome-17-3 Hyakunincho, Shinjuku City
Author: 招财进宝
Review: The watermelon juice is so good and there are a lot of milk foam on it. This is definitely the best boba shop in Tokyo. The shop is very clean and the service is pretty nice. I really like staff there. she looks pretty cute.

Name: Gong cha Nihonbashi
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashihoncho, 2 Chome−1−1 武田グローバル本社ビル 1F
Author: Nobody GL
Review: They didn't give me a plastic bag to take out, I wondered how to hold it outside, so I asked them for a small bag (it's enough for 1 drink), and she charged me 10 yen without any receipt. I can pay more for the drink if they make me feel comfortable using their service, instead of charging for the basic thing, or they can make something small and simple for holding on hand easily (not from plastic if they keep the idea that they want to protect the environment from plastic) like a lot of brands are doing. They just make the customers feel annoyed while using their service. I don't like that kind of feeling before leaving that store. So I decided to choose some brands else which make their customers feel convenient while using their service to drink in the future instead of Gongcha.

Name: Gong cha Nihonbashi
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashihoncho, 2 Chome−1−1 武田グローバル本社ビル 1F
Author: Hiroki Iwata
Review:
I always have taro milk tea with pearl. It’s always good. It reminds me of life in Sydney as I would have the same drink at easy way...
This shop didnt have a line up whereas other shops always do.

Name: Gong cha Nihonbashi
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashihoncho, 2 Chome−1−1 武田グローバル本社ビル 1F
Author: Anna Light
Review:
It's so yummy! 💗 Service is good too, although tapioca is popular right now so had to wait in line a bit to get the drink (maybe 10min I think passed).
I got the Green Tea Gongcha drink! So good!

Name: Gong cha Nihonbashi
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashihoncho, 2 Chome−1−1 武田グローバル本社ビル 1F
Author: Mewslie
Review: One of the quiet branches of Gongcha in central Tokyo and it is in a nice area as well. Service is about the same as other branches but the queue tends to be much shorter which is nice. There are many places to sit outside in the surrounding block; it might not be so nice if it's raining. Nice walk from either Tokyo or Kanda Station.

Name: Gong cha Nihonbashi
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashihoncho, 2 Chome−1−1 武田グローバル本社ビル 1F
Author: Wild Wombat
Review: Crazy long queue with 1-2 order counters only. The wait for drink is shorter than The Alley. Waited 30min for Sunday afternoon around 4pm. Negative: No JCB card, only VISA

Name: Taiwankokutotapioka A ' LITTLE Shinjukukabukichoten
Address: 1 Chome-21-12 Kabukicho, Shinjuku City
Author: Andreea Daogaru
Review: the jasmine milk tea was really delicious and the tapioca pearls were perfect.I told her less sugar and less ice and she did it perfectly for my taste. I don't know why all the bad reviews... Ok, maybe the girl was not all smiley face, but it was late and maybe she was tired from working all day? I will come again.

Name: Taiwankokutotapioka A ' LITTLE Shinjukukabukichoten
Address: 1 Chome-21-12 Kabukicho, Shinjuku City
Author: Thompson Nguyen
Review:
We always get bubble tea everywhere we go. First bubble tea in Japan was kinda disappointment. The guy who made our bubble tea wasn’t really nice to us (foreigners) but I can understand why he would have resent towards people who have the luxury to travel vs him.

As far as bubble tea goes mine was pretty good.  I forgot what I got but I got the special drink where it was green in the middle, white on top, and boba on bottom. The green part was matcha. I liked my drink.  BUT my girl got jasmine milk tea and it twice she had some hard black plastic thing in her drink.  So that’s why this review is getting 3 stars. Im not going to give anything less because the guy probably made a mistake and everyone makes mistakes.  Get the jasmine at your own risk.  We won’t be coming back here again.

Name: Taiwankokutotapioka A ' LITTLE Shinjukukabukichoten
Address: 1 Chome-21-12 Kabukicho, Shinjuku City
Author: Calvin
Review: It was good but she didn't ask me how much sugar or ice I wanted. The texture of the tapioca is perfect. Cash and takeout only.

Name: Taiwankokutotapioka A ' LITTLE Shinjukukabukichoten
Address: 1 Chome-21-12 Kabukicho, Shinjuku City
Author: Isiah dawkins
Review: I arrived here as the shop was opening and the lady at the stand i don’t know if she was the owner or employee but she was the most rude person i’ve ever met in Japan and I’ve been here multiple times. I was so polite and waited patiently, she opened the door and didnt look at me or greet me as i stood there just ignored me and I politely asked a question and she was so angry and bothered it.

Name: Taiwankokutotapioka A ' LITTLE Shinjukukabukichoten
Address: 1 Chome-21-12 Kabukicho, Shinjuku City
Author: Dr. A Al-Zuhairi
Review: Avoid. Please avoid. Poor quality. Expensive. Please just avoid

Name: EN SHI DA JI PAI Shibuya
Address: 12-12 Udagawacho, Shibuya City
Author: Naomi
Review: I visited this place around 7 pm and no more brown sugar tapioca tea available. I just got an original Taiwanese castella. One block for ¥700 and one slice for ¥400. I recommend to orde one whole. I always wanted to try this Taiwanese castella and glad I did. The texture is similar to Japanese cheese cake but not too sweet. It goes well with tea or coffee.

Name: EN SHI DA JI PAI Shibuya
Address: 12-12 Udagawacho, Shibuya City
Author: elliza jose
Review: We only ordered one slice of taiwanese castella cake and it came out smoking hot and delicious. I can only imagine taking home one big loaf. I wish we had. So so good.

Name: EN SHI DA JI PAI Shibuya
Address: 12-12 Udagawacho, Shibuya City
Author: Justin Shircliff
Review: A nice alternative to the bubble tea scene popping up all over Tokyo. I typically like sweet tea, but the brown sugar option here was too sweet (with regular amounts of ingredients). The taste was delicious, it was just too much. I’d try it again and would say it’s worth stopping by.

Name: EN SHI DA JI PAI Shibuya
Address: 12-12 Udagawacho, Shibuya City
Author: Gregg Tavares
Review:
So against my better judgement I tried this place. It definitely fits Taiwan's preference for bland food. Their signature dish is a flattened chicken breast breaded and deep fried and then sprinkled with one of five seasonings. I tried there original flavour and their pakuchi (celantro) flavor. It tasted like bland fried chicken with salt and pepper. I tasted no pakuchi at all.

If you want fried chicken you'd be far better of going to one of the department store basement food floors a short walk away and getting Japanese fried chicken. It will be way more flavorful.

It's a large piece of chicken. You might want to split one if your ignoring my review above

Name: EN SHI DA JI PAI Shibuya
Address: 12-12 Udagawacho, Shibuya City
Author: Celine
Review: The castella (Taiwanese sponge cake) was so good. It was light and not too sweet.

Name: 龍翔堂 上野店 Ryushodo uenoten
Address: 6 Chome-11-3 Ueno, Taito City
Author: Rachel S.
Review: We ordered one medium size brown sugar pearl milk tea and strawberry milk tea, and popcorn chicken, green onion pancake and fries. However, we did not get the green onion pancake and messed up with someone else’s order. The drinks were pretty good, but the popcorn and fries were average.

Name: 龍翔堂 上野店 Ryushodo uenoten
Address: 6 Chome-11-3 Ueno, Taito City
Author: Elaine
Review: Came here for the boba … it was excellent and cheap! I got the matcha boba , the only thing was that it was sweet so I would change the sweetness level but other than that , it was worth it !

Name: 龍翔堂 上野店 Ryushodo uenoten
Address: 6 Chome-11-3 Ueno, Taito City
Author: Anonymous Capybara
Review:
I’m from Taiwan and I used to work in a milk tea shop so I can say that the bubble milk tea in this shop is really like what we have in Taiwan everyday 🥹🙏🏻
Just a little bit too sweet since I’m Taiwan we can always adjust the sweetness and ice

Name: 龍翔堂 上野店 Ryushodo uenoten
Address: 6 Chome-11-3 Ueno, Taito City
Author: Angus Macrae
Review: Best bubble tea in the area! And the scallion pancake is amazing too

Name: 龍翔堂 上野店 Ryushodo uenoten
Address: 6 Chome-11-3 Ueno, Taito City
Author: Claudio Lener
Review: As far as bubble tea goes, this was really good. A bit pricey for the size, and I wanted mine a bit less sweet, but it was good nonetheless.

Name: Chatime (Ikebukuro East)
Address: Toshima City, Higashiikebukuro, 1 Chome−40−3 池袋旗ビル1F A
Author: Magdalena Kristanti
Review:
The taste was super.

Orde L size but got my drink on the M size cup, you can see from the left side picture of my grape juice. What to do?

Name: Chatime (Ikebukuro East)
Address: Toshima City, Higashiikebukuro, 1 Chome−40−3 池袋旗ビル1F A
Author: Sophie C
Review: Love💗💗💗💗💗

Name: Chatime (Ikebukuro East)
Address: Toshima City, Higashiikebukuro, 1 Chome−40−3 池袋旗ビル1F A
Author: MyStIcNoVa Ryuu
Review: One of the best Taiwanese pearl milk tea chains, feel free to drop by

Name: Chatime (Ikebukuro East)
Address: Toshima City, Higashiikebukuro, 1 Chome−40−3 池袋旗ビル1F A
Author: Ángel Méndez
Review: Take a break and enjoy a cold drink here.

Name: Chatime (Ikebukuro East)
Address: Toshima City, Higashiikebukuro, 1 Chome−40−3 池袋旗ビル1F A
Author: Rena Fujii
Review:
✴︎Access
About 8 minutes walk from Ikebukuro Station Seibu Exit

✴︎Impressions
Chatime, a shop famous for tapioca🧋
It was open until late at night and was empty.
Tapioca, ice, sweetness, toppings, etc.
You can choose, the taste is delicious, and the taste is stable 🧡
There are many types of menu
When I went there was Maron? chestnut? but
The items inside were also sold 🌰

When I look at the reviews, there are a lot of bad reviews.
I felt that the customer service was average at all 🌸
It looked like he was busy because he was running the store by himself.

Name: Gong Cha
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−3 小田急新宿ミロード 4F
Author: Tomtam Ch
Review: In general the shop atmosphere is quite nice. There are available seats for sitting. The staffs take a very good care and manage long queues well. The bad side is that the place is overcrowded. The worst part is the bubble tea is horribly tasteless, nothing but ‘water and sugar’ 🤢🧋🤢

Name: Gong Cha
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−3 小田急新宿ミロード 4F
Author: PEACHY HAPPY
Review:
It is located at 4th floor of MYLORD Shinjuku.
A number of seats but might have many people as well. Overall, if you want to have a nice tea & short break from shopping — you may consider this tea shop ;)

Name: Gong Cha
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−3 小田急新宿ミロード 4F
Author: Pat Jirapat
Review: I really like drinking milk tea at this branch. There is a vending machine and automatic payment. And there are many flavors to choose from. There are many types of seats available for your convenience.

Name: Gong Cha
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−3 小田急新宿ミロード 4F
Author: Le Phuong
Review: Highly recomend the brown sugar bubble milk sake with salty cream foam. Soooo good

Name: Gong Cha
Address: Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1 Chome−1−3 小田急新宿ミロード 4F
Author: starlightmei
Review:
I love Gong Cha, but don’t come here in the late afternoon, as it will be full of studying students taking up all the seats.

They should have a time limit and kick people out.

Name: Yifang Taiwan Fruit Tea Shinookubo
Address: 1 Chome-3-11 Okubo, Shinjuku City
Author: Sofia V.
Review: I have been to a lot of different Yifangs mainly in London but also to the one in Stockholm. I always get the same bubble tea, therefore I can compare the quality of them very well. Somehow I felt a little let down by this one in Tokyo. The tapioca pearls were cooked for too long. I mean it was not bad but just not as good as the Yifang standard I am used to. However I‘d still recommend 8/10

Name: Yifang Taiwan Fruit Tea Shinookubo
Address: 1 Chome-3-11 Okubo, Shinjuku City
Author: Megan Wimberley
Review: Delicious tea (I got matcha latte and added tapioca, reduced sweetness and reduced the amount of ice). The inside of the shop is small but lovely and it smells nice too. Staff was friendly and drink was made super quickly

Name: Yifang Taiwan Fruit Tea Shinookubo
Address: 1 Chome-3-11 Okubo, Shinjuku City
Author: Seema Saleh
Review: For my first boba try in Japan it was pretty good! I would probably next time try a different flavor but it was still really good! Highly recommend as they made the boba super quick too!

Name: Yifang Taiwan Fruit Tea Shinookubo
Address: 1 Chome-3-11 Okubo, Shinjuku City
Author: ellen q
Review: Really good fruit tea here! There was only one worker when we went and they were super fast and polite.

Name: Yifang Taiwan Fruit Tea Shinookubo
Address: 1 Chome-3-11 Okubo, Shinjuku City
Author: Jurian
Review: Pretty good, chill atmosphere and indoor seating available

Name: Celeb Shinjuku
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 2 Chome−16−9 新宿五城ビル
Author: Edía Paff
Review: the kakigori drinks were really nice! The heart-shaped cups are obviously very cute. Would come again. The furniture feels a bit run-down, but the friendly staff makes up foe that.

Name: Celeb Shinjuku
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 2 Chome−16−9 新宿五城ビル
Author: Dominic Pearl
Review: I’m a big fan of fruit tea and this has the best I’ve tasted. The Tapioca pearls are also SENSATIONAL. A bit sweeter than normal ones, which is awesome.

Name: Celeb Shinjuku
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 2 Chome−16−9 新宿五城ビル
Author: CC
Review: Good matcha milk tea. Bubbles are soft and chewy too. Price is on the high side though.

Name: Celeb Shinjuku
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 2 Chome−16−9 新宿五城ビル
Author: E T
Review: Good atmosphere!

Name: Celeb Shinjuku
Address: Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 2 Chome−16−9 新宿五城ビル
Author: 丸隆明
Review: good taste

Name: coco都可渋谷本店
Address: 32-15 Udagawacho, Shibuya City
Author: Laurie Lebel
Review: I'm from Canada. Came to Japan and really was impressed by the size and price from coco. The large size is BIG and the price is really good!!! Delicious bubble tea 🧋

Name: coco都可渋谷本店
Address: 32-15 Udagawacho, Shibuya City
Author: Aira Rontos
Review: got a matcha pearl milktea, my friends are looking for the panda milktea but i think they dont have it here.

Name: coco都可渋谷本店
Address: 32-15 Udagawacho, Shibuya City
Author: E E
Review: I can’t go back to gongcha or other boba places in Tokyo! A lot of boba stores have been closing down these days so I’m glad you guys are still available! I love the jasmine tapioca milk tea so much! And the size is actually a large serving when you order a Large size!! I always get my drinks with the salted cheese cream as it reminds of my favorite boba milk tea in LA! It’s super fulfilling and the tapioca tastes so good! I hope you guys open more stores in Tokyo!

Name: coco都可渋谷本店
Address: 32-15 Udagawacho, Shibuya City
Author: Aris
Review: Really tasty bubble tea. I recommend it.

Name: coco都可渋谷本店
Address: 32-15 Udagawacho, Shibuya City
Author: Brian Latchman
Review: staff is sooo slow took 45mins to get order

Name: GONGCHA Beans Asagaya
Address: Suginami City, Asagayakita, 南3−36-1 ビーンズ阿佐ヶ谷 1F
Author: kiwi0359
Review:
I often stop by when going to the hospital in Asagaya.
It's right in front of the station and the store is compact, so I guess there are a lot of people taking it home.

The number of seats is about 5 or 6 tables.
It's always crowded.

I like this place because if you order hot milk tea, it will be served hot enough to kill you.

Name: GONGCHA Beans Asagaya
Address: Suginami City, Asagayakita, 南3−36-1 ビーンズ阿佐ヶ谷 1F
Author: ポンおしゃか
Review:
Due to the large number of part-time workers, product delivery is slow.
When I pointed this out, the clerk seemed to get angry for some reason. I hate people too much. Is it a child's game?
Since part-time workers are generally young children, the store should manage them to some extent.
No matter how busy they are, there are many stores that take their business more seriously. Although the exotica is an advantage, there is no particular need to choose this store.

Name: GONGCHA Beans Asagaya
Address: Suginami City, Asagayakita, 南3−36-1 ビーンズ阿佐ヶ谷 1F
Author: まんじゅうすきすき
Review:
2024/06/16 I visited at night.

I've used this store many times for mobile ordering, so I used mobile ordering this time as well.
When I place a mobile order, I'm supposed to receive a notification on LINE as soon as it's ready, but no matter how long I wait, I never receive a notification...

Although I did not receive a notification, I went inside the store and waited. I waited there, but I waited, but I wasn't called...Tears

Therefore, I went to the reception counter and called out to them, but the three female staff members were so absorbed in chatting that they didn't come over for a few minutes.
The distance between the staff behind the counter and the customers shouldn't be that far.

In the end, it seems that the tapioca itself was completed and they forgot to send the notification.

It had been sitting around for a long time since it was completed, so when I tried it after I got home, the ice was turned to mush and it was the worst tasting drink I've ever had.

Even in that condition, the taste was still delicious (though not as good as usual), so I ate it till the end. Thank you for the meal.

Talking is very good.
I also usually want part-time workers to work loosely.

However, I think there is a limit to how loosely we can work.

Thank you very much for giving me this valuable experience.

Name: GONGCHA Beans Asagaya
Address: Suginami City, Asagayakita, 南3−36-1 ビーンズ阿佐ヶ谷 1F
Author: アカツキ
Review:
Gong cha. located at Asagaya Station.
It's in a good location, so it's very easy to use.

It's easy to use, so it gets crowded at certain times of the day.

Name: GONGCHA Beans Asagaya
Address: Suginami City, Asagayakita, 南3−36-1 ビーンズ阿佐ヶ谷 1F
Author: M Hk
Review:
2022.12.29?
The attitude of the staff is cheeky.
After ordering on LINE, I closed the screen and couldn't see the order screen.

I was asked to show the screen when I received it, but I didn't even open the LINE app.

When I was looking for where it was, he said in a fit of anger that it wasn't there, but higher up.

At that point, I was already pissed and asked if I needed a receipt, and when I said I wanted it, he handed it to me and slammed it on the counter.

I like the drinks, but I won't go there anymore because the staff is so rude.

So I don't even want to give it a star٩(//̀Д/́/)۶

I asked for less sweetness, but it was quite sweet.
Even if it's gumshiro, it's better to get it later.
It tasted like matcha and was delicious.
I want it to be a little less sweet.

Name: HAPPY LEMON Seihin Seikatsu Nihonbashi Store
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashimuromachi, 3 Chome−2−1 コレド室町テラス 2F
Author: Bing-yu CHIU
Review: I went there around 4pm on Sunday, August 11, 2024. The female server at the counter was obviously not very well-trained: No greeting in the beginning, very weak voice that I could barely hear, and no "thank-you" in the end of my ordering. (I was speaking Japanese to her)

Name: HAPPY LEMON Seihin Seikatsu Nihonbashi Store
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashimuromachi, 3 Chome−2−1 コレド室町テラス 2F
Author: Chris Namer
Review:
No wait (Friday afternoon) and fast service with ample seating.

Oatmeal Milk Tea and Jasmine Tea Latte were so good. Black Tea Latte was tasty and boba was perfect.

Name: HAPPY LEMON Seihin Seikatsu Nihonbashi Store
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashimuromachi, 3 Chome−2−1 コレド室町テラス 2F
Author: Cep Garcia
Review: Jasmine tea with salty cheese, no sugar and less  ice is recommended.

Name: HAPPY LEMON Seihin Seikatsu Nihonbashi Store
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashimuromachi, 3 Chome−2−1 コレド室町テラス 2F
Author: D. D. (D2)
Review: Thank you for being patient with our large party! You were very careful to get our orders correct

Name: HAPPY LEMON Seihin Seikatsu Nihonbashi Store
Address: Chuo City, Nihonbashimuromachi, 3 Chome−2−1 コレド室町テラス 2F
Author: Edward
Review: Salty cheese chocolate shake - yum!

Name: Pearl Lady Shimokitazawa
Address: Setagaya City, Kitazawa, 2 Chome−26-24 オーブ井部
Author: Ema Alatini
Review: A solid boba spot with good flavored taro boba. I’m not a big fan of Gong Cha’s flavor or price point so this was a surprising find. It’s a cute spot and the service was very fast.

Name: Pearl Lady Shimokitazawa
Address: Setagaya City, Kitazawa, 2 Chome−26-24 オーブ井部
Author: R
Review: I got a frozen ramune boba, it was cheap and really delicious. Perfect for summer. Like a slush puppy!

Name: Pearl Lady Shimokitazawa
Address: Setagaya City, Kitazawa, 2 Chome−26-24 オーブ井部
Author: Tokyo Addicted
Review:
It’s good! I’m not a bubble tea/ boba fan but they have good products here! Crepes too.
Orange and mango are very good. It’s fun to get the colorful tapioca too.

Name: Pearl Lady Shimokitazawa
Address: Setagaya City, Kitazawa, 2 Chome−26-24 オーブ井部
Author: S
Review: If you are looking for good milk tea with boba, this is the place to go. I visit here every time I come to Shimokita. They have a wide variety of milk tea and all are very tasty and reasonable price. Other boba places in Tokyo have watery milk tea and cost like double :/ Love this place.

Name: Pearl Lady Shimokitazawa
Address: Setagaya City, Kitazawa, 2 Chome−26-24 オーブ井部
Author: Y T
Review:
I used it for eating while walking.
It is now a crepe and tapioca shop.
Mainly takeout.
Adding tapioca to the drink is
I definitely don't recommend it if you're full.
I would like to be able to choose without tapioca.
Credit card payment is possible.

Name: Chun Shui Tang Omotesando
Address: Shibuya City, Jingumae, 4 Chome−28−11 クレール・ミキ
Author: serene tham
Review: All the food was delicious. Very good service attitude

Name: Chun Shui Tang Omotesando
Address: Shibuya City, Jingumae, 4 Chome−28−11 クレール・ミキ
Author: GOLDEN
Review: Milk tea has no tea profile whatsoever. They shouldn't say they represent Taiwan and that they invented the first cup of Boba. Many other Boba places taste better. Service was great and is a nice rest spot.

Name: Chun Shui Tang Omotesando
Address: Shibuya City, Jingumae, 4 Chome−28−11 クレール・ミキ
Author: Norah Plasschaert
Review: We bumped into this place while shopping. The food is amazing and the jasmine tea was heavenly. Ordering is easy with the QR code. The bathroom is exceptionally clean. The service was great and the price as well!

Name: Chun Shui Tang Omotesando
Address: Shibuya City, Jingumae, 4 Chome−28−11 クレール・ミキ
Author: Gladys Houwen
Review: A bit overrated tbh. The queuing system was unclear. Bubble tea was nice but noodles were average. The beef was chewy. Portion size was rather small. The rice dumplings actually tasted better. I would only go again for bubble tea when there is no queue

Name: Chun Shui Tang Omotesando
Address: Shibuya City, Jingumae, 4 Chome−28−11 クレール・ミキ
Author: Aulia Listiyadhi
Review: Went there and ordered milk tea. It costs 600 JPY. Service is relatively quick. It is too sweet for my taste but thankfully the tea aroma is strong so kinda make up for it. I hope they could put some option to make it less sugar or no sugar though.

Name: Gong Cha
Address: Minato City, Daiba, 1 Chome−7−1 アクアシティお台場 3F
Author: Haruko Kogiso
Review: Quite crowded on weekends. Near the entrance of the building. Student ID can be used for discounts!

Name: Gong Cha
Address: Minato City, Daiba, 1 Chome−7−1 アクアシティお台場 3F
Author: Eloy
Review: So good!! Best tapioca tea/balls i’ve ever tried! Next to rainbow bridge, perfect setting. Just great! おいしかった！😊

Name: Gong Cha
Address: Minato City, Daiba, 1 Chome−7−1 アクアシティお台場 3F
Author: Jack Liu
Review: Tried a couple of bubble tea spots in Japan. This is the best one. This place is in Aqua City in Odaiba and has a very long and slow-moving line. I'm from Hawaii where you get your boba QUICK. Not sure why it takes so long to get your order taken. Got the black milk tea. The screen shows the menu in multiple languages. Staff is friendly. If you want bubble tea in Japan, come to this chain.

Name: Gong Cha
Address: Minato City, Daiba, 1 Chome−7−1 アクアシティお台場 3F
Author: Robert Zabihi
Review:
Best bubble tea I've had. I ordered the milk froth green tea (speciality) really good the milk froth is tangy and a little salty . The tea is sweet great combo.

My GF had a taro tea. Also very nice. Probably best bubble tea I've had.

Name: Gong Cha
Address: Minato City, Daiba, 1 Chome−7−1 アクアシティお台場 3F
Author: Shuan
Review: These guys want to be the Starbucks for [bubble] tea, but they better work more on the ambience of their place if they want to be a match for Starbucks.

Name: Happy Lemon Shinjuku
Address: 1 Chome-1-4 Nishishinjuku, Shinjuku City
Author: Jolene Lim
Review:
Freshly Squeezed Lemon Honey Black Tea was so good, we revisited on the same evening itself! This drink was so refreshing on a hot day.

It is a small kiosk, but the staff are so friendly! While the price is not the lowest, it was such a good and unique drink.

Name: Happy Lemon Shinjuku
Address: 1 Chome-1-4 Nishishinjuku, Shinjuku City
Author: l p
Review: The place is only for takeout. First time trying cheese tea and I was skeptical of the hype, but it was actually good. I tried milk tea because, of all the variants, I felt that cheese and milk would probably be the least adventurous. I will try one of the wilder options next time. As is with most Taiwanese tea places, you can adjust the amount of ice and sugar. They accept some mobile payments.

Name: Happy Lemon Shinjuku
Address: 1 Chome-1-4 Nishishinjuku, Shinjuku City
Author: Mariana Muzquiz
Review: Delicious bubble tea, we order the milk tea with normal sugar and it was perfect. We spoke no japanese but they were very friendly and explain everything to us so we could order.

Name: Happy Lemon Shinjuku
Address: 1 Chome-1-4 Nishishinjuku, Shinjuku City
Author: Arunothia Marappan
Review: The drinks we tried: Jasmine Tea with Salted cream and brown sugar boba with milk tea were both average. Service was very quick and friendly though 👍🏽

Name: Happy Lemon Shinjuku
Address: 1 Chome-1-4 Nishishinjuku, Shinjuku City
Author: Su Gi Chandran
Review: Had the salted cheese milk tea with pearls. Cost 648Y (pearls and cheese are 100Y each). Pearl texture is good. Milk tea and cheese didn't taste that good together, but the milk tea was decent. Queue wasn't long on a weekend afternoon.

Name: BullPulu (Kawasaki Azalea)
Address: Kawasaki, Kawasaki Ward, Ekimae Honcho, 26-2 126 川崎地下街アゼリア B1 デリチカゾーン
Author: Vivian L
Review: Inside the Delichicka among other food kiosks. Decent tapioca milk tea for reasonable price (¥350). Sweetness is adjustable, pearls are not hard, nicely soft & chewy. Because there’s not another boba (bubble tea) specialty place in the area, I recommend this one.

Name: BullPulu (Kawasaki Azalea)
Address: Kawasaki, Kawasaki Ward, Ekimae Honcho, 26-2 126 川崎地下街アゼリア B1 デリチカゾーン
Author: Kenjiro Y
Review:
This Burupuru is hidden on the bottom floor (b1f) of the Azeria shopping center.  For some reason does Douhuas and they are the best.  Light flavoring and plenty of tofu.

The workers aren't the most friendliest compared to others but they take their time to make the goods and I've stopped by a few times.

Name: BullPulu (Kawasaki Azalea)
Address: Kawasaki, Kawasaki Ward, Ekimae Honcho, 26-2 126 川崎地下街アゼリア B1 デリチカゾーン
Author: Dee Karsan
Review: Good place, soy milk ones are nice. Got the strawberry (bit sweet) and matcha. Would go again. Quite filling too.

Name: BullPulu (Kawasaki Azalea)
Address: Kawasaki, Kawasaki Ward, Ekimae Honcho, 26-2 126 川崎地下街アゼリア B1 デリチカゾーン
Author: Sonika
Review: I had chocolate milk tea which was delicious.

Name: BullPulu (Kawasaki Azalea)
Address: Kawasaki, Kawasaki Ward, Ekimae Honcho, 26-2 126 川崎地下街アゼリア B1 デリチカゾーン
Author: R. Mar
Review: Great place for Boba but a little hard to find without any directories or directions.

Name: Gong Cha atré Kichijoji Shop
Address: Musashino, Kichijoji Minamicho, 1 Chome−1−24 アトレ吉祥寺 本館 1F
Author: 菊本ケイリー
Review: i’m absolutely addicted to mango alishan tea it’s soo good. it is a bit pricey and ive never had another problems with the service, even when busy. but the one thing is THE LINES ARE SO LONG. especially on weekends. if you go on weekends i suggest ordering with mobile order online (details are on the gong cha website). skips the lines.

Name: Gong Cha atré Kichijoji Shop
Address: Musashino, Kichijoji Minamicho, 1 Chome−1−24 アトレ吉祥寺 本館 1F
Author: Kenny Huang
Review: Busy location with constant line ups. About 4-5 staffs working so it didn't take so long to get our drinks. 8 seats for customers to sit. Our drinks were pretty good.

Name: Gong Cha atré Kichijoji Shop
Address: Musashino, Kichijoji Minamicho, 1 Chome−1−24 アトレ吉祥寺 本館 1F
Author: Lydia Pincott
Review: A classic! I got the cold black milk tea with milk foam. Loved the milk foam, super addition. Delicious ☺️

Name: Gong Cha atré Kichijoji Shop
Address: Musashino, Kichijoji Minamicho, 1 Chome−1−24 アトレ吉祥寺 本館 1F
Author: 민경재 (Jae)
Review: Double tapioca pearls make me so happy.

Name: Gong Cha atré Kichijoji Shop
Address: Musashino, Kichijoji Minamicho, 1 Chome−1−24 アトレ吉祥寺 本館 1F
Author: 信義小紅帽
Review: The size is large... But, the ices are huge....

Name: ナインティー（九茶）早稲田店 ninetea waseda
Address: Shinjuku City, Babashitacho, 62 武道家の隣
Author: H. Matsuda
Review: This is the good stuff. Staff are nice. There are standing tables but no seats in the store, so you will likely do a take away.

Name: ナインティー（九茶）早稲田店 ninetea waseda
Address: Shinjuku City, Babashitacho, 62 武道家の隣
Author: Lucia Šikulová (Lucyfer)
Review: I have been coming to this bubble tea store for 6 months now, and it is the best bubble tea I've ever had. My personal recommendation is the Lemon Green tea with Grass Jelly 50% sugar. Properly sour! Yum. The staff is also very kind and patient. Thank you

Name: ナインティー（九茶）早稲田店 ninetea waseda
Address: Shinjuku City, Babashitacho, 62 武道家の隣
Author: Christian Thorenfeldt
Review: I had the matcha tea with brown sugar bubbles. It was delicious. I will be coming back!

Name: ナインティー（九茶）早稲田店 ninetea waseda
Address: Shinjuku City, Babashitacho, 62 武道家の隣
Author: Oskar MoreeZ
Review: Best and cheapest bubble tea in Tokyo. I highly recommend Oolong Milk Tea.

Name: ナインティー（九茶）早稲田店 ninetea waseda
Address: Shinjuku City, Babashitacho, 62 武道家の隣
Author: An Trần Hà
Review: The shop is small but the matcha bubble tea is great.

Name: Dipper Dan
Address: Toshima City, Higashiikebukuro, 3 Chome−1, サンシャインシティ 専門店街アルパ B1
Author: P P
Review: Something so simple yet so delicious!! The staff was very efficient.  Order in one line pick up at another line!  The crepes had the right amount of thickness and sweetness and combined with the toppings makes you beg for more after just one bite!!  The price is awesome!!! The fruits were fresh, the cream was smooth, the custard was mild yet flavourful and the ice cream adds a great texture to it all! Additionally they have BUBBLE TEA!! I ordered the mango which was sweet and refreshing (should have asked for little ice but didn’t know how to ask for that in Japanese). If you consider crepe, line up right away as it gets BUSY and the seating area is very limited.  First time trying crepe and was not disappointed!  Loved it!!

Name: Dipper Dan
Address: Toshima City, Higashiikebukuro, 3 Chome−1, サンシャインシティ 専門店街アルパ B1
Author: sam fisher
Review: A good place for a quick snack & drink. Nice place with the color ambience very cool & attractive to eyes. Location is easy access inside a famous mall in ikebukuro.

Name: Dipper Dan
Address: Toshima City, Higashiikebukuro, 3 Chome−1, サンシャインシティ 専門店街アルパ B1
Author: Angela Yang
Review: On the 9th, 19th and 29th of every month all crêpes in store are ¥300. You will not find crêpes for cheaper anywhere else. I recommend you to take advantage of this, as their crêpes are absolutely delicious! However, there does tend to be long queues on those days of the month. The right queue is for paying and taking orders, and the left queue is for collecting your crêpes. They make the crêpes so expertly right in front of you I didn't even feel bored while lining up! Just be sure not to film/take photos of the staff, as the sign states. There's also seats within the store, although these are limited.

Name: Dipper Dan
Address: Toshima City, Higashiikebukuro, 3 Chome−1, サンシャインシティ 専門店街アルパ B1
Author: Kin Cheung
Review: One of the better place for crepes with fresh fruits! There’s always a line waiting.

Name: Dipper Dan
Address: Toshima City, Higashiikebukuro, 3 Chome−1, サンシャインシティ 専門店街アルパ B1
Author: James Brown
Review: Make sure to go on the 9th, 19th or 29th of the month. They have a ¥300 special on all Crepés.

Name: Nonara Pearl (2nd floor)
Address: 1 Chome-11 Jingumae, Shibuya City
Author: Neil Cabato
Review: Got the berry milk tea and it was really good. Service was fast and efficient. They had chairs but it was basically a long thin bench hidden behind the counters. The sides have tables, they should have placed chairs too. One of the reason why people buy is because they are tired from walking and want to rest a bit.

Name: Nonara Pearl (2nd floor)
Address: 1 Chome-11 Jingumae, Shibuya City
Author: Vo Hana
Review: The most decadent soy milk I've ever had. I must find this brand again. I NEED IT.

Name: Nonara Pearl (2nd floor)
Address: 1 Chome-11 Jingumae, Shibuya City
Author: Masagama Hayashi
Review: I ordered a cup of Matcha milk tea without ice or sugar, and I didn't ask before ordering. I came back to buy it because I had tasted it before and thought it was good. This time, the salesperson was a very young Japanese girl, and the service was poor and she didn't admit any mistakes. I don't want to come back in the future with such an attitude.

Name: Nonara Pearl (2nd floor)
Address: 1 Chome-11 Jingumae, Shibuya City
Author: JR
Review: I asked to add tapioca to the soymilk I ordered (paying extra of course) but the staff refused. It makes no sense when tapioca is a topping that you can add to the drinks for 80 yen. Terrible service

Name: Nonara Pearl (2nd floor)
Address: 1 Chome-11 Jingumae, Shibuya City
Author: Kroline Lccia
Review:
If you’re an Aficionado of bubble tea… You should go here!
Nice store to take a tiny break around LaForet Harajuku, free wifi and USB charge is available too^^*)

Name: Mian Tea Nippori
Address: Arakawa City, Higashinippori, 6 Chome−57−9 エクセレントⅡ 1階
Author: Summer Hello
Review:
The best milk tea + matcha latte in the town.
The taste is amazing like no other and the people are very kind. And the shop is very clean.

Name: Mian Tea Nippori
Address: Arakawa City, Higashinippori, 6 Chome−57−9 エクセレントⅡ 1階
Author: Joaquin Ramas
Review: Mint tea was fantastic, was a foreigner and was truly welcomed in here. Recommend for all :D

Name: Mian Tea Nippori
Address: Arakawa City, Higashinippori, 6 Chome−57−9 エクセレントⅡ 1階
Author: Eric K
Review: Extremely friendly staff and a wonderful atmosphere. The tea and coffee are fantastic. It's the perfect spot to unwind and relax.

Name: Mian Tea Nippori
Address: Arakawa City, Higashinippori, 6 Chome−57−9 エクセレントⅡ 1階
Author: Ji Hyuk Kim
Review:
First time I came here I ordered 2 milk teas. Both were very good. 5 stars. The next time it was a hot day so I ordered a fresh grape smoothie. They gave me a semi cold grape juice with a little foam floating on top. 850 yen for grape juice. Definitely not worth it. Not coming back.

I came back. Their desserts are awesome and i finally re tried a grapefruit smoothie. Was much better. Upgraded 2 more stars.

Name: Mian Tea Nippori
Address: Arakawa City, Higashinippori, 6 Chome−57−9 エクセレントⅡ 1階
Author: Audrey Chin Quan
Review: My favourite Taiwanese dessert is served here. Not too sweet like some other places. Loved it.

Name: タピオカ専門 烏煎道黒龍茶 川崎店
Address: Kawasaki, Kawasaki Ward, Ogawacho, 18-16 真美ビル 1F
Author: bebi
Review: Ordered from uber eats, nothing like the picture. Has no option to make it warm, nor no ice. Taste was ok, presentation was disappointing.

Name: タピオカ専門 烏煎道黒龍茶 川崎店
Address: Kawasaki, Kawasaki Ward, Ogawacho, 18-16 真美ビル 1F
Author: Wあずき
Review: Although the store is a little far from the station, I'm glad I went there. I ordered purple sweet potato milk tea and sea oyster mochi. Everything was delicious.

Name: タピオカ専門 烏煎道黒龍茶 川崎店
Address: Kawasaki, Kawasaki Ward, Ogawacho, 18-16 真美ビル 1F
Author: こゆ
Review: I was curious about the signboard, so I tried the purple sweet potato milk tea! The tapioca was chewy, not too sweet, and delicious, and I drank it down quickly! There are many other delicious-looking menu items that I would like to visit again! They also sell chicken and cheese balls, and they looked delicious!

Name: タピオカ専門 烏煎道黒龍茶 川崎店
Address: Kawasaki, Kawasaki Ward, Ogawacho, 18-16 真美ビル 1F
Author: 獲練増田ー
Review:
The price is cheap among tapioca-type products, and I like the taste the best around here.
I'm grateful that it's open until late at night, which is very useful.

Name: タピオカ専門 烏煎道黒龍茶 川崎店
Address: Kawasaki, Kawasaki Ward, Ogawacho, 18-16 真美ビル 1F
Author: おりば
Review:
I've eaten tapioca in a lot of places, but it was the most delicious.
In particular, the chewy feel of the tapioca is the best, neither too hard nor too soft.
What surprised me was that the hojicha (I ordered the hojicha tapioca one) contained hojicha powder (?), making both the taste of the drink and the tapioca delicious.
If you like tapioca, please try it!

Name: 台湾タピオカ BoBa Tea
Address: 2 Chome-7-19 Kamishinjo, Nakahara Ward, Kawasaki
Author: Shal McG
Review: The boba here is very good, reminds me of how it should be! If you have been to Taiwan or China you would know. I really like how they use real fruit and the drinks are nice and creamy. They also have stamp cards which is nice.

Name: 台湾タピオカ BoBa Tea
Address: 2 Chome-7-19 Kamishinjo, Nakahara Ward, Kawasaki
Author: DAGU CHING LONG
Review:
the best Tapioca juice shop I have ever visited in Nakahara area!
I bought a lot of Tapioca juice and it was tasty! I'll buy Tapioca juices here over and over again!

Name: 台湾タピオカ BoBa Tea
Address: 2 Chome-7-19 Kamishinjo, Nakahara Ward, Kawasaki
Author: Sabrina Jensen
Review: Fast and delicious! Also you can adjust the sweetness of your drink which is amazing!

Name: 台湾タピオカ BoBa Tea
Address: 2 Chome-7-19 Kamishinjo, Nakahara Ward, Kawasaki
Author: Ryan Su
Review: Not as good as expected, the taste of milk tea seems to be using cream instead of actual milk, so it’s not my taste.  Also, taro ball has no taste as well, will probably not buy again…

Name: 台湾タピオカ BoBa Tea
Address: 2 Chome-7-19 Kamishinjo, Nakahara Ward, Kawasaki
Author: K
Review:
The best bubble tea shop around here. Highly recommended.
The staffs are friendly and kind.
I like them.

Name: アルパカ茶屋渋谷店
Address: 26-6 Udagawacho, Shibuya City
Author: Celine Tan
Review: I’ve come here all the time for months just to get some GOOD boba. The lychee tea or seasonal fruit teas are really good (and the boba itself). It’s nice that there is a large size and a regular size. It’s located in an ally near Don Quixote; the neon sign helps point it out. Other places just don’t hit the way this one does. I’ve come here at least 10 times within 3 months.

Name: アルパカ茶屋渋谷店
Address: 26-6 Udagawacho, Shibuya City
Author: Jen Seto
Review:
I stumbled upon this place looking for bubble tea one night and I was not disappointed. I tried both the Shibuya Milk Tea and the Alpaca Milk Tea and preferred the Shibuya one. The Alpaca Milk Tea was a bit too floral for my liking.
I liked this place so much I came back 4 times out of my 8 night stay. Service was excellent, quick, and friendly. The staff used a scale to measure the ingredients so the tea was perfect every time I got it.
I will definitely come back the next time I'm in Tokyo.

Name: アルパカ茶屋渋谷店
Address: 26-6 Udagawacho, Shibuya City
Author: Hnin Wutt Yii Aung
Review: As a Tokyo boba expert, the taste from Alpaca cafe is in my all time Top 3. So many options for caffeine free as well. Mango milk is my favorite, so I kept coming back.

Name: アルパカ茶屋渋谷店
Address: 26-6 Udagawacho, Shibuya City
Author: Larissa
Review: Very good service! Bubble Tea is nice too 👍🏼 recommend this place :)

Name: アルパカ茶屋渋谷店
Address: 26-6 Udagawacho, Shibuya City
Author: Coby Simon
Review: The staff was really nice to English speaker. Drink was enjoyable. Located right off the main road. I liked the llama decorations.

Name: BAMI NHEM NHEM 小岩店(バミーネムネム)Bánh mì Việt Nam
Address: Edogawa City, Nishikoiwa, 5 Chome−1−22 相國第2ビル
Author: Quyền Đức
Review: Last time I ate bread here a few times and it was very delicious, but now I bought 2 special portions, filled with a few pieces of melon and meat, completely different from previous times.

Name: BAMI NHEM NHEM 小岩店(バミーネムネム)Bánh mì Việt Nam
Address: Edogawa City, Nishikoiwa, 5 Chome−1−22 相國第2ビル
Author: Minh Nguyễn

Name: BAMI NHEM NHEM 小岩店(バミーネムネム)Bánh mì Việt Nam
Address: Edogawa City, Nishikoiwa, 5 Chome−1−22 相國第2ビル
Author: Thế Anh Nguyễn

Name: BAMI NHEM NHEM 小岩店(バミーネムネム)Bánh mì Việt Nam
Address: Edogawa City, Nishikoiwa, 5 Chome−1−22 相國第2ビル
Author: Thủy Tiên Phạm

Name: Me Tea 武蔵新城店
Address: Kawasaki, Nakahara Ward, Kamishinjo, 2 Chome−8−22 ｢ミツイビルディング/1F｣
Author: Sholes K
Review:
Good Bubble tea
Have a wide range of choices
Seating options is very limited
A bit pricy but good taste
Good for takeout

Name: Me Tea 武蔵新城店
Address: Kawasaki, Nakahara Ward, Kamishinjo, 2 Chome−8−22 ｢ミツイビルディング/1F｣
Author: h, kao
Review:
I heard that it had opened recently so I went there!
There are many types and toppings, so I recommend it!
I ordered the brown sugar pomegranate juice with nata de coco added, and the jasmine milk tea with my favorite Senso jelly instead of tapioca!
Is the clerk also Taiwanese? He was kind and did his best to serve customers carefully (*^^*) I had a good impression!
It's good because it's empty on weekday mornings!
We also had strollers, so there were some people with children! In the evening, there are many high school students! I think there will be a line on Saturday and Sunday! It contains a lot of tapioca and is very delicious, and the tea is also delicious! As expected, there are only authentic people doing it.
All items are 20% off until June 16th, and you can also get a 10% off ticket that can be used during the period, making it a great deal! It can be used up to 3 times, so if you go during the period you can drink tapioca at a great price! It's very nice that you can drink it for less than 500 yen even with toppings (*^^*) I will go every day during the discount period
On rainy days, it’s nice to get one free topping ☺️

Name: Me Tea 武蔵新城店
Address: Kawasaki, Nakahara Ward, Kamishinjo, 2 Chome−8−22 ｢ミツイビルディング/1F｣
Author: 梅村和
Review: Brown sugar tapioca milk tea very delicious. The restaurant is run by a Taiwanese person and has a counter style restaurant with tables in the back. It has a lot of tapioca and is very generous.

Name: Me Tea 武蔵新城店
Address: Kawasaki, Nakahara Ward, Kamishinjo, 2 Chome−8−22 ｢ミツイビルディング/1F｣
Author: 箱田有花
Review:
This is a shop where the tapioca is chewy and delicious.
Brown sugar tapioca milk contains milk as it is and is rich. You can also change the sweetness depending on your mood that day.
The ice is just right this summer because if you use it normally, the ice will stop by the time you finish drinking.
The brown sugar mango juice was also delicious without the brown sugar getting in the way.
It seems like they'll be starting a stamp card service soon, so this is a shop I'll likely be frequenting along with another tapioca shop at the north exit.

Name: Me Tea 武蔵新城店
Address: Kawasaki, Nakahara Ward, Kamishinjo, 2 Chome−8−22 ｢ミツイビルディング/1F｣
Author: MAYO S
Review:
I ordered brown sugar tapioca milk.
You can choose from a variety of flavors, as well as ice and sweetness. The drinking space inside the store was spacious and clean!

Name: 16tapi 新宿東口駅前店
Address: 3 Chome-24-4 M2F Shinjuku, Shinjuku City
Author: Dylan Yuen
Review: Im not sure why this place is rated quite negatively, because I highly recommend this place. The staff were friendly and the drinks were quick to come. I got the fruit mix, with my friends getting the brown sugar milk tea and the yuzu drink. Overall, we all enjoyed the drinks a lot. Also, quite cheap! 550 yen (5.50AUD) for medium-size drinks which was really great! Only downside would be that the tapioca was slightly undercooked. Otherwise a great experience!

Name: 16tapi 新宿東口駅前店
Address: 3 Chome-24-4 M2F Shinjuku, Shinjuku City
Author: Joki W
Review: Think the other reviews are unwarranted. The drink was nice, staff was friendly and helpful and the shop is quite cool. It is very small though, only two seats. Has charging outlets, my goto place for a recharge pitstop while in Shinjuku.

Name: 16tapi 新宿東口駅前店
Address: 3 Chome-24-4 M2F Shinjuku, Shinjuku City
Author: Anthony.A
Review:
I always come here on my trips to Japan, especially after a long day when I come back to shinjuku I leave the train station and this is my first stop.

Staff are always friendly and accommodating for me being English.

Highly recommended and will always come back.

Name: 16tapi 新宿東口駅前店
Address: 3 Chome-24-4 M2F Shinjuku, Shinjuku City
Author: Jess Chu
Review: Tried their #2 which was the Soy Milk Blueberry Smoothie. It was okay. I wasn’t too impressed tbh.

Name: 16tapi 新宿東口駅前店
Address: 3 Chome-24-4 M2F Shinjuku, Shinjuku City
Author: J Shaw
Review: I ordered brown sugar tapioca, the drink was very watery. Maybe they watered it down because it was only 160 yen.

Name: 茶度-CHADO-小岩店
Address: 7 Chome-26-21 Minamikoiwa, Edogawa City
Author: Skye Callaghan
Review: The owner is a lovely man, he's super patient and understanding with foreigners! The tea is excellent as well!

Name: 茶度-CHADO-小岩店
Address: 7 Chome-26-21 Minamikoiwa, Edogawa City
Author: エビアッコ
Review:
It was delicious the first time I tried it, so I came back again. When I entered the store, there was no one there, and the woman who came out a while later was unfriendly. Ordered mango milk, strawberry milk, and matcha milk.
It was ready in about 5 minutes, but it looked thin as it was already mixed... As expected, everything is thin. Tapioca is also hard.
The store is dark and dirty, so I wouldn't go there again if I could.

Name: 茶度-CHADO-小岩店
Address: 7 Chome-26-21 Minamikoiwa, Edogawa City
Author: ニブルス
Review:
I often stop by after work and the refreshing menu items are delicious, so I always shop here when I'm in Koiwa.
A Chinese man was always working the cash register, and he was very polite and fast.
I don't know if he quit, but since I haven't seen any male staff anymore, I've been taking a lot of irregular holidays.
From there to China? There was a female staff member who was unable to communicate with me, so much so that I couldn't even understand the Japanese she was ordering from. It takes more than 5 minutes at the cash register because people make mistakes when checking out. This time it took about 30 minutes from the time I arrived to the time I left.
I can't speak Japanese well, I'm a newcomer, and there are things like Uber, so I understand.
However, I think a certain level of language ability, cashier handling, and drink preparation speed are required.
I can tolerate it a few times. It takes more than 20 minutes almost every time. As expected, I couldn't resist this time and wrote a review. It's a shame because it tastes good. There are times when the trash cans are full and overflowing, so I'm concerned about that.
Wouldn't it be better to re-educate them as a whole?
I think it would be better to make the menu readable and audible.
I'm not going for the time being.

Name: 茶度-CHADO-小岩店
Address: 7 Chome-26-21 Minamikoiwa, Edogawa City
Author: 樋口貴子
Review:
Currently my favorite tapioca in Tokyo
It's a shop.

Reasonable price, tapioca
The flavor is strong and delicious.

There are many types, and there are many in the store.
The interior is also cute.

Does the waiter always drink right away?
After that, I drink it. That being said
He even went out of his way to give me a straw.
I think the service is very considerate.
I always think so.

Maybe it will close this fall.
I heard that I couldn't do it, so I took the trouble to find it.
I feel sad even though it's a shop.

By all means, once you drink it, it will be delicious.
A shop you can understand. I love tapioca
Recommended! Everyone please come
Let's support local business!

Milk tea is delicious. This time
Warabi mochi and almond milk tea too
I'd like to try it.

Name: 茶度-CHADO-小岩店
Address: 7 Chome-26-21 Minamikoiwa, Edogawa City
Author: taddy
Review:
[Official Twitter information as of May 25, 2023: Closing has been decided] This is a shop located about 30 seconds walk from JR Koiwa Station. It may be a little difficult to find as the store is in a hidden location.
I had hot Jasmine milk tea M size ¥450.
The milk in the tea has a rich and sweet taste similar to Fujiya's Milky, and combined with the scent of jasmine, the overall taste is very sweet. Even though it's not too sweet, it's still delicious! The tapioca pearls are large and sweet, and even the medium size was very satisfying.
It is a wonderful shop with a chic and stylish interior that resembles a cafe. I thought it was a bit of a shame that the location was difficult to get into.
I was recommended by a friend and just after I started going there, it was decided to close, which is a shame. It will be a while, but I hope you enjoy it. Thank you for the meal!

Name: 一芳台湾水果茶 吉祥寺店
Address: 1 Chome-3-9 Gotenyama, Musashino
Author: Mia Yang
Review: I ordered a hot green tea and I received a boiling hot green tea, It’s extremely hot, I burned my fingers when I tried to hold the cup. The owner doesn’t seem to care when I told her. Terrible service.

Name: 一芳台湾水果茶 吉祥寺店
Address: 1 Chome-3-9 Gotenyama, Musashino
Author: Yu-Han Yang
Review: I ordered boba milk tea with grass jelly but it came with no boba. Not sure what's going on.

Name: 一芳台湾水果茶 吉祥寺店
Address: 1 Chome-3-9 Gotenyama, Musashino
Author: みぃみぃ
Review:
The shop is located near the entrance of Inokashira Park from the Gotenyama side, so it is very conspicuous. I've always passed by this place, but I wasn't in the mood for Starbucks, so this was my first time using it.

There are so many menu items that it's hard to choose! The menu is easy to understand with colorful gradations depending on what's in it, but in reality, the food is mixed with a lid on and you have to use a straw to stick it in, so it didn't really stand out.

It's generally delicious, and although it's a drink stand, there are a few tables, which is nice, but I think the price is a bit high. I would like to repeat it if it were a little cheaper.

Name: 一芳台湾水果茶 吉祥寺店
Address: 1 Chome-3-9 Gotenyama, Musashino
Author: Allypapa0629
Review:
There are many shops in Kichijoji that sell Taiwanese products, but I think this one is a hit.
Speaking of ``Yipfang'', as the store name says ``Taiwan water fruit tea'', it is a fruit tea, but this time I ordered the hot taro latte and azuki bean latte.

You can choose the sweetness, and even if you choose normal, it's not overly sweet, so it has a very gentle taste. The taro was chopped into small pieces, and the sweetness of the taro was well blended into the tea, making it very delicious. The Azuki Latte is similarly sweet, and is recommended hot when it's cold.

In addition, there is ``Taiwanese Karaage Yokohama Chicken Pei'' next door, but the back of the store is connected, and one employee was managing the two stores. I bought chicken soup next door and ate it inside with my latte.

Name: 一芳台湾水果茶 吉祥寺店
Address: 1 Chome-3-9 Gotenyama, Musashino
Author: Hana Coli
Review:
A restaurant I love, no matter what I drink, it's delicious.
Fruits are especially the best
The store staff are also kind and I love them.
I want it to last forever.

Name: MAX SEE（マックスシー）川崎店
Address: Kawasaki, Kawasaki Ward, Nisshincho, １−15, Kawasaki Nikko Hotel Bldg., １階
Author: Jackie Tells
Review: Best Tea in Kawasaki so Far!!! It's big and the cheese foam which i really liked was just the way I wanted it to be. Generous serving! Belonged in my top 2 best milk tea places if you really liked that cheesy foam on top of your tea😉 jackietells.com

Name: MAX SEE（マックスシー）川崎店
Address: Kawasaki, Kawasaki Ward, Nisshincho, １−15, Kawasaki Nikko Hotel Bldg., １階
Author: Cathy M
Review: I have been here 3 times in the past 1-2 months. The tapioca is always chewy with a good texture, and the sugar level is just right (I get 少なめ). Even though I order 普通ice, it is always on the light side, so if you want a regular amount of ice I would recommend you ask for 多い. Overall I am happy with the drinks and service.

Name: MAX SEE（マックスシー）川崎店
Address: Kawasaki, Kawasaki Ward, Nisshincho, １−15, Kawasaki Nikko Hotel Bldg., １階
Author: S K
Review:
This is the worst cheese form tea I have ever tried.
And the quality of the tea is not good neither.

Name: MAX SEE（マックスシー）川崎店
Address: Kawasaki, Kawasaki Ward, Nisshincho, １−15, Kawasaki Nikko Hotel Bldg., １階
Author: M Y
Review:
We are quietly operating inside the Nikko Hotel building, which has become lonely due to many closed stores. We use signs and posters to announce that we are open so that you won't forget our presence.

The amount of tapioca is large and it stays at the bottom even after you finish drinking the drink, so you can enjoy it to your heart's content. Compared to other stores, the tapioca is large, soft, chewy, and delicious. You can choose the amount of ice, but personally, I think it's better to use less, as the drink gets thinner midway through.

I also tried cheese foam, but it didn't have the punch of cheese. To experience it better, try 31 Ice Cream's Strawberry Cheesecake in a shake.
However, the level of tapioca drinks is high.

Name: MAX SEE（マックスシー）川崎店
Address: Kawasaki, Kawasaki Ward, Nisshincho, １−15, Kawasaki Nikko Hotel Bldg., １階
Author: Lilith Lee
Review:
Of the two milk teas I ordered at UBER, one of the tapioca pearls was very hard. When I looked closely, I ordered regular ice, but there was no ice, and even though I ordered less sweet, it tasted like normal sweetness.
The other one had regular ice, and the tapioca was soft as usual.

Isn't this something you made earlier? At least it's highly likely that it wasn't made on the spot.

When I ordered it, it was delivered very quickly (1-2 minutes). Huh? That's what I thought when it arrived and I tried drinking it, only to find out that they had only made one cup.

What, I can understand if it's rice, but tapioca will be hard, right? Moreover, there is no ice and the sweetness is different, isn't it strange? Do they do something sneaky because it's Uber? ?

Name: 好茶 戸越銀座店
Address: 1 Chome-6-21 Hiratsuka, Shinagawa City
Author: P.Thanataon Golf
Review: I ordered with Uber Eat and I love how they were well packed and all the packaging design. The BOBO Tea is also good and I also love Red Lovers.

Name: 好茶 戸越銀座店
Address: 1 Chome-6-21 Hiratsuka, Shinagawa City
Author: Kathy Wan
Review: Got their normal boba milk tea and was surprised at how good the milk tea tasted like the ones you get in Taiwan!

Name: 好茶 戸越銀座店
Address: 1 Chome-6-21 Hiratsuka, Shinagawa City
Author: intan meidiawati
Review:
Purchased several menu items here.
But tonight I bought the brown sugar BOBO flavor, which has a very low amount of sugar. Usually it's just the right sweetness, but now it's not sweet.
I often buy here and it's always delicious. Please improve the way the female employees work and the service. If you take it home, it's better to cover it with tape. Isn't that how it usually works? I have purchased here 3 times. A woman responded. I was very dissatisfied with the system and service.

Name: 好茶 戸越銀座店
Address: 1 Chome-6-21 Hiratsuka, Shinagawa City
Author: T C
Review:
The shop had a cute atmosphere. There is only a tripod chair and a built-in desk, but when it's crowded I think you can enjoy the experience at your leisure.
The wrapping for carrying around is also cute.
The specialty of this place is that most of the drinks are fruit-based.

However, some of the essential tapioca was soggy and it didn't taste as good as Delone.
The amount of tapioca is also small unless you add it for 100 yen. You can't even choose the amount of ice. You cannot choose sweetness other than milk tea type. No foam milk either.

Name: 好茶 戸越銀座店
Address: 1 Chome-6-21 Hiratsuka, Shinagawa City
Author: Y Suzu
Review: I ordered it at a delivery store, but the actual product was different from the photo and was so bad that I was fooled. Both the potato garden and the tapioca were extremely tasteless. In a sense, it's amazing how Taiwanese sweets were made to be so mysteriously tasteless, so if you want to try it, please do!

Name: 700cc台湾タピオカ
Address: 1 Chome-26-7 Takadanobaba, Shinjuku City
Author: Mark Carter
Review: My bubble tea was just milk…

Name: 700cc台湾タピオカ
Address: 1 Chome-26-7 Takadanobaba, Shinjuku City
Author: Thanawat Chaidee
Review: The guy who selling he quit being upset to those who don’t understand Japanese as well even here is Takadanobaba where are so many foreign student.

Name: 700cc台湾タピオカ
Address: 1 Chome-26-7 Takadanobaba, Shinjuku City
Author: J.
Review: Good drinks, very yummy!

Name: 700cc台湾タピオカ
Address: 1 Chome-26-7 Takadanobaba, Shinjuku City
Author: 爱吃的福猪猪
Review: I happened to pass by a 700cc milk tea shop, and since I was tired from shopping and was thirsty, I ordered two cups of milk tea with watermelon milk cap and poplar nectar. I didn't expect it to be so surprisingly delicious! In particular, the watermelon in the watermelon milk cap is fresh and fragrant, and goes perfectly with the milk cap. The poplar nectar sago was chewy and the mango was sweet and fragrant, which I really liked.

Name: 700cc台湾タピオカ
Address: 1 Chome-26-7 Takadanobaba, Shinjuku City
Author: CYONチョン
Review:
I have tasted more than half of the varieties, and the Lemonade of this restaurant is the best because the boss or the sisters in China make it very well every time, so they keep coming back.

Point: When I bought it today, although it looked like two ladies from other countries were visiting the store (I saw the domestic delivery boy talking to them only in Japanese), it was the same as wanting to hang out.
Who knew that the first sip I took was just boiled water. There is no lemon syrup that is usually available, and the lemon slices seem to be unsqueezed. This time it is really terrible.

Also, the service of the two ladies needs a lot of improvement. It's not about the bad attitude, it's about the order of making drinks and cashiering.

Thoughts: Next time my brothers and sisters in China are not here, I will have no choice but to buy something else to try.

Name: 善茶
Address: Arakawa City, Higashinippori, 5 Chome−52−6 日経商事日暮里ビル 1階
Author: 柊みどり
Review:
It's delicious and the price range is a little low!
I ordered the brown sugar tapioca milk.
It was served within about 5 minutes of ordering.
However, there is an additional 50 yen for hot food on the menu.
I want you to write it down. This time it was explained verbally.
The store clerk is not a native Japanese speaker.
Honestly, sometimes I can't hear what they're saying.

The size and texture of the grains are good, and it is a true brown sugar tapi.
If you order it normally, brown sugar tapioca milk with ice cream costs 480 yen.
It's cheap to cut a coin with brown sugar tapi and raw milk (like Oaso).

This is a cheap and delicious restaurant.
Recommended for brown sugar tapi lovers. I will repeat,
I think I'll order it with ice cream next time.

Name: 善茶
Address: Arakawa City, Higashinippori, 5 Chome−52−6 日経商事日暮里ビル 1階
Author: ry ma
Review:
I ordered the oolong milk tea with tapioca.
It took a while to be served, but it was very delicious and the price was reasonable, so I would like to use it again soon. I was impressed by the staff's courteous customer service. thank you very much.

Name: 善茶
Address: Arakawa City, Higashinippori, 5 Chome−52−6 日経商事日暮里ビル 1階
Author: yishien wu
Review: The taste is not much different from the one in Taiwan. M size 390 yen is also good.

Name: 善茶
Address: Arakawa City, Higashinippori, 5 Chome−52−6 日経商事日暮里ビル 1階
Author: ヴラディスラフ
Review:
I had to wait 15 minutes for a Frappe even though there was no one else there.
The taste was also bad, so I think it's better not to go there even if you're on a whim.

Name: 善茶
Address: Arakawa City, Higashinippori, 5 Chome−52−6 日経商事日暮里ビル 1階
Author: 禇文豪
Review: The taste is okay

Name: SAN CHA ISSEI 三茶一生
Address: Shinjuku City, Babashitacho, 7−7 林ビル 1F
Author: Suteishi Ro
Review: They are not consistently open. I like to come buy some groceries but don’t know their store hours. The milk tea is strong though.

Name: SAN CHA ISSEI 三茶一生
Address: Shinjuku City, Babashitacho, 7−7 林ビル 1F
Author: Levi Li
Review: It’s really delicious and tasty. It’s a fabulous milk tea store.

Name: SAN CHA ISSEI 三茶一生
Address: Shinjuku City, Babashitacho, 7−7 林ビル 1F
Author: suwast y
Review:
Their signature product is tapioca drinks, but the store also sells Chinese ingredients, and the atmosphere was originally focused on selling ingredients to Chinese compatriots.
Although the shop is small, there is an eat-in space where you can relax and have a drink inside.
Drinks had a wide selection of toppings. This time I used mango milk with aloe topping. The milk was also thick and delicious.

Name: SAN CHA ISSEI 三茶一生
Address: Shinjuku City, Babashitacho, 7−7 林ビル 1F
Author: Keisuke Tajima
Review:
I drank mango milk with less sweetness and no toppings.
There was almost no mango taste.
It tastes like drinking diluted condensed milk.
It was very sweet even though it wasn't very sweet.

Name: SAN CHA ISSEI 三茶一生
Address: Shinjuku City, Babashitacho, 7−7 林ビル 1F
Author: dev男
Review:
I ordered milk foam black tea (with Senso jelly) and lemon green tea.
A matte cup and a cute label.

Name: 禾葉（カバ）タピオカ専門店
Address: Yokohama, Naka Ward, Isezakichō, 3 Chome−107 Niビル 2階
Author: Dahédrey Payandi-Rolland
Review: We discover this little coffe shop on Google map and went there for some refreshing drinks. The shop is cute and cozy, the barista was really nice and tried to explain the menu to us even though he didn't speak English. Sadly for the shop but hopefully for us, there was not so many people when we arrived.  Cold drinks were just delicious and size portions generous.

Name: 禾葉（カバ）タピオカ専門店
Address: Yokohama, Naka Ward, Isezakichō, 3 Chome−107 Niビル 2階
Author: Julia Raftery
Review: Lovely fresh drinks, cute space, and helpful service! Worth a stop!

Name: 禾葉（カバ）タピオカ専門店
Address: Yokohama, Naka Ward, Isezakichō, 3 Chome−107 Niビル 2階
Author: ジョかか
Review: nice

Name: 禾葉（カバ）タピオカ専門店
Address: Yokohama, Naka Ward, Isezakichō, 3 Chome−107 Niビル 2階
Author: 猫神みい
Review:
Momoko Sakura Yogurt Smoothie 750 yen
A tapioca cafe located in Isezaki Mall.
The gentle color scheme gives you a sense of fashion and nature, making you feel at ease.
The small items placed there are also cute.
The menu is extensive and attractive.
Sakura Momoko is a yogurt flavored with cherry blossoms.
It also contains something that looks like a small peach jelly.
The sherbet taste is quite weak, probably to make the jelly easier to drink.
It almost makes me feel refreshed.
When you think of it as a smoothie, tastes seem to be divided.
I really like the Momo Mango Double.

Name: 禾葉（カバ）タピオカ専門店
Address: Yokohama, Naka Ward, Isezakichō, 3 Chome−107 Niビル 2階
Author: 木村理平
Review:
The atmosphere of the shop was very cozy and the staff were very kind.

I especially recommend their extensive menu and great taste. With so many flavors to choose from, you'll always find a new favorite.

Bimichabo has plenty of facilities for the convenience of our customers, including comfortable seats and free Wi-Fi. It's a great place to spend time talking or studying with friends.

Name: Tiktea
Address: Itabashi City, Oyamacho, 47−6 アーク大山ビル
Author: AO
Review:
Is it reasonable because the quantity is larger than other stores? It was delicious.
The tapioca was also chewy and not hard.
This is my favorite tapioca shop in Daisen, but unfortunately it's a bit far from the station so I can't go there often.

I understand that the store is not a place to relax, and I wonder if it is run by a Chinese company. That's how I feel about the service.
I think it makes up for that because the cost performance is good.

When I went there for the first time in a while, I was surprised to see Douhua. I thought Ikebukuro was the only place near me, so I'd like to order it next time.

Name: Tiktea
Address: Itabashi City, Oyamacho, 47−6 アーク大山ビル
Author: どらあみ
Review:
There have been tapioca drink shops in Yusa for a long time, but in the past few months, tapioca drink shops have been popping up in Oyama. When I was thinking of going to Shigezo, I was surprised to see this store next door.
The clerk is of Taiwanese descent and doesn't seem to understand difficult Japanese.
The large size is around 650 yen, which is the same strong price range as in the city. The menu is extensive. The tapioca itself is quite sweet and soft. The drinks are also sweet. However, the sugar had a good effect on my tired head from the intense heat.

There is a mochi shop next door across from Shigezo, which I like, but at 100 yen for a mochi and 650 yen for a tapioca drink, it makes me think that anyone can buy a tapioca shop.

Name: Tiktea
Address: Itabashi City, Oyamacho, 47−6 アーク大山ビル
Author: さすらいのanzutann
Review:
This is a tapioca shop that I often go to since it's in my neighborhood.The tapioca is always chewy and delicious.
In the winter, there are many hot items on the menu, but there are also discount menus that change daily, so it's a good deal, and it's fun to try different flavors!

The raw peaches and bananas are also delicious!

Name: Tiktea
Address: Itabashi City, Oyamacho, 47−6 アーク大山ビル
Author: NYN
Review: I ordered milk tea at UBEREATS, but I don't have a straw, so please tell me how to drink it!

Name: Tiktea
Address: Itabashi City, Oyamacho, 47−6 アーク大山ビル
Author: nicora
Review: I always drink this tapioca with UberEATS! It's so delicious that I wish they would open stores outside of Oyama.

Name: 一茶 One Tea 小岩店
Address: 1 Chome-23-12 Nishikoiwa, Edogawa City
Author: S M
Review:
Personally, I like the taste.

At first, I was surprised by the staff's bad attitude.
Thank you for keeping me waiting, what I don't have is basic customer service lol
When it's finished, I'd probably say something like, ``Sorry for keeping you waiting,'' but I just leave it on the counter without saying a word, and I'm busy washing the dishes, no matter if the customer comes to pick it up or not.
I'm a timid person, so I used to go home feeling depressed even though I bought tapioca, but I've gradually gotten used to it lol
This is not the type of customer service you would expect in Japan, but this is what the local store clerks were like when I was in China, and I wonder if it would be like this if they were not Japanese.

Name: 一茶 One Tea 小岩店
Address: 1 Chome-23-12 Nishikoiwa, Edogawa City
Author: makoto miyazawa
Review: I ordered the newly released Lemon Passion Soda. One size for 620 yen. For those who want to drink it wholeheartedly, it might be best to have more ice. The taste is just as you would expect.

Name: 一茶 One Tea 小岩店
Address: 1 Chome-23-12 Nishikoiwa, Edogawa City
Author: 初音みくおみ
Review: There is no parking lot, but there is an eat-in space. There are many restaurants like this, so I had a certain idea about the taste, but I personally liked the sweetness and taste.

Name: 一茶 One Tea 小岩店
Address: 1 Chome-23-12 Nishikoiwa, Edogawa City
Author: Shinichi S.
Review:
Tapi is available at One Tea, located just outside the north exit of Koiwa Station in Edogawa Ward, Tokyo. Black milk tea L @ 580 yen.

Just by walking around, I found several tapioca shops in Koiwa. However, I wonder if tapioca can be sold in such a funky part of Tokyo as Koiwa. I was able to finally buy this after waiting in line for several hours at a popular store in Harajuku and Omotesando! Isn't it better to do that?

I mean, tapioca has already become popular for about the third time in my life, so what's the point of being grateful for starch made from cassava rhizomes? That's the story. On days when I reconstitute starch (carbohydrates) with brown sugar water and then add caramel toppings to my milk tea, it's already a calorie incarnation.

I have no idea what's so good about it, but yeah, it's pretty tasty.

#Tokyo #Tokyo #Edogawa Ward #Koiwa
#Tapioca #Tapioca milk tea
#Issa
#Black milk tea #Instagrammable #photogenic #tapiru #unexpectedly delicious

Name: 一茶 One Tea 小岩店
Address: 1 Chome-23-12 Nishikoiwa, Edogawa City
Author: 庄绪栋（Freeman）
Review: Visit this milk tea shop often. Most of the food made by the staff are delicious, but the taste made by the recent lady wearing black-rimmed glasses is really different from the food made by the other staff. I hope the store can give her more training.

Name: ナインティー赤羽店 NINETEA(九茶) Akabane
Address: 1 Chome-20-5 Akabaneminami, Kita City
Author: N L (ナタリア)
Review: This is probably my favorite bubble tea shop in Japan. It’s an independent shop, the staff is friendly and the quality is great. Unlike other bubble tea shops it doesn’t taste like mostly milk. SUPPORT SMALL BUSINESS - not huge brands.

Name: ナインティー赤羽店 NINETEA(九茶) Akabane
Address: 1 Chome-20-5 Akabaneminami, Kita City
Author: Octavio Silva
Review:
It was near my house, so I popped in and it was perfect, with the sweetness and deliciousness that I like.
I have a sweet tooth that attracts people (for example, I put 3 sticks of sugar in my coffee), but it's sweet enough to make it 100% sweet.
Even if other tapioca shops set the sweetness to max, there are many places where I can't taste the sweetness at all because I have a sweet tooth, so the 100% sweetness here is really delicious 😋
My husband also likes it and wants to come here often, so as long as we live in Akabane, we plan to use it a lot.
I haven't seen many tapioca shops lately, so I hope they don't close. Thank you.

I've seen some opinions that there is an additional charge for tapioca, but most other tapioca shops charge an additional charge, and the tapioca toppings here come in quite a large amount, so I'm very satisfied!

Name: ナインティー赤羽店 NINETEA(九茶) Akabane
Address: 1 Chome-20-5 Akabaneminami, Kita City
Author: mi ma
Review:
This store is easily accessible within walking distance from Akabane Station.
Tapioca drinks, jasmine tea, green tea, lemonade, etc.
A wide variety of drink menus.
The menu is rich in variety and delicious.
The price is also reasonable.
Although it is not large, it is possible to eat in.
This is a store I would like to visit again.

Name: ナインティー赤羽店 NINETEA(九茶) Akabane
Address: 1 Chome-20-5 Akabaneminami, Kita City
Author: YUKA
Review:
As everyone has said, it's more delicious than the tapioca shop inside Ecute! It's ︎.
The egg tart is also warm and crunchy.
