Big ups to the lady's that take pride in their work and thank you so much Aneeqah! You are a star ✨

Name: Ben's Bubble Tea Blue Route Mall
Address: Shop 53A, Blue Route Mall, okai Rd, Tokai, Cape Town
Author: Liz “Toxic_Mercy” Marinus
Review: Great customer service, vibes was great all of them were happy Cheerful and laughing all round. I got myself a matcha milk tea. It was very delicious but don't recommend if you dont like grass tasting drinks. Would 100% recommend the restaurant exp was great.

Name: Ben's Bubble Tea Blue Route Mall
Address: Shop 53A, Blue Route Mall, okai Rd, Tokai, Cape Town
Author: Najuwah
Review: Second time going here. Amazing bubble tea. The staff is friendly and the service is quick. Small seating area would've been nice if there were more space to sit. The kids love the experience of bubble tea, so bring the whole family. The kiosk is clean and a bit hidden if you are not aware. I say they should move up to the food court where there's more space and seating. Definitely recommend trying

Name: Ben's Bubble Tea Blue Route Mall
Address: Shop 53A, Blue Route Mall, okai Rd, Tokai, Cape Town
Author: C De Jager
Review: I’m a bubble tea connoisseur and their brown sugar bliss was really good! The boba was very fresh. It would be nice to see the staff wearing gloves for sanitary reasons because it appears to be a very hands-on process and with winter coming a lot of people are sick. I asked for my milk tea to be cold as I saw Ben’s Bubble Tea now offers both hot and cold and the staff member I was talking to was very confused as to why I was specifying cold and insisted that they only serve cold. Would appreciate a friendlier approach from staff but otherwise really nice milk tea :)

Name: Live Mart Bakery Cafe
Address: 13 Printers Way, Marconi Beam, Cape Town
Author: Robbi Ferreira
Review: Such a good experience. So much variety and lovely staff. They have Boba and food as well and can recommend what to choose based on what you like.

Name: Live Mart Bakery Cafe
Address: 13 Printers Way, Marconi Beam, Cape Town
Author: Johanna Vermeulen
Review: Fast, affordable and friendly people. I do recommend them

Name: Live Mart Bakery Cafe
Address: 13 Printers Way, Marconi Beam, Cape Town
Author: Atarah Rass
Review: Only one of the people know anything about what they're selling - like ability to give advice - but they're super friendly, they're more affordable than most of the other Asian markets, they have great hours and food is yummmmmy. Less sugar option on drinks is still quite sweet.

Name: Live Mart Bakery Cafe
Address: 13 Printers Way, Marconi Beam, Cape Town
Author: Yolanda Herrendoerfer
Review: The restaurant's food is warm and delicious. It's the perfect lunchtime meal.  The service was quick.

Name: Live Mart Bakery Cafe
Address: 13 Printers Way, Marconi Beam, Cape Town
Author: Jelena Jerling
Review: This place has the absolute best bubble tea ever! They also have a very lovely selection of snacks and bakery goods. Amazing selection of food to choose from. Highly recommended to go here and grab some asian food.

Name: Susu
Address: The Pumphouse, 6 Dock Rd, Victoria & Alfred Waterfront, Cape Town
Author: gustav gabel
Review: Very nice bubble tea

Name: Susu
Address: The Pumphouse, 6 Dock Rd, Victoria & Alfred Waterfront, Cape Town
Author: Widaad Daniels

Name: Susu
Address: The Pumphouse, 6 Dock Rd, Victoria & Alfred Waterfront, Cape Town
Author: Rafàh Lutta

Name: Cape Sun Sushi Asian Cuisine Bubble Tea
Address: The New National Hotel Building ZA, Voortrekker Rd, Parow East, Cape Town
Author: Larry Wayne Cupido
Review: This was one our favorite places to get sushi. It was always really good and prepared well. The last two times I ordered it was not as expected at all. The first time it was bad I thought okay might just be a isolated incident. Possibly the sushi guy was not there and someone had to stand in but now again... this is not the standard that attracted me to buy.

Name: Cape Sun Sushi Asian Cuisine Bubble Tea
Address: The New National Hotel Building ZA, Voortrekker Rd, Parow East, Cape Town
Author: Thato Daumas
Review:
The place is okay but the furniture could be updated. The decor is very simple with some Chinese objects like fans and such.

I ordered the passion fruit and lemon 🍋 bubble tea. It was tasty and flavourful. I didn't eat anything because of my dietary restrictions.

Name: Cape Sun Sushi Asian Cuisine Bubble Tea
Address: The New National Hotel Building ZA, Voortrekker Rd, Parow East, Cape Town
Author: Joleen Witbooi
Review: Ordered platter E for supper last night. Tasty and fresh sushi, would have liked the rice to be slightly softer but overall happy with the sushi. Platter includes chicken and veg spring rolls which were very nice. Will be back to try the rest of their menu.

Name: Cape Sun Sushi Asian Cuisine Bubble Tea
Address: The New National Hotel Building ZA, Voortrekker Rd, Parow East, Cape Town
Author: Jacques louw
Review: Ordered sushi here a few times before. Was always good. Yesterday’s was not the same. Ordered platter E. Portion sizes were a lot smaller and not all the pieces were included as per the menu. Lady also dismissed this when asking about the missing pieces. Would not recommend.

Name: Cape Sun Sushi Asian Cuisine Bubble Tea
Address: The New National Hotel Building ZA, Voortrekker Rd, Parow East, Cape Town
Author: Maojing Zhang
Review: Amazing food!love it 😍 I love sushi and so does my five-year-old daughter! This is a good choice🥰

Name: The Coffee Lounge
Address: Manhattan Suites and Conferencing, Century City, Cape Town
Author: Sinazo Hoyi
Review: Never coming here again. It failed us. Got a hyperli deal to try this place and I regretted it after 5 mins. They could not safely accomodation my 1 year old and the food was basic. Their desserts are not bad and the waitress was very friendly but the manager that was there on that Saturday sucked.

Name: The Coffee Lounge
Address: Manhattan Suites and Conferencing, Century City, Cape Town
Author: Tarrin Loxton
Review:
I have been wanting to try this restaurant for some time, the last time I paid it a visit was when it was still inside the Crystal Towers Hotel.

The decor inside is rather nice, great for birthday lunches, babyshowers etc.

The service was great! Staff were friendly ,helpful and attentive.

The scones and coffee we had were delicious.

The menu... I do feel could do with a bit more of a variety, but that is merely my opinion.

The only negatives I really have is the walk to the bathroom on the carpeted floors, whilst the bathroom itself is nice and clean, the carpets on the walkway to get there really don't smell great and the lights close to the beautiful cherry blossom ceiling display flicker and it was really bothering my eyes however if you have your back to them it seems to not bother you

All in all a great experience!

Name: The Coffee Lounge
Address: Manhattan Suites and Conferencing, Century City, Cape Town
Author: yasin khan
Review:
Poor service, confused waiters and average food.
Arrived at 14:50 and the place was not unusually busy. Upon ordering, they discovered they have no rooibos... Surely inventory is checked the day before or the morning at least.
Anyways, we put in the order for drinks, main meal and desert. The food arrived as follows:
1) Coffee at 15:10 that's 20 minutes to make coffee.
2) followed by desert at 15:20 for cake which was already on display I'm still confused and also why should I eat desert first. Oh and by now the coffee was cooling down....
3) finally the main meal, a salmon bagel which I ordered at 14:50 , this arrived at 15:30 when the waiter said they don't serve it after 15:00....
So I already had finished my coffee and half of the desert by the time the bagel arrived. Below average size for the price but great presentation.
Would I go here again? Seriously doubt it. They need to jack up training on staff. The original waiter who took the order was also nowhere to be seen and I had to chase the bits of my order down with passing waitresses and waiters

Name: The Coffee Lounge
Address: Manhattan Suites and Conferencing, Century City, Cape Town
Author: L
Review:
Was my first time visiting, the service was good👍

The food was tasty. However, the portion sizes varied, and some were unexpected🙃

I would say its well suited for celebrating birthdays with close family and friends.

The array of dessert treats was delicious and well presented 👌

The environment was calm and relaxed😌 quite fancy 😎 a bit pricy, but worth a try.

You might just end up finding your new 'spot'

They are not halaal anymore, though, because they serve alcohol😔

Name: The Coffee Lounge
Address: Manhattan Suites and Conferencing, Century City, Cape Town
Author: Fehrzaana Karbelkar
Review:
Since my review they have become an online only food establishment.
The restaurant in its place is not fully halaal.

I had crumb chicken samosas which were nice. The cappuccino was yummy. The peppermint pudding dessert was jelly like it was rather  off putting.  The place itself was lively and noisy but to be fair it was busy.

Name: Susu Bubble Tea Sea Point
Address: 277 Main Rd, Sea Point, Cape Town
Author: Fayhoon Faisal
Review:
Love this branch of Susu 😍🩷 The only one opening up to a very late time 🙌🏻
Thanks a lot 💐keep up the good work🫡

Name: Susu Bubble Tea Sea Point
Address: 277 Main Rd, Sea Point, Cape Town
Author: Melissa Herman
Review: Susu is such a great addition to the Adelphi Galleria. My go-to is the standard milk tea with pearls. Zero sugar is needed because the pearls are quite sweet. I wish they had a Matcha milk tea option with pearls on their menu. It would be great if they traded longer hours over a weekend.

Name: Susu Bubble Tea Sea Point
Address: 277 Main Rd, Sea Point, Cape Town
Author: Stephen Frank
Review:
1st time at this establishment. What a huge DISAPPOINTMENT 😞. Service was appalling, the lady had absolutely no interest in helping or assisting.
We were the only customers and she ignored us for about 4 minutes continuing with menial tasks instead of assisting us.

Name: Susu Bubble Tea Sea Point
Address: 277 Main Rd, Sea Point, Cape Town
Author: Farrid Chiwoniso
Review: 1st time at this establishment. What a huge DISAPPOINTMENT 😞.  Service was appalling,  the lady had no interest in helping or assisting. Ordered Drinking "YOGURT" But got the most watery Drink. Nothing about the YOGURT was YOGURT,  just plain tea/ flavored water. Asked the lady if that was indeed YOGURT and she just showing any interest or anything said yes. NOT ON 👎🏾

Name: Susu Bubble Tea Sea Point
Address: 277 Main Rd, Sea Point, Cape Town
Author: Chrismonia Voko
Review: I had my favourite treat of all time. Tasty Taro Milk tea 🧋 Vegan option and 30% sugar. Thank you Susu Bubble tea Sea Point for the best service.

Name: Wianja's Bubble Tea
Address: Seychelles Ave, Sunnydale, Cape Town
Author: N/A
Review: N/A

Name: Susu bubble tea Cavendish
Address: 1 Dreyer St, Claremont, Cape Town
Author: Fayhoon Faisal
Review:
Lovely branch of Susu 💐
You can find it near dischem on lower floor👀 Bargain books is also next to it
Highly recommend Mango Tornado !! best drink 😋

Name: Susu bubble tea Cavendish
Address: 1 Dreyer St, Claremont, Cape Town
Author: Aisha Walls
Review: The Boba is delicious and high quality, though I will say they are a bit stingy on the amount of tapioca they give. Other than that it's an overall good experience.

Name: Susu bubble tea Cavendish
Address: 1 Dreyer St, Claremont, Cape Town
Author: Yusraa M

Name: Ben's Bubble Tea N1 City Mall
Address: Shop 69a, N1 City Mall, Louwtjie Rothman St, N1 City, Cape Town
Author: Basheerah Schroeder
Review: Ben’s bubble tea is a cute small store. They have delicious gourmet flavors and the usuals. Personally the strawberry and chocolate tastes like nesquik ( which tastes really good ) and their gourmet flavors are quite nice too such as the Biscoff ( jusy very sweet) but the best one is the chocnado. Would defs recommend if you’re a boba lover however I must say they always take quite long to make your order even when not as busy so place your order and go in a few other shops then come back if you’re in a hurry

Name: Ben's Bubble Tea N1 City Mall
Address: Shop 69a, N1 City Mall, Louwtjie Rothman St, N1 City, Cape Town
Author: Raeesah
Review:
Best bubble tea I've had in a while 😋
I had the watermelon and strawberry fresh fruit tea with extra pineapple jelly . It was really refreshing and flavourful 🤩 I highly recommend trying their tea.

And a big plus is that they are fully halaal 👍🏼

Name: Ben's Bubble Tea N1 City Mall
Address: Shop 69a, N1 City Mall, Louwtjie Rothman St, N1 City, Cape Town
Author: Crisscross Applesauce
Review: Was my first time experiencing Boba tea. Coffee flavor Boba tea was nice. A bit expensive considering I've never had Boba. I've mentioned to staff it was my first time that I've heard about Boba, and I ordered what I though was Boba tea, ended up paying R18 for a desert item (the description is very hard to read as it is small), but I would have expected staff to inform me of what it was considering that I have mentioned that I never had Boba tea.  After a while of sitting and had a look through the menu, my mom told me that she doesn't think it was tea that I've ordered. Eventually I ordered the boba tea. But furthermore, flavor was good.

Name: Ben's Bubble Tea N1 City Mall
Address: Shop 69a, N1 City Mall, Louwtjie Rothman St, N1 City, Cape Town
Author: dragoneyes1ct
Review: Ben's Bubble Tea N1 City. Quaint little store with lovely staff. I had the Brown Sugar Classic Bubble Tea. Having had Bubble Tea in China and Japan and in various locations internationally, in SA this is the closest thing to the original I have had. Delicious. Highly recommend

Name: Ben's Bubble Tea N1 City Mall
Address: Shop 69a, N1 City Mall, Louwtjie Rothman St, N1 City, Cape Town
Author: Serie Ross
Review: The Boba was delicious and you can pick the sweetness of your boba the staff are nice which gives it a great atmosphere.

Name: Seattle Coffee Company Canal Walk
Address: Shop 522 Century Blvd, Century City, Cape Town
Author: Jarryd Metzler
Review:
Just another coffee store that hasn’t taught their barista’s how to make proper coffee. They don’t have different names just for fun, teach your staff the correct ratio’s.
Cortado for reference, just the double espresso with hot milk…

Name: Seattle Coffee Company Canal Walk
Address: Shop 522 Century Blvd, Century City, Cape Town
Author: Cheree Roelofse
Review: I absolutely love Seattle Coffee, especially their Grande Caramel Latte... My absolute favourite! They also make a perfect cappuccino. I stop here regularly for my morning coffee before work and make sure to type your phone number into their machine to earn point... My next coffee is free because of that! They also seem to have a great menu that I will definitely be back to try

Name: Seattle Coffee Company Canal Walk
Address: Shop 522 Century Blvd, Century City, Cape Town
Author: Portia Fairbairn
Review:
Love the coffee it's not the issue understanding what bank cards can be used instore is confusing. Cause we had a student card from fnb unfortunately u can't use it there, which I don't understand. If u want customers u going to lose a few cause u only accommodate certain bank cards.

But five stars for suggesting to my partner on using the points to get the coffee I asked for. Coffee still 10 out of 10. That wasn't my issue just the bank card or what cards may be used. "Confused!!"

Staff member didn't know he just said it's like that and they not sure why it does not work there.

Name: Seattle Coffee Company Canal Walk
Address: Shop 522 Century Blvd, Century City, Cape Town
Author: Pamela Dinie
Review: The staff they were thought very well they know what the are doing and the love the are job you can see the way the always friendly to customers keep like that Siphokazi i love the way you treat your customers thanks for the delicious dream coffee

Name: Seattle Coffee Company Canal Walk
Address: Shop 522 Century Blvd, Century City, Cape Town
Author: Jamie-lee Wilson
Review:
The staff at this Seattle are so friendly!

P.s please consider making a dairy free butterscotch syrup, for all of the lactose intolerant people...I miss them so much even though they make me sick.

Name: Shift Espresso bar | Waterway House
Address: 4 Dock Rd, Victoria & Alfred Waterfront, Cape Town
Author: Edith Mirzaian
Review:
I’m so happy to have discovered this gem in Cape Town. I was here for 8 days and the hotel coffee wasn’t cutting it. Of course we explored the town in search of the coffee that was going to hit the spot. Shift did not disappoint. The coffee is the best we had in town, the green juice was also a favorite, and you enjoy these treats in the cool vibe atmosphere they’ve created. But the staff is the best. They are lovely people serving deliciousness.
I did not try the food, but the dishes going past me looked delectable.

Name: Shift Espresso bar | Waterway House
Address: 4 Dock Rd, Victoria & Alfred Waterfront, Cape Town
Author: Buyisiwe Shongwe
Review:
Great place to have a coffee outside if the weather’s good. Service started off great but deteriorated over the course of our stay. May have just been a busy morning. The staff was friendly enough and fixed all the errors they were making.
The location gets the spot a nice rating otherwise it’s kinda average.

Name: Shift Espresso bar | Waterway House
Address: 4 Dock Rd, Victoria & Alfred Waterfront, Cape Town
Author: Chantal H.
Review: During our stay in Cape Town we had breakfast at this place every day. The personal was amazing and very friendly! The food is good and de ambiance is very laid back and chill. Would defenitly recommand this place for everybody who likes good food and coffee to start your day of with a smile.

Name: Shift Espresso bar | Waterway House
Address: 4 Dock Rd, Victoria & Alfred Waterfront, Cape Town
Author: Erick Mendoza
Review: Good spot to relax in friendly enviroment food for me was spot on i did scrabled eggs avo and toast and the avocado is actually real no a spread. Staff is friendly especially Pumi

Name: Shift Espresso bar | Waterway House
Address: 4 Dock Rd, Victoria & Alfred Waterfront, Cape Town
Author: Milo
Review:
What a gorgeous coffee shop! The aesthetic is perfect, the service is excellent and warm and the coffee is wonderful. Its such a perfect experience, I made this my compulsory stop every morning!
Their food is so good too!
They have a give a book, take a book deal and I am proud to have left a work I truly enjoyed there. It’s an all-round great feeling here at shift.
If I lived here, I would want to work here 📚☕️⛰️🌊🦭☀️🌴

Name: Susu Bubble Tea Camps Bay
Address: Victoria Rd, Camps Bay, Cape Town
Author: Mogammad Faisal Baulackey
Review: Really nice vibey store. Difficult to find. They are up the stairs, through the woolworths, right, then left. Amazing place to take pictures.

Name: Susu Bubble Tea Camps Bay
Address: Victoria Rd, Camps Bay, Cape Town
Author: lluwellen king
Review: Funky interior.. great drink

Name: Susu Bubble Tea Camps Bay
Address: Victoria Rd, Camps Bay, Cape Town
Author: Marvin Ngobeni
Review: Great tasting bubble tea with perfect blend of flavours and sweetness

Name: Susu Bubble Tea Camps Bay
Address: Victoria Rd, Camps Bay, Cape Town
Author: Ayesha **
Review: One of my daughters favs

Name: Susu Bubble Tea Camps Bay
Address: Victoria Rd, Camps Bay, Cape Town
Author: Tatenda Schaafsma

Name: Coco Safar Sea Point
Address: Piazza St-John, 395 Main Rd, Sea Point, Cape Town
Author: Kate Rolfe
Review:
Wow, what an incredible experience this restaurant creates! The staff are so friendly and kind!
The owner made us feel so welcomed. His passion for the restaurant and his story of its becoming is so beautiful!

But most importantly, damn these croissants 😍! They are INSANE! best croissant I’ve had in Cape Town!

Name: Coco Safar Sea Point
Address: Piazza St-John, 395 Main Rd, Sea Point, Cape Town
Author: Aadil Muzavar
Review: I had an amazing breakfast at Coco Safar Sea Point, featuring their famous croissant and perfectly brewed coffee. The food was delicious, and the service was outstanding—Jolene, our server, was incredibly friendly and attentive. The atmosphere was warm and inviting, making it a perfect spot to start the day. Highly recommend!

Name: Coco Safar Sea Point
Address: Piazza St-John, 395 Main Rd, Sea Point, Cape Town
Author: Sonja Matthews
Review: Fantastique...Délicieux...Magnifique. A Woman's Day to remember. Enjoyed a divine breakfast with refreshing freshly squeezed orange mimosas. The poached eggs paired with the caramelized onions and roasted tomatoes were absolutely sublime. The next decision was the hardest to make. Which one of their signature croissants to have with coffee. Well, let me just say that I came home with a bag of croissants, cause having just one flavor was not an option. The atmosphere was awesome, the music....perfect. Calm and relaxing. I shall return for round 2....lunch.

Name: Coco Safar Sea Point
Address: Piazza St-John, 395 Main Rd, Sea Point, Cape Town
Author: Imtiyaaz Moses
Review: Absolute lovely service and great food at Coco Safar Sea Point. Went there for my birthday yesterday and I absolutely enjoyed it. Thank you Coco Safar for making my day extra special!

Name: Coco Safar Sea Point
Address: Piazza St-John, 395 Main Rd, Sea Point, Cape Town
Author: Michael Kiessling
Review: Today was the day of searching for the best croissant in Cape Town, we visited 6 places, and the winner by far was the black maple croissant, 6/5, absolutely mind blowing delicious. The atmosphere and service from Massey was incredible, it absolutely suits the vibe of Coco Safar Sea Point

Name: Food Lover's Eatery Newspaper House
Address: Shop 122, St George's Mall, Church St, Cape Town City Centre, Cape Town
Author: Danie Swarts
Review: Very good, value for money. Food is fresh, good quality. Only reason not 5 stars is it's not fine dining (not Michelin star chef food) and it's not expected to be. But if you want to grab a quick good quality value for money lunch then this is my go-to place!

Name: Food Lover's Eatery Newspaper House
Address: Shop 122, St George's Mall, Church St, Cape Town City Centre, Cape Town
Author: Claude McCulloch
Review: Hmmmmmm, no wonder why the sushi platter was reduced. It wasn't only the price, but the quality too!

Name: Food Lover's Eatery Newspaper House
Address: Shop 122, St George's Mall, Church St, Cape Town City Centre, Cape Town
Author: Alex K
Review: Food lovers offers like 30 different kinds of foods (veggies, meats, pasta, rice etc) that you can spoon into one lunchbox and weigh altogether at the till. But you put different candies that all COST THE SAME per 100g into one bag (like one would do at a candy store) and you get treated like a stupid child for not using 10 different plastic bags for each individual candy. It all costs the same, therefore it doesn’t matter if it is weighed together or separately…it all adds up the same in the end. This behaviour is made all the more confusing when you see they sell already mixed candies in containers at the tills, so why can’t I do the same? I have been in this food lovers, spending money almost every weekday for the past 4 years and the one day I want to treat myself to some sweeties because I am having a bad day, I get treated with hostility and like I am an idiot. Nice one guys 👌

Name: Food Lover's Eatery Newspaper House
Address: Shop 122, St George's Mall, Church St, Cape Town City Centre, Cape Town
Author: Erica Mateus
Review: You can find a variety of foods here. They sell fresh fruits and vegetables and they sometimes run the same sales as bigger Food Lovers Market stores. Bread is baked fresh daily and you can choose from a range of Portuguese rolls to German rolls. The space is clean and adheres to COVID-19 protocols. The security man stands at the entrance and sanitises your hands and greets customers with a smile. Some of the staff at the bakery and at the tills could be friendlier. Some times they help customers with not such a good attitude. You can also grab ready made meals here such as pizza, chicken, pasta, salad, chopped fruits, muesli, sandwiches and more. Grab your healthy snacks on your way out.

Name: Food Lover's Eatery Newspaper House
Address: Shop 122, St George's Mall, Church St, Cape Town City Centre, Cape Town
Author: Ess
Review: Market is open with good grab and go bars. But no cafe area closed ( no signage as to why last three days). Company Gardens are nearby.

Name: Afternoon Tea at Mount Nelson, A Belmond Hotel, Cape Town
Address: 76 Orange St, Gardens, Cape Town
Author: danielle krasniqi
Review:
My first high tea experience was made so incredible with the staff and ambiance at Mount Nelson.  Craig was thoughtful in explaining the tea selection to us and sharing details of tea ceremonies which we loved.  and our waiter Cheslyn was outstanding- I hope to see her immortalized in the menu book with a drawing of her smiling face by the time we come back for another visit!
The food, teas, and sweets were so good and we loved the hotel itself.  11/10 experience- hope we can make it back from NYC soon!

Name: Afternoon Tea at Mount Nelson, A Belmond Hotel, Cape Town
Address: 76 Orange St, Gardens, Cape Town
Author: Theran Pather
Review: Had the vegan High Tea experience. Some of the most interesting vegan foods I've ever eaten. A great selection of sweet and savory items for everyone. There is even a selection of cakes that you can also indulgence in as part of the experience. The highlight is, in fact, the tea selection. There are so many options to choose from, I personally enjoyed the Mount Nelson House blend for those who like a stronger, darker tea.

Name: Afternoon Tea at Mount Nelson, A Belmond Hotel, Cape Town
Address: 76 Orange St, Gardens, Cape Town
Author: Rene Mostert
Review: It was good but I do miss the long table with eats. The trays are fancy but do not give you the buffet feeling of abundance... Fot the price one would like abundance. The kids' tray was really cute. As always...the hotel and garden are absolutely amazing!

Name: Afternoon Tea at Mount Nelson, A Belmond Hotel, Cape Town
Address: 76 Orange St, Gardens, Cape Town
Author: Bradley Ford
Review: Highly recommend the High Tea option. The staff provides, and creates, a perfect experience. Don't be put off by the price, it's worth every cent.

Name: Afternoon Tea at Mount Nelson, A Belmond Hotel, Cape Town
Address: 76 Orange St, Gardens, Cape Town
Author: Amber Cohen
Review: OMG! This entire afternoon exceeded expectations. The service was the best I’ve experienced in Cape Town. It was such a brilliantly designed menu, both tea and food. The honey bush ice tea/punch was incredible. Better than any house cocktail I’ve ever had. The exterior and interior of the hotel itself is beautiful! Couldn’t believe how gorgeous in person it was. Thank you for a relaxing and filling afternoon.

Name: Little Stream Conference Centre & Tea Garden
Address: Klein Constantia Road At the end of the road , on the right of the cul de sac, Hope of Constantia, Cape Town
Author: Emil Bosch Photography
Review: We photographed a wedding at Little Stream just over a year ago. The venue is a photographers’ dream. We will now be booking all our Family Shoots there. This will provide a safe beautiful environment for both us and the families we photograph.

Name: Little Stream Conference Centre & Tea Garden
Address: Klein Constantia Road At the end of the road , on the right of the cul de sac, Hope of Constantia, Cape Town
Author: Joel Harris
Review: A truly beautiful place with a gorgeous garden and different areas to perambulate. Interesting environment with different sculptures and paths to explore. Extremely welcoming and friendly staff with a vast menu of scrumptious items on offer, including a little gift shop too. Overall an especially cute setting that is spectacularly peaceful, would definitely recommend.

Name: Little Stream Conference Centre & Tea Garden
Address: Klein Constantia Road At the end of the road , on the right of the cul de sac, Hope of Constantia, Cape Town
Author: Marietha Quixley
Review: Magical rainy afternoon. Fantastic service, burger a bit overdone but home made fries top notch. Coffee shakes to die for, and their power smoothies are a meal on it's own. Definitely recommend - looking forward to plan a function here as the gardens are truly magnificent.

Name: Little Stream Conference Centre & Tea Garden
Address: Klein Constantia Road At the end of the road , on the right of the cul de sac, Hope of Constantia, Cape Town
Author: Bonnie
Review: We had a bridal shower here. Such a stunning venue, good service and very accommodating of our needs. We hired the tent, which is lovely and private with a beautiful view of the garden. I personally didn't eat anything but was happy to see gluten-free carrot cake and gluten-free brownies on the menu. Some of the guests had the carrot cake which they said was very good. Nice it caters  for gluten-free people!

Name: Little Stream Conference Centre & Tea Garden
Address: Klein Constantia Road At the end of the road , on the right of the cul de sac, Hope of Constantia, Cape Town
Author: Doreen Vizant
Review: Beautiful hidden gem . Loved the tranquility.   Sitting in the magical garden you hear different interesting sounds.  Unfortunately the path that I took down to the magical garden is not wheelchair -friendly.

Name: Scotch Coffee House
Address: 101 St Georges Mall, Cape Town City Centre, Cape Town
Author: Sharon Spangenberg
Review: Definitely the best coffee at an excellent price.  But I would really review the process to cut waiting times.  Waiting times are crazy.  The barista is good.  Unfortunately she must function with only one spoon while the equipment makes provision for 2.  she must also learn to attend to clients before she attends to packing out her supplies.  There are 2 people in the kiosk but the barista seems to be the main person - attends to suppliers and packing out stock while customers have to wait.  And the process - please don't only cut open milk sachet and warm/froth milk after you have made the coffee - you can do it in the meantime.  I would love to give my feedback to the owner but I cannot find contact details on the internet.  I have started buying from Wimpy again (at double the price) because I cannot wait up to 15 minutes for a cup of coffee.

Name: Scotch Coffee House
Address: 101 St Georges Mall, Cape Town City Centre, Cape Town
Author: arshad Ali
Review: The best coffee and muffins in golden acre shopping center

Name: Scotch Coffee House
Address: 101 St Georges Mall, Cape Town City Centre, Cape Town
Author: Hadley Blake

Name: Peacock Tea and Coffee - Blue Route Mall
Address: 16 Tokai Rd, Dreyersdal, Cape Town
Author: Richard Morris
Review: Not only does this shop serve the most amazing house brand coffee of the day, but the selection of coffee and tea related products and accessories are impressive. I enjoy sitting in the outdoor seating when i visit the mall every 2nd weekend or so. In all honesty the shop would not be the same without the charismatic two shop assistants 'Babes and Felicia. Keep up the excellent work.

Name: Peacock Tea and Coffee - Blue Route Mall
Address: 16 Tokai Rd, Dreyersdal, Cape Town
Author: Izelke Gebhardt
Review:
Love coffee ☕️ and that fresh pressed roast smell ?
Then go and visit Peacock Tea and Coffee. Sit down for a variety of coffee ☕️ , tea 🍵 , cakes 🍰, tarts 🧁, biscuits, sweet muffins, pies, and quiches. Teapots, coffee plungers, grounded tea and ground coffee, and tea brews are also available for purchase.
The staff that work here are friendly and kind.
I go to the mall to shop and always pass by for a takeaway coffee on my way home. It is a must!

Name: Peacock Tea and Coffee - Blue Route Mall
Address: 16 Tokai Rd, Dreyersdal, Cape Town
Author: Roeshana Achmat-Hoosain
Review:
Impeccable service by Larney today. Just had a quick snack but due to Larney's amazing service we actually went from take-away to sit down service.

Will definitely be returning for more.

Name: Peacock Tea and Coffee - Blue Route Mall
Address: 16 Tokai Rd, Dreyersdal, Cape Town
Author: Shaun Deysel
Review:
Absolutely amazing experience! The staff are INCREDIBLY friendly and always put a smile on my face so early in the morning!

Very affordable coffee/food as well

:)

Name: Peacock Tea and Coffee - Blue Route Mall
Address: 16 Tokai Rd, Dreyersdal, Cape Town
Author: John Hardie
Review: What a delightful reception by the friendly staff at this institution! Their kindness really made my day! The best Earl Grey tea in town.

Name: Cocoa Cha Chi
Address: Shop 20, Lower Main Rd, Observatory, Cape Town
Author: Caitlyn Ganesh
Review: The tomato soup was delicious and perfect for the cold Cape Town weather. The restaurant was packed on this particular Saturday evening, expected for Observatory though, but it took around 20mins or so just for my drinks order, and at least I got a knee blanket to embrace the cold. Will definitely return on my next trip to Cape Town and hopefully it will be warmer🙌🏽

Name: Cocoa Cha Chi
Address: Shop 20, Lower Main Rd, Observatory, Cape Town
Author: Lyndsey Petro
Review:
Always considered this more of a café, but was pleasantly surprised by the variety and yumminess of the menu.

Great spot for meetings and 'working from home'.

Name: Cocoa Cha Chi
Address: Shop 20, Lower Main Rd, Observatory, Cape Town
Author: Jain Halder
Review: The food was heartwarmingly good. Their selection of drinks ranged from a wide variety. The place is a little crowded but very warm and cozy thanks to their fire place. Definitely recommend coming here but only if it's not crowded.

Name: Cocoa Cha Chi
Address: Shop 20, Lower Main Rd, Observatory, Cape Town
Author: Ziggy Ezulu
Review:
This definitely makes the Grade in the Cosy Chic Cafe category.
Beautiful interior with picturesque bar and functional wood-burning fireplace in the corner.
Tables by the window with the outside view- the best for just chilling and watching life pass by.
Went there in the evening and the ambiance was perfect - relaxed, good muted music, the buzz of conversation.
Friendly staff and good service.
Can definitely recommend this 😉👍

Name: Cocoa Cha Chi
Address: Shop 20, Lower Main Rd, Observatory, Cape Town
Author: Ntando Sithole
Review: A great place to work and eat delicious food. The food is also affordable, the atmosphere were just right and the staff was very friendly. For the students, I highly recommend it for study dates. It's close to the UCT health science faculty and is a walking distance from Obz Sqaure. Enjoy!

Name: Umoja caffe
Address: 313 Lower Main Rd, Observatory, Cape Town
Author: Thersia Muzhambi

Name: Umoja caffe
Address: 313 Lower Main Rd, Observatory, Cape Town
Author: Astrid Hans

Name: Ben's Bubble Tea Bayside Mall
Address: Corner of Blaauwberg Road, W Coast Rd, Table View, Cape Town
Author: N/A
Review: N/A

Name: Ollies specialty coffee and Pas Normal Studios - OSCS clubhouse
Address: 315 Main Rd, Sea Point, Cape Town
Author: Abigail Pregnolato
Review: Ollies croissant is so delicious you have to try it, and coffee is in the best in Cape Town! Thank you for your service!

Name: Ollies specialty coffee and Pas Normal Studios - OSCS clubhouse
Address: 315 Main Rd, Sea Point, Cape Town
Author: Will Law
Review: Ollie is thoughtful, brilliant, and hospitable. My friend and I had a Nicaraguan natural coffee from Cedar Roasters as a V60 pour over. If you appreciate speciality coffee, this is one of the best around. Ask Ollie for his story! He is connected with all of Cape Town speciality coffee.

Name: Ollies specialty coffee and Pas Normal Studios - OSCS clubhouse
Address: 315 Main Rd, Sea Point, Cape Town
Author: Dev Corke (The Vanilla Gorilla)
Review:
Ollie is passionate about coffee and will talk to you for hours about it - which is EXACTLY what you want from a coffee shop owner.
The beans are impeccable and the care in making every cup is fantastic. As a coffee snob, this is my favourite coffee in Cape Town.

Name: Ollies specialty coffee and Pas Normal Studios - OSCS clubhouse
Address: 315 Main Rd, Sea Point, Cape Town
Author: Daniel Way
Review: Great spot for a quick coffee with friends. Staff greet you with a grand smile and make you feel so welcomed! Parking on the street can be quite tough to find so you may need to walk a fair distance - definitely worth it though! Coffee was great. Definitely recommend the visit!

Name: Ollies specialty coffee and Pas Normal Studios - OSCS clubhouse
Address: 315 Main Rd, Sea Point, Cape Town
Author: G P
Review:
This place is a cycle studio with a proper Coffee machine set up. Thought to give it a shot on my usual stroll through the area.

Barista is cool af, laidbackback vibes with cyclists coming in after their morning rides and lovely flat white (zar 38).

I recommend it to anyone passing through the area that has exhausted the other popular places like naked, paulines, plato, bootleggers, shift etc and is game to try something new, you will not be disappointed.

Name: Asami's House Rosmead
Address: 15 Carlton Rd, Claremont, Cape Town
Author: Rebecca Williams
Review: I have never been disappointed when ordering from Asami. Price's are low, portion sizes are MASSIVE, and taste is decent. Meat to veg to noodles is a good ratio/Batter to meat to noodles ratio is good. Staff is always friendly. Personal preference I like my sweet and sour sauce a bit more sweet but is absolutely fine as it is.

Name: Asami's House Rosmead
Address: 15 Carlton Rd, Claremont, Cape Town
Author: QueenAries_EMZA
Review: Just ordered right now, don't waste your time with this place. Highly disappointed with what I recieved. Portion size is a joke for real, fashion sandwich is not even that.

Name: Asami's House Rosmead
Address: 15 Carlton Rd, Claremont, Cape Town
Author: Emile Liebenberg
Review:
I paid R300 on Uber eats to be served a whole bunch of rice. 90% of the platter was rice. Considering the price of this meal I can firmly say it’s not worth it.

NB: I ordered the 24 piece, but one get one.

Name: Asami's House Rosmead
Address: 15 Carlton Rd, Claremont, Cape Town
Author: Sakeenah Schroeder
Review:
Ordered on Uber eats as they do have nice combo deals.
Firstly this sushi gave myself and my husband food poisoning... the sushi had absolutely no flavour to it and some of the fish was probably off as it had a funny smell... The rice was absolutely tasteless and chewy...
AND my FAVOURITE part was finding HAIR INBETWEEN my California rolls and another drowning in mayo on the platter...
Needless to say I lost my appetite and threw the rest of my half eaten platter away. A waste of money and FOOD!

Name: Asami's House Rosmead
Address: 15 Carlton Rd, Claremont, Cape Town
Author: Leston Sylvester
Review: What an absolute gem found on Rosmead today! Good quality, friendly staff and amazing specials! I will definitely be seeing you again very soon!

Name: Royal Tea V&A Waterfront
Address: Level one, V&A Waterfront, Victoria Wharf, Victoria & Alfred Waterfront, Cape Town
Author: Amanda Lan
Review: The best bubble tea. Perfectly balanced in flavour. This was the first bubble tea shop. Sorry guys this has the authentic recipe and flavour. I will definitely be returning.

Name: Royal Tea V&A Waterfront
Address: Level one, V&A Waterfront, Victoria Wharf, Victoria & Alfred Waterfront, Cape Town
Author: CHRISTINA RUWONA
Review:
I recently visited  your Waterfront shop and my experience was nothing short of delightful. From the moment I walked in, I was greeted by a calming and cozy atmosphere and Lovely Team
The variety of teas available at this shop is impressive. They offer a wide range of choices, from classic black and green teas to unique  blends and seasonal specialties. I particularly enjoyed your Taro Time
I would like to Say Thank you to Beaulah and Team
Keep up the work

Name: Royal Tea V&A Waterfront
Address: Level one, V&A Waterfront, Victoria Wharf, Victoria & Alfred Waterfront, Cape Town
Author: Fayhoon Faisal
Review: Boba place in V&A waterfront 😚 has a nice variety of options 👀 The mango drink and milk tea are great 😆❤️ Tapioca pearls are always perfect so soft and squishy 😁

Name: Royal Tea V&A Waterfront
Address: Level one, V&A Waterfront, Victoria Wharf, Victoria & Alfred Waterfront, Cape Town
Author: Jutika Krongmongkolkul
Review:
went there almost everyday during my stay in cape town. good location inside v&a shopping mall.
reasonable price and the staff made as per order correctly.
no seats available there as it was only for buying to-go.

Name: Royal Tea V&A Waterfront
Address: Level one, V&A Waterfront, Victoria Wharf, Victoria & Alfred Waterfront, Cape Town
Author: Taahirah Chafeker
Review: I've been going to Royal Tea most Sunday's where Alfred or Mervielle serves us. They have made the place so welcoming and inviting. I look forward to conversing with them on Sunday's. They are helpful and make your day brighter, even during winter months. Keep up the good work and the warmth!

Name: Nigiro Teacafe
Address: Nigiro Teacafe, 71 Gabriel Rd, Plumstead, Cape Town
Author: Mitch
Review:
Excellent tea shop! This is a proper tea shop that steeps based on temperature and time. The sencha fukuyu was very nice.
The atmosphere is excellent, tons of tea accessories to purchase. And a massive list of loose leaf tea to go.
I will definitely be back!

Name: Nigiro Teacafe
Address: Nigiro Teacafe, 71 Gabriel Rd, Plumstead, Cape Town
Author: Amanda Rinquest
Review:
Quiet and unassuming little tea shop with a huge selection of teas to purchase, and a few things other vegetarian things to buy.

It can be overwhelming but the staff help you decide based on what you feel like snacking on. Really worth a visit!

Name: Nigiro Teacafe
Address: Nigiro Teacafe, 71 Gabriel Rd, Plumstead, Cape Town
Author: Anastasia Coulbanis
Review: What a different way to spend a morning! Tea tasting! Extremely knowledgeable, amazing service an such a peaceful atmosphere. Definitely going back!

Name: Nigiro Teacafe
Address: Nigiro Teacafe, 71 Gabriel Rd, Plumstead, Cape Town
Author: Nazeema Khan
Review: Great little spot to relax and enjoy a selection of any tea you can imagine  - think black, white, green, fruits - and some options for coffee lovers. Their cakes are absolutely divine (with vegan options), and even though they have a limited food menu, it is well worth it. The shop has a variety of goods and utensils for sale. Service is above expectations. Do yourself a favor and experience a little bit of magic and relaxation.

Name: Nigiro Teacafe
Address: Nigiro Teacafe, 71 Gabriel Rd, Plumstead, Cape Town
Author: Brian Claassen
Review:
This Teacafe is an absolute gem. I received the warmest greeting and the owner actually remembered me even though I had only been in once before, many weeks prior.

Their tea selection is simple awe inspiring and extremely well priced. I had the omelette which was delicious and its tea pairing.

My girlfriend has insisted that I bring her along on my next visit, which will hopefully be very soon.

Customer service at its absolute best!!

Name: Royal Tea Cavendish Square
Address: Shop F8 & F9, WE ARE EGG, Floor, Cavendish Square, 1 Dreyer St, Claremont, Cape Town
Author: Rozana Kamish
Review:
Royal Tea bubble tea shop sells refreshing cold tea with a difference, new to Cape Town as I have had it in Taiwan many years ago. Flavors and ingredient selection caters for all.
This tea shop is situated in Cavendish Square, inside The Egg store, a trendy business that sells various companies products, with clothing and health products and trendy food stores.
I tried a large matcha tea with bubbles and it was good. I would recommend honey in it.
I took the large size as I wanted the reusable cup that came with it, so cool. So much to drink. The strawberry and pine bubble tea was also refreshing. Loved loved loved the service. Those guys working their are friendly and happy to assist if you struggling to decide what to order. Next time I'm trying Taro. Had it before at another store, still a favorite.

Name: Royal Tea Cavendish Square
Address: Shop F8 & F9, WE ARE EGG, Floor, Cavendish Square, 1 Dreyer St, Claremont, Cape Town
Author: Ondela Mgumane
Review: I had a fantastic first bubble tea experience at this store , the staff was welcoming and they know their products very well and recommended me to try the oreo dairy delight .wow amazing

Name: Royal Tea Cavendish Square
Address: Shop F8 & F9, WE ARE EGG, Floor, Cavendish Square, 1 Dreyer St, Claremont, Cape Town
Author: Faizel Manuels
Review: Overall this would be the best service and smelling bubble tea we've had so far. Wish I knew the guy who helped us. He added to the experience by being an amazing employee. Sometimes you just need some kindness in the way of service to make you spend more money at a place. Thanks for that hire

Name: Royal Tea Cavendish Square
Address: Shop F8 & F9, WE ARE EGG, Floor, Cavendish Square, 1 Dreyer St, Claremont, Cape Town
Author: Kelly du Raan
Review: I had the most amazing Juice there called “All Inclusive” and it was delicious. The oreo boba drink is also amazing. Definitely recommend trying some drinks out here.

Name: Royal Tea Cavendish Square
Address: Shop F8 & F9, WE ARE EGG, Floor, Cavendish Square, 1 Dreyer St, Claremont, Cape Town
Author: SHANAAZ PRINS
Review: The service is really good and super friendly. The drinks are made right in front of you, which is really interesting to watch. One of my top recommendations for sure.

Name: Brown Coffee Beans & Gourmet Tea pty ltd
Address: G01, Salt Circle Arcade, 374 Albert Rd, Woodstock, Cape Town
Author: Clifford September
Review: Amazing coffee, great vibe. Best service. Can't wait to go back to get my next coffee.

Name: Brown Coffee Beans & Gourmet Tea pty ltd
Address: G01, Salt Circle Arcade, 374 Albert Rd, Woodstock, Cape Town
Author: Jill Lauren Cupido-Masters
Review: Brown coffee beans sells the absolute best coffee in CT! In addition to the amazing coffee I also loved the service with a smile and the Uber chic cups and vibe. My new favorite place to buy coffee for when my guest come to visit as well. Now we can all share in the classic Brown Coffee Beans.

Name: Brown Coffee Beans & Gourmet Tea pty ltd
Address: G01, Salt Circle Arcade, 374 Albert Rd, Woodstock, Cape Town
Author: Charles joey
Review: Super awesome service. Was in a hurry this morning and wanted a cappuccino. Told the guy I'm in a hurry and he politely helped me with no hassle. He is a bravo male with a scar in his face. Please thank him and may he be an asset to you in the future. #5starPerformance . Charles

Name: Brown Coffee Beans & Gourmet Tea pty ltd
Address: G01, Salt Circle Arcade, 374 Albert Rd, Woodstock, Cape Town
Author: Ludi-May Allie
Review: If you take your coffee seriously, then definitely check this place out. Excellent java and friendly service. A gem of a place. Make sure you visit when in the area. Thanks for a lovely experience B!

Name: Brown Coffee Beans & Gourmet Tea pty ltd
Address: G01, Salt Circle Arcade, 374 Albert Rd, Woodstock, Cape Town
Author: The DJ Company
Review: A hidden gem in Paardein Island with great company.

Name: Susu Bubble Tea Waterkant
Address: 72 Waterkant St, Green Point, Cape Town
Author: Chelsea Zive
Review: I’ve loved every moment here, definitely the best susu although I recommend they change their confusing slogan. Live loved by others, live loving others. This eliminates confusion and is more sensible which enhances the experience in this institute.

Name: Susu Bubble Tea Waterkant
Address: 72 Waterkant St, Green Point, Cape Town
Author: Yasmin Rehder
Review: Love stopping by after work to grab a bubble tea. My fav brand/franchise regarding taste and flavor of bubble tea. They also have another branch in Canal Walk that I visit. Love the brown sugar milk tea 🧋 Definitely worth paying an extra R5 for a large size. Absolutely delicious and highly recommended.

Name: Susu Bubble Tea Waterkant
Address: 72 Waterkant St, Green Point, Cape Town
Author: Samuel Christov
Review: Ordered off uber eats and my lemon honey tea with strawberry pops. I found a floating black foreign object in the still sealed drink container. I have sent a message of complaint where someone promptly responded. I received a message where they stated that they will be in touch to get involved in the issue. It's been a while now and no one has sent any kind of contact. Hence the review.

Name: Susu Bubble Tea Waterkant
Address: 72 Waterkant St, Green Point, Cape Town
Author: Jessica
Review: The drink was refreshing and not too sweet just the way I wanted. They have a lot of flavors to choose from. Glad I tried it.

Name: Susu Bubble Tea Waterkant
Address: 72 Waterkant St, Green Point, Cape Town
Author: Jutika Krongmongkolkul
Review: nice and colorful decorations. staffs were friendly. had a few menus of their bubble tea such as classic bubble milk tea, taro milk tea, strawberry slush and all tasted great!

Name: TeAwesome
Address: Canal Walk, 490 Century Blvd, Century City, Cape Town
Author: Mustaqeem Abrahams
Review: Honestly my first worse experience ever. I’ve bought boba tea a lot by this place for a long time now and today my wife and I decided to buy again. My wife ordered a chocolate milk tea with strawberry boba and I ordered a taro tea with pudding boba and honestly the worst I’ve ever had. My wife’s strawberry boba wasn’t even boba balls and my taro boba was like slime it was like snot in my mouth. Both her and I were very disappointed and did not finish it at all, we both took literally one sip and I spat mine immediately out, it was honestly disgusting  and was such a waste of money spent so much for such a waste.

Name: TeAwesome
Address: Canal Walk, 490 Century Blvd, Century City, Cape Town
Author: Fadeelah Kenny
Review: Love the selection of fresh ingredients but their execution leaves much to be desired. When I ordered there was no one ahead of me but my poke bowl still took quite a while to make. I asked them twice to add less mayo than usual but it still came drenched in mayo and the soy sauce dressing. Spoilt a perfectly good poke bowl with so much dressing IMHO.

Name: TeAwesome
Address: Canal Walk, 490 Century Blvd, Century City, Cape Town
Author: Atomic-Chicken
Review:
So I tried Taro Milk Boba Tea with Mango Bubbles for the first time today & I was pleasantly surprised! 😁 I added some sugar and ice to this tastebud sensation, but you have the option to leave it out. You can customise your drink as you wish, which I think is super awesome. ☑️☑️☑️
My 3 star rating is aimed at the staff who honestly didn't seem very interested in their job. I asked for a suggestion and I might as well have asked for the world! They are NOT professional and definitely NOT friendly. 👎
I will go in search of another TeAwesome and try some of their other drinks on their menu. This one will never see me again.
you will find them in the food court area.

Name: TeAwesome
Address: Canal Walk, 490 Century Blvd, Century City, Cape Town
Author: Samuel Christov
Review: The service was quick and the Drinks that we ordered where fantastic. I love all the different flavors that where available as well as the fact that they also let us choose our own ingredients to make the drink feel like our own custom beverage.

Name: TeAwesome
Address: Canal Walk, 490 Century Blvd, Century City, Cape Town
Author: Jasmine Wong
Review: Amazing that they have bubble tea in Cape Town. They have all the classic flavours including taro, chocolate and coffee. The milk teas are the best options. Love that you are able to customized options like: sugar, ice and add ins. If you know, you know you have to add tapioca balls. Wish they were fresher though.

Name: Bubble Up Boutique Bubble Tea
Address: 3 Pampoenkraal Ln, Durbanville, Cape Town
Author: Siobhan S
Review:
had the most amazing bubble tea experience at Bubble Up Boutique Bubble! The owner made some fantastic recommendations, and every sip was delightful. If you’re a bubble tea lover, this place is a must-visit. 🍹✨

#BubbleTeaLover #Durbanville #HiddenGems #BubbleUpBoutiqueBubble

Name: Bubble Up Boutique Bubble Tea
Address: 3 Pampoenkraal Ln, Durbanville, Cape Town
Author: Rakkooni USA
Review: Calling all geeks, nerds, weebs, muggles and even everyone in between! This is the pit stop for you! The selection of bubble tea is HUGE! I love their caffeine-free rooibos options. They have all the classics as well as the ability to mix all kinds of exotic varieties. Talk about a hole in the wall! I have to go here every time I am remotely near the area, lol. Amazing quality!

Name: Bubble Up Boutique Bubble Tea
Address: 3 Pampoenkraal Ln, Durbanville, Cape Town
Author: Lisa Roberts
Review: A favourite after-school treat! Lovely staff and super owner. Taro and tapioca bubble tea is amazing 🧋💜

Name: Bubble Up Boutique Bubble Tea
Address: 3 Pampoenkraal Ln, Durbanville, Cape Town
Author: Donald Stockhall
Review:
Great little place with friendly staff.
Just a note to the owners to consider, if you open at 09:00 for business on a Monday, then ensure you have all your ingredients ready for people arriving at 09:00 to order.
Last week we couldn’t get what we came for because the tapioca wasn’t cooked yet.
Today we arrived at 14:00 and again couldn’t get what we came for because there was no tapioca available. It’s really disappointing.
They still get five stars because their product is really good and they really are super friendly. Go give them a try.

Name: Bubble Up Boutique Bubble Tea
Address: 3 Pampoenkraal Ln, Durbanville, Cape Town
Author: Lizelle De Bruin
Review: The bubble tea was delicious as a treat. I had Rooibos with Blood orange and Turkish delight

Name: Kings bubbletea
Address: Unit 2C, Falcon Crest, Tyger waterfront, Tyger Falls Blvd, Bellville, Cape Town
Author: Stephan Maritz
Review:
We ordered a chocolate and a match bubble tea, and flavours were perfect.

Many of the menu items weren't available, and drinks weren't cooled but that's what loadshedding is doing to businesses.

I'll be back again for sure!

Name: Kings bubbletea
Address: Unit 2C, Falcon Crest, Tyger waterfront, Tyger Falls Blvd, Bellville, Cape Town
Author: Chantel Mlilwana
Review:
I love the way you listen to my kids and exceptional 💕.!!!!!
You guys really know your customers

Name: Kings bubbletea
Address: Unit 2C, Falcon Crest, Tyger waterfront, Tyger Falls Blvd, Bellville, Cape Town
Author: That _weirdio
Review: We ordered a mango and peach blast and they were amazing. Cold, refreshing and the bobba added a great texture. The services was kind and answered all my stupid questions. I loved this restaurant and I would go again

Name: Kings bubbletea
Address: Unit 2C, Falcon Crest, Tyger waterfront, Tyger Falls Blvd, Bellville, Cape Town
Author: Anpan
Review:
Huge sizes, taste amazing
Best taro milk tea ever tasted🤞🏻

Name: Kings bubbletea
Address: Unit 2C, Falcon Crest, Tyger waterfront, Tyger Falls Blvd, Bellville, Cape Town
Author: Elzaan Liebenberg
Review: Been there on 4 different occasions and always closed

Name: Peacock Tea and Coffee
Address: Shop 123, Canal Walk, Century Place Blvd, Century City, Cape Town
Author: Zuhair Kader
Review: Awesome service, store and coffee. Couldn't have asked for better. So very helpful. Went the extra mile. Please please keep it up and don't change. Humble down to earth staff. Excellent coffees and teas. Even grind the coffee at no charge.

Name: Peacock Tea and Coffee
Address: Shop 123, Canal Walk, Century Place Blvd, Century City, Cape Town
Author: Trey Poulie
Review:
I love that whenever you enter the store you get service with a smile.

They have a large variety of teas and coffees which are very affordable.

Also the beautiful cups, kettles etc are worth the visit and the cake slices are amazingly good.

A must see each time I visit canal walk.

The lady she is wonderfully sweet and  gives you walk through of everything without sounding annoyed.

Name: Peacock Tea and Coffee
Address: Shop 123, Canal Walk, Century Place Blvd, Century City, Cape Town
Author: Louise van Wyk
Review: Very good quality selection of teas and coffees. I always buy my Darjeerling and Assam loose leaf tea from them, and always receive great service. Today I also purchased Aeropress coffee filters at the best price in the market. Friendly and competent staff.

Name: Peacock Tea and Coffee
Address: Shop 123, Canal Walk, Century Place Blvd, Century City, Cape Town
Author: eman awad
Review: My favorite place to Drink and buy my yummy Coffee ☕

Name: Peacock Tea and Coffee
Address: Shop 123, Canal Walk, Century Place Blvd, Century City, Cape Town
Author: Charis Joy Abrahams
Review: Always friendly, helpful staff who you can build relationship with and remember you whenever you return. Very pleasant experience whenever we get our beans from them and they are so friendly towards our little ones too. Beans are well priced and great tasting. They KNOW what their talking about. They can grind the beans for you if you need. Overall always a joy to visit and worth the trip.

Name: Dilmah Tea South Africa
Address: 3 Engine Ave, Montague Gardens, Cape Town
Author: Gihansa Galhenage
Review:
Hi there! I'm a UCT fine arts student and I'm trying to collect as many "Ceylon" tea boxes as I can as I am pursuing a project that is focusing on tea and identity (as a Sri Lankan person). I need to collect used tea boxes (and ONLY the box) for a large scale installation and was wondering if you can help me out. Is there any way that defeated boxes can be provided to me? Or old boxes that are thrown away into recycling? Please do assist me in any way you can.
Thank you!

Name: Dilmah Tea South Africa
Address: 3 Engine Ave, Montague Gardens, Cape Town
Author: Shivani Singh
Review: Ordered online and received my items two days later (in Jhb) and everything was in perfect order... Even my glass mugs were perfect. High quality tea, excellent service. Five stars!

Name: Dilmah Tea South Africa
Address: 3 Engine Ave, Montague Gardens, Cape Town
Author: Crystal Gaybba
Review: Best tea out there! Wide range of luxury ethically sourced tea at great prices. Friendly, helpful staff willing to go the extra mile. My only source of a good cuppa ☕️ support local ❤️

Name: Dilmah Tea South Africa
Address: 3 Engine Ave, Montague Gardens, Cape Town
Author: Martin Mössmer
Review:
Best tea, sadly no longer available in supermarkets. BUT if you order online they deliver, plus there is a bigger range available now than ever before.
This company is speedy, reliable and friendly.

Name: Dilmah Tea South Africa
Address: 3 Engine Ave, Montague Gardens, Cape Town
Author: Colleen Mclintock
Review: Placed an order on the 22nd December, no feedback sent until I followed up, I do understand there are holidays but the delay seems excessive. Orders from takelot still arriving the next day.

Name: Chai Tea Room
Address: Shop 28 at Eden on the bay shopping cntr Cnr Otto Du Plessis, Sir David Baird Dr, Bloubergstrand, Cape Town
Author: Ilse Van Der Poel
Review: Absolutely delightful little place.. A variety of teas and coffee as well as baked delicacies. The staff is nothing but beautiful friendly demeanor, etiquette is lovely, customer care and witty to say the least. Super relaxing atmosphere.. Definitely worth having a lovely cup of something 🙂

Name: Chai Tea Room
Address: Shop 28 at Eden on the bay shopping cntr Cnr Otto Du Plessis, Sir David Baird Dr, Bloubergstrand, Cape Town
Author: Aasiyah Chafekar
Review: Loved the service, and the cakes. Ordered a muffin with my coffee. Friend had the cheesecake with the hibiscus green tea.

Name: Chai Tea Room
Address: Shop 28 at Eden on the bay shopping cntr Cnr Otto Du Plessis, Sir David Baird Dr, Bloubergstrand, Cape Town
Author: Stacy Vermuelan
Review: Ordered 2 take away brownies a hot chocolate and a lemon meringue. Brownies were absolutely delicious but would definitely recommend someone checks the lemon meringue. It was extremely lemony and was not pleasant at all. Overall lovely service!

Name: Chai Tea Room
Address: Shop 28 at Eden on the bay shopping cntr Cnr Otto Du Plessis, Sir David Baird Dr, Bloubergstrand, Cape Town
Author: Luke Duffield
Review:
Disappointing. I stopped in on Sunday around 2pm and ordered a double Bells on the rocks. The waiter only informed me when it came time to pay that the price on the menu had gone up just over 60%.
It's unprofessional. Wait staff should inform customers of any price change on the menu upon ordering. I will not be going back.

Name: Chai Tea Room
Address: Shop 28 at Eden on the bay shopping cntr Cnr Otto Du Plessis, Sir David Baird Dr, Bloubergstrand, Cape Town
Author: Andrea P
Review:
BEST & MOST BEAUTIFUL TEA ROOM! & yes they make great coffee too.
The most delicious treats and croissants. You are in good hands!

Name: Enmasse Espresso & Tea Merchants
Address: V&A Waterfront, Shop 6, The Watershed, 17 Dock Rd, Cape Town
Author: David Ding
Review: Good offerings and explanation. While I drank many different types of tea, roobois isn't my type, but the shop presented a variety of ways for me to understand it. Biology, taste, texture, samples, you name it. Good setup, education, and description wins this rating.

Name: Enmasse Espresso & Tea Merchants
Address: V&A Waterfront, Shop 6, The Watershed, 17 Dock Rd, Cape Town
Author: benaya simeon
Review: Amazing tea collection, and the staff also super helpful to explain every single tea variant, glad to get tea here.

Name: Enmasse Espresso & Tea Merchants
Address: V&A Waterfront, Shop 6, The Watershed, 17 Dock Rd, Cape Town
Author: Zintle Mlomo
Review: In the hustle and bustle of v&a, I enjoyed a very relaxing jasmin queen tea. There are also interesting tea mixtures available for sale and I took home the pinotage rooibos tea, which I absolutely enjoy. Will return to try out their other flavours. Would recommend to tea lovers.

Name: Enmasse Espresso & Tea Merchants
Address: V&A Waterfront, Shop 6, The Watershed, 17 Dock Rd, Cape Town
Author: J MS (Celestine TLS)
Review: Stopped for a couple of flat whites whilst walking through the V&A shed. Tea looked amazing but the coffee was a bit meh. Lovely service but I’d go for tea over coffee in the future.

Name: Enmasse Espresso & Tea Merchants
Address: V&A Waterfront, Shop 6, The Watershed, 17 Dock Rd, Cape Town
Author: Justin Boober
Review: Hours are wrong/ closing early, doesn't accept amex, won't make a sandwich,, sell me me spicy teas with no rooibos. Your  smile is nice you're too good to work at this tea company. Get a job selling expensive clothes or make up

Name: Jua Na Mlima Tea Company
Address: Chichester Rd, Claremont, Cape Town
Author: rachel van der westhuizen
Review: This tea is amazing. I am 70 yrs old. With age comes aches and pains as well as highblood pressure. I am using this tea for the past 6 months. My blood pressure has regulated, I could not climb the stairs without pain in my knees, that is gone and it curbs your appetite. I lost 9 kg.

Name: Jua Na Mlima Tea Company
Address: Chichester Rd, Claremont, Cape Town
Author: Allison Mokadam
Review: My mom of 70 has had the most amazing results, she’s lost 9 legs over the past 6 months, her blood pressure has stabilised and her knee pain has decreased significantly. We make sure to keep enough tea so that we don’t run out ☺️

Name: Jua Na Mlima Tea Company
Address: Chichester Rd, Claremont, Cape Town
Author: Ntando Mhlongo
Review: My name is Lydia I got my parcel for the purple tea starting my journey and I'm.excited will put my progress soon

Name: Jua Na Mlima Tea Company
Address: Chichester Rd, Claremont, Cape Town
Author: Jillian Fisher
Review: Since drinking this tea I have seen the improvement in my post covid symptoms. I not only have more energy, I am also able to have a good night's sleep as well. I am so grateful that I was introduced this amazing product.

Name: Jua Na Mlima Tea Company
Address: Chichester Rd, Claremont, Cape Town
Author: Melissa Appolis
Review: Presently surprised with this tea, I love the health benefits of this product. The tea is actually purple which is amazing. Friendly and healthy staff!

Name: Bobalogy
Address: 105 Kromboom Rd, Rondebosch East, Cape Town
Author: Shakira Ontong
Review: Not what I was expecting. The area is a bit dodge and the interior needs a bit of work. Great place for young people to get together to enjoy hooka and milkshakes. Otherwise, the food was delicious, we had the steak pizza(a bit spicy) and chicken Tikka masala. Portions were enough for two people to share if you are not that hungry and prices are reasonable. Will definitely go back again but will sit at the non smoking section(didn't know about it until we left) next time as the smoke was a bit too much for me...

Name: Bobalogy
Address: 105 Kromboom Rd, Rondebosch East, Cape Town
Author: Taufeeq Laattoe
Review: Prior to Covid I frequented Arabian nights weekly , however now not often at all . Decided to visit for a pipe and milkshake and it was not disappointing at all. For me they still have the best pipes always smoking so smooth . Their milkshakes are still top notch . Was great to be back for a chill session with friends .

Name: Bobalogy
Address: 105 Kromboom Rd, Rondebosch East, Cape Town
Author: Shaheeda Crombie
Review: From what I could see it looks like a typical shisha spot. You pay for your hookah. they have a menu. my daughter had her 18th birthday there but I didnt stay. just checked the place out and left. by 1st glance it looked pretty decent.

Name: Bobalogy
Address: 105 Kromboom Rd, Rondebosch East, Cape Town
Author: Mogamat Razien Boyes
Review: Boba Pearls are nice and sweet. Great texture and quality. I had the bar one flavour. Flavour is good. I enjoyed my boba tea. I will definitely recommend! Its better than driving all the way to Canal walk or Kenilworth. The random printed cartoon characters on the lid is a good gesture. Support Local 😀

Name: Bobalogy
Address: 105 Kromboom Rd, Rondebosch East, Cape Town
Author: Noel Adams
Review: Place was nice and cosy. The place does need some TLC renovations though but was a lovely experience. Food was Devine and hooka pipes was not bad, had a broad range of flavours I never even knew existed.

Name: SUSU Bubble Tea Canal Walk
Address: Shop 407A, Century Blvd, Milnerton, Cape Town
Author: Sultan
Review: A kiosk located inside of Sports Scene store in Canal Walk. A variety of items on the menu and the staff was eager to assist with recommendations. The original thai milk with brown sugar boba was delicious.

Name: SUSU Bubble Tea Canal Walk
Address: Shop 407A, Century Blvd, Milnerton, Cape Town
Author: Fazlyn Petersen
Review: My kids have been nagging for bubble tea so I finally went to get some. The shop is inside Sportscene. The staff were friendly and polite. The caramel milk tea was very sweet though. If you order on Uber eats you can select how much sugar. Next time I'll ask them to make it 50%. My daughter enjoyed her chocolate slushie.

Name: SUSU Bubble Tea Canal Walk
Address: Shop 407A, Century Blvd, Milnerton, Cape Town
Author: Jenny D
Review: Last time I was here, was told they don't do fresh milk latte. But it was quickly corrected.  This time they tell me they don't have fresh milk in stock, while we are in a mall with 4 grocery stores who sells milk, there's milk j  the fridge in store! I don't want to drink that palm oil podwer, so I guess I'm not ever coming back here

Name: SUSU Bubble Tea Canal Walk
Address: Shop 407A, Century Blvd, Milnerton, Cape Town
Author: Melissa Naidoo
Review:
Strangest location. It’s inside Sportscene but that have really good bubble tea and such a nice variety

I had the green apple tea with mango balls which was supper yummy. The passion fruit ice tea with mango balls was my favorite. I am yet to try their milk tea selection.

The staff is friendly and the service is fast.

Name: SUSU Bubble Tea Canal Walk
Address: Shop 407A, Century Blvd, Milnerton, Cape Town
Author: Siobhan
Review:
MoMo is located inside Sportscene it is not a standalone store.

They seem to be quite popular as there was a large group of people waiting for their orders when I got there, and I waited around 15-20 minutes for my order. But it was definitely worth the wait.
You need to have a rough idea of what it is that you would like to order, as the guy who takes your order is not very friendly or helpful. Even after expressing that it was my first time visiting the store.

It would also be great if they had pictures on their menu, it would make the ordering process so much easier.

All in all, still worth it. The bubble tea was great, I ordered two different flavours (a milky tea and a fruity one) and I thoroughly enjoyed both.

Name: Peacock Tea and Coffee - Blue Route Mall
Address: 16 Tokai Rd, Dreyersdal, Cape Town
Author: Richard Morris
Review: Not only does this shop serve the most amazing house brand coffee of the day, but the selection of coffee and tea related products and accessories are impressive. I enjoy sitting in the outdoor seating when i visit the mall every 2nd weekend or so. In all honesty the shop would not be the same without the charismatic two shop assistants 'Babes and Felicia. Keep up the excellent work.

Name: Peacock Tea and Coffee - Blue Route Mall
Address: 16 Tokai Rd, Dreyersdal, Cape Town
Author: Izelke Gebhardt
Review:
Love coffee ☕️ and that fresh pressed roast smell ?
Then go and visit Peacock Tea and Coffee. Sit down for a variety of coffee ☕️ , tea 🍵 , cakes 🍰, tarts 🧁, biscuits, sweet muffins, pies, and quiches. Teapots, coffee plungers, grounded tea and ground coffee, and tea brews are also available for purchase.
The staff that work here are friendly and kind.
I go to the mall to shop and always pass by for a takeaway coffee on my way home. It is a must!

Name: Peacock Tea and Coffee - Blue Route Mall
Address: 16 Tokai Rd, Dreyersdal, Cape Town
Author: Roeshana Achmat-Hoosain
Review:
Impeccable service by Larney today. Just had a quick snack but due to Larney's amazing service we actually went from take-away to sit down service.

Will definitely be returning for more.

Name: Peacock Tea and Coffee - Blue Route Mall
Address: 16 Tokai Rd, Dreyersdal, Cape Town
Author: Shaun Deysel
Review:
Absolutely amazing experience! The staff are INCREDIBLY friendly and always put a smile on my face so early in the morning!

Very affordable coffee/food as well

:)

Name: Peacock Tea and Coffee - Blue Route Mall
Address: 16 Tokai Rd, Dreyersdal, Cape Town
Author: John Hardie
Review: What a delightful reception by the friendly staff at this institution! Their kindness really made my day! The best Earl Grey tea in town.

Name: Peacock Tea and Coffee - N1 City
Address: Shop 91, N1 City Mall, Louwtjie Rothman St, Goodwood, Cape Town
Author: Tasneem Patrick
Review: Still the best place to grab some decent priced cake. They have a cake and coffee special for R55. We couldn't finish the cake. Generous cake portions, good coffee.

Name: Peacock Tea and Coffee - N1 City
Address: Shop 91, N1 City Mall, Louwtjie Rothman St, Goodwood, Cape Town
Author: Lise Yzelle
Review: Terrible experience. Unfriendly staff. I asked 3 times for red chai and received a normal chai. Special on board not in stock.

Name: Peacock Tea and Coffee - N1 City
Address: Shop 91, N1 City Mall, Louwtjie Rothman St, Goodwood, Cape Town
Author: Shailen Naidoo
Review: Great store, lovely vibe if you want to get away from all the snobby people at places like Bootlegger. They have a nice quiche, and there  cakes are great!

Name: Peacock Tea and Coffee - N1 City
Address: Shop 91, N1 City Mall, Louwtjie Rothman St, Goodwood, Cape Town
Author: J Jacobs
Review: Cake and tea was good but the staff is very unfriendly and unhelpful. Would have liked to order more tea but no service. A customer, after standing around awhile walked out while saying "no service". The attitude is as if they doing you a favour. Disappointed

Name: Peacock Tea and Coffee - N1 City
Address: Shop 91, N1 City Mall, Louwtjie Rothman St, Goodwood, Cape Town
Author: Nikita Hayward
Review:
This shop has lovely teas and coffees to try out, but unfortunately,  their staff's helpfulness and friendliness is not on par.

On my recent visit I dealt with the manager through ordering a gift. She mentioned that they had my gift in stock, but she can't find the box for it.

She asked for my contact details, which I have written down in their note pad, and she said that she'll make contact with me once they receive new stock. I haven't received any contact from her and the gift was close to due date so I decided to phone her.

She made an excuse that she lost my contact details, but they have received stock. I went to the store on that same day and the manager didn't want to look me in the eye or even apologize for losing my number.

Name: Ben's Bubble Tea Kenilworth Centre
Address: Kenilworth Centre, Kenilworth, Cape Town
Author: Sultan
Review: Kiosk located towards the entrance of the mall.  A variety of items on the menu and the staff were eager to assist with recommendations. The original thai milk with brown sugar boba was delicious.

Name: Ben's Bubble Tea Kenilworth Centre
Address: Kenilworth Centre, Kenilworth, Cape Town
Author: Liv G
Review:
This was our first experience with the Ben's Bubble Tea brand and it was incredibly disappointing.

The staff seemed annoyed that we were there (around 5 PM, so nowhere near closing) and didn't greet. While my group of 4 looked at the menu and I'd informed the person that took eventually took our order that we were still deciding (we were the only customers) she kept pressing to take the order leaving us feeling rushed and pressured.

We placed our orders for 4 of the flavours and received warmer than room temperature beverages (the milk had been left on the counter) that were more akin to a warm drinks that had gotten cold as opposed to something pleasant and refreshing.

The beverage topped with caramelised sugar had a melted cup that leaked from the moment it was handed to us. The server could have opted to tell us this but said nothing, and this resulted in a significant portion spilling out of the cup before we'd even reached the parking lot.

From the shoddy service, a melted plastic cup and drinks served at an unappetising temperature, this wasn't the experience we were hoping for at all.

Name: Ben's Bubble Tea Kenilworth Centre
Address: Kenilworth Centre, Kenilworth, Cape Town
Author: Naeemah
Review:
This is my favourite bubble tea store! The fruity drinks are so refreshing and the brown sugar bliss is perfectly sweet and decadent.

The staff is incredibly friendly and it's always such a pleasure seeing them. They are attentive to taking my order, patient with explaining the different drinks and prepares my order perfectly.

Thank you to the KC staff for always providing great service :) See you very soon!

Name: Ben's Bubble Tea Kenilworth Centre
Address: Kenilworth Centre, Kenilworth, Cape Town
Author: Sian
Review: Amazing bubble tea and mochi!!🧋😍 my fave is the Brown Sugar Bliss (25%) and the Taro mochi! I order often from UberEats or go there when I'm in KC and it always tastes great!

Name: Ben's Bubble Tea Kenilworth Centre
Address: Kenilworth Centre, Kenilworth, Cape Town
Author: Ayesha Patel
Review: The 1st time we tried bens bubble tea the experience was great . And the other times as well. The reason for my 3 stars is one of your staff. She really needs training. My 2 girls bought them boba(11, 6) mind you they always buy themselves at other boba stores and don't get ignored like they got from your staff. They waited for there drinks until my husband realized 2 other customers got there drinks and my babies still standing there waiting on there drinks  they other one comes with a attitude making there drinks... On another occasion we went and the same cashier blatantly ignored us. We walked away then she looks at us. I'll attach a picture of the same lady with and extreme bad attitude. I won't ever visit this koisk again.

Name: Ben's Bubble Tea
Address: Arum Rd, Table View, Cape Town
Author: Cindy D. Calvert

Name: Peacock Tea and Coffee
Address: Fountain Centre,, Main Rd, Rondebosch, Cape Town
Author: Rochelle Strauss
Review: I went to this store to buy the snack trays.  Lovely store and wonderful service from the sales lady.  She was friendly and helpful. The shop is filled with gorgeous tea pots, cups etc.  A really nice place to buy beautiful gifts and a good selection of coffees and teas. ☕ Their English Breakfast tea is really good.

Name: Peacock Tea and Coffee
Address: Fountain Centre,, Main Rd, Rondebosch, Cape Town
Author: Stephanie Smith
Review: I recently bought a Mellerware automatic coffee maker from here because I expected they would carry quality products. The coffee it produced was lukewarm and the heating plate didn’t work to keep coffee warm. I took it back and they said they could find nothing wrong with the machine and refused to return, exchange, or give me store credit. They said I’d have to take it up with Mellerware, but Mellerware told me they don’t handle issues in products that are less than a year old. Overall, a lot of frustration, plus wasted time and money.

Name: Peacock Tea and Coffee
Address: Fountain Centre,, Main Rd, Rondebosch, Cape Town
Author: Lindsay Moses
Review: The woman who works there is absolutely horrid. Went in to get some coffee and wanted a new teapot. When I asked to inquire about any of the teapots she would not tell me and would instead just repeat that it was expensive, insinuating I could not afford them. I will never go back. Terrible store, and terrible service. Take your money elsewhere.

Name: Peacock Tea and Coffee
Address: Fountain Centre,, Main Rd, Rondebosch, Cape Town
Author: Ian Pells
Review: Super helpful and friendly lady works here always willing to share advice and good vibes. This is a good spot to pick up a gift as there are loads of desirable useful and aesthtically pleasing things for sale. Needless to say there is a lot of good fresh coffee and tea for sale too. Recommended.

Name: Peacock Tea and Coffee
Address: Fountain Centre,, Main Rd, Rondebosch, Cape Town
Author: Richard Cochrane
Review: Peacock had a great range in coffees, teas and accessories for your every need. Prices are reasonable and the staff are helpful. You can also get tea and coffee made there.  If you need freshly ground coffee, they're also willing to ground up some beans of your choice to the quantity that you want.

Name: Peacock
Address: Shop 80B, Otto du Plessis Dr, Table View, Cape Town
Author: Yolanda Thezaphi
Review:
This cute little coffee shop had the best cappuccino ever, I paired it up with pie.

The ladies there were so friendly and welcoming. The service was excellent

Name: Peacock
Address: Shop 80B, Otto du Plessis Dr, Table View, Cape Town
Author: Rick Rohan
Review: They have a good selection of coffees and teas. I found the  coffee prices quite reasonable. Their tea selection is massive. The coffee is freshly ground as per your requirement (Plunger, machine etc). Friendly and helpful staff.

Name: Peacock
Address: Shop 80B, Otto du Plessis Dr, Table View, Cape Town
Author: Cindy D. Calvert
Review: Lovely Teas and Coffee. Relaxed vibe. Intimate coffee shop to meet with a friend for a chat.

Name: Peacock
Address: Shop 80B, Otto du Plessis Dr, Table View, Cape Town
Author: lisa zinyana
Review: Best coffee but my main start are the pies 🥰 I’ve never had such a fresh pie. This is my new favourite spot.

Name: Peacock
